C: 「██年██月██日  天气：非常好  心情：非常不好」 「今天，我打破了老巫婆的一个  式管  试官  试管，被批评了一顿。」 「老巫婆好凶！她总是不让我们中午一起玩，只能睡午觉，太讨厌了！」 「我们应该反抗她的  抱正   抱政  饱政  暴政！不能让她 为为所所   为所为欲  为所欲为！」 「我要成立一个『鼹鼠党』，把诊所里的小朋友全都  抓   逮捕   要请  邀请进来！一起反抗那个老巫婆！然后，我们就一起吃好吃的、玩好玩的，没有人可以阻止我们！」 「我就是这个鼹鼠党的老大！还有，是诊所的老大！我要每天狠狠批评老巫婆，还要让她每天做  清务   家洁  清洁！哈哈哈哈哈！」
E: "██/██/██ Weather: Fine Mood: Very bad" "Today, I broke one of the old witch's Tesh Stubes Tech Tubes Test Tubes, and got chewed out." "The old witch is terrible! She never lets us play together during lunch, and only lets us take a nap. I hate her!" "We should rebel against her tarany— terrany— tarreny— tyranny! We can't let her get away— gator way— get her way!" "I'm gonna make a gang called 'The Moles', and grab kidnap envit invite all the kids from the clinic! We'll take down the old witch together! And then, we can eat whatever we want and have fun — and nobody can stop us!" "And I'll be the boss of The Moles! And the boss of the whole clinic, too! I'll give that old witch a nice talking-to every day, and make her do all of the choars choors chores! Muahaha!"

C: 「戴斯特，这份简历你看过了吗？」 「您说的是哪…噢，是她啊——这位刚刚在市场调研小组结束了实习，还引起了不小的轰动——呃，褒义的那种。」 「居然已经过了实习期了？唔……」 「哪里不对吗，德比斯基先生？」 「没什么，只是好奇，毕竟她的入职年龄也算是突破部门下限了…何况这姑娘的履历还这么惊人。我看看…嚯，签的居然还是『终身合同』？真没想到，那么落魄的星球上还能捡到这种人才……」 「我已经和业务同事核实过了，简历上的信息全部属实。而且，她甚至没把当时的入职测试结果写进去——听说她在精算、微经宏经、星际金融、管理学等学科测试上全都拿到了高分，甚至连体测也接近满分。她唯一没有及格的项目是……」 「嗯？是什么？」 「…是商务礼仪，她直接翘掉了那门测试。『我最讨厌的就是形式主义』——据说她当时是那么说的。」
E: "Destor, have you seen this resume?" "Which one do you... Oh, it's her — She just finished her internship at the marketing research team, and made quite a stir there — Ah, in a good way." "She's already finished the internship? Ah..." "Is there something wrong, Mr. Dvorski?" "Nothing. Just curious. After all, the age at which she started her career is the youngest recorded in this department... Besides, her resume is so stunning. Let me see... Oh! She even signed a "lifelong contract"? I didn't expect us to pick up a talent like this from such a despondent planet..." "I've already checked with our colleagues. Everything in her resume is true. She didn't even write her employment exam results in — Apparently she got a high mark in actuarial sciences, micro- and macroeconomics, intergalactic finances, and management sciences. Even her physical exam was nearly perfect. The only topic she failed was..." "Hmm? What was it?" "... It's business etiquette. She didn't even turn up for that test. 'I absolutely hate formalism' — apparently that's what she said."

C: 仙舟「罗浮」天舶司的主司，性情温和，处事老练。 \n年轻时作为飞行士久历战阵，以优秀的战绩成为主司，却因一场惨烈的战争不再飞翔天际。 \n如今虽已褪去锋芒，专心操持公务，但「罗浮」的航向上始终有她的身影。
E: The Xianzhou Luofu's Head of the Sky-Faring Commission is gentle, yet seasoned and authoritative.\nHaving been a pilot since young, she had become the commission's head with her outstanding combat achievements, yet she no longer flies due to a particularly brutal battle.\nNow, her shine had already dimmed as she shifted her focus to official duties, but she is always seen guiding the course of the Luofu.

C: 如是百年悄然逝去，战事再起，卜官符玄领命演算不休。丰饶民大军三度成形，突袭方壶仙舟。玉阙、罗浮同方壶仙舟相去不远，驰援责无旁贷。卜算结果显示，若倾全力迎击，任何参战的仙舟军队都将迎来惨烈的败局——但坚持守势，将会有转圜的余地。 但卦象并未显示转圜之机在何处。符玄反复推演，再三占算，穷观阵输出的结果依旧毫无变化。 「没有人会选择失败。」卜者能做到的，都在这里了。符玄将利害剖陈纸上，把卜算结果上呈神策府。毫无意外，帝弓天将合议的结果，侵逼方壶的丰饶联军兵力庞大，绝不能单纯采取守势。罗浮与玉阙云骑军必须迎战，为曜青部队争取赶来的时机。 那一日符玄隔着投影沙盘，见证了联盟援军的溃败。步离人不仅带来了遮天蔽日的舰队与器兽，更将古老传说中的活体星宿「计都蜃楼」召来。这邪物坠向方壶，即将为其上所有的生命带来灭顶之灾，再现苍城仙舟覆灭的惨剧。而人们只能眼睁睁见证它的降临。 卜者能做到的，真的只有如此吗？在焦灼与愤怒中，符玄心中升起一个极其大胆的念头。「我要见景元将军！」 在面见将军后，少女说出了她的想法。以云骑眼下的力量，想要取胜已不可能。唯一的转机，是令帝弓垂迹示现。 出乎她预料的，在说出这堪称亵渎和荒谬的念头后，眼前这位略显疲惫的将军并未露出任何嗤笑的神情，而是点了点头。「你想怎么做？」 「玉阙仙舟拥有联盟中观星的第一重器，瞰云镜。这座装置不仅能用来观察，它也可以向外发射讯息…我的意思是，用天艟将瞰云镜运往方壶，向帝弓光矢最后的所在处求救。争分夺秒的话，在那颗星星落下前，一切还有转圜的余地。」 「你很清楚…帝弓降世临凡的唯一征兆和可能带来的后果，对吧？」 「是的。作为方案的提出者，我愿意亲临战场，执行此事。」少女神色严肃，她十分明白自己提出的想法有多惊世骇俗。 「多谢你的建言。只是，危机之刻应当由六御勠力赴难。何况，你并无权限操作那器物。若事情因此失控，我作为进言呈辞者，会担负全部的后果，希望符小姐不必多虑。」 望着将军离去的背影，符玄突然回过神来，意识到「六御勠力赴难」的意义所在：能全权使用瞰云镜，乃至以辨读帝弓诰谕的方式发出讯号的人—— 唯有玉阙太卜本人。 …… 「这就是你寻求『眼界』的初衷？我读到了你的那些梦……」 少女没有睁开双眼，却能看见周遭的世界由烟雾凝成实体，所有可能性褪去，只剩下清晰无误的唯一选择。 「那些不是梦，那是我的过去，塑造了我的一切。」 「而他说的没错，其实命运从来只有一条道路。」
E: Centuries passed thus, and the flames of war descended again. Diviner Fu Xuan calculated ceaselessly at her job. The grand armies of the Denizens of Abundance formed for the third time and launched a surprise attack on the Xianzhou Fanghu. The Yuque and the Luofu were close to the Fanghu, and it was their duty to give assistance. The divination revealed that all Xianzhou armies will meet a devastating defeat if they choose to face the assault head-on — however, should they keep up a defense, then there will be a chance to change the tides of battle. What a pity that the hexagram did not reveal how this chance will come about! Fu Xuan calculated and divined over and over again, yet the results given by the Matrix of Prescience never changed. "No one will choose defeat." This was the limit of a diviner's capacities. Fu Xuan outlined the pros and cons in writing and submitted the divination results to the Seat of Divine Foresight. However, as she expected, the outcome of the meeting between the Arbiter-Generals concluded that they must not take on a defensive position, not when such overwhelming numbers of the Abundance Axis were assaulting the Fanghu. The Cloud Knights of the Luofu and the Yuque must rise to face the enemy, buying time before the Yaoqing's army can arrive. On that day, Fu Xuan bore witness through the Projection Sandpit to the Alliance's army being decimated. Not only did the borisin bring fleets and mechabeasts numerous enough to block out the sky, they even summoned the incarnosphere Ketu Mirage from ancient legends. This evil gravitated toward the Fanghu, hellbent on bringing annihilation to all lives onboard, recreating the tragedy of the fall of the Xianzhou Cangcheng. And the only thing people could do was watch as it neared. Was this truly the limit of a diviner's capacities!? A bold idea surfaced in Fu Xuan's mind as she drowned in anxiety and anger. "I must see General Jing Yuan!" The girl spoke her thoughts when brought face-to-face with the general. It was no longer possible to obtain victory with the forces available to the Cloud Knights. The only chance of victory lies in making the Reignbow manifest themselves. She was not expecting the tired-looking man before her to simply nod after hearing her absurd and borderline blasphemous idea. The general did not even show any hints of ridicule. "How would you want to do it?" "The Xianzhou Yuque holds the Cloudpeer Telescope, the ultimate astronomical observation device in the Alliance. Not only can it scry into the distance, it can also be used to send out information... I plan to ship the Cloudpeer Telescope to the Fanghu using a Navis Astriger, and send out an SOS signal to the last observed location of the Reignbow's Lux Arrow. If we hurry, we still have a chance to turn everything around before that living planet falls." "I trust that you are... well aware of the singular sign of the Reignbow's descent onto the physical plane and its consequences, correct?" "Yes. As the person who voiced this plan, I am willing to be on the front lines and execute it." The girl's expression was solemn. She was keenly aware of how unorthodox her idea was. "I thank you for your words, but the Six Charioteers should work together to combat such a great crisis. Moreover, you do not have the permission to manipulate that device. Should this plan go awry, I will take all responsibility as the one who made the suggestion. Do not trouble yourself over this, Miss Fu." As Fu Xuan watched the general's retreating figure, she suddenly realized what he meant by "the Six Charioteers should work together" — the only person who has the permission to use the Cloudpeer Telescope and can send out a signal in the format of the Reignbow's decree... ...was none other than the Yuque's Master Diviner. ... "Is this why you seek "The Eye"? I saw your dreams..." The girl did not open her eyes, yet she could already see the world around her condense into solid form from nebulous mist, see all possibilities fade and leave behind the solitary, absolute, and faultless "choice." "Those are not dreams. They are my past. They made me who I am." "And he was right all this time. There is only ever one path in destiny."

C: 直率而自我的博识学会学者，常以奇怪的石膏头雕遮蔽面容。\n自幼便展露出过人的才智，如今却以「庸人」自居。\n坚信智慧与创造力并不为天才独有，致力于向全宇宙传播知识，医治名为愚钝的顽疾。
E: A candid and self-assured Intelligentsia Guild member, who often conceals his appearance with a strange plaster sculpture.\nHe demonstrated unparalleled intelligence and talent since his youth, but now refers to himself as a "Mundanite."\nFirmly believing that intellect and creativity are not confined to geniuses, he seeks to distribute knowledge to the entire universe to cure the persistent disease named ignorance.

C: 许多人认为拉帝奥加入博识学会后，会一改从前的锋芒，以适应学会讲求实际、平和朴实的学术环境。但笔者不得不说，拉帝奥还是那个拉帝奥。以下是笔者节录的内部记录原文：  「 答辩人：维里塔斯•拉帝奥 题目：逻辑知识论 委员会主席：罗塞思 记录人：莫里微 答辩实录： 罗塞思：『拉帝奥先生，您的论文十分精彩，感谢您的讲解。现在，有请听众提问。』 现场一片沉寂。 罗塞思：『那…拉帝奥先生，我先来吧。』 罗塞思：『我非常赞成你的主要观点，但对其中一个细节，我依然有些不解。』 维里塔斯•拉帝奥：『每次别人赞同我的时候，我都觉得自己一定错了。』 罗塞思：『我的问题是，为何您会认为知识是一种特权？』 维里塔斯•拉帝奥：『尊敬的罗塞思教授，您问出这样的问题，就代表您根本没有读懂我的论文，也并不理解我运用的推导方法。』 维里塔斯•拉帝奥：『但若要简单回答，您倒是提供了一个现成的例子。您无法理解我的观点，正恰恰说明知识并非人人都能享有。』 维里塔斯•拉帝奥：『倘若愚钝是一种顽疾，学者的职责便是将其根除，医治宇宙。』 维里塔斯•拉帝奥走向讲台，面向众人：『所以诸位，对他人的愚蠢视而不见，并非礼仪，而是一种缺德的世故。若要传播知识，必先让人理解自身的愚蠢。当然，学会的学者对自己也应当一视同仁。』 罗塞思耸肩苦笑。 …… 维里塔斯•拉帝奥在一片哗然中退场。 答辩评语：激情的手握住冰冷的剑，这或许是对维里塔斯•拉帝奥先生最形象的评语。维里塔斯•拉帝奥将逻辑、狂热与批评艺术结合在一起，向我们展现了一个卓越的思想家面对无知的思考与行动。我们坚信，拉帝奥先生的加入会为博识学会带来莫大的益处。 答辩委员会意见：一致通过。 」 博识学会内部素有「庸众院」的传闻，据称这一神秘组织汇集了学会的最强大脑。而拉帝奥以「庸人」自居，仿佛无形中印证了这一流言。联想到他和天才俱乐部的纠葛，这个名字总令人浮想联翩。庸人作为天才的反义词，往往要付出巨大的努力和代价才能追及后者的辙迹。拉帝奥自称庸人，到底是一种退缩，还是一种嘲讽，抑或是一种宣战？但无论如何，他以知识治疗思想之病的执着，无愧于「真理医生」之名。 …… ——摘自《智慧之为特权：解密真理医生》第二百三十页
E: Many believe that after joining the Intelligentsia Guild, Ratio will learn to smooth out his sharp personality to adapt to the Guild's practical and simplistic academic environment. But I must say Ratio is still his old self. Below is the original excerpt from the internal records that I have transcribed: " Respondent: Veritas Ratio Subject: Logical Epistemology Chairman of the Committee: Roseth Transcriber: Morriway Defense Transcript: Roseth: Mr. Ratio, your paper is exceptional. Thank you for your presentation. Now, we will open the floor for questions. There was a silence. Roseth: Well, I'll do the honor then. Roseth: I fully concur with your main ideas, but there's a detail that I find slightly confusing. Veritas Ratio: Whenever someone agrees with me, I feel like I must be wrong. Roseth: My question is, why do you think knowledge is a privilege? Veritas Ratio: Dear Professor Roseth, your question indicates that you haven't fully grasped the content of my paper and do not understand the deductive methods I employed. Veritas Ratio: To put it simply, you would be a great example. Your inability to comprehend my ideas shows precisely that knowledge is not for everyone. Veritas Ratio: If ignorance is an ailment, it is the duty of scholars to weed it out and heal the universe. Veritas Ratio walked to the podium, facing the crowd. Veritas Ratio: So, ladies and gentlemen, turning a blind eye to the folly of others is not an etiquette, but a wicked worldly practice. To spread knowledge, we must first make people realize their folly. The same surely applies to the scholars of the Guild. Roseth shrugged and smiled bitterly. ... Veritas Ratio left amid the commotion. Remark: A passionate hand holding an icy sword — that is probably the best way to describe Mr. Veritas Ratio. By blending logic, passion, and the art of criticism into one, Ratio presents to us how a great thinker perceives and reacts to ignorance. We strongly believe that the addition of Mr. Veritas Ratio will bring immeasurable benefits to the Intelligentsia Guild. Committee Decision: Approved unanimously. " There are words about a mysterious organization within the Intelligentsia Guild called the "Council of Mundanites" that houses the brightest minds of the Guild. The fact that Ratio calls himself a Mundanite seems to affirm the rumor. It is hard not to read something into the organization's name, given Ratio's entangled history with the Genius Society. The mundane, as opposed to the ingenious, often has to make enormous efforts and sacrifices just to catch up with the latter. Is Ratio calling himself mundane a form of submission, mockery, or declaration of war? Anyway, he does live up to his name of Dr. Ratio with his dedication to curing ill minds with knowledge. ... Extracted from page 230, Wisdom as a Privilege: Decoding Dr. Ratio

C: 丰饶玄鹿召唤缃叶之杪时，使其获得【培植】，大幅提高其【复还】的伤害。
E: Upon summoning Twig of Marple Leaf, Abundant Ebon Deer grants it Cultivation, greatly increasing its Retaliation DMG.

C:
你心中盘算着三月七刚刚那句话：「反物质军团在空间站疯狗似地流窜……」看来，接下来的路况不容乐观。
你看了看身边的三月七，她自信地朝你点点头。
你又看了看手中的这根棒球棍，它同样散发着自信的光彩。
你也可以这么自信，试试看吧！
E:
You keep thinking about what March 7th said: "The Legion are rampaging through the space station like a pack of wolves..." It seems like the road ahead is going to be a hard one.
You look at March 7th beside you and she nods at you with confidence.
You then look at the baseball bat in your hand, which is glowing as if also full of confidence.
You can do it too, give it a try!

C: 为了逃脱追捕，你们冲进了裂界。可你们怎会突然沦落至此？三月七也无法解释，因为她的人设只是一位单纯可爱的少女。\n不过，你们迅速达成共识：当务之急是找到裂界的出口，其他事项等离开这片险地再作商议。
E: You rush into the Fragmentum to avoid getting caught. How come things went downhill so quickly? March 7th has no clue — she's written as an innocent and sweet teenage girl after all.\nDespite the initial shock, you quickly agree on the course of action: Find the way out of the Fragmentum first. Everything else can wait.

C:
你们修好了报废矿车，并将它从道路上移走，打通了继续向下的道路。
此处已近矿洞底部，你注意到希儿神色警惕，眼神也变得如尖刀般锐利…
她的眼神本来就吓人，是什么能让她露出比以往更甚的表情？你不知道，但你十分清楚一件事——
危险正在迫近，你应当做好万全准备。
E:
You fix the out of order mine cart and move it out of the way, opening the path continuing downward.
This is near the bottom of the mines and you notice Seele's cautious expression and sharp gaze...
Her expression is normally scary enough already, so what is it that would make her show an even more serious look? You're not sure, but there is one thing that you are certain of...
Danger is closing in and you should make yourself prepared.

C: 矿区的危机基本解除，绝大部分「地火」成员已经护送矿民先行撤离现场。\n不过，希儿尚未将布洛妮娅押送至首领面前，而你们也没有见到这位大人物——而这正是你们此行的根本原因。\n继续向下深入吧！
E: The crisis in the mines is no more, and most of the Wildfire members have left the spot, escorting miners to safety along with them.\nHowever, Seele has not yet brought her captive, Bronya, to the chief, and you haven't had the chance to meet this important figure, a meeting with whom is the biggest motive behind this journey.\nContinue deeper into the mine!

C: 打开第二道大门的权限只掌握在克拉拉手里，而克拉拉此时又回到了铆钉镇搜集材料。\n不久前刚从那里回来的你很清楚：铆钉镇究竟是个怎样凶险的地方。就算克拉拉有护卫机器人跟着，你也绝不能放任这个年纪的小女孩独自在铆钉镇探险…\n证明你是克拉拉家人的时候到了——前往铆钉镇吧！
E: Only Clara, who has returned to Rivet Town to collect materials, has the authorization to open the second gate.\nBeing there not long ago, you are well aware of how vicious of a place Rivet Town is. You wouldn't allow such a little girl to be exploring Rivet Town alone, even if she has a robot guardian by her side...\nIt's time to prove that you're truly a member of Clara's family — head to Rivet Town!

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n战斗引发的巨大震动让下层区的居民有些担惊受怕，娜塔莎希望你能去安抚一下他们的情绪，将好消息带给所有人。\n鼹鼠党的孩子们趁乱跑到了铆钉镇里，去确认下他们是否安全吧。
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nThe great tremors from the battle made the Underworlders very concerned. Natasha would like you to go comfort them and bring the good news to everyone.\nThe kids in the Moles ran to Rivet Town during the commotion. Go check on them.

C: 故事尘埃落定，布洛妮娅继任成为大守护者，上下层区再次交融，组建成了完整的贝洛伯格。\n你们与布洛妮娅道别完毕，但在离开雅利洛-Ⅵ之前，三月七似乎还有没完成的心愿…\n再在城市里逛一圈，把那些值得纪念的人和物用快门记录下来吧。
E: The story ended and Bronya succeeded as the Supreme Guardian. The Overworld and Underworld reunited to create a complete Belobog.\nYou bid farewell to Bronya, but March 7th still has some unfulfilled wishes before you leave Jarilo-VI...\nTake another stroll in the city and record with your camera the people and things you want to commit to memory.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你们被困在这个可疑的房间里了，还遭遇了令人心生恐惧的迷因怪物…你们真的能打倒它吗？
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou are trapped in this suspicious room and encounter a terrifying memetic monster... Can you really defeat it?

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 公司决定与家族携手共建匹诺康尼，全宇宙的学者们也将不遗余力地提供帮助…好一派皆大欢喜的热闹景象。至此，「梦想之地」匹诺康尼之旅也便告一段落。\n是时候踏上新的旅途了。
E: The IPC decides to develop Penacony alongside The Family, and scholars from all over the universe will assist in every way they can... It is a lively scene where all's well that ends well. With this, your journey to Penacony, the "Land of the Dreams" has come to an end.\nIt's time to embark on a new adventure.

C: 纷争泰坦「尼卡多利」突袭奥赫玛，情急下我们伸出援手，跟随白厄一路击败泰坦眷属、保护居民。
E: Nikador, the Strife Titan, launched a surprise attack on Okhema. In a moment of desperation, we stepped in to assist. Following Phainon's lead, we defeated the Titankin and protected the residents on the way.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
E: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所说，欧洛尼斯让{F#她}{M#他}看到了星核猎手…那是一段理应不存在，却无比鲜明的记忆。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, Oronyx showed {F#her}{M#him} the Stellaron Hunters... It was a memory that should not exist, yet it seems so vivid and realistic.

C: {NICKNAME}成功打开悬锋城的往世之门，来到过去的悬锋城。彼时正值悬锋祭典，尼卡多利的失神刚刚开始，悬锋城仍然喧嚣繁荣。
E: {NICKNAME} unlocked the door to the past in Castrum Kremnos, stepping into the city's former days. It was the time of the Kremnos Festival, and Nikador had just begun to lose their mind. Castrum Kremnos was still prosperous and vibrant with life.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 跟随白厄了解黄金裔的救世苦旅后，我们最终还是决定留在翁法罗斯。经过一番休整，众黄金裔再度集结，准备向尼卡多利所在的悬锋城发起讨伐，夺取「天谴之矛」的火种。
E: After understanding from Phainon the Chrysos Heirs' arduous journey to save the world, we ultimately decided to remain in Amphoreus. After a period of rest and recovery, the Chrysos Heirs reconvened, readying themselves for an attack against Castrum Kremnos, where Nikador was, with the goal of seizing the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nThe gift that Castorice prepared was stolen by the famous Amphorean Kitty Phantom Thief. What's more, the thief left clues.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 螺丝咕姆先生的现身无疑是一个转机，我们对翁法罗斯的状况有了新的认知。\n应他的请求，{NICKNAME}将留在翁法罗斯临机应变，而我会按照原定计划返回列车，与列车组的其他成员汇合后，商讨下一步的计划。
E: Mr. Screwllum's arrival marks a definite turning point, giving us fresh insights into Amphoreus's condition.\nFollowing his request, {NICKNAME} will stay behind in Amphoreus to adapt to changing circumstances, while I'll return to the Express as planned to regroup with the other Crew members and formulate our next course of action.

C:
你还记得吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
在那酣醉的迷梦中，山高而陡峻，你看见了自己。
相信我吧，后来的观众啊，他就在那山巅与众人欢歌。
残缺的黄金裔，还有畸形的半神们，他们同他歌唱，旋飞舞，脚跺地。
欧呵！恐惧令他的心震颤：神谕充满每一颗灵魂，狂喜而迷乱。
欧呵！请宽恕他们吧，卡厄斯兰那，请宽恕他们——你那无匹的烈焰令人胆寒！
就让他们歌唱不知疲倦的英雄，歌唱再创世，那酒与蜜奔腾之地。
歌唱他如何在星辰当中加增荣光，永恒之城如何轰然陨落。
奥赫玛人、悬锋城，还有他们所知的一切血脉如何毁灭。
至于卡厄斯兰那——他就在那酣醉的迷梦中，陡峭的山巅！
他用血点燃火焰，火焰点燃血，似太阳逼迫一切邪恶无法抵近。
山高而陡峻，他就在那里独自狂欢，起舞，永不停歇。
但一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
E:
Do you still remember, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
In that drunken dream, the mountains loomed high and steep — and there, you saw yourself.
Believe me, O future witness — he stood atop that peak, and the people sang with him in ecstasy.
The broken Chrysos Heirs, the twisted demigods — they sang, they spun, they stamped their feet upon the ground with him.
Hail! Terror struck his heart: Prophecy burned in every soul, wild with rapture and madness.
Hail! Spare them, Khaslana, spare them — your peerless flame sends chills down every spine!
Let them sing of the tireless heroes, sing of the Era Nova, sing of that land where wine and honey flow in torrents.
Let them sing how he wove new glory among the stars, and how the Eternal City crashed to dust.
How Okhemans, Castrum Kremnos, and every lineage they knew were destroyed.
As for Khaslana — He is still within the drunken dreams, upon the sheer and jagged peak!
There he lights flame with blood, and blood with flame, like a sun whose blaze banished all evil from its path.
The mountains rise cruel and steep. Yet still he dances there alone, wild and unceasing in his joy.
Yet all proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.
All proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C: 在这里你将听不见人声，看不见人影；太阳的闪烁的火焰会把你烤焦，使你的皮肤失掉颜色；直到满天星斗的夜遮住了阳光，或太阳出来化去了晨霜，你才松快。这眼前的苦难将永远折磨你；没有人救得了你。\n——但你已经把火留下了，那是解放他们的火。而解放你的火，早就在过去点亮了。
E: Here, you'll hear no human voices, see no human shadows. The sun's flickering flames will scorch you, draining the color from your skin. Only when the starlit night shields you from sunlight, or when the Sun rises to melt away the morning frost, will you find relief. These present hardships will torture you forever, and no one can save you.\nBut you have left behind the fire... the fire that will liberate them. And the fire meant to free you was illuminated long ago.

C: 在这里你将听不见人声，看不见人影；太阳的闪烁的火焰会把你烤焦，使你的皮肤失掉颜色；直到满天星斗的夜遮住了阳光，或太阳出来化去了晨霜，你才松快。这眼前的苦难将永远折磨你；没有人救得了你。\n——但你已经把火留下了，那是解放他们的火。而解放你的火，早就在过去点亮了。
E: Here, you'll hear no human voices, see no human shadows. The sun's flickering flames will scorch you, draining the color from your skin. Only when the starlit night shields you from sunlight, or when the Sun rises to melt away the morning frost, will you find relief. These present hardships will torture you forever, and no one can save you.\nBut you have left behind the fire... the fire that will liberate them. And the fire meant to free you was illuminated long ago.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n为了继续访问控制节点，先获取不同扇区的密钥。\n长夜月应该也在那深处的房间里，继续前进吧。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nTo continue accessing the control node, obtain the encryption keys from each sector.\nEvernight is probably in that room deep within. Keep moving.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…为什么自己什么都不记得？难道真的是以「记忆」为代价…？\n航线会议要开始了，要是真记不得了，列车组的大家会告诉你的。\n说真的，是谁把这么没有品味的画放在你的房间里了？
E: The Era Nova Ceremony was a success, and the journey in Amphoreus had reached its end... So why can't you remember anything? Was it really at the cost of "memories"...?\nThe navigation meeting is about to begin. If you had truly forgotten, the Crew would fill you in.\nBy the way, who put that tasteless painting in your room?

C: 天外之界的来客背负起世界的命运，用「开拓」为翁法罗斯写下新的起点。哀丽秘榭之外，是所有人愿望中的崭新纪元。\n而今你已抵达黎明，准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: A visitor from beyond the sky shoulders the world's destiny, writing a new beginning for Amphoreus through "Trailblaze." Beyond the Aedes Elysiae lies a new era that everyone wishes for.\nNow that you have arrived at the Dawn, {NICKNAME}, are you ready to answer the world's summon?

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 一番混乱乌龙后，「异星水魈」再度逃窜。\n今后，也许你还会在意想不到的地方与它相见……
E: The Xenohydro escapes once again after the entire ruckus.\nMaybe you'll run into it again somewhere unexpectedly in the future...

C: 温天翁讲述了与「猎彗人」何塞的恩仇过往，并交给你一张宝藏显影图。前往图中所示地点，那里沉睡着何塞的昔日家当。
E: Wen Tianweng describes his past with the Comet Hunter Hosea and hands you a developed treasure map. Head to the marked location in the image to find Hosea's hidden possessions.

C: 你击退了怪物，成功救出「瓜农」帕梅拉。\n你本以为她会知恩图报。但「瓜农」恪守着自己的职业道德，坚持要你付出某种代价。\n你答应了她的要求，但在出人意料的是，帕梅拉所要求的「代价」竟是姬子的照片。
E: You succeeded in defeating the monsters and saved "the Gossipmonger" Pamela.\nYou thought she might appreciate your deed, but she adhered to her professional ethics and insisted that you pay some kind of price.\nYou agreed, but surprisingly, Pamela's "price" is a picture of Himeko.

C: 空间站尚未从先前的混乱中彻底恢复过来，缺乏崭新机组设备支持的终端机，算力严重不足，但好在第二天就会有足够的算力。现在，新的一天又开始了……
E: The space station hasn't recovered from the previous accident. Without the support of new equipment, the terminal's computing power is severely lacking. The computing power should pick up the next day though. Now a new day begins...

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 你凭自己的聪明才智，很快便解决了矿车工老师傅布置的矿车难题。\n去问问他有何奖励吧——这种环节通常都会有奖励，不是吗？
E: With your ingenuity, you quickly solved the mine cart puzzle set up by the senior mine cart operator.\nGo ask him what the reward is — there is usually a reward for this kind of task, isn't there?

C: 你成为了下层区人口中的「超级新星」，目前正在俱乐部天梯榜上一路高歌猛进。\n如果想要在擂台上与人切磋切磋，不妨去找掘掘博士安排参加比赛吧。
E: People in the underworld call you a "supernova." Your rank gets higher and higher on the club's ranking list.\nIf you want to hone your skills in the arena, you can go to Dr. Dig, who will arrange for you to participate in fighting matches.

C: 听说了歌蒂大婶原本是想要买玩具的，但是没有找到想买的东西就回磐岩镇了。这怎么行！\n赶快去告诉歌蒂大婶，宇宙无敌可爱的「菌菌」正在拍卖，不买可就亏了！
E: You heard that Aunt Gertie was going to buy a toy, but she returned to Boulder Town because she found nothing attractive. This is your chance!\nYou're going to tell Gertie that "Junjun" is being auctioned, and she's not going to want to miss out!

C: 你已经收集齐了所有你能找到的《冒险鼹鼠队》书页，应该还没有别人能做到这些事情，将好消息告诉尤利安吧。
E: You've already collected all the pages that you could find from The Adventurous Moles. You are probably the first one to have done so. Tell Julian the good news.

C: 你在贝洛伯格的极北之地再次遇见了希莉儿…的幻影。\n她似乎陷入了痛楚的深渊，你想帮助她挣脱折磨。\n最后一次，帮她解开这缠人的谜题吧。
E: In the farthest northern reaches of Belobog, you reunite with Cyrille... Or at least, her phantom.\nShe seems to be lost in an abyss of pain, and you want to help her break free.\nRelease her from the grips of this puzzle for one last time.

C: 你们到了目的地，但谨慎的梁沐一定要半夏「一个人前来」，你们只好暂时回避。\n没有多少时间争辩了，现在就相信半夏的做法吧。
E: You reach the destination, but the cautious Liangmu insists to have Banxia "come alone," so you should step aside for a while.\nThere's no time to argue about it, so just trust Banxia for this.

C: 十王司判官请求你们将她护送至星槎渡口。横生的建木枝蔓，失控的魔阴身与孽物…想必这一路定然不可能一帆风顺。
E: The Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission requested you to escort her to the Starskiff Jetty, with overgrown Ambrosial Arbor Vines and uncontrolled mara-struck individuals and abominations along the way... It is nearly impossible for the journey there to be smooth sailing.

C: 在解决了种种阻碍之后，三月七终于接近了自己记忆的起点。可越是靠近，她就越是不安——这「阻碍」究竟是从何而来呢？\n此时符玄的警告在她的心中不断回响，使她几乎想要停下脚步，回头折返……\n「但开拓者绝不能回头，即使是在回头的时候。」三月七对这个冷笑话颇为得意，决定之后讲给丹恒听。
E: After overcoming various obstacles, March 7th finally approaches the starting point of her memories. However, the closer she gets, the more anxious she feels — Where is this "obstacle" coming from?\nFu Xuan's warning echoes in her mind, making her almost wanting to stop and turn back the way she came...\n"But Trailblazers must never turn back, even when they turn their back." March 7th is pretty satisfied with this dry joke and decides to tell it to Dan Heng when she gets back.

C: 这场奇妙的梦境终于结束了。爱德华医生似乎想听听你的感受，和他聊聊吧。哦对了，别忘了黑天鹅最开始的叮嘱：「这段记忆的性质有些特殊，为了其他顾客的梦境体验，还请不要向任何人透露它的结局。」
E: This wonderful dream has finally come to an end. Dr. Edward would like to hear your thoughts — go and talk with him. Oh, don't forget what Black Swan told you at the start: "The nature of this memory is special. Don't ruin the dreamscape experience for anyone else by spoiling the ending."

C: 抵达罗浮，迎面而来是星槎渡口人满为患的景象。
E: Arriving at the Luofu, you are greeted by an overwhelming sight of starskiffs.

C: 幽囚狱中，来历不明的机械与劫狱者横行无忌，意在救出步离战首。而曜青的使节生死不明。受寒鸦请托，你们不得不深入幽囚狱之底，确认犯人是否依然在押……
E: In the Shackling Prison, unidentified machines and prison breakers wreak chaos with impunity. Their goal is to rescue the borisin Warhead. Meanwhile, the Yaoqing messenger's fate is unknown. At the behest of Hanya, you all have no choice but to delve deeper into the Shackling Prison to confirm if the convict is still behind bars...

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定在擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。\n一艘姗姗来迟的星槎引起了她的警觉。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the tense atmosphere and anxiety from waiting are starting to make Yunli uneasy. She decides to conduct a thorough patrol of the Skysplitter before the tournament begins to ensure that nothing untoward is happening.\nThe late arrival of a starskiff arouses Yunli's wariness.

C: 空无一物的战场中，新死的顽敌再度现身于眼前。老练的猎手将面对一场特殊的逐猎……而她，已成猎物。
E: On the empty battlefield, a tenacious and freshly-dead foe makes an appearance once more. The veteran hunter is primed to go on a special hunt... but this time, she is the prey.

C: 原来莱斯利•迪恩的确早已离世，梦境中的他只是由一众难以接受他死讯的人们联合创造出的幻影。\n回到黄金的时刻，将真相告知莱斯利•迪恩吧。
E: It turns out that Lesley Dean has been gone for some time, and the person in the Dreamscape was created by his fans struggling to accept his death.\nReturn to the Golden Hour and inform him of the truth.

C: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊…\n问题只有一个：我们愿意付出多少代价？
E: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss.\nThere is only one question: How much are we willing to pay?

C: 还记得最初的祈祷吗？帕西提亚，伟大的欧洛尼斯向你降下了神启，或许从那一刻起，你的命运就早已注定。
E: Do you remember your original prayer? Pasithea, the great Oronyx sent you divine inspiration. Perhaps, your fate was decided from that very moment.

C: 等到夜梦已不再喧嚣，等到我们在梦乡重逢。
E: Until the day our dreams fall quiet once more, until we meet again in the land of our dreams.

C: 通过对暗号的方式，找到「马桶怪谈」的投稿人，并追问对方「怪谈」背后的真相。或者凭借自己对空间站的认识，直接寻找这个不得了的马桶。
E: Using passphrase, find the submitter of the Toilet Incident and ask them about the truth behind the "ghost story." Alternatively, find the mythical toilet in question based on your knowledge of the space station.

C: 传言贝洛伯格的郊外还有冰原狼活动的痕迹，动物学专家莉拉需要你帮助她完成雪原生态调查。要找的痕迹有皮毛、脚印，还有…粪便？
E: Rumor has it that direwolf tracks have been found on the outskirts of Belobog. Lila needs your help with an ecological survey in the Snow Plains. She needs fur, footprints, and... feces?

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n他希望能和名演员塔米拉交朋友，还想派你去和她交涉——好人做到底，你决定帮他这个忙。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nHe wants to be friends with the famous actor, Tamila, and would like you to talk to her — You decide to help him the whole way through.

C: 阿丽娜希望你能带给她更多纸团，你决定在磐岩镇多逛逛……
E: Alina hopes that you can bring her more balls of paper. You decide to walk some more around Boulder Town...

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n你听到了一段塔米拉与他人的有趣对话，快去把你的发现告诉塞琳吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nYou overheard a fun conversation between Tamila and another person, so go and tell Celine right away.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 帕姆为到访列车的客人准备了一本登记簿，去看看上面写了什么吧。
E: Pom-Pom has left a guest book for the Express's visitors. Go take a look at what's written on its pages.

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 你成功打开了封存「余火」的火种匣。有太多的疑问需要伊来内解答，你决定和他谈谈。
E: You have successfully opened the Coreflame Casket containing the sealed Embers. Having too many questions needing Alain's answer, you decide to speak with him.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 丢失的奇物竟然在一名叫「管家」的造物手里，它是谁？它在哪儿？你和佩佩两眼一抹黑，在走丢的造物处，它们似乎知道「管家」的信息……
E: The lost Curio is currently held by a creation known as "butler." Who is this butler? And where can they be found? Despite lacking any information, you might uncover new leads by locating the lost Curio...

C: 邓恩发来消息，希望你能作为主教官参与铁卫禁区的军事演练活动。\n和「副官」聊聊，开启第一轮军事演练，并完成铁卫精心布设的挑战。
E: Dunn sent you a message, hoping you will be the main drillmaster for the military exercise in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nTalk to the aide and begin the first round of the military exercise, and complete the challenge meticulously designed by the Guards.

C: 建木生发导致罗浮的货运系统出现了故障，鹤运物流请求你操纵机巧鸟寻回他们失事的星槎。\n和梓桥谈一谈，听听她的具体需求吧。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's growth made Luofu's logistic system malfunction. Now, Heron Express is asking you to control cycranes to find a starskiff of theirs, which had an accident.\nSpeak with Ziqiao and see what she actually needs from you.

C: 根据梓桥的记录，这艘星槎应该丢失在禨祥台了，去那里仔细找找看吧。
E: Ziqiao's records say this starskiff was lost in Fortuna Augurstead. Go there to have a closer look.

C: 实验助手工作正式开始！去问问看温世玲本次实验还缺少什么素材吧。
E: The work of a lab assistant has officially begun! Go ask Wen Shiling what materials are still missing in this experiment.

C: 综合展馆的展品似乎已经找回一半了——为此，馆长于尔丹有话想对你说。
E: Half of the exhibits in the General Hall seems to have been recovered. Uldan the curator has something to tell you regarding that.

C: 在这段胡编乱造的故事中，初代司鼎为后来者设计了一系列的试炼。只有通过这些试炼，才能够炼制出使自己脱胎换骨的灵丹妙药。
E: In this made-up story, the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission designed a series of trials for their successors. Only by passing through these trials can one concoct the elixir that can make oneself be born anew.

C: 龙尊造像希望你帮它找出丹枫藏在此处的宝藏…怎么又是寻宝故事？算了，西衍先生开心就好。
E: The Statue of the High Elder wishes you can help it find the treasure Dan Feng hid here... why is this an adventure treasure seeking story again? Never mind. As long as it makes Mr. Xiyan happy.

C: 白露打算带你去长乐天金人巷到处吃喝，她自愿成为免费导游，这样的好事哪里能找到喔！\n既然白露都这样说了，你就勉为其难地跟在她身后好好逛一逛金人巷吧……
E: Bailu has plans to show you around the food establishments at Aurum Alley over in Exalting Sanctum. It's a rare and fine thing to have someone willing to serve as a free guide!\nSince Bailu already made up her mind, you should make an effort to follow her and browse the stores in Aurum Alley...

C: 身正不怕影子斜，没有做亏心事的话，货物也经得起检查。\n严查斯科特的货物，提防他的小动作。
E: An honest soul is a blameless one. If someone hasn't done anything wrong, then they have nothing to fear from an inspection.\nScrutinize Skott's goods and be vigilant for any tricks he might pull.

C: 帮助商会完成码头营收的任务，建立商铺与商会的合作，规划合理的路线…这都将帮助金人巷实现复兴。\n金人巷商会通过码头运营赚取储值金，至少应该先挣到目标金额，帮助商会摆脱眼前的危机。
E: Help the merchant guild reach the dock's revenue goal, build up cooperation between the guild and the stores, plan reasonable routes... All these tasks will help revitalize Aurum Alley.\nThe Aurum Alley Merchant Guild accumulates funding through operating the docks. You should prioritize reaching the revenue goal and help the guild overcome their immediate crisis.

C: 来到金人巷中，你们向前来寻找白露的医助们打听情报，打算找到消失不见的龙女
E: Upon arriving at Aurum Alley, you inquire with the medical assistants who are here looking for Bailu, hoping to find the vanished Dragon Lady

C: 阴森鬼怪的中心就在大衍穷观阵阵心，跟随青雀一起看看到底发生了什么异状。
E: The heart of the eerie anomaly lies in the center of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Go with Qingque to see what has happened.

C: 阿月向你们讲述了夜半鬼来电之事，更将对方约她在迴星港某处见面的事托盘而出。可阿月孤身一人，岂能和你们这群能人异士组成的捉鬼小队相比。你们决定接受阿月的委托，代她前往迴星港赴约，看看对方究竟是何方神圣。
E: A-Yue tells you about the ghostly phone calls she receives in the middle of the night, and reveals that the other party has asked to meet her at a specific location in Stargazer Navalia. A-Yue going there on her own would be very risky, especially compared to your ghost-hunting squad composed of capable exorcists. You accept A-Yue's commission and decide to meet the other person on her behalf in Stargazer Navalia, aiming to uncover their true identity.

C: 当你们应约前去指定地点，却发现扑了个空。难道这是某人的恶作剧？可来都来了，总不能白跑一趟，你们决定继续深入探索迴星港……
E: As you arrive at the agreed location, you find nobody there. Could this be a mere prank? Since you're here already, you decide to explore deeper into Stargazer Navalia in search of potential clues...

C: 帮助辛格勒收集线索——它们应该就散落在神秘空间的战利品宝箱中。
E: Help Singler search for clues — they should be scattered in the mysterious space's treasure chest.

C: 成为巨星的机会近在咫尺，准备迎接终极挑战吧。
E: The chance to become a superstar is just around the corner. Prepare to face the final showdown.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 见习医师伦道夫已经准备好了今日的离散忆质收容计划，去帮伦道夫拍摄目标所在的位置吧。
E: Trainee Healer Randolph has prepared the retrieval plan for the scattered memoria today. Help him film the location of the target.

C:
你应该猜得出这位「独立参赛者•铁臂」是谁，所以这里还是不要欲盖弥彰了。

和你聊些无关紧要的星天演武仪典幕后八卦吧。
你可能发现了，虎克和史瓦罗没怎么在故事中登场。这其实是因为他们有自己的事要忙。
除了偷偷参赛，史瓦罗还要带着虎克在罗浮四处逛街。他想给克拉拉带一些伴手礼，但不知道该买些什么。于是他就「计算」了一下——同为女孩子，虎克一定知道该给克拉拉买什么伴手礼！听她的准没错！

十数日后，机械聚落。
克拉拉看着面前整整六箱子苏打豆汁儿，陷入了沉思。
E:
You can probably guess who this "Independent Contestant — Iron Arm" is, so there's no need to play up the mystery here.

Let's chat about some unimportant Luminary Wardance behind-the-scenes gossip instead.
You might have discovered that Hook and Svarog didn't make much of an appearance in the story. It's because they are busy with their own affairs.
Apart from taking part in the competition, Svarog is also visiting the shops in Luofu with Hook. He wants to bring some souvenirs to Clara but doesn't know what to buy, so after some "calculation" — He figures that Hook, as another female child, must know what to buy for Clara! He can't go wrong listening to Hook!

A few days later in the Robot Settlement,
Clara sinks into deep thought as she gazes upon the six boxes of mung bean soda before her.

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了。\n利用这段时间，为接下来的比赛做好准备吧。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather.\nUse this time to prepare for the upcoming match.

C: 和驭空交谈，进入最后的战斗。愿丹轮高悬，照彻尘心。
E: Speak with Yukong and enter the final fight. May the claret wheel hang overhead, illuminating mortal hearts.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n第一场演出圆满结束！返回排练室和乐队成员们集合吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe first performance wrapped up successfully! Return to the rehearsal room to reunite with the band members.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n没想到，乐队成员都纷纷提出要退出乐队…作为乐队经理，你得想办法把他们都劝回来。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nYou never imagined that all the band members would ask to quit the band... As the band manager, you need to find a way to persuade them all to come back.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n返回排练室，进一步讨论后续的安排。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nReturn to the practice room and discuss your future plans further.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到「阮•梅」造物的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of Ruan Mei's creations' beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 证件照拍摄完毕，报名资料准备齐全，是时候向「副导演」提交报名申请了。
E: The ID photo has been taken, the registration materials have been prepared. It's time to submit the registration to the assistant director.

C: 达米亚诺斯说他很有经验，只要跟着他前进就好…
E: Damionis says he has plenty of experience, and you just need to follow him.

C: 没想到缇宝率领的奇美拉小队居然后来居上，占据了第二名的位置…但你还有不少时间，努力工作来击败她吧！
E: Surprisingly, Tribbie's chimera squad secured second place... But there's still time to turn the tables. Work hard and outperform her squad!

C: 有好事者前来挑衅，你自然不会退缩。努力工作，堂堂正正地击败这个对手吧！
E: When a worthy challenger shows up, don't shy away. Put in the effort and defeat this rival fair and square!

C: 利用假身份信息通过安全验证
E: Use a fake identity to get past security check

C: 在银狼的协助下成功取出星核
E: Get the Stellaron with Silver Wolf's help

C: 离开三月七的房间
E: Leave March 7th's room

C: 前往孤儿院寻找物资
E: Go to the orphanage and search for the supplies

C: 在禁区高处瞭望
E: Take a look at the restricted zone from up high

C: 调查遗落在路边的物件
E: Investigate items discarded on the side of the road

C: 前往机械聚落，向克拉拉和史瓦罗报信
E: Go to the Robot Settlement and inform Clara and Svarog

C: 穿过流云渡，和列车组汇合
E: Cross Cloudford and reconvene with the Express Crew

C: 进入工造司一探究竟
E: Enter the Artisanship Commission to see what is happening

C: 将礼物送交「尚滋味」的燕翠
E: Give the gift to Yancui from Spices Supreme

C: （可选）在返回列车前，与你在仙舟上结识的人们话别
E: (Optional) Before you return to the Express, bid farewell to the people you got to know on Xianzhou

C: 利用梦境的特性打开大门
E: Use the characteristics of the Dreamscape to open the door

C: 想办法击落吊灯制造通路
E: Find a way to shoot down the chandelier to clear a path

C: 与「缭乱•忍侠」乱破交谈
E: Talk to the Dazzling Ninja Hero, Rappa.

C: 第三苦行！降伏万魔！
E: The third trial! Eradicate the fiendlings!

C: 阅读桌上的报告
E: Read the report on the table

C: 拿取少量大地兽饲料
E: Take out a small amount of dromas feed

C: 尝试用相同的砝码配平天秤
E: Try using the same weights to balance the scales

C: 与「不存在的回忆」中的星核猎手对话
E: Speak with the Stellaron Hunters in the Non-Existent Memory

C: 探望三月七
E: Visit March 7th

C: 乘坐水车，前往友爱之馆上层
E: Take the waterwheel to head to the top level of the Library of Philia

C: 与白厄同行最后一段路
E: Walk with Phainon for the last part of the journey

C: 与缇里西庇俄丝一起面对圣城守卫
E: Face the holy city's guards together with Tribios

C: 查看那刻夏展示的「记忆」
E: Check the memory shown by Anaxa

C: 跟随黄金短矛
E: Follow the Golden Short Spear

C: 向第一面镜授令
E: Give an order to the First Mirror

C: 查看各组御主的情况
E: Check on the status of Masters from other teams

C: 击败钟表老子
E: Defeat Old Clockie

C: 找出葛瑞迪的真身
E: Find Grady's true body

C: 重返翁法罗斯
E: Return to Amphoreus

C: 继续批阅记忆的谏书
E: Continue reviewing the Epistle of Remembrance

C: 与昔涟对话
E: Talk with Cyrene

C: 深入错乱的记忆，寻找荒笛
E: Venture into the disordered memory and seek out Terravox

C: 召集「最后的泰坦」们，准备迎战铁墓
E: Gather the "Last Titans" and prepare to face Irontomb

C: 找个温暖又熟悉的地方，好好休息吧
E: Find a warm and familiar place to get some proper rest

C: 前往基座舱段，协助科员收拾残局
E: Head to the base zone and help the researcher in need

C: 收集斥力桥僻处的旧零件
E: Collect the old parts in the crevices of the repulsion bridge

C: 告知古恩处置原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>的选择
E: Tell Gunn how to deal with Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>

C: 从怪物身上取得当前房间的通行密钥
E: Get the encryption key for the current room from the monster

C: 从怪物身上取得通行密钥
E: Obtain the encryption key from the monster's body

C: 前往中央房间
E: Head to the central room

C: 就空间站的神秘泡泡一事咨询黑塔
E: Ask Herta about the mysterious bubbles in the Space Station

C: 接受真理医生的质询
E: Face Dr. Ratio's interrogation

C: 通过忆泡探索关联记忆【艾丝妲的烦恼】
E: Explore the related memory "Asta's troubles" through the Memory Bubble

C: 回忆与阿德勒的对话内容
E: Recall the content of the conversation with Adler

C: 追踪逃逸的冥火
E: Track the escaped infernal fire

C: 回复跃渊的消息
E: Respond to Yueyuan's message

C: 领取通过测试的奖励
E: Claim the reward for passing the test

C: 帮虎克找到她的宝贝
E: Help Hook find her treasure

C: 向买家打听同行伙伴的消息
E: Ask for more information about this suspicious buyer

C: 与希莉儿交谈
E: Talk to Cyrille

C: 与佩拉和玲可暂时分别
E: Say goodbye to Pela and Lynx for now

C: （可选）消灭神秘的生物
E: (Optional) Eliminate the mysterious creature

C: 前往海边，与陶德会面
E: Head to the coast and meet with Todd

C: 与温符瑞对话
E: Talk to Wen Furui

C: 前往约定的地点，与白露见面
E: Go to the location at which you promised to meet Bailu

C: 护送雪衣前往工造司的渡口
E: Escort Xueyi to the Artisanship Commission's dock

C: 探索绥园！出来吧！小鬼们！
E: Explore Fyxestroll Garden! Bring it on, schmucks! Huh!

C: 见证彦卿与云璃的比试
E: Watch Yanqing duel Yunli

C: 找到合适的箱子躲藏
E: Find a suitable box to hide in

C: 追逐劫狱者的脚步
E: Pursue the jailbreaker's trail

C: 继续见证罗伯特的故事
E: Continue to witness Robert's stories

C: 给莱斯利•迪恩第二次机会，解开芙洛拉的心结
E: Grant Lesley Dean a second chance to free Flora from her agony

C: 等待波提欧和银枝前来救场
E: Wait for Boothill and Argenti to come to your assistance

C: 跟帕里斯和天谴猎手逛逛裁缝铺
E: Browse the tailor's shop with Paris and the Furiae Archer

E: Talk to Julian from the Moles

E: Go to the florist in the Overworld to buy flowers for Lila

E: Return to Du's Teahouse and tell Boss Du about what you learned

E: Take the extrapolation result to the client

C: 与伊来内对话
E: Speak with Alain

E: Explore the Simulated Universe

E: Enter Simulated Universe: World 1

E: Search for the missing Juice Recipe

E: Listen to the merchant's explanation

C: 找到提图斯，看看他是否需要帮助
E: Find Titus and see if he needs help

E: Reunite with Apollonius, who had returned to the feast, as well as with everyone else

C: 利用「等级」涂鸦削弱敌人
E: Weaken the enemies using Level graffitis

C: 向于尔丹了解情况
E: Find out more about the situation from Uldan

E: Complete Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster on any difficulty

C: 与温世玲进行超链接对决
E: Have a Hyperlink Match with Wen Shiling

E: Talk to Guinaifen and Sushang and post on Ghostly Grove about the anomaly having been resolved

C: 追踪神秘的幽灵
E: Track down the mysterious specter

E: Rescue the trapped bird

C: 找到藏于丰厚战利品中的线索
E: Find the clues within the Bountiful Treasure

E: Follow Mr. Bigwig

E: Return to the lounge

E: Head to "that room"

E: Pass the first "School of Action" test

E: Achieve victory against Tinah with the newly acquired arcade machine

C: 探索斯科特的内心世界
E: Explore Skott's inner world

E: Head to the Skysplitter

E: Have a round of "Pathfinder" with Qingque's colleague

C: 完成「枘凿六合」简单模式III
E: Complete Hexanexus Easy Mode III

E: Complete Hexanexus: Remake Hard Mode II

E: Control the Fried Cold Rice Robot and translate Peppy's barks

E: (Optional) Investigate the dromas

E: Welcome the next guest

C: 坚韧训练
E: Tenacity Training

C: 感知训练
E: Acuity Training

C: 前2次行动：<color=#f29e38ff>力量与坚韧训练</color>的心情消耗降低#1%，且效率提高#2%
E: For the first 2 actions: Reduces <color=#f29e38ff>Strength and Tenacity Training's</color> Mood consumption by #1% and increases efficiency by #2%

C: 安排灵敏或感知训练合计至少3次：本日所有属性的增长率提高#1%
E: Plan Dexterity or Acuity Training for a total of at least 3 sessions: All stats' improvement rate increases by #1% for today

C: 安排至少2次力量训练：本日所有行动额外提高#1点力量
E: Plan at least 2 sessions of Strength Training: All actions today additionally increases Strength by #1

C: 安排至少1次游历：本日所有行动额外提高#1点灵敏
E: Plan at least 1 Excursion: All actions today additionally increase Dexterity by #1

C: 第一次试剑
E: First Sword Trial

C: 四时剑意•商素
E: Blade Speaks in Seasons: Autumnlight

C: 公司的机甲很好用吗？现在是银狼的了。
E: Are the IPC's mecha really useful? Well, they belong to Silver Wolf now.

C: 准备好了！
E: You bet!

C: 我们列车上这伙人啊，几天不睡都没问题，但一觉就要全睡回来。你啊，早晚也会掌握这技能的。好啦，大好时光别在走廊里耽搁了。
E: We Trailblazers can go days without sleep, but when we do hit the hay, we have to make up for it. Anyway, no point wasting our time in the corridor.

C: 多休息一阵子再走嘛。
E: Any chance for a little break first?

C: 「星核猎手」，我见过你，不过是在公司的悬赏令上，那可是天文数字的赏金——而且不论死活。你知道自己的悬赏是多少吗？
E: I've seen your face before, Stellaron Hunter, even if it was only on a Corporation wanted poster. They were offering quite the bounty... dead or alive. Do you know the figure?

C: 好吧，这是你的自由。
E: Well, that's up to you.

C: 其实远远没那么简单，他的经历可比我要精彩哦。
E: ...But that's only a small part of his story. Believe me when I say he has more experience than I do.

C: 嗯…听说他以前干过很了不得的事情，现在还被某个厉害势力通缉在册。我猜是仙舟联盟，流光忆庭也有可能。可以排除公司，公司的通缉名单我见过。
E: Yeah... I heard he did something incredible once, and now some powerful force has his name on a wanted list. My guess is the Xianzhou Alliance or the Garden of Recollection. In any case, it can't be the IPC — I've seen their wanted list.

C: 原来你还不知道啊……
E: So you don't know yet...

C: 裂界和寒潮…会消失吗？
E: The Fragmentum and the Eternal Freeze... will they disappear?

C: 恐怕不会。
E: I'm afraid not.

C: 我想使用合成机。
E: I want to use the Synthesizer.

C: 老年时，她返老还童；年少时再度解开虚数流溢现象的奥秘，捕捉天外星核并将之封印；黑塔女士曾十九次将所在星球从毁灭的危机中拯救，两次拜谒星神。
E: In her senior years, she managed to reverse her own age via de-aging, and went on to solve the mystery of the imaginary leakage phenomenon, and even captured and sealed a stellaron. Madam Herta has saved the planet she was on from destruction <unbreak>19</unbreak> times and has met the Aeons twice.

C: 哈，联盟笑话。
E: Hah. What an Alliance joke.

C: 真是残酷的黑屏。
E: What a cruel black screen.

C: 如遇紧急情况，请各位科员立刻联系防卫科进行报备。
E: In case of emergency, all researchers are requested to contact the Security Department immediately.

C: 太好了，你还记得我。
E: Great, so you remember me.

C: 撤离完成后为了防止军团进攻主控舱段，电梯的权限暂时封锁了。
E: After the evacuation was complete, the elevators were all shut down to keep the Legion away from the master control zone.

C: 我没事，这点疼痛真的不算什么，我早就习惯了。况且为了保护大家而受伤，本来就是一件值得自豪的事。
E: I'm fine, this pain is nothing, really. I'm used to it. In fact, I should be proud of it. It's a reminder of being able to protect everyone.

C: {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，三月七小姐，丹恒先生，听到广播后请速至主控制台，艾丝妲站长正在找你们。
E: Would {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}, Ms. March 7th, and Mr. Dan Heng please proceed immediately to the master control station. Lead Researcher Asta is waiting for you.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着青雀：「<unbreak>65</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Qingque: "<unbreak>65</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 你觉得这个分数多少透着点诡异……
E: You think this score is kinda weird...

C: 你听见有谁在啜泣，有谁在喧嚣，有谁留下无言的哀悼。最后，你听见一声低语——
E: You hear someone sobbing, someone yelling, and someone mourning wordlessly. Finally, someone whispers...

C: {NICKNAME}？
E: {NICKNAME}?

C: 这里是我们平时集会的所在，后面的车厢才是用来休息的私人空间。
E: We usually meet up here, but our personal cabins are in the next carriage.

C: 你来啦！马上就要前往下一站了，是不是感觉很兴奋？
E: There you are!

C: 这是什么意识的交互魔术？
E: Is this some sort of mumbo jumbo about transferring consciousness?

C: 即使去过了那么多星球，我对银河还是所知甚少，因为它太广袤啦。关于银河的实质众说纷纭，倒是有几个假说可以和你分享。
E: I've been to many different worlds, yet I still know very little about the galaxy, simply because it's too vast. As for its nature, there are a few theories that I can share with you.

C: 比如「星际和平公司」：他们崇拜「存护」克里珀，却阴差阳错成了银河最大的经济体；
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation is a good example: They worship Qlipoth, the Aeon of Preservation, but somehow became the largest economic entity in the galaxy;

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 当然，往深了说，没那么简单…这个项目现在也遇到了很多问题，并不顺利……
E: Of course, if you want to get to the nitty-gritty, it's not that simple... This project has encountered plenty of hiccups along the way. It wasn't all smooth sailing.

C: 有什么需要注意的礼节吗？
E: Is there any etiquette we need to observe?

C: 此时不跑更待何时！
E: It's now or never!

C: 听她这么形容，我居然一下想不出槽点在哪……
E: When she puts it like that, it actually starts to make sense...

C: 哪个朗道，姐姐还是弟弟？杰帕德的话，还是谨慎点为好…他可是铁卫高层啊，我们在他看来，没准就是会走路的军功章……
E: The bro or the sis? If you're talking about Gepard, we should be careful... He's a top Silvermane Guard — he'd probably get a medal for every one of us he brought in.

C: 上次来到地上时，我还是个小孩子。现在眼前的这些，我完全没有印象。
E: The last time I was on the surface, I was still a child. I have no memory of any of this.

C: 不曾想被逐出了筑城者，还会再听到这个词…来吧，我把知道的都告诉你们。
E: I never thought I'd hear that word again after being expelled by the Architects... Come on, I'll tell you everything.

C: 你们快找地方躲起来——我来应付他！
E: Find somewhere to hide — quick — I'll handle him!

C: 这…我收到的指令是对外保密……
E: I... I've been instructed to keep it quiet.

C: 嗯…我觉得还是有办法安全拆开它的。你看这里的结构……
E: Well... I think there's still a way to non-destructively take it apart. You see the structure here...

C: 另外，铁卫绝对不会坐视你无家可归的。你可以…呃…先到「永动」机械屋寻求暂时庇护。
E: Oh, another thing, you can rest assured that we the Silvermane Guards will never let you go homeless. You can... um... seek temporary shelter in the Neverwinter workshop for now.

C: 佩拉，你看过之后有什么头绪了吗？
E: So, Pela, now that you had a look, what do you think?

C: 这才对嘛，这才是年轻有为的机械师该有的精气神！我就等你这句话呢！
E: That's right, that's the spirit of a young and promising mechanic! I've been waiting for you to say this!

C: 到啦，永冬铭碑！拍照拍照！
E: Here we are, Everwinter Monument! Photo time!

C: …你是不是有事求我？
E: ...This "something..." is it a favor?

C: 哪有什么情况……
E: That's just it — there is no deal...

C: 想联系的话总有办法啦，不用担心！
E: There's always a way for me to contact him if I need to, so don't worry!

C: 停！别再做阅读理解了！有没有一种可能，我是说可能，这些钟压根就不会走，钟面只是个装饰呢？
E: Hold your horses! This isn't Shakespeare! Is there a possibility, and by that, I mean the remotest possibility, that these clocks aren't actually running and are just decorations?

C: 在去往老巫婆的家的路上，蕾莎遇见的三位骑士被老巫婆唤作：「我的黎明」、「我的太阳」与「我的黑夜」，特鲁太太仿佛对广阔的宇宙都拥有支配权。
E: On the way to the old witch's house, Leisha meets three knights. The witch calls them "my dawn," "my sun," and "my night.." It's as if Mrs. Trude is able to control everything in the vast universe.

C: 几个黑色垃圾袋上洒落了碎纸屑。它碎得如此整齐，你还以为这个世界已经解锁了碎纸机的科技。
E: Scraps of paper are scattered all over the black garbage bags. They've been torn up so evenly that you begin to wonder whether this world may have discovered paper-shredding technology.

C: 「什么也没有。」你决定这么告诉她。
E: "Nothing" you decided to tell her.

C: 呵呵，很幽默嘛，{NICKNAME}。
E: Ahaaaa... You're so hilarious, {NICKNAME}.

C: 他的朋友？那地下一大半是你的敌人了。
E: A friend of his? Then most of the underground is your enemy.

C: 那倒不是他们的本意。这几个人有求于奥列格首领，所以我把他们带来了。
E: They're here because they need a favor from Chief Oleg. I'm escorting them.

C: 才不会说谎！
E: Yeah, never!

C: 居然被小孩子看不起了…可恶，你们给我等着！
E: So you kids think you're better than us, huh? Just you wait and see!

C: 他高了，也变老了。
E: He's looking taller... and older.

C: 外表看似大人…
E: Looks like an adult to me...

C: 没有，就是吓唬你。
E: Nah, we're just messing with you.

C: 上去看看，说不定他需要帮忙。
E: Let's head up and take a look, he might need help.

C: 根据咱的观察，小镇上的住民基本都是从事体力劳动的矿民，不像上层区那么富裕。
E: From what I've seen, the residents are nearly all miners. It seems like the people here have less than those in the Overworld.

C: 大守护者背叛了我们。
E: The supreme guardian betrayed us.

C: 「大守护者」为何这么做？
E: Why did the supreme guardian choose to act that way?

C: 问几遍了，还没听够吗？好吧，我叫桑博•科斯基，职业是行商，爱好是见义勇为，对你们没有任何企图。
E: You haven't heard enough about me, huh? Alright, my name is Sampo Koski. I'm a businessman who stands up for justice in his free time. And no, I don't have it in for you.

C: 虎克知道，铆钉镇现在很危险！所以我想请你当虎克的保镖！
E: I know that Rivet Town is super dangerous right now! That's why I'd like to enlist you as my bodyguard!

C: 唔，你明明是为了帮虎克…对不起，荣誉队员！
E: *sigh* But you were only there to help Hook... I'm sorry, honorary member!

C: 你见过那群土鳖吗？整天就知道埋头训练，个个搞得灰头土脸…他们根本不懂观众想看的是什么。
E: Have you seen those knuckleheads? All they know is to bury their heads and train, getting all dirty and sweaty... They don't know what the audience wants to see.

C: 就是它，就是它！这质感没得说！
E: That's it, that's it! Wow, that texture!

C: 大家来拳馆不都是图一乐吗，不会有人真的喜欢上「怪物盔甲」了吧？
E: People are just here for some fun. Nobody will actually like Monster Armor, right?

C: …有什么事吗？
E: ...Can I help you?

C: 你还不能回去。
E: You can't go back yet.

C: 你妈妈托我把礼物交给你。
E: Your mom asked me to give you this gift.

C: 对啊，我刚才不是说了，那家伙前不久才负了伤，连盔甲都被搞坏了。
E: Yeah, didn't I just say, he was badly injured not long ago and even got his armor broken.

C: 而且，「外来者」在下层区声名远扬——您要是肯赏脸参赛，那这拳馆指定是座无虚席！
E: Besides, the Outsider is well known in the Underworld. If you can grace us with your visit, then the tickets will be sold out for sure!

C: 我明白了，剩下的人就交由我们通知吧。如果一切顺利…这应该就是「地火」最后的任务了。
E: Roger that — you can leave the rest to us. If everything goes smoothly... this should be Wildfire's final mission.

C: 我看到歌蒂了！怎么还有个人躺在地上？
E: I see Gertie! But who's that lying on the ground?

C: …你们的父母呢？
E: ...Where are your parents?

C: 希望别再折腾我了…
E: Not again...

C: 我很感谢你，不过{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}别太得意了。要想当上鼹鼠党的二把手还是不够的，必须先过了我这关，我还没有打算把位置让出来呢！
E: Thank you very much, {F#miss}{M#mister}, but don't read too much into it. That's not enough for you to be the second-in-command of The Moles. You gotta get past me — and I ain't planning on giving up my position just yet!

C: 哇哦！没想到真的让{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}找到了《冒险鼹鼠队》的书页。
E: Wow! {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, I never expected you to actually find one of the pages of The Adventurous Moles.

C: 「在边缘通路的露天咖啡馆入口附近」。
E: "At an open-air café in Backwater Pass..."

C: 这只邮筒蜷缩在角落里，似乎并不希望被发现。「还是别去打扰它了吧。」通情达理的你知道，既然以社交性著称的人尚且需要一点私密空间，何况邮筒呢。
E: This mailbox is tucked away in the corner, trying not to be noticed. "Better not disturb it." You get the sense that even the most sociable person would need some personal space, let alone a mailbox.

C: 「你是个诚实的人。」那个声音赞许地说，「我将给你你想要的。」
E: "You are an honest person," the voice says in an approving way, "I will give you what you want."

C: 日前，据星际和平家电雅利洛片区分店某销售员消息称，冰封七百余年的雅利洛-Ⅵ表面再度传来通讯信号。
E: A sales rep from the Jarilo branch of Interastral Peace Appliances told us that signal transmissions have been detected from Jarilo-VI, a planet that has been sealed under heavy snow for over <unbreak>700</unbreak> years.

C: 在未来的日子里，公司将与匹诺康尼开展旅游业、制造业、文化艺术等多个领域的深度合作，携手缔造更为璀璨耀眼的盛会之星。
E: Moving forward, the IPC plans to partner closely with Penacony in areas such as tourism, manufacturing, and cultural arts, with the aim of enhancing the luster of this celebrated Planet of Festivities.

C: 垂下星星…这怕是整座仙舟都装不下吧！
E: "Stars hung from its branches..." Then how did it fit in the Xianzhou!?

C: 何其壮观的神迹…
E: What a spectacular view...

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 谢谢你一路引领我们。
E: Thank you for guiding us all the way here.

C: 内里怪物横行，人迹了无，倒确是藏匿行迹的妙处。
E: With monsters wreaking havoc and the Knights scattered, Stargazer Navalia has become a perfect place for the suspect to hide out.

C: 呵呵，若说没有援手，也不尽然。恩公们准备好了，咱们就出发吧～
E: I wouldn't say you're entirely on your own, hehe... When you're ready, let's get going~

C: 又来了客人？
E: Someone was here before us?

C: 恩公身手了得，和魔阴身打得有来有回。小女子不过一介文职小吏，万一卡芙卡暴起伤人……
E: Not a lot of people out there could've fought the mara-struck like you did. I'm only a civil servant — I can't imagine what Kafka would do to me if I were caught in the fray...

C: 要犯现在由我接管。
E: I'll be taking the criminal from here.

C: 太卜怎么会乖乖听别人的话？
E: I can't imagine Fu Xuan obeying orders to the word.

C: …未必。如果行军大捷，通常会留下据点和部队置后策应。但这里却没有。
E: ...Not necessarily. There'd usually be a base with supporting forces set up after a successful engagement, but we don't see any of that.

C: 潜伏已久的「药王秘传」竟在这个节骨眼现身了，不知那位太卜有没有算到这一节……
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were in hiding for so long... now they finally show their face. Did the master diviner fail to foresee this...?

C: 星核的确引起了与丰饶有关的异象，难道药王秘传因此放弃了伪装？不应该啊，云骑的主力丝毫未损…一定有什么我们不知道的事情发生了，太卜不在，向营地里的云骑打听打听吧。
E: The Stellaron has certainly caused Abundance-like abnormalities — is that what motivated the Disciples to come out of the shadows? No. The Knight's main force remains intact... Something must have happened — something we're not aware of. The master diviner isn't here — let's head into camp and see what we can learn from the troops here.

C: 您还真是胆大呢，这话也敢当着大庭广众说…还是小声些罢，若让云骑军听到，他们可不会手软的。
E: Shh, that's a brave thing to say out in the open... If the Cloud Knights hear you, they won't think twice.

C: 那家伙以仙舟人的样貌潜伏行事，愚弄我等…真是可恶、可恶至极。
E: That impostor had the audacity to carry out her nefarious plans right under our noses... How utterly despicable.

C: 我来此，乃是让这仙舟分崩离析，自灭而亡！
E: I have come with a single purpose: To set in motion the self-destruction of the Xianzhou!

C: 我提防着丰饶孽物、星核猎手、药王秘传…可千算万算，终是没料到「反物质军团」的出现。
E: I have been keeping careful watch against the Abominations of Abundance, the Stellaron Hunters, and the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... but I never anticipated the Antimatter Legion.

C: 不可能，我的名字被抹去了…
E: How can that be, my name was erased...

C: 来到这个地方，记忆可有松动？
E: Has coming here triggered your memory?

C: 符卿，若我无法返回，将始末因果呈报给其他仙舟的重任，交托给你了。
E: Lady Fu, if I am unable to return, I entrust you with the important task of relaying the full account to the other Xianzhou ships.

C: 少主大人，我说不上来。虽然心底有些怨，但总觉得…有些说不出来的感受。
E: I cannot say, young master. I feel resentment in my heart, but there are also... feelings I cannot put into words.

C: 你轻轻将手放在晶壳上，一个梦泡泡在你耳旁绽开。你瞬间明白，珍珠里的孩子渴望成为一名绘制瑰丽丹青的画师。
E: You gently place your hand on the crystal shell, and a dream bubble blooms near your ear. In a moment, you understand that the child in the pearl desires to become a painter who creates brilliant paintings.

C: 这幅壁画应该与周遭其他几幅有所联系，讲述持明族轮回一世的过程，自古海中蜕生，又结卵归于古海。
E: This mural must be related to the others here. It tells the story of the Vidyadhara self-reincarnation, from hatching rebirth in the ancient sea, to the return to that same sea as the cycle begins again.

C: 以纯粹的力量毁灭你们，那是焚风的美学。我不会这么做。
E: Zephyro wished to destroy you with brute force... but that is not my way.

C: 这家伙…要动真格了！
E: I think she's about to get serious!

C: 「不夜侯」…那是咱们刚抵达时经过的港口茶馆的名字吧？
E: The Sleepless Earl... Was that the name of that teahouse at the port when we first got into town?

C: 现在知道我身份的，也只有寥寥几人而已。等消息传开了，谁知会如何？
E: There are only a handful of individuals who know my identity now. I do not wish to guess what could occur if word gets out.

C: 哎，这是…这是停云姐姐答应送我的茶种！她果然从别的世界寻来了么？真是辛苦她了。
E: Oh! This is... This is the tea Miss Tingyun promised to get for me! She really went to another world for this? She's incredible.

C: 这回该按原计划跃迁了吧？
E: So, we can warp jump as planned this time?

C: 我离开时只来得及仓促向姬子小姐道别。
E: When I left the train, I only had time to say a quick goodbye to Himeko.

C: 本座就祝你坦途畅通，履险如夷。
E: I wish your travels be fleeting of foot, and may your crises be effortlessly resolved.

C: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
E: I'm leaving the Luofu.

C: 听上去公输师傅很感伤。
E: You sound touched, Master Gongshu.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，谢谢你能告诉我这个消息。就像丹枢大人说的那样，我们不能指望别人永远照顾自己。
E: Thanks for telling me, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. Like Dan Shu always said, we can't expect others to take care of us forever.

C: 药…药王秘传？你你你你你们找我有什么事？
E: *gulp* Sanctus... Medicus? Wh—wh—what do you want with me?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>请问，你会愿意栖身其中吗？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>I would ask: Would you wish to stay?</color>

C: …又或者邀请者另有其人，但他们默许了，想将计就计再布个更大的。无所谓，家族也好，「钟表匠的遗产」也罢，能为我所用就行。
E: ...Or someone else made the invite, and they acquiesced to elevating the magnitude of the plan. Regardless — be it The Family or the Watchmaker's Legacy, as long as they're all useful to me.

C: 嗯！现实中的匹诺康尼就是这座酒店。而梦中的匹诺康尼…是奇迹诞生的地方，奢华的享乐之地，盛大的筵席永不落幕！
E: Yes! This hotel is Penacony in real life. And the Penacony in the dream... is a place where miracles are born. A land of lavish joy, a grand banquet where the curtains never fall!

C: 唔，很难用词语形容它的美妙。总之，您一定会为之惊叹的！
E: Mm... It's hard to describe its magnificence in words. In any case, you will surely be awed!

C: …你为什么还不走？
E: ...Why haven't you left?

C: 你伛身，躺倒在入梦池中央。冰冷的流质没过你的腰肢。女声继续在你的耳边轻语，伴有晚钟声，野风掀起荒原的簌簌声，知更鸟、沙鸥、天鹅与渡鸦的宣叙调……
E: You curl your body, lying down in the center of the Dream Pool. The icy liquid rises above your waist. The gentle female voice continues to whisper in your ear, accompanied by the tolling of evening bells. The wild wind rustles through the barren plains, while nightingales, seagulls, swans, and ravens add their symphony to the choir...

C: 这里是天堂吗…
E: Are we in Heaven... Or?

C: 是我粗心大意，没能打扫干净，给您添麻烦了…万分抱歉！
E: It was my mistake — I failed to tidy up properly, and caused an inconvenience for you... I'm truly sorry!

C: …啊，不过这并不代表梦中的时间是停滞的——为了避免给各位旅客造成身心负担，梦境中的时间尺度被设定为与现实一致，请您不必担心！
E: ...Ah, but that doesn't mean that time has stopped in the dream. To avoid any physical or mental burden on guests, time in the dream has been synced with reality's, so don't worry!

C: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
E: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

C: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
E: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

C: 多亏你刚才出手相助！不然我可能真的要…被抓走了。
E: I owe you a big one! If it hadn't been for you, I might have been... taken away by them.

C: 你也是家族成员吗？
E: Are you a Family member?

C: 钱包没问题吗？
E: Doesn't that get expensive?

C: 它在临走前似乎提到了「报答」——前提是要你到一个叫「大树」的地方去。
E: Before it left, it seems to have offered some kind of "reward." The main thing is that you need to go to "the tree" first.

C: （点数全部花完了，去找流萤吧。）
E: (I've used up all the tokens. Time to meet Firefly.)

C: 生成完毕！请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上。
E: It's ready! Please close your eyes and rest your forehead against the dream bubble.

C: 你看不到吗？
E: Can't you see him?

C: 真的没问题吗…
E: Are you sure about this...

C: 对！这就说明你成功施展了钟表把戏！
E: Here comes the Clockwork!

C: 别客气，应该的。
E: It's the least I can do.

C: 我猜，是不是和那个…只有你能看见的钟表小子有关？
E: Could it have something to do with... That Clockie that only you can see?

C: 朋友，别卷了。
E: Give yourself a break, mate.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I won't bother you.

C: 真不愧是你，好点子真多！这里的视野真好，整个黄金的时刻都尽收眼底……
E: That's impressive! Got a lot of good ideas, you do! This place has a great view, and you can see all of the Golden Hour from here...

C: …不过咱们一会儿该怎么离开呢？不会又要爬一次通风管道吧？
E: ...Though, how are we going to leave? We're not climbing the ventilation ducts again, are we?

C: 稍等，让我准备一下……
E: Wait, let me get ready.

C: （…咦？那里是不是有个什么…东西在呼救？）
E: (...Eh? Is something... crying for help over there?)

C: 咦，那儿有好多人，好像真的发生什么事了……
E: There's a crowd over there. Looks like something really did happen...

C: 工作室的门没有上锁…
E: The workshop door isn't locked...
(...Firefly?)

C: 这…太突然了…
E: That... that was too sudden...

C: 这不是你的错。
E: It's not your fault.

C: 她也没有选择…
E: She didn't have a choice either...

C: ——二位，我回来了。
E: ...I'm back.

C: 厉害啊，这你都能忍～真是个冷血的家伙。嘿，我们说不定很聊得来哦？
E: Wow, you can endure that much? Truly, a heart of ice you've got there. Hey, maybe we could actually get along?

C: 别客气，这是我应该做的。毕竟你很特殊…特殊到有许多双眼睛在注视着你。
E: I just did what I had to do. You are special, after all... So special that many pairs of eyes are watching your every move.

C: 这片忆域…有点过于扭曲了。我得采用些不那么优雅的手段，二位…请给我一点时间……
E: This Memory Zone... is overly twisted. I have to use inelegant methods, so you two... please give me a little time...

C: 我…不想放弃……
E: I... won't give up...

C: 接下来，找个合适的位置…试着*走上*墙面吧。
E: Next, find a suitable spot... and try *walking up* the wall.

C: 这…怎么可能？
E: But... how is that possible?

C: 公司不是忆庭，能做的事相当有限——这点你再清楚不过。
E: The IPC is not the Garden, and there are real limits to what they can actually do. But you know all this.

C: 别急嘛，你不妨先回到同伴们身边，和他们聊聊。
E: Don't worry. Just head back and talk things over with your companions.

C: （黑天鹅…她又是怎么想的？）
E: (Black Swan... What is she thinking?)

C: 抱歉，我无法回答这个问题。那位游侠太过神秘，恐怕没人能给出定论。
E: Sorry, I can't answer that question. That ranger is shrouded in mystery. I'm afraid no one is capable of providing an answer.

C: 老实说，我之前不信，甚至亲身*试验*了几次——直到我发现自己确实死不掉。一有危险，我就会被「入梦池」强制唤醒，仿佛只是做了个噩梦。
E: To be honest with you, I didn't believe it and even tested it a few times myself — until I discovered that I couldn't actually die. Whenever there's any danger, I'm forced awake by the Dreampool and it's all as if everything were just a nightmare.

C: 如果是前者，就不需要我来传话。
E: If it were the former, it would hardly befit my stature to stoop to the role of a mere messenger.

C: 你好，我是世界上最烂的兵人。
E: Hello, I'm the world's lousiest soldier.

C: 烫烫烫烫烫烫烫。
E: Hothothothothothothot.

C: 阵仗怎么这么大？
E: Why is it so big?

C: 有原则的猎犬家系成员变得异常沉重…还是想办法让他<color=#dbc291ff>轻松</color>一点吧。
E: The principled Bloodhound Family member has become unusually gloomy... You have to think of a way to get him to <color=#dbc291ff>lighten up</color>.

C: 于情于理，他都给出了令人信服的说法。说是不勉强，但意图已经很明显了。
E: He appealed convincingly to both reason and emotion. It wasn't forced, but the intent was obvious.

C: 「死亡」的存在会被家族掩盖，他打算从什么地方破局？切入点必须足够重要，所有人都会关注，但过程中又不能太张扬……
E: The existence of "Death" will be covered up by The Family, so how does he plan on taking them down? It's got to be something important enough that everyone will notice, but it also can't be anything too out-in-the-open...

C: 无论你是否相信，巡海游侠，黄泉…这就是我如今的身份。而拜访匹诺康尼，只是为了一个久远的「遗愿」。
E: Believe it or not, Galaxy Ranger, Acheron... those are the names I go by to this very day. My trip to Penacony is solely to fulfill an old "final request."

C: …好。我向母神发誓，我会永远保护好这份「财富」……
E: ...Okay. I will swear to Gaiathra Triclops to protect this "wealth"...

C: 模型型型型型型型型型型型型型型——
E: Mode-e-e-e-e-e-e-l—

C: 「你交予家族的基石是否属于你？」
E: "Does the Cornerstone you handed over to The Family belong to you?"

C: 嗯，一定会。
E: Mm, I'm sure.

C: 你们说的这加拉赫到底是谁？已经有好几个人跟我提起这名字了，这灰头发的上次也说过。
E: Who exactly is this Gallagher you keep talking about? There have been a few people mentioning this name, even the one with the gray hair.

C: 其他办法…对了！{NICKNAME}不是说，上次是靠那什么…钟表把戏，让这位大哥回心转意的嘛。
E: Another way... That's it! Didn't {NICKNAME} say something about that... What was it... clockwork? That got this guy to change his mind.

C: 去跟他们玩场「游戏」——两天时间，活着出来，证明你的本事货真价实。
E: Go and play a "game" with them. If you come out alive after two days, it proves that you're the real deal.

C: 这些宝石送给你。
E: Here, I got these gems for you.

C: 别，你摇过我们就用不了了。
E: Don't! It's no good for our drink if all shaken up.

C: 这个能用来调饮吗？咦，下面还压着张纸条…「需以珍视之物换取」。
E: Can this be used for mixing drinks? Oh, and there's a note underneath... "Exchange with your precious things."

C: 是要我们拿东西交换？可是应该换什么呢…又要交给谁？
E: What should we exchange for it?... And who should we give our stuff to?

C: 这你就得亲自去问她了。不过我猜她不会松口的，除非你能调出一杯让她心服口服的饮料。
E: You'll have to ask her yourself to find out. But I have a feeling she won't budge unless you impress her with an incredible drink.

C: …我前面说得还不够清楚吗，艾米绮小姐？「惊梦酒吧」只欢迎想尽情享受饮品的客人。抱歉…我对你的提案没兴趣。
E: Haven't I made myself clear enough, Ms. Amiky? The Dreamjolt Hostelry only welcomes guests who want to enjoy a drink to their heart's content. I'm sorry, but I'm not interested in your proposal.

C: 哈努兄弟立牌。
E: Hanu's sign.

C: …再向前走，就要进入朝露公馆深处了。
E: ...Looks like we're about to enter the depths of Dewlight Pavilion.

C: 黄泉微微拔刀。顷刻间，她的气息变得微不可知。
E: Acheron draws her blade slightly. Within a moment, her breath became imperceptible.

C: 两道足迹并非一前一后。从几乎并行的状态来看，同行者应该不是他的下属……
E: It looks like they were walking side by side as opposed to one behind the other — so the second individual is likely equal in status to Aventurine.

C: 「该诈骗案牵连星际和平公司与博识学会多个部门，导致大量人力物力资源浪费，令公司蒙受巨额损失——」
E: "This fraud case has been linked to many departments within the Interastral Peace Corporation and the Intelligentsia Guild, causing a large drain in manpower and resources, resulting in the IPC taking a massive loss..."

C: 你知道我很少说真心话，劝你把它听进去。
E: You know how rare it is for me to give you the straight dope, so listen while you can.

C: 和妈妈告别的那天，有多少卡提卡人在屁股后边像豺狼一样追着你们？
E: When Mama said goodbye that day, how many Katicans were like jackals hot on your heels?

C: 「对掌」是一种小小的仪式，我们把手掌贴在一起，把祷文念给芬戈妈妈听，她就会祝福我们。
E: Putting our palms together is a simple ritual. By putting our palms together and reciting the prayer to Mama Fenge, she will bless us.

C: 卡提卡人嗜血、残忍，贪得无厌。他们想要一切，所以他们什么也得不到。
E: Katicans are bloodthirsty, cruel, and insatiably greedy. They want everything, only to end up with nothing.

C: 登上舞台。
E: Go on stage.

C: 你可以的。
E: Of course you can.

C: 出发吧，各位——到我们贯彻「开拓」之道的时候了。
E: Let's get going, everyone. The hour of trailblazing is upon us.

C: …这就足够了。
E: ...That is enough.

C: …最后一次，我们来「对掌」吧？
E: What do you say? One last time? Put our palms together?

C: 至于吗？表情跟活见了鬼似的，以为我们已经死绝了是吧？哈哈！确实，销声匿迹太久了就这坏处。
E: You look like you've seen a ghost. Did you think we all went extinct? Haha! Well, that's the price you pay for being off-grid for too long.

C: 所以明白了么，你的伙伴现在很危险，可以说是相当危险。如果还不相信，你大可给他们发个消息看看。但我会劝你动作快点……
E: So do you understand now? Your companions are in danger, and it's pretty harrowing. If you don't want to believe me, you'd best send a message to 'em. But I'd advise you to move fast...

C: 请问，你说的是克劳克影视乐园的事故吗？
E: Excuse me, are you talking about the Clock Studios Theme Park incident?

C: 喂！你是傻的吗，知更鸟小姐都认不出来，以为在跟谁说话呢！
E: Hey! Are you a fool? You don't even recognize Miss Robin? Who do you think you're talking to?

C: 没问题。死不了，我和你都一样。
E: I'm fine. I'll survive. Same goes for you.

C: 你的「剧本」里也有。
E: It's in your script, too.

C: 抱歉，我没注意。
E: Sorry, I didn't notice.

C: 艾利欧给我的指示只有一条——「让星穹列车一同追逐『盛大的遗产』」。这意味着钟表匠的遗产对「开拓」的旅途、对你都意义非凡。
E: Elio only gave me one instruction: Allow the Astral Express to pursue the Grand Legacy. It means that the Watchmaker's Legacy holds great significance to Trailblazing, and to you.

C: 以前，艾利欧的剧本都是围绕着某颗具体的星核展开。但在你出现后，这条规则似乎就不适用了。也许，他也在未来中看到了「不可能之事」吧。
E: Elio's scripts used to revolve and expand around certain specific Stellarons. But with your appearance, this condition has apparently ceased to be appropriate. Perhaps, he also saw the "impossible" in the future.

C: 没错。看来她在流梦礁进行了大量的研究与测算，而后匆匆离世。
E: That's right. It seems like she did a great deal of research and calculations in Dreamflux Reef... before abruptly passing away.

C: 现在听来，知更鸟小姐的嗓音似乎有所恢复？
E: Hearing you speak, it sounds as if your voice has made somewhat of a recovery.

C: 很浪漫的想法。那你呢，小博士，你认可妹妹的观点吗？
E: That's quite the romantic idea. And what about you, our young scholar? Do you agree with your sister?

C: 那对兄妹该知道的都知道了，怎么选他们心里有数。各位无名客到得比较晚，我理应花些时间为各位答疑解惑。
E: The siblings already know what they need to, and they've made their choice. But you Nameless arrived a bit late, so it's only fair that I answer your questions.

C: 这玩意应该不能当护身符…
E: I don't think this'll bring us any luck...

C: 还是匹诺康尼好啊，只有美梦，没有苦头，不用为明天烦恼，想做什么就做什么，这才叫活着呢…嗝，舒坦！
E: It's better to be here in Penacony! No pain, no worries about tomorrow, just sweet dreams! You can do whatever you want! That's what I call living... *hiccup* Yeah, now this is the life!

C: 你想说…人类也是如此？
E: Are you implying... that the same goes for humans too?

C: 梦主大人，只要证明谐乐大典与星核无关，是我们多心了的话…我会如约回到舞台献唱。
E: Dreammaster, it's just to prove that the Charmony Festival has nothing to do with the Stellaron. If we're being overly cautious... I will return to the stage to offer tribute in song, just per the arrangement.

C: 请等一下。
E: Just a moment.

C: 虽然不知道您的消息从何而来，但请不要相信这些风言风语。我以猎犬家系成员的名义向您保证，谐乐大典一切进展顺利。
E: I'm not sure where you heard those rumors, but they're completely baseless. I can assure you, as a representative of the Bloodhound Family, that everything is going smoothly for the Charmony Festival.

C: 我军必败无疑！
E: Rest assured, we'll lose!

C: 现在，想象你们二人受到拓荒感召，第一次踏上匹诺康尼的梦之土地。可是这里黄沙漫天，一片荒芜，根本不是「钟表匠」口中的乐土！
