E: Envision that you both, driven by the spirit of exploration, are arriving at the land of dreams that is Penacony for the first time. But! Instead of lush lands, you find yourselves amidst swirling sands and desolation, far from the paradise the Watchmaker described.

C: 我会…站起来，和他一起再次出发。
E: I'm... gonna get back on my feet and keep moving forward.

C: 前方一共有三座舞台，每座舞台上都有一场挑战。挑战的敌人都是电影《逐梦往事》中的反派角色。干脆利落地打倒敌人，创造新的记录吧！
E: There are a total of three stages up ahead, each with their own challenges. The enemies you will contend against are antagonists from the film Once Upon a Time in Dreams. Defeat them swiftly and decisively to set a new record!

C: 天哪，无敌的哈努兄弟居然倒下了！各位，快快回到战场，向恶棍们复仇吧！
E: Oh no, the not-so-unstoppable Hanu has actually fallen! Quickly, return to the battlefield and seek revenge against the bad guys!

C: 拿到了美梦剧团的内心碎片…这种事也太梦幻了。
E: An inner self fragment belonging to the Sweet Dreams Troupe... This is just too surreal.

C: 我谨代表主办方向你致以诚挚祝贺，愿你在祂的光芒下得享喜乐。
E: I, on behalf of the organizers, extend my sincere congratulations to you, wishing you joy under THEIR radiance.

C: 还真是方便的流程啊…要是主办方允许穿装甲参赛就更好了。
E: What a coincidentally convenient plot twist... It'd be even more awesome if the organizers allowed me to wear armor.

C: 你囚禁了我们？
E: You've imprisoned us?

C: 他也做好了计划，准备发家致富后就把孩子赎回，共享匹诺康尼的美梦。只可惜他的偷渡计划有些笨拙，被那群冥顽不灵的猎犬们嗅出了气息。
E: He had a plan in place: He would buy back his children once he had made his fortune, and enjoy Penacony's beautiful dream with them. Alas, his plan to smuggle himself was somewhat clumsy — and he was sniffed out by those pigheaded Hounds.

C: 他为了追梦，竟然连孩子都卖了欸…就算有赎回的打算，也太不负责任了吧。
E: He sold his kids to chase a dream... Even if he intended to go back for them, it's still insanely irresponsible.

C: 看来你和我一样，也在思考另一种选择能否带来更好的结局。但很可惜，他的下场恐怕只会更加凄惨。
E: It seems you, like me, are pondering whether a different choice could have led to a better outcome. Sadly, his fate would only be more tragic.

C: 竟然一下子就选对了？
E: Wait, you managed to choose the right door on your first try?

C: 爷爷？什么意思，莫非你是「钟表匠」的后代？
E: Grandpa? Do you mean... you're the Watchmaker's grandson?

C: 当然，都走到这一步了，还有「前进」以外的选项吗？
E: Of course. We've come this far. Surely there's no other option than moving forward.

C: {NICKNAME}，你还记得吗？误入这里的时候，你有拿到过一块神秘的碎片。
E: Do you remember, {NICKNAME}? You said you obtained a mysterious shard when you stumbled into this place.

C: 哼，不谈那群无名客，那头上长翅膀的小子也跟你一模一样，死心眼儿，不见棺材不落泪…天意弄人啊，要不是这该死的命途，咱几个没准真能聊到一起去。
E: Yeah, not just those Nameless, even Mr. Wings is just like you... Stubborn, won't listen or give up, no matter what... Well, fate is unpredictable, I guess. If we weren't bound by those cursed Paths, maybe we could've had some good talks.

C: 只可惜，尝起来实在是有点淡。
E: It's a shame these berries don't have much flavor.

C: 丹恒先生，你听说过比亚里-斯卡曼德洛斯星么？那是「同谐」影响下的地上天国之一，大小达耳达努星系居民们趋之若鹜的人间天堂。
E: Have you heard of a planet named Byari Skamandros, Dan Heng? It's one of the paradises under the influence of the Harmony, a sought-after wonderland for the inhabitants of the Dardanu Major and Minor systems.

C: 恕我难以苟同。那颗星球既没有加入信用体系，也没有连通银轨，是「同谐」庇护下的偏远文明…但匹诺康尼不一样。
E: I would disagree. Byari Skamandros is not part of the credit system or connected to the silver rail. It's nothing more than a remote civilization sheltered by the Harmony... But Penacony is different.

C: …「同谐」的希佩。据说祂参与了列神对虫皇的讨伐，又出于不明原因吞纳了「秩序」太一。
E: ...Xipe the Harmony. Legend has it that THEY participated in the crusade against the Imperator Insectorum and devoured Ena the Order for unknown reasons.

C: 他小宝贝的，好家伙…你们是想说可能是两道无主的命途在暗中捣鬼？
E: Holy forkeroni... So, you're saying that the two leaderless Paths are working behind the scenes?

C: 正是。有罗浮云骑支援…应当够了。
E: Exactly. The assistance from the Luofu Cloud Knights... would be enough.

C: 那东西一辈子只能用一次，你最好想清楚了。
E: Think it over carefully. You can only use that once in your lifetime.

C: 看来「谐乐大典」票房不佳啊！
E: Looks like the Charmony Festival was a flop at the box office!

C: 「可惜直到最后，他们仍是一群被赋予了自由权的奴隶。」
E: "Alas, they remain but slaves till the very end, with the illusion of freedom."

C: 「如若没有一位君王，谁庇护孱弱者，谁对抗横暴者？」
E: "Without a king, who shall protect the weak and stand against the mighty?"

C: 因为我们的目标一致，你我为之奋斗的信念也有同等的分量。
E: Because our shared goals give equal weight to the beliefs we strive for.

C: 那…就把那件「小小的临别礼物」还给我吧？我已经迫不及待了。
E: So... How about you hand that "small parting gift" back to me? I'm quite eager to have it back.

C: 这并非你冒险故事里最<color=#dbc291ff>致命的破绽</color>。还有时间，不妨再认真思考一下吧。
E: This is not <color=#dbc291ff>the fatal flaw</color> in your adventure. Take your time and think it through.

C: 内乱期间，他随灯蛾家系一同重新开辟银轨，途中遭虫群袭击失踪，后为巡海游侠所救。
E: While reopening the silver rail with the Lampmoth Family during the civil war, he was ambushed by the Swarm and disappeared only to be rescued by the Galaxy Rangers.

C: 如今，星期日借由谐乐大典篡夺了{RUBY_B#「同愿」的同谐化身}「齐响诗班」{RUBY_E#}的权能。阿斯德纳也因此坠入太一之梦，平等地将每一个人变作祂的{RUBY_B#傀儡}音符{RUBY_E#}。
E: Now Sunday has usurped the power of the {RUBY_B#Shared Wish's Harmonious Embodiment}Harmonious Choir{RUBY_E#} through the Charmony Festival. Asdana has thus fallen into Ena's Dream, transforming everyone equally into the {RUBY_B#puppets}notes{RUBY_E#} of the Aeon.

C: 举手之劳。也要感谢身在匹诺康尼的忆者们，你的那三位同伴…应该都从各自的梦里醒来了。
E: You're welcome. And thanks to the Memokeepers in Penacony, too. I believe your partners... have also awakened from their dreams.

C: 你说话还是那么…别有深意。
E: Your words still carry... a profound significance.

C: 会有人在他的坟前，献上一束花。
E: Someone would stand at his grave and place a bouquet of flowers.

C: 是啊，无数次…我被家族拒之门外，只能和它擦肩而过。
E: Yeah, for countless times... I got rejected by The Family and had to pass it by.

C: 但我知道，我的同伴还在那里…孤身一人……
E: But I knew that my companion was still there... alone...

C: 哥哥，你说…星星会死去吗？
E: Brother, do you think... the stars will fade away?

C: 这边，亲爱的。
E: This way, darling.

C: 你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？
E: What happened to you in Ena's dream?

C: 听您的意思…您是想绕开公司，直接向全宇宙公开募股？
E: If I'm not mistaken... you want to bypass the IPC and go public on a universal scale?

C: 她作为列车组代表，先行前往和家族交涉了。等安排妥当，会立马联系我们。
E: She went to negotiate with The Family as a representative of the Crew. She'll contact us once her arrangements are ready.

C: 是啊，很高兴能再见到各位。但重逢过后，也许就是道别了。
E: Yeah, it's good to see you all again, although we might be saying goodbye again after this reunion.

C: 而为了不让匹诺康尼再走上先前的老路，对星穹列车而言，公司也会成为谈判桌上不可或缺的助力。
E: As far as the Astral Express is concerned, the IPC will make for an invaluable ally during the negotiations to prevent Penacony returning to its former ways.

C: 说来有些令人哑然，在无边无际的梦中，我得以回到故乡，与分别已久的朋友重逢。而因为一些特殊的原因…我想起了黄泉小姐。
E: Well, it was somewhat surprising. In that dream, I returned to my homeworld and reunited with my long-lost friends. And for some reason... Acheron resurfaced in my mind.

C: 列车不要紧吗？
E: But what about the Express?

C: 智库里没有相关记录，只是我的猜测：「秩序」的隐患始终存在于「同谐」中，这原本是家族的内部问题。
E: No related records exist in the data bank, but I have a theory: The hidden dangers of the Order have always been within the Harmony — And this issue existed within The Family from the very beginning.

C: 但身为{RUBY_B#「同谐」希佩}祂{RUBY_E#}的选民，我还是需要最后一个答案的。
E: However, as {RUBY_B#Xipe, the Harmony}THEIR{RUBY_E#} chosen one, I still need one final answer.

C: （混进来的过程比我想的还要轻松，家族的安保还是一样疏漏百出。）
E: (Sneaking in was easier than I thought. The Family's security is as lax as ever.)

C: 是的，一切。
E: That's right, everything.

C: 不是在做梦啦，这是在现实，「白日梦」酒店！「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
E: You're not dreaming. We're in The Reverie Hotel, in the real world. The Order's dream is over.

C: 你的宝箱就归我了！
E: Your chest is mine!

C: 但在匹诺康尼内外部的共同努力下，我们终于令梦境重回正轨。又时逢谐乐大典，可谓是好事成双，「晖长石号」的重新启航也具备了新的意义。
E: But thanks to the hard work of Penacony's internal and external factions, we've finally gotten the Dreamscape back on track, just in time for the Charmony Festival. And as they say, good things come in pairs. The Charmony Festival not only celebrates this achievement but also marks the relaunch of the Radiant Feldspar.

C: 我二呢？
E: Where's two?

C: 你或许有所不知，其实正是我导演了匹诺康尼的整场闹剧。作为剧目的{M#男一号}{F#女一号}，你现在有什么想法？欢迎畅所欲言……
E: If you didn't know, I'm the one who directed the entire farce in Penacony. As the leading {F#lady}{M#man} of the show, what did you think? Feel free to share your thoughts...

C: 别过来，这颗炸弹很危险！还有…我是真的流萤！
E: Don't come close. This bomb is very dangerous! And... I'm the real Firefly!

C: 美梦失去了「秩序」的庇护，要是让它在这里爆炸…后果不堪设想。我研究了很久，但这枚炸弹的构造十分特殊，像是被某种莫名的命途力量上了锁……
E: The sweet dream has lost the protection of the Order — if it were to blow up here... the consequences would be unfathomable. I've scrutinized it for a long time, but the bomb's design is incredibly unique, as if it's been locked by some mysterious Path force...

C: 时间会带走一切，珍惜当下。
E: Time will wash everything away, so treasure the present.

C: 呜呜…帕呜……
E: *sob*... *sniff*...

C: 太好了，有文凭了！
E: Awesome! I'll finally have some academic credentials!

C: 原来鬼动静是你？
E: Oh, so that ruckus was you?

C: 什么鬼动静！我喊你的时候很温柔的，好不好？
E: What do you mean ruckus!? I was really gentle when trying to wake you up.

C: 专注呼吸，想象一座乐园…想象…一片……
E: Focus on your breathing and imagine you're in paradise... Imagine... an... island...

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: Ba na na na~

C: 它们作鸟兽散了。这群邪祟心中有鬼，此地不宜久留。
E: They've scampered off in different directions. Those fiendlings are up to no good. We'd better get moving.

C: 咦？是在叫我们吗？
E: Huh? Are you talking to us?

C: 你是…？
E: And you are...?

C: 走吧，候考地点在公共教室。
E: Let's go. The waiting area is in the open classroom.

C: 没有，我还没找到。
E: No, I haven't found it.

C: 我是谐乐学院。
E: I'll be going to Charmony Academy.

C: 她就是你在梦里看见的忍者？
E: Is she the ninja you saw in your dream?

C: 其次，我只是恰巧路过，看到朋友来和他打个招呼。
E: Second, I just happened to be passing by. I saw a friend and came to say hello.

C: 他们自称「助蕉」，看着像美梦剧团，但要多奇怪有多奇怪。来这里，只是为了宣扬一种名为「睡蕉小猴」的……
E: They call themselves Assistananas. They look like the Sweet Dreams Troupe, except much stranger. They came here to advertise something called the Slumbernana Monkey...

C: 我肯定是没睡醒吧？这种双厨狂喜的好事儿，还能让我碰上？
E: I must be dreaming! Two of my favorite things together? I must be the luckiest fan alive!

C: 《走在睡蕉上的旅行》，献丑了蕉！
E: This is "The Slumbernana Traveler." I hope you find it ap-"peeling"!

C: 场面未必好看，但结果一定公道。我只在乎公道。
E: Things ain't gonna be pretty, but justice will be served, and that's all I care about.

C: 但为了这部影片，我愿意放下一些坚持，为两位游侠提供一些小小的关联。
E: Yet, for the sake of this film, I am willing to forgo some of my standards to offer some tiny clues to you and the other Ranger.

C: 可是，您为什么要提起这个？
E: Is there a reason you're telling us this?

C: 你喊着什么正义勇气开拓，将周身气力用于双臂，试图使它为你打开一条代表希望与财富的缝隙——
E: You yell out something about trailblazing justice and courage, channeling all your strength into your arms, and attempt to make it open a crevice representing hope and fortune for you...

C: 过一个巧手鉴定
E: Roll DEX once

C: 等等！这又是个什么蕉？
E: Wait! What in the bana is this!?

C: 竟用邪术将忍者变作邪祟，多么可怕。
E: Resorting to sorcery to turn ninjas into fiendlings... Dreadfully horrid.

C: 废物~废物猴子~你是打不过本魔王的，赶紧回家吃香蕉吧~
E: Good-for-nothing monkey~ You're no match for me, loser monkey! Go back home and chomp on your bananas instead!

C: （丹恒，辛苦你了……）
E: (Thanks for quenching her wrath, Dan Heng...)

C: 虽然是挺欠揍的…但人设错了，不及格！
E: It's taunting, alright... But you're channeling the wrong archetype! Fail!

C: 芮克先生，停止拍摄吧，我们该换演员了。
E: Let's stop filming, Mr. Reca. We need to swap out the actors.

C: 一天被打两次了！
E: Two "chops" in one day!

C: 是啊，睡蕉的前身是繁殖力极强的碧绿野蕉。如果没有人为干预，它本应绽放更加多彩的光芒，就像这匹诺康尼一样。
E: Of course. The golden Slumbernana's predecessor was the highly reproductive jadegreen banana. If not for human intervention, it would have blossomed much more vibrantly over the years, much like Penacony as we know it.

C: 他们都是稀世罕见的好演员，还有许多留待挖掘的故事，我可不能让他们就这么杀青啊。
E: We're talking exceptional talents that are incredibly rare to come by! They have so many more stories waiting to be unearthed! I can't allow their journey to end here.

C: 哈，见过手枪炸膛吗？只要能用对时候，强过给人一梭子。
E: Hah, ever seen a squib load? When timed right, it's more effective than unloadin' a full clip.

C: 喂——喂——这么快？
E: Hey—! Hellooo! That was fast...?

C: 别过来，站那儿别动。
E: Stay where you are. Don't come any closer.

C: 哈，在胡说八道些什么，真是个怪梦。
E: Hah, what a strange dream. Everything sounds like nonsense.

C: 感觉如何？
E: How do you feel?

C: 但…怎么回事，我现在感觉还不赖。是呢，谁香蕉在乎？
E: Well... what the heck, I actually feel pretty good right now. Yeah... who banana fudgin' cares about revenge!?

C: 至于你…很快就会被我写进研究报告了。
E: And you... you'll soon be mentioned in my research report.

C: 初次见面…阁下何许人也？
E: Greetings. Who might you be?

C: 密码正确，活体基因编辑已关闭，舱门开启中。
E: Password input correct. Live specimen gene editing disabled. Opening hatch.

C: 蕉蕉蕉——返祖目标：狭鼻次目；基因退行进度：7％；生命体征：稳定。
E: Bana, bana. Atavistic target: Old World monkey. Gene regression progress: 7%. Vital signs: Stable.

C: 答案很简单，你毕不了业了。根据能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>的报告，你正在让实验走向错误的方向。
E: Simple. You won't be able to graduate. According to Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>'s reports, you have been guiding the experiment in the wrong direction.

C: 当然——忍徒•乱破。
E: Of course... Now, Ninja Initiate Rappa.

C: 演员们，准备好开始最后的演出了吗？
E: Actors, are you ready for the final act?

C: 让他给跑了？
E: He escaped?

C: 那你牛大了。
E: Wow, you're the best.

C: 他香蕉的，这都什么？
E: Banana my sundae! What kind of questions are these?

C: 啧，要让这石球滚到终点还真不容易…我看着都手抖。
E: Tsk, getting that stone ball to the endpoint looks pretty tough... My hands are shaking just from looking at it.

C: 这…恐怕不妥。火种试炼比寻常仪式复杂得多，若错估作业之理，或逆行，或歪曲，后果不堪设想……
E: That... might not be a good idea. The Coreflame trial is many times more complicated than a standard ritual. Even the slightest misjudgment, misstep, or hiccup could result in grave consequences...

C: 「不可名状」、「不知源头」…这些关键词组合在一起，你会想到什么？
E: An "unspeakable" thing of "unknown origin"... What comes to your mind when we put these keywords together?

C: 没准是阿基维利自产自销呢。
E: Who knows, maybe Akivili's behind it all.

C: 快躲起来，躲在家里！
E: Hurry, hide in the house!

C: 死吧，猪猡——！
E: Die, you swine!

C: 哼…「纷争」的试炼竟如此恶毒啊。
E: Hmph... The trial of Strife is a vicious one, alright.

C: 纵然死神来叫你起床，你也将倨傲地告诉它：生命因何而沉睡？因为被窝很温暖……
E: Even if Death itself came to rouse you, you'd proudly retort: Why does life slumber? Because the bed is warm...

C: 确实需要慎重考虑。
E: Right, we need to think about this first.

C: 话都说到这份上了，那就…
E: Well, if you insist...

C: 才不是，阿格莱雅女士这么厉害，我哪里能在这种事上帮得了忙。
E: Haha, you're mistaken! The capable Lady Aglaea doesn't need my help with things like this.

C: 我倒是有个提议。{NICKNAME}若闲不下来，何不与大家同去树庭？那里的景貌幽邃雅致，适合旅行。
E: If you're not keen on just sitting around, {NICKNAME}, why not go with them? The Grove is a picturesque place, perfect for sightseeing.

C: 小小蝶，小小灰，准备好了吗？
E: Little Cas, Little Gray, are you ready?

C: 那你先来，我给你加油！
E: You go first! I'll cheer you on!

C: 获得强力的新技能！
E: You'll learn a powerful new ability!

C: 很久以前，「最初的学者」塞勒苏斯带领众人在林间建立起花园与庭院，并取名「神悟树庭」，供世人醒神、求识、悟道之用。
E: A long time ago, Thalesus, the First Scholar, led the masses to build a garden and courtyard in the forest, naming the site the "Grove of Epiphany." There, people sought mental clarity, knowledge, and enlightenment.

C: 树庭闭门谢客了？
E: Is the Grove closed to visitors?

C: …不过这人到底是谁？总觉得大家对他有一种莫名的信任？
E: Who is this Anaxa anyway? Why does everybody seem to have some kind of trust in him?

C: 无人获胜——因为那届大辩论会本就没召开过。
E: Nobody won because the <unbreak>752</unbreak>nd Great Debate never took place.

C: 粗重的呼吸是你决心的真实写照，感人至深，就连林间草木都应声簌簌作响。
E: Your heavy breathing is a testament to your determination, deeply moving, as even the forest leaves rustle in response.

C: 呵…还是随吾一道来吧。
E: Heh... Just come with me.

C: 依吾所见，倒不如宽下心来，合衷共济，先踏过难关，再论谁是谁非。
E: Therefore, why don't we just put everything aside and work together? We can always determine who's right and who's wrong once we overcome this.

C: 吾去去就回。
E: I'll be back shortly.

C: 慢、慢一点，不要打草惊蛇！
E: S—Slow down. We don't want to alert them.

C: 不容易…吾要精疲力尽了。
E: That was tough... I'm truly exhausted.

C: 慌什么！有元老院的指示，黄金裔也不敢对我们怎么样。
E: Get a grip! We're here by order of the Council of Elders. Even the Chrysos Heirs have to think twice before doing anything to us.

C: 元老院的走狗，让开。
E: Out of my way, lackeys of the Council.

C: 我想与你讨论…悬锋族人的未来。
E: I came to discuss... the future of the Kremnoans.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是你亲手用长矛贯穿了他的胸膛。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You drove the spear into his chest with your very own hands.</color>

C: 「…却不曾想，跌入了燃烧的炉膛？」
E: "...Yet little do they know, that they will step into flames, fuel to the fire, a burning brand."

C: 早在黄金世前，两头野兽便已在特雷托斯平原上捉对厮杀。雄狮当剑羚作盘中餐，而剑羚视之为一堵蔑视、压迫、磨难的高墙，它誓用犄角将其推翻……
E: Long before the dawn of Era Chrysea, the two beasts started their timeless battle on the plains of Tretos. The lion regarded the oryx as its food, while the oryx perceived the lion as a scornful, oppressive, and challenging barrier that it swore to topple with its antlers...

C: 哈…混账老爷子，走得倒是轻巧……
E: Heh... Just up and left me behind, that old man...

C: 但当时，在树庭，你接下我的时候……
E: Yet when you caught me in the Grove...

C: 伪善者…野心家！创世的神谕，逐火之旅，不过是你用来攫取权力的说辞罢了。
E: You're a hypocrite... and a megalomaniac! The prophecy of genesis and the Flame-Chase Journey are just excuses for you to seize power.

C: 克拉特鲁斯……
E: Krateros...

C: （遐蝶说得对，先回去休息吧。估计迷迷也累坏了，一直都没出声。）
E: (Castorice is right. I should get some rest. Mem is probably exhausted too. {F#She hasn't}{M#They haven't} made a peep.)

C: 「三者开辟天地，三者编织命运。三者捏塑生命，三者引渡灾祸。」
E: "Three carved the heavens and the earth, three wove the threads of fate. Three molded life with their hands, and three guided calamity's gate."

C: 与此同时 奥赫玛某处
E: At the same time, somewhere in Okhema

C: 到时候，可以交给缇安，缇安最会卖可怜了！
E: Leave it to Trianne. Trianne knows how to play cute!

C: 但要是如你所说，它岂不是很快就会冲着奥赫玛来？创世涡心可是摆满了泰坦的火种。
E: But if your argument holds up, wouldn't they be headed to Okhema soon? The Vortex of Genesis is full of the Titans' Coreflames.

C: 一是我本人；二是仍未陨落的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}；三是保管诸神火种的奥赫玛和创世涡心。
E: The first target is me. The second target is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, who hasn't yet fallen. And the third is Okhema and the Vortex of Genesis, where the Coreflames are housed.

C: 呵呵，派头十足啊，「救世主」。
E: Oho, what a spirited display, "Deliverer."

C: …没错。山之民畏惧改变，更遑论迁徙。战争将至，长老却只打算求和，不愿离开山里。吉奥刻勒斯感到悲哀，愤怒。
E: ...That's right. The Mountain Dwellers were fearful of even the smallest change to their lifestyle, let alone leaving their home. Despite the imminent war, the elders would rather negotiate for peace instead of leaving the mountains. This made Geocles both angry and sad.

C: 如今我身负神权，隐隐能感觉到…你们对翁法罗斯的未来重要非凡。
E: Now that I bear the divine within me, I can get the vague feeling that... that you have a great significance for the future of Amphoreus.

C: 我已不是「王」了，大工匠。
E: I'm no longer the "king," Grand Craftsman.

C: 不过…你没说错。我只是觉得，这种场合，强装轻松可能会显得更体面些。
E: But you're not off the mark... I just thought putting on a nonchalant front for this occasion might help us preserve some dignity.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 向您致敬。
E: We salute you.

C: 缇宝老师…你不来么？
E: Tribbie... Are you not coming with us?

C: 缇宝大人，你分明知道…那句*明天见*只是一个善意的谎言。
E: Lady Tribbie, you know perfectly well... that see you tomorrow is nothing but a white lie.

C: ——「我们」究竟为何物，对吗？
E: "What exactly are 'we'?" Correct?

C: 现在 奥赫玛
E: Presently, in Okhema

C: 报！白厄大人…啊，还有缇宝、缇宁大人！你们没事就好！
E: Lord Phainon! Ah... Lady Tribbie! And Lady Trinnon! I'm glad you're alright!

C: 你的思绪渐渐回溯到了那场「圣杯战争」伊始，许多模糊的细节变得清晰了起来。
E: Your thoughts gradually rewind to the beginning of that Holy Grail War as many vague details gain clarity.

C: 我和漆黑的虎克大人约好了，这趟盛会之星的旅行，得全程录制些精彩记录给老乡们开开眼。这不，正巧碰上你来接受「匹诺康尼圣杯战争」的采访——
E: I promised Pitch-Dark Hook the Great we'd record every thrilling moment of this trip to the Planet of Festivities for the folks back home. And here we are — stumbling upon you being interviewed for the Penaconian Holy Grail War—

C: 奥帝先生，需要我优先处理一下吗？
E: Mr. Oti, should I take care of this first?

C: 那些有意接受「请柬」并打算加入圣杯战争的参战者，已经时刻在我的宝具注视之下了。制片人，你打算先看看哪个呢？
E: The participants who have accepted the invitation and plan to join the Holy Grail War are already under my Noble Phantasm's watch. So producer, which one do you want to check out first?

C: 我也是这么想的，Lancer。有我在此，绝不会坐视你伤害我的御主。
E: That's what I was thinking too, Lancer. But as long as I stand here, I won't let you lay a hand on my Master.

C: 你就是我的从者吗？
E: Are you my Servant?

C: 忽然传来了一阵雷鸣般的「咕噜」声…显然，眼前的女战士饿坏了。
E: Only to suddenly hear a thunderous rumble... It seems the lady knight before you is starving.

C: 那么，事情很简单，我们一起去把主办这场圣杯战争的老可爱给逮出来。
E: That makes things simple. We just find the muddle-fudger behind this Holy Grail War and drag them out into the open.

C: 流梦礁的快餐店量大实惠。
E: No worries. The fast food joints in Dreamflux Reef are cheap with big portions.

C: 我经历过很多次圣杯战争，也见识过各种不同的仪式形态。但这一次，和过去全都不同。
E: I've experienced many Holy Grail Wars and seen many different ritual forms, but this one is unlike anything before.

C: 没有战斗过的痕迹，不太像Lancer的作风。
E: No signs of battle. This doesn't quite seem like something Lancer would do.

C: 哼，这座镇子可是我身为骑士的起点。
E: Hmph. This town is nothing less than where my life as a knight began.

C: 我很幸运。
E: I'm really lucky.

C: 御主，我只是…有些疲惫。
E: Master... I'm so... tired.

C: 身为骑士的功绩。
E: The deeds he achieved as a knight.

C: 天然矿石研讨。
E: Natural Ore Symposium.

C: 我有时也会想，如果你跟我们一起离开，会发生什么变化。可惜，开拓之旅从来不存在「后悔」和「如果」。
E: I sometimes wonder what might have changed if you had come with us. Sadly, the trailblazing expedition doesn't leave room for regrets and what-ifs.

C: 轻松完成工作。
E: Breeze through the work.

C: 我们甚至可以签订一张合同，用定义精确、逻辑干净的语言许愿，让圣杯满足所有人的愿望——各位御主和从者，你们为之战斗的不就是这一刻吗？
E: We can even formalize it with a contract — using precise, logical language to word our wishes, ensuring the Holy Grail fulfills everyone's desires... After all, isn't this the very moment you've all been fighting for, Masters and Servants?

C: 我不需要圣杯，我没有实现的愿望也将在此作结。
E: I don't need the Holy Grail. The wishes I did not fulfill will end here.

C: 混蛋！别以为顶着「石心十人」的名头我就怕你！战略投资部的手再长，也伸不到咱们这边来！
E: Wretched brat! You think I'm scared of you just cos you're a Stoneheart? The Strategic Investment Department's reach may be long, but it will never reach my neck of the woods!

C: Saber也是加把劲骑士。
E: Saber's a knight who gives her all too.

C: *清嗓*。
E: *Clears throat*

C: 不过他的名字早就被匹诺康尼人遗忘了。他用来关住我们的这部电影，是我偶然在星际旧货市场淘到的。
E: But people in Penacony forgot about his name ages ago. I only found the film he used to trap us through sheer luck — picked it up at an interstellar junk market.

C: 哼，你可不要对我有太多信心。
E: Hmph. Don't place too much faith in me.

C: 终于该结束了——trace on。
E: Time to end this — Trace on.

C: 是啊，除了能动摇情绪的能力，这家伙浑身上下都是破绽。
E: Yep. Besides his emotion-manipulating powers, this guy's nothing but walking weak points.

C: 砂金在替某位同僚讨要签名，究竟是谁呢？真令人好奇。
E: Aventurine is asking for an autograph on behalf of a colleague, who could it be? How curious.

C: 我可不是什么都没干啊，有个叫左轮总督的恶灵缠着我，非要和我玩一局，把十年的存款都输给了我——瞧，我还带了个老朋友回来。
E: Well, I did do something, alright? Some evil spirit called the Revolver Governor got all clingy with me, insisted we play a game — and ended up losing ten years' worth of savings to me. Look, I even brought an old friend back with me.

C: 我对你的品味不做评价。
E: I reserve judgment on your film taste.

C: 营救公主行动！
E: The princess rescue mission is on!

C: 是啊，黑天鹅小姐不是也说了——难以从外部被观测到，只能被忆庭之镜照映出来的世界——神神秘秘的。
E: Yeah, that's what Miss Black Swan said. It's a world hidden away from outside observation, with a presence only revealed by the light from the mirror of the Garden of Recollection. It's mysterious, alright.

C: 原来如此，打扰二位了。
E: I see. We'll leave the two of you to your work, then.

C: 这算什么，历练一下你？
E: Was that his way of training you?

C: 那位狐人少女的经历也堪称一段奇遇，也许这就是有机生命的缘分吧。
E: That foxian girl has indeed been through an unimaginable turn of events. I suppose that's the fate you organic lifeforms are bound by.

C: 所以，有谁能为我解释一下吗？
E: So, is anyone going to tell me what's going on?

C: 我要打破你的刻板印象。
E: I'm gonna have to break that stereotype you have of me.

C: 你是想看她们打起来吧……
E: You're hoping for them to get into a fight, aren't you?

C: …没什么。
E: Never mind...

C: 回了仙舟，商团也寻个代言可好？
E: Perhaps a merchant guild representative can be found upon returning to the Xianzhou?

C: 要去哪？
E: Where are we going?

C: 我们岂不是根本就不会相见？
E: We wouldn't have crossed paths.

C: 故事发生在仙舟联盟，一位年少成名的剑客欲摘得剑首之名，而他刚满百岁的狐人师妹却在此时令他陷入了两难之境……
E: The story unfolds in the Xianzhou Alliance, where a young sword master strives to become the Sword Champion. However, his junior foxian soror who's just turned a hundred, puts him in a tough spot...

C: 毕竟是要带回仙舟，还是挑些和联盟无关的吧。您随意选几个便好。
E: Since I'm returning to the Xianzhou, I think it's better to choose something unrelated to the Alliance. Feel free to pick a few for me.

C: 是啊，偏偏是我……
E: Yeah, me, of all people...

C: …怎么？你不打算回去吗？
E: ...Why? You don't want to?

C: 放心，不会花太多时间的。
E: Don't worry. I won't take too much time.

C: 我固然不具备「开拓」的意志，也无法成为一位真正的无名客。
E: While I lack the will to Trailblaze, nor can I become a true Nameless...

C: 登上星穹列车，暂且与各位同行？
E: Come aboard the Astral Express and travel with you for now?

C: 谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
E: Thank you all for your forgiveness.

C: 话虽如此，情报还是太少了。
E: Still, we know far too little about the planet.

C: …等会儿，是不是少了个人？
E: ...Wait, I think we might be missing someone.

C: 没问题，我俩配合默契。
E: Sure, we work well together.

C: 计算机很快就能恢复运转，距离谒见机器头就只差最后一步。
E: These computers will get up to speed soon. Now we're just one final step away from requesting an audience with Droidhead.

C: 最后一个扇区…是叫「通信区」来着？
E: Our last stop is the... Communications Zone?

C: 不是，为什么还有这种预设啊？！
E: No, wait. Why do you even have such presets!?

C: 别怕，就算被藏进了镜子里，你还是能为这个世界做出贡献的。你身上那点微薄的命途能量，说不定就能帮我引来机器头的注意呢？
E: Aww, cheer up. You can still do your part for this world while trapped in a mirror. For all you know, your weak Path Energy could just help me get Droidhead looking this way.

C: 他在向我们隐瞒什么？
E: He's hiding something from us?

C: 慢…门开了？
E: Hold on. It opened on its own?

C: 沿着命运的一缕游丝，你落下了开篇的第一笔，感觉如何？
E: By following the threads of fate, you have begun to write the opening chapter of your story. How do you feel?

C: 我来熄灭你的火种，泰坦！
E: I shall extinguish your Coreflame, Titan!

C: 真是奇妙的启程礼。我对二位的来由越发好奇了。
E: What an interesting way to mark the start of your journey. I grow more and more curious about your cause.

C: 沉静…感触远比字句更加真诚，也更善于解惑。闭上双眼，让暖流拥抱你，用肌肤聆听海的故事。
E: Quiet your thoughts... Feelings are far more honest than words and can better satisfy your curiosity. Close your eyes and feel the warm ripples of water embrace you. Feel the delivery of this account from the seas.

C: 「还没到你呢！课堂上禁止抢话！」
E: "It's not your turn! No interrupting me in class!"

C: 是啊。泰坦，很奇妙吧？
E: We know, right? Aren't Titans amazing?

C: …不怎么擅长「接触」而已。无论是和人，还是和这些孩子。
E: ...am not too good with social "contact." Regardless of whether it's with people or with these children.

C: 完美的神造出最初之人，最初之人砌成最初之城。
E: The perfect gods created the very first humans, and the first humans created the first city.

C: 粉霞天女，只从这字里行间，我便能想象你的美貌！你定然是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的化身，令我深陷池沼，难以自拔……
E: Rosy Celestial Maiden, just from this name alone am I able to imagine your beauty! You must be the incarnation of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}. You cause me to sink deeper and deeper, unable to get a hold of myself...

C: 这不是奥赫玛的新朋友，两位远道而来的勇士吗？幸会幸会，吼吼吼！
E: Aren't you Okhema's two new friends? The brave warriors from a faraway place? It's an honor to meet you, roarrr!

C: 那便是你们面前的祭仪水盆。消解旁支杂念，以盆中灵水敷面，再次睁开双眼时，你们便能见证……
E: That passageway is none other than the ceremonial basin in front of you. Clear yourselves of all distracting thoughts and wash your faces with the spirit water inside the basin. When you next open your eyes, you shall witness for yourselves...

C: 躺椅
E: Lounger

C: 贵客，是这边，请随我来。
E: It's this way. Come with me.

C: 真言狮口…应该就在附近。
E: Verax Leo... should be nearby.

C: 稍等，还想再看看。
E: Not yet, I want to explore the place a little more.

C: 我会再给两位一次机会，重新缝补信任的裂帛。金线会替我做出裁决，坦诚则生…欺瞒则亡。
E: I will grant the both of you another chance to mend our broken trust. The golden thread shall judge on my behalf. If you're truthful, you will live, else... you will perish.

C: 那是绝不可以踏足的禁地。
E: This is forbidden territory which can never be ventured into.

C: 金色的丝线平静如初。
E: The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.

C: 等等，再给我个机会…
E: Wait! Please, just give me one more chance...

C: …你正在迎接属于自己的甜蜜死亡。
E: ...you are currently welcoming your own sweet demise.

C: 我全都了解了。
E: I've got it all figured out.

C: …有别的旅行方式吗？
E: ...Is there another way to travel?

C: 我打算多花些时间留在这，向缇宝女士讨教翁法罗斯的知识。你负责行动，我负责研究，我们各司其职。
E: I plan to stay here for a while and learn more about Amphoreus from Lady Tribbie. You'll handle the action, and I'll deal with the research. We each have a role to play.

C: 这里就是「悬锋城」。
E: This is Castrum Kremnos.

C: 缇安老师，前面危险重重，你留在这里，找个安全的地方躲起来。
E: Trianne, the road ahead is dangerous. You should stay here and find a safe place to hide.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…你的神躯果然被疯狂之手掏空了么？你已彻底舍弃战士的尊严了么……
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... Has your divine body truly been hollowed out by the hands of madness? Have you completely forsaken your dignity as a warrior?

C: 能再呼唤一次{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}奇迹吗？
E: Can you call upon {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s Miracle again?

C: 闷热。泰坦的怒火点燃了空气。
E: The sweltering heat — the Titan's wrath has set the air ablaze.

C: 什么声音？
E: What was that?

C: 没字幕你怎么看懂的？
E: How can you understand without subtitles?

C: 「挑战」？很好，至少它愿意建立沟通了，哪怕是要刁难我们。
E: A challenge? Great, at least they're willing to speak to us now. Even if they are only making things difficult for us.

C: 「找到…比它更重的砝码…将它置于右侧的托盘……」
E: "Find... something that weighs more... and place it in the right pan..."

C: {NICKNAME}阁下？你还好吗？
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}? Are you feeling alright?

C: 你也想到了？！
E: You've also got it!?

C: 啊…颇有仙舟气息的口号呢。你不怕被过往束缚吗？
E: Ah... It reeks of Xianzhou. Aren't you afraid you'll be bound by your past?

C: 不存在的记忆开始降温，结霜…凝冻。
E: Nonexistent memories begin to cool, frost... then freeze.

C: 卡芙卡…还有流萤。
E: Kafka... and Firefly.

C: 我该走了，卡芙卡。
E: It's time for me to leave, Kafka.

C: 走吧，我们跟上它。
E: Let's go, we need to follow them.

C: 味道，浓烈…继续，下一个！
E: Scent, strong... Onward, next!

C: 记忆…收集，完成！
E: Memory... collected!

C: 遇见麻烦了吗？
E: Something wrong?

C: …罢了，我想你是故意为之。告诉我，贼灵，你为何要藏身于污秽中？
E: ...Never mind. I bet you did that on purpose. Tell me, Spirithief, why are you hiding in the filth?

C: 是用通用语书写的卷轴，读读看吧。
E: It's a scroll written in the common tongue. We should see what it's about.

C: 又是你，话都说不清的愚氓！你手无寸铁，也妄想加入悬锋祭典？这是对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的不敬！
E: Why, it's you again, inarticulate fool! Pfft, unarmed, and yet you dare to think you can join the Kremnos Festival? That's an insult to the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}!

C: …让我过去。
E: ...Let me through.

C: 格奈乌斯阁下，继续前进之前…有一件事，我们必须同你说明。
E: Lord Gnaeus, before we move on... there is something we must explain to you.

C: 如此惨烈…这祭典究竟是为了满足谁的欲望？
E: Such carnage... whose desires does this festival truly serve?

C: 原来那不是尼卡多利的设计…
E: Looks like it wasn't Nikador's idea...

C: 遥远未来的某日…陷入疯狂的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}会把我们的伙伴和家园逼上绝路。我们回到这里…就是为了寻找阻止末日降临的方法。
E: Some day in the distant future... a mad {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will drive our companions and our homeland to the brink of destruction. The reason we came back here... is to find a way to prevent Amphoreus from falling to its doom.

C: …不必再聆听亡者之声了，现在的信息已经足够。悬锋城人对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的灵魂动了手脚，我们只需找到他们渎神的现场。
E: ...You don't have to listen to these spirits any longer. We've learned enough from them now. The people of Kremnos have tampered with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul in some way. What we need to do is find the place of their blasphemous act.

C: 没有头绪…只能先付诸行动。
E: There's no trace... Let's just start with these first.

C: 「荣耀。」
E: "Honor."

C: 这世上的离别皆是哀伤，阁下。
E: All farewells in this world are sorrowful, Lord Gnaeus.

C: 不要低估踏入此地的战士，他们绝不缺乏技巧和英勇。
E: Never underestimate those who step into this arena. They are skilled and courageous beyond measure.

C: 不必心急，万敌阁下。待回到奥赫玛后，由我来为你转述吧。
E: Not now, Lord Mydei. I'll tell you everything once we return to Okhema.

C: 回到当年，假如神谕没有找到我…我肯定还在漫无目的地流浪。此时此刻，我存在的意义就是为黄金裔的使命奉献一切。
E: If the prophecy hadn't found me back then... I would still be roaming the world aimlessly. Right now though, I live for the sole purpose of dedicating myself to the mission of the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 喂喂喂——喂喂喂——能流畅说话的感觉，好棒啊！不过…原来我的说话风格这么成熟吗？第一人称代词竟然是…「人家」？
E: Wowie! It feels amazing being able to speak fluently! But... why do I speak in such a proper, un-cutesy manner now? I mean, referring to myself in standard first person and all.

C: 你怎么没配音啊？
E: Why aren't your words enunciated?

C: 嗯？这么一想…人家上次吃东西是多久之前的事了？记不起来……
E: Hmm? But come to think of it... I don't remember when the last time I ate something was...

C: 终有一日…他会带领所有人——剩下的人——敲开奇迹的大门。
E: There will come a day when he leads everyone — everyone we have left — through the gates of the miracle.

C: 不管他身在何处，在与何物战斗…但愿他能通过这次考验。
E: Wherever he is, whatever he is fighting, I pray he makes it through this test.

C: 回忆起来，时常有人冲上讲台与他理论，否定那些不敬神的观点。
E: Now that I think about it, students would often rush to the podium during class to challenge him on those blasphemous ideas.

C: 我相信你的判断。
E: I trust you to make the right call.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 失去支柱…时间的法则…将会崩塌……
E: If the pillar is lost... the laws of Time... will collapse...

C: 母亲…何处……
E: Mother... Where...

C: …遍地黑潮，不忍直视哪。
E: The black tide is everywhere... I can't bear to look.

C: 她是奥赫玛众黄金裔中资历次长者，在岁月磋磨与火种烧蚀中逐渐丧失人性…是一位可敬可畏的对手。
E: She is the second-most experienced Chrysos Heir across the whole of Okhema, who has gradually lost her humanity to the ravages of time and the ablation of the Coreflame... A formidable opponent indeed.

C: 呵…阁下的意见，我明白了。
E: Hah... I understand what you mean.

C: 我的支持代表树庭全体的支持。
E: Garnering my support is equivalent to garnering the support of the entire Grove.

C: 确凿的真理。
E: Very true.

C: 我听到了，在潮汐深处，{RUBY_B#冥界}乌有之界{RUBY_E#}的门关之后，那里有一道声音，将要向我述说——
E: I hear it, from the depths of the tides, behind the closed doors of {RUBY_B#nether realm}the void world{RUBY_E#} — a voice ready to tell me something—

C: 但我清楚，这与您的理想相悖：若不完成「再创世」，黑潮就无法根绝。即便有万敌阁下…黑潮还离我们很远。
E: But I know this runs counter to your wishes. So long as we do not usher in Era Nova, the black tide will never be eradicated. Even with Lord Mydei on the front line, and the black tide not posing an immediate risk, the danger nevertheless remains...

C: 斯缇科西亚，我也曾到访过那里。即便已被冥河围作孤岛，也不难看出它在过去的岁月里是何等恬美……
E: Styxia... I've visited that place in the past. Though it is now an island surrounded by the River of Souls' torrents, it's not hard to see its former splendor...

C: 事已至此，先睡觉吧。
E: There's nothing more we can do for now. Let's get some rest.

C: …恕我无法对这种行径感到麻木。
E: ...No. I can never get used to this.

C: …我想做些什么，可即便尽力表现地更自然些，也无法像普通人那样，理所当然地与生者相碰。
E: ...I wished I could take action, but no matter how hard I try, I cannot simply interact with the living as ordinary people do.

C: 一些是家族财产，另一些来自改衣师的副业。别把逐火的事业与你惯常的勾当相提并论。
E: Some of it is family fortune, while the rest came from my business as a dressmaster. Don't liken the Flame-Chase work to your shady dealings.

C: 扎格列斯半神的职责是敲竹杠？
E: Is ripping people off the authority of Zagreus' demigod?

C: 记住我的教诲，动手吧。
E: It is time. Remember what I taught you, child.

C: 请放松。愿你在温柔的花乡中…平静睡去。
E: Please relax. May you fall asleep peacefully... amid a gentle field of flowers.

C: 不然呢，这地头什么光景你们也看见了——这些可怜人被冥界拒之门外，困在自己生前的几个弹指里面，进退不得。
E: What else am I supposed do? You can see the mess this place is in — These poor souls are denied by the nether realm, so now they're stuck in a few brief moments of their life, unable to move forward or back.

C: 先生，请问女王和公主…现状如何？
E: Sir, could I... ask how the queen and princess are doing?

C: 这就是我们强者的烦恼…
E: Ah, these are the troubles that powerhouses like us face...

C: 这是我的猜测……
E: This is my guess...

C: 一如既往，灵魂的幻象于斯消散。
E: As always, the illusion of spirits dissipates here.

C: 凯旋人间…余兴而已！
E: For the feast of "Strife"... Upon their triumphant return!

C: 挑战…死亡。
E: Challenge... death.

C: 我第一次有了很多同伴，第一次有了手工和留影的爱好；第一次和他人共进晚餐，第一次走进市场，买下喜欢了很久的奇美拉娃娃，抱着它进入梦乡……
E: It's the first time I've gained so many companions, the first time I picked up the hobbies of crafting and photography, the first time I had dinner with someone else, the first time I went to the market to buy the chimera doll I'd liked for a very long time and hugged it to sleep...

C: 我将在炼金法阵中呈现，它无比想要知晓的一切：我离开斯缇科西亚后所经历的全部人生……
E: I shall reveal what they have been yearning to know in the alchemical matrix — I will show them my whole life since I left Styxia...

C: 呵…对你说出这话的人，我想他或许是一位将军？斗士？
E: Heh... I take it the one who spoke this line was a general? Or perhaps a warrior?

C: 伙伴{M#他}{F#她}…这是怎么了？
E: What's wrong with {M#him?}{F#her?}

C: 那，该从哪里说起呢？不妨就从最初开始吧……
E: Where should I begin...? I suppose we can start from the beginning.

C: 生与死的分量同样沉重…你我都再明白不过了，不是么？
E: Life and death weigh equally heavy... We both know that now, don't we?

C: 但，与那次不同的是…这一次，试炼的双方都做好了准备。
E: But unlike that time, the ones undergoing the trial this time are prepared.

C: 遐蝶…遐蝶……
E: Castorice... Castorice...

C: 等等！要是奇迹突然失效怎么办？
E: W—Wait! What if the miracle suddenly loses its effect?

C: 老师，你当真觉得…将世界的命运托付在一场大会上，是正确的么？
E: Prof... Do you truly think it's wise to entrust the fate of the world to an assembly like this?

C: ——因为这问题和你没有半点关系。
E: Because that question is not yours to ask in the first place.

C: *观众议论纷纷*
E: *crowd chatter*

C: 万世不息，永不动摇！
E: ...A steadfast and unwavering promise that shall endure through the ages!

C: 来古士阁下，可以么？
E: By your leave, Lord Lygus.

C: *观众议论纷纷*
E: *crowd chatter*

C: 作为交换…请你带回「死亡」的火种，完成逐火之旅，别让我们至今的努力付诸东流。
E: In exchange... Please, take the Coreflame of Death with you and complete the Flame-Chase Journey. Do not let our work thus far be in vain.

C: （可是，已经到终点了。也许，我还能最后再看一眼这片花海……）
E: (Since I've already made it to the end, maybe I can have one last glance at that sea of flowers...)

C: 终于…我知道，你能做到。
E: At last... I knew you could do it.

C: 我不明白。如果你的理论不假，那成为泰坦的你应当没有前世的任何记忆…那成神又有什么意义？
E: I don't understand. If your theory is correct, you'll lose all memories of your past life once you become a Titan, so what's the point of becoming a god?

C: 寰宇间的一切都能以记忆诠释，这是忆庭的信条，也是这条命途存续的动力。
E: The belief of the Garden is that everything in this universe can be interpreted through memories. This is the driving force behind the continuance of this Path.

C: 完美的范例？
E: Perfect example?

C: 一个只能被忆庭之镜映照出的世界，意味着忆者拥有将其「私藏」的权利。如果那些「记忆」行者先一步掌握了翁法罗斯的奥秘……
E: A world that can only be seen through the Garden's mirror means that Memokeepers have the right to keep the world in their private collection. If those pathstriders of Remembrance were to uncover the secrets of Amphoreus first...

C: 第三面镜，你来负责生成「数据精神体」吧。
E: Third Mirror, you're in charge of generating the "data spirit entity."

C: 谁？
E: Who's there?

C: 吕枯耳戈斯，来古士。
E: Lycurgus, Lygus.

C: 其中夹杂着学者们的感叹：「醍醐灌顶了，语言的艺术学无止境」，「学不会诡辩，至少可以学点诚实之人的的防身术」，等等。
E: Amidst it are scholars' exclamations: "A true eye-opener, the art of language knows no bounds," "If I can't master sophistry, I can at least learn to defend myself against them as an honest man," and so on.

C: 以树庭的藏书风格，竟会有这种眼皮底下的遗漏？
E: Given the Grove's meticulous approach to archiving, could there really be such an oversight right under their noses?

C: 可是通过炼金术将它们与人的灵魂融合？我很难想象……
E: But fusing them with human souls through alchemical means? I can't even begin to imagine...

C: 老师，我们看到的这片天空是假的，对吧？
E: Sir, this sky above us... It's not real, is it?

C: 事关死亡泰坦的真相，还有{NICKNAME}的性命……
E: It's a matter of uncovering the truth about the Death Titan — and {NICKNAME}'s survival...

C: 但只要把思路逆转过来，一切便能迎刃而解。答案很简单，就和你对我做的事一样……
E: But all we need to do is look at this from a different perspective, and the problem will resolve itself. The solution is simple: Just like what you did to me...

C: 这场辩论本就没有荣誉可言。但也正因此，对「人」的尊重才显得更为珍贵。白厄，你是没有缺陷的黄金裔，对人性体悟至深——
E: There is no glory in winning this debate, but that makes having respect for "humans" so much more priceless. Phainon, you are a Chrysos Heir without flaw, capable of relating deeply with humans...

C: 可怕的死亡吞噬了一切，我们的故乡也随之覆灭。直到……
E: The terrifying Death had consumed all. Thereafter, our hometown fell into ruin as well, until...

C: 那也就代表——我完全可以登上神座，重塑你们创造的荒谬世界了。
E: It means that I can actually ascend to godhood and reshape this absurd world that you all have created.

C: 对，我们充当了塞涅俄丝的处刑官。
E: Yes, we acted as Seliose's executioners.

C: 我…没有。
E: I... did not.

C: …你可曾战胜内心的软弱，响应它迫切的召唤？
E: ...did you overcome your inner weakness and heed its urgent call?

C: 历史再次证明了一事：逐火之旅本身就是一场奇迹——
E: History has proven once again: The Flame-Chase Journey itself is a miracle —

C: 那枚宝珠在闪烁…得通过它才能打开大门！
E: That orb is blinking... We need to use it to open the gate!

C: 火种……
E: Coreflame...

C: （还有一件事？等会儿，莫非…老家伙还在别处藏了什么宝贝？！我嘞个翻飞之币呀，本姑娘的幸运日来了！）
E: (One last thing? Wait... is he hiding more treasures? Holy "Coin of Whimsy"!? Today might just be my lucky day!)

C: （关乎这一城人的死活？至于这么夸张吗，我倒要听听是怎么个事……）
E: (What? The fate of the city's people? Is it that serious? I must find out more...)

C: 哎唷！你怎、你是怎么跑到我前面去的？！
E: Ow! How... how did you get ahead of me!?

C: 停！停停停，别砍我，别！
E: Whoa, whoa, whoa! Don't swing that thing — easy there!

C: *…再等上你一阵！*
E: ...wait around a little longer for you!

C: 哈…那预言里的「分文」……
E: Ha, the prophecy's "petty change"...

C: …这次怎么耍他呢？容我构思一波。
E: ...How should I mess with them this time? Let me come up with a plan.

C: 你也…感觉到了？
E: You sense it as well?

C: 这…不可思议，您好像对它的结构一清二楚。您修理过类似的东西吗？
E: This... is unbelievable. You seem to understand its structure perfectly. Have you repaired something like this before?

C: 重点在于，若您和同伴不愿就此中止对黄金裔的支持…那或许会触犯到部分人的利益。
E: The crucial point is, if you and your companion are unwilling to halt your support for the Chrysos Heirs... it could offend certain interests.

C: 今天我一定要…嘿嘿……
E: Today I'm definitely going to... hehe...

C: …列车。瓦尔特。手机。
E: ...the Express. Welt. Phone.

C: 这些卡牌的牌面，好精致呀……
E: These cards are so detailed and fine...

C: …是「清洗者」？
E: ...Are they "Cleaners"?

C: 我的肩膀很酸痛，剑也有些钝了…但要削掉你们的舌头？那还绰绰有余。
E: My shoulders might be sore and my sword a tad dull... but it's still enough to slice off your tongues.

C: 怎么样，小风堇？这里很适合吧？
E: How's it going, Cinny? This place fits, doesn't it?

C: 半神，何不以池水作镜，好好看看你如今的恶毒相？
E: Demigod, why not gaze into the water's reflection and see the wretched face you wear now?

C: 话虽如此，我倒有一件和你足够般配的服饰。
E: That said, I do have something that would suit you perfectly.

C: 喔…原来如此。穿着一身祭司袍子的赛飞儿大姐头，还真难想象那画面啊？
E: Oh... I see. But you in a priest's robe? Now that's hard to picture.

C: 什、什么？！大姐头，你的意思是……
E: Wh—What!? Boss, do you mean...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>对吧，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Isn't that right, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}?</color>

C: 这群黑衣人……
E: These folks in black...

C: 「但最好的时机已经来到…我的退场将为他们肃清后顾之忧。这件临别赠礼，应该多少能够弥补这仓促一别的遗憾吧？」
E: "The moment has come... My departure will give them one less thing to worry about. This parting gift should help ease the regret of such a sudden goodbye."

C: 放心，清洗者没伤到我们。
E: Don't worry. The Cleaners didn't lay a hand on us.

C: 这又是……
E: What's this...

C: 但如今她已不在——没错，正如你们听闻的那样——守护圣城千年的半神阿格莱雅，的确已经陨落了。
E: Now she is gone — yes, as you have heard — the demigod Aglaea, who guarded the holy city for a millennium, has indeed fallen.

C: …遐蝶小姐？
E: ...Miss Castorice?

C: 哈，忘了你？那怎么可能。
E: Ha, forget you? Like I'd ever.

C: 黄金裔是神谕的代行者，而他们——他们才是这个世界的主人。
E: The Chrysos Heirs are the executors of the prophecy, yet they — the people are the true masters of this world.

C: 自从树庭遭到黑潮破坏，我就一直想尽量远离这里，远离可能让人感伤的回忆。
E: I've been trying to stay away from here since the black tide destroyed the Grove... And through that, stay away from the memories that might make me sad.

C: 啊，我知道啦。聚焦眼下，不乱跑。
E: Oh. Got it. Yes, I'll focus and not run off.

C: 我是昏光庭院的雅辛忒丝，继承逐火使命的天空后裔。
E: I am Hyacinthia from the Twilight Courtyard, a descendant of the Sky who has inherited the duty of Flame-Chase.

C: 毕竟在神话里，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}本就是一位阴晴不定的泰坦嘛。
E: That makes sense. {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} was always described as a fickle Titan in the myths.

C: 飞儿现在也会这样逗人啦？看来你还惦念着阿雅很久以前的话呢。
E: Ciphy, cracking jokes? Looks like you haven't forgotten what Agy said all those years ago.

C: 她一直都是那样啦，别在意。不管怎样，飞儿她愿意回来奥赫玛帮忙…实在是太好了。
E: Don't worry. She's always been like that... It's good to have her back in Okhema lending a hand.

C: …孩子，为何你会出现在我面前？莫非…你是天空一族的后裔？
E: ...Child, what brings you before me? Could it be... you're a descendant of the Sky people?

C: 这是…生者的世界？
E: Is this... the world of the living?

C: 直到，一支奔腾着凡人之怒的长枪……
E: Until a spear, fueled by mortal rage...

C: 哈哈哈…真是靠谱。但愿你没有牺牲睡眠时间，接下来可还有一场硬仗啊。
E: Hahaha... always dependable. I just hope you didn't lose any sleep. We've still got a tough fight ahead.

C: 这场面，你已经能应对自如了。
E: Looks like you've mastered public speaking now.

C: 也许…是<color=#dbc291ff>「天象画壁」</color>。
E: Maybe... it's the <color=#dbc291ff>celestial mural</color>.

C: 傲慢的晖之民，泰坦会贬斥你们的骄狂不恭……
E: Arrogant Sunfolk, the Titan will condemn your brazen disrespect...

C: 我的意识已经迷失了太久。终于，黑潮的囚笼被打开了。
E: My consciousness has been lost for far too long. Finally, I have been released from the black tide's cage.

C: 能和我一起见证历史吗？
E: Can you witness history with me?

C: 毫无疑问，这张壁画描绘的就是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}了。
E: No question about it. This mural depicts the {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#}.

C: 什么？史诗的说法是，英雄塞涅俄丝曾离群独居，只为磨砺意志、锻炼武艺。
E: What!? But the epics said Seliose left to live in solitude so she could train her spirit and hone her martial skills.

C: 它…会飞到云层之外，我们无法企及的高度吗？
E: Will they... fly beyond the clouds, to heights that are beyond our reach?

C: 不无这种可能。
E: It is not impossible.

C: 飞吧，露奈比斯。
E: Fly, Lunabis.

C: 但…这和历史的记载不同。天空一族流传的神话中，艾格勒重伤之下，意图鱼死网破……
E: This doesn't align with the historical records. According to the legends of the Sky people, Aquila, gravely wounded, was determined to fight to the end...

C: 她的部分…我无法感知。
E: But as for her... I cannot sense anything.

C: 我还记得他口述的方法——但愿管用。
E: I still remember the words he used. I hope it works.

C: 「降下悬于全世之巅的泰坦心火，供你虔诚的造物瞻望。」
E: "Cast down the Titan's fire that hangs at the pinnacle of the world, for your devout creations to behold."

C: 若是如此，那你本应站在黄金裔身旁！为何要阻挠我们，「盗火行者」？
E: If so, you should be standing alongside the Chrysos Heirs! Why do you hinder us, "Flame Reaver"?

C: 必须…重启……
E: Must... reset...

C: 去吧…奇迹，去创造。救世主…去成为。
E: Go... miracle, create it. Deliverer... you shall become.

C: 盗火行者在城内作乱，他还有诸多分身——泽弗，请找人通知克拉特鲁斯，让他带着最精英的卫士守在城内的关口——
E: The Flame Reaver is wreaking havoc in the city, and they still have many clones. Zeph, please get someone to inform Krateros, and have him lead the most elite guards to defend the city's passages...

C: 但只要击败了艾格勒，令天空的诅咒不再…至少你和丹恒还有机会安全回家。
E: As long as we defeated Aquila, lifting the sky's curse... you and Dan Heng would at least have a chance to get home safely.

C: 你变得不像你自己了，白厄。
E: You've changed into someone different from yourself, Phainon.

C: 我们每个人都有抉择的权力。假如无法接受我代替你们做出的决定……
E: Every one of us has the right to make our own choices. If you can't accept my decision on your behalf...

C: 啊…对哦。那你可要站稳听好咯，小鬼！
E: Ah... you're right. Then you'd better strap in and listen up, brat!

C: 恐怕这世上已经没有安全的角落了！
E: I fear no corner of this world is safe right now!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>一位「绝灭大君」将完成进化、蜕变，自汹涌的潮汐中诞生。你我熟知的银河，将承受不可逆转的打击。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A Lord Ravager will complete its evolution and metamorphosis, and emerge from the surging tides. The cosmos as we know it will suffer irreversible consequences.</color>

C: 诚如诸位所知：当旧日的神明倒下，需要有人扛起断裂的支柱，填补神职空缺。为此，背负神权者必须战胜试炼，证明自己的资质。
E: As you know, when the old gods fell, someone had to bear their broken pillars, to fill the vacant seats. Those who would assume divine authority must prove themselves through trials.

C: 你是说，「迷路迷境」里的…？
E: The ones from Membrance Maze, you mean?

C: 翻看第二页上的神谕牌。
E: Turn to the second page of oracle cards.

C: 不过，「保护世界上的每一个角落」这种事我可不敢想——那得需要多不可思议的能力啊？
E: Still, "protecting everything everywhere" seems like a dream — what amazing power would you need for that?

C: 这就是有着大魔术师、大表演家、睿智之左眼、{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的亵渎者等诸多称号的「学士」牌了。
E: Behold the Scholar, bearer of many names: the Grand Magician, the Great Performer, the Eye of Wisdom, and the Defiler of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: …还有，一个人究竟要背负多少事物，才能够称得上「救世主」的称号呢。
E: And learn... just how many burdens one must bear to become a true "Deliverer."

C: 您、您的意思是…哀丽秘榭，也要被卷入预言中的浩劫了吗？
E: Y—You mean... Aedes Elysiae will be swept up in the prophesied catastrophe?

C: 「——哀丽秘榭的来者，无名的英雄。」
E: "One from Aedes Elysiae, the Nameless Hero."

C: 这是…白厄和昔涟的后续？
E: This is... the rest of Phainon and Cyrene's story?

C: 让我想想…啊，还有一个地方没去找过。
E: Let's see... Ah! There's one place we haven't checked yet.

C: 这个人…必须是你……
E: That person... can only be... you.

C: 既然陛下不在，不必多礼了。「剑旗」二字总会让我想起那葬身渊下的故国……
E: Since Her Majesty is not here, no need for formalities. The word "Gladiorum" always reminds me of my fallen homeland buried deep in the depths...

C: 您对我所说的，难道就不抱一丝质疑？
E: Aren't you even a little suspicious of what I've said?

C: 那么，我就是救世之火…最合适的薪柴了吧。
E: Then I suppose... that makes me the perfect fuel for the flame of Deliverance, doesn't it?

C: <unbreak>33550337</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>...

C: 我必须和你告别，然后…继续以「毁灭」对抗「毁灭」。
E: I must say goodbye to you... and then fight the Destruction with Destruction.

C: 借我「岁月」的力量，将这位英雄送回时光的原点，送往你的身边吧——
E: Lend me the power of Time and send this hero back to the origin of time, back to your side...

C: 对。那些对话很真实，也很诱人吧？那是因为，坏人翻看了你的记忆，勾起了你心底最深处的渴望。拨弄女孩子细腻的心绪，真是不可饶恕。
E: Yes. Convincing, weren't they? They've studied your memories, using your deepest wishes against you. How dare they manipulate a young girl's feelings like that.

C: 在那之前，还有一项准备需要完成。来古士行为异常，实验过程中，他几乎从不干涉泰坦或半神的行为。
E: There's one more preparation we must make. Lygus's behavior has been quite abnormal. He's never interfered in the actions of Titans or the demigods throughout the whole experiment.

C: 上一次回归的终点，丹恒先生并未与你一同进入新世界。已知：翁法罗斯内外时间流速并不一致。内部度过的千年，对于外界只是短短一瞬。
E: Mr. Dan Heng did not enter the new world with you at the end of the last cycle. Known: The flow of time inside and outside Amphoreus is not identical. A thousand years in this world may only be a fleeting second outside of it.

C: （但变数太多了，来古士的行动尚不清楚，在解决他的问题后还得直面铁墓。还有昔涟，她究竟是……）
E: (But there are so many unknowns. We don't know what Lygus might be doing, and we'll have to face Irontomb after dealing with him. There's also Cyrene... What exactly is she?)

C: >>>SkoPeo<unbreak>365</unbreak>，原动力：██，泰坦权能：大地，命途：██<<<
E: >>>SkoPeo<unbreak>365</unbreak>, Primum Mobile: ████████, Titan Authority: Earth, Path: ██████████<<<

C: 又在耍什么花招？
E: What kind of tricks are you pulling?

C: 怎么了？你的眼神似乎有些陌生。
E: What is the matter? Your gaze seems somewhat unsure.

C: 您有权明白，那位来自天外的「救世主」并非十恶不赦之人。不过从一开始，{M#他}{F#她}的立场就与翁法罗斯全然不一。
E: You are entitled to know that the "Deliverer" from beyond the sky is not a wholly wicked being. But from the very start, {M#his}{F#her} stance has been completely at odds with Amphoreus.

C: 真是一刻都不能放下戒备呀。借着泡澡的名义，我们去找个合适的小角落，把目前的进展告诉黑塔和螺丝咕姆阁下。
E: Can't let our guard down for a second. Let's use taking a bath as an excuse to find a quiet corner to update Madam Herta and Screwllum on our progress.

C: 走、走！千万别当着这家伙的面……
E: Let's go! We can't talk in front of this guy...

C: 呵…做你的部下还真可怜，整天都要为长官随时扔下的烂摊子费神。
E: Heh... Being your subordinate is such a tragedy. I'm always having to worry about the messes you leave behind.

C: 难道是某位天才的造物…
E: Maybe he's the creation of some Genius...

C: 将计就计，交给他吧。
E: Go with their plan and hand it to him.

C: 明白你的意思。
E: I understand.

C: 可如果就这么回答，她恐怕会更失落…{NICKNAME}，该怎么办？
E: But she'll probably get really disappointed if we tell her that... What should we do, {NICKNAME}?

C: 阿波罗尼点了点头，对你们的回答表示赞许。
E: Apollonius nodded, showing approval of your answers.

C: 净说大话，先小心你自己的肚皮吧！
E: You wish. Be careful you don't get drunk first!

C: 打从宴会开始，众宾客就被我的歌声催眠，他们看不见凯撒和那位神礼官。
E: Since the start of this banquet, all the guests have been under the spell of my song. None of them can see the Imperator and that Theoros.

C: 翁法罗斯已经太过脆弱，就连捍卫她的英勇行为也必须藏在水面下。身为凯撒的锋刃，我必须在暗流中为她开辟前路……
E: Amphoreus has become far too weak. Even heroic actions protecting her from harm must be conducted under the water's surface. I am the Imperator's blade, and I must clear the way for her while remaining concealed in the torrents...

C: 祝二位，旗开得胜。
E: I wish you a victory in this first skirmish.

C: 若你们还有遗言，便向凯撒悉数道来。
E: If you have any last words, say them to the Imperator...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>以「智识」之名，我将邀请您——步入与我相同的囚笼。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the Erudition, I invite you to step into the same cage as mine.</color>

C: 喝蜜酿吧，小心别人听见。
E: Just drink your honey brew and make sure no one heard that.

C: 我设想过好多重逢的话语，可话到口边，却只留下了这一句……
E: There's so much I wanted to say for our reunion, yet now that you're back, there's only one thing to say...

C: 冥冥之中，一场跨越纪元的漫长接力，或许就要开始了啊。
E: Perhaps a relay across the ages is finally about to begin somewhere out there.

C: 不，圣女。该留下来的人是我。
E: No, Holy Maiden. I'm the one who must stay.

C: 预言中的王储已经诞生。他将成为奥赫玛新的捍卫者，在我们离去后继续守护这片土地。
E: The prophesied crown prince has already been born. He shall become the new defender of Okhema, protecting this land after we leave.

C: 「记忆」就是这样的。在时间的长河里，它可能会磨损，会消散，但它不会离开。当内心的小角落被唤醒，回忆一定会以更美的形式再度浮现。
E: That's what "memory" is. It may wear down and fade in the river of time... But it never truly leaves. When that hidden corner of the heart is stirred, the past returns even more beautiful than before.

C: 照你的意思，蜗居公主…是再也回不来了么？
E: So what you're saying is... Princess Homebody... is never coming back, is she?

C: 只有对其感同身受，你才能理解我的观点：
E: Only by feeling it for yourself can you understand my point of view:

C: 而我会亲自毁灭你的野心。
E: And I'll be the one to bring destruction to your scheme.

C: 那我…又该以何种方式，生存在漆黑的世间？
E: How... am I to go on? In a world drowned in shadow?

C: 在岸上徘徊许久后，迷茫的海妖邂逅了来日的共犯……
E: After wandering the surface for ages, the lost sea siren met her future conspirator...

C: 高贵的骑士，你用剑刃换来了胜利，理应享受此刻的意兴，让我为你斟满蜜酿。
E: Noble knight, you have earned victory with your blade, and you have every reason to revel in this moment of triumph. Let me pour you a glass of honey brew.

C: 让我们回到序幕，那段有关洞穴寓言的问题吧：「洞穴里的囚徒是否能够识别投影和回声，而非将其错认为真正的世界？」
E: Let's return to the prologue. Remember the allegory of the cave? "Can the prisoners in the cave learn to see the shadows and echoes for what they are, and stop mistaking them for reality?"

C: 呵呵…因为我已为自己的愿景等待了三千万世，无数个千年。
E: Hehe... That's only because I've waited thirty million lifetimes for my vision to be realized. Countless millennia.

C: 看，是救世主！
E: Look, it's the Deliverer!

C: ——所以，我们才要反转思路，将他的优势扭转为「弱点」。
E: That's why we need to change our way of thinking and turn his advantage into a weakness.

C: 「律法」的去向，我意已决。但在挪动下一步棋子前……
E: I have decided on Law's final destination. However, before I move my next chess piece...

C: 所以，你的术式到底有什么效果？
E: So what exactly does your formula do?

C: …好。我可以为这潭死水投下一枚石子，激起破局的涟漪。
E: ...Fine. Let me drop a single pebble into these stagnant waters and watch the ripples reshape everything.

C: 「依照黑塔女士的说法，丹恒已经踏上了返程……」
E: "Based on what Madam Herta said, Dan Heng should already be on his way back..."

C: 「别担心，寻常忆者奈何不了那条小龙。只要他足够清醒，就一定能顺着指引找到出口。」
E: "Don't worry. Normal Memokeepers can't do anything to that little dragon. As long as he's awake enough, he'll find a way out."

C: 为了同伴，三月七做出了许多努力，但种种尝试，也只为翁法罗斯徒增了几篇野史。
E: March 7th tried so many things to help her companions, but the only outcome of her efforts was a few Amphorean folk tales.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>执行协议λ<unbreak>003</unbreak>-<unbreak>097</unbreak>：格式化对象。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Executing Protocol λ<unbreak>003</unbreak>-<unbreak>097</unbreak>: Format object.</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>45.147%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>45.147%</unbreak>...</color>

C: 欧洛尼斯和浮黎有关联——这件事不是秘密。在你遇见迷迷的时候，祂也出现了。
E: It's no secret that Oronyx and Fuli are related. That Aeon also appeared when you encountered Mem.

C: 她的转变…令人感慨。
E: Her transformation... is painful to watch.

C: 你打算…牺牲昔涟保存至今的「记忆」？
E: You plan to... destroy all the "memories" Cyrene has ever recorded?

C: 前路漫漫，必须有一位守护者陪伴在她身旁。而你…无疑是最佳人选。
E: The road ahead is still long, and she needs a guardian to stand by her side. You... are my best choice.

C: 有照片墙还不够吗？
E: Isn't the photo wall enough?

C: 「找回你自己，{NICKNAME}……」
E: "Find your way back... Find yourself... {NICKNAME}..."

C: 嗯？
E: Hmm?

C: 「三重面相的灵魂啊……」
E: "Oh, Triple-Faced Soul..."

C: 若不愿提起那染血的旧名，唤我「忘却的记忆」也好。
E: If you do not wish to use that bloodstained name, you may call me "Obliviated Memory."

C: 龙临大地，万类仰止。寰宇生灵皆贪图「不朽」，你我再清楚不过。
E: The dragon descends upon the earth, and all beings look to it in reverence. You and I know that all life in the universe covets Permanence.

C: 有些人就是血里有风，停不下一时半刻。无妨，她那份我来喝就好！
E: Some people are born with adventure in their blood and can't stop for even a moment. No matter, I'll drink her portion for her!

C: 呸…这不是水吗？！
E: Pah... Isn't this just water!?

C: 谢谢你力排众议，丹枫。
E: Thank you for standing your ground against the dissenters, Dan Feng.

C: 但你们口中的明天，从来只有「人」的位置。
E: But the tomorrow you speak of only ever had a place for "humans."

C: 去吧，龙裔。那道烈焰已经洞穿「大地」守护的秘密……
E: Go, Long's Scion. That fiery blaze has already burned through "Earth's" protection, revealing the secrets underneath...

C: 如此，将生生不息者——带向远方。
E: And thus bring the endless stream of life into the distant future.

C: 那便解放吾之残躯，赠予你这枚背离逐火之火吧——
E: Then free what remains of my body and let me give you this flame that turned away from the Flame-Chase—

C: 原来如此，多谢提醒，交给我的云吟术吧。
E: I see. Thank you for the advice. My cloudhymn magic will take it from here.

C: 感激不尽。请收下无名客的承诺：翁法罗斯，一定能为自己写下崭新的结局。
E: I cannot thank you enough. Accept this promise from the Nameless: Amphoreus will definitely write a brand-new ending for itself.

C: 呵…你还记得我喜欢火和宴会哪。那就说定了，你也要找回伙伴，完成旅行。
E: Hehe... You still remember how much I love fire and feasts. All right then, it's a promise. Go find your companion and see your journey through.

C: 他一定心存算计。但这一世，在众黄金裔毫无保留的相助下，主导权始终在我们这边。
E: He must be calculating something. But this time, with the Chrysos Heirs giving us their full support, we've had the upper hand from the start.

C: 或许，这还能为幸存者换来一线生机。
E: We may yet bring a glimmer of hope for those who are still alive in there.

C: 无限轮回的史诗，要迎来尾声了呀。
E: The epic with endless cycles is about to end.

C: 「爱」会永远存在，对吗？
E: "Love" will always exist, right?

C: 我们也是时候深入涡心，去看看翁法罗斯内部的样貌了。
E: It's about time we dive into the Vortex and see what Amphoreus looks like on the inside.

C: 歌颂「公正之秤，刻律德菈」，您赐下的律法仲裁善恶，让「秩序」成为自由的基石。
E: Praise be to "Cerydra, Scale of Justice," for the laws that you bestow arbitrate good and evil, making Order the cornerstone of freedom.

C: 它消失得太彻底了，一丝痕迹都没留下，就好像有人刻意大喊——「这里什么都没有。」
E: It vanished too cleanly. No traces, like someone yelling, "Look! There's nothing here!"

C: 该方案的损耗…无法计算。它不该被列为选项。
E: That plan's cost... is incalculable. It shouldn't even be on the table.

C: 但在回路中，我发现了一些…值得注意的「伤痕」。
E: But I did find some... interesting "scars" in the circuit.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>星核。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Stellaron.</color>

C: 开拓档案「4:<unbreak>66</unbreak>」——PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的经历，足以证明德谬歌进入过翁法罗斯的演算。
E: Trailblaze Archive 4:<unbreak>66</unbreak> — The data from PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> clearly indicates that the Demiurge did in fact enter Amphoreus' extrapolation.

C: 不过，要是继续长大，人家是不是要比{NICKNAME}更高啦？那我可要好好期待一下咯？
E: But if I keep growing, I might be taller than you, right, {NICKNAME}? Then I'm really looking forward to that.

C: 有那么像吗？
E: Do we really look that alike?

C: 回首往日，属于我的「拯救」只有一次，我救下的生命也唯有一人。
E: Looking back, I had only one act of "salvation" to my name, and only one life I ever saved.

C: 请带上这朵安提灵花。我想，如果有什么能诉说「遐蝶」的故事……
E: Please take this Antila flower with you. I believe that if anything could speak for "Castorice"...

C: 克莱门汀小姐，克拉特鲁斯先生，还有无数响应{NICKNAME}号召的人，以彩虹为指引，他们用相同的旋律传来喜讯……
E: Miss Clementine, Mr. Krateros, and countless others who have heeded {NICKNAME}'s call... guided by the rainbow. They're sending back good news, all to the same tune...

C: 唯独启程的初心，他绝对不会忘记。
E: He'll never forget what set him on this path.

C: 该放下了，孩子。放下你的愤怒，聆听理性的呼唤。
E: It's time to move on, my child. Let go of your anger, and listen to reason.

C: 我们，绝不会辜负你的愿望！
E: We won't let you down!

C: 我总会避免妄下决断，但此刻，世人的「正义」确凿无疑。
E: I have always avoided making hasty verdicts, but now, humanity's "justice" is unquestionable.

C: 银河的「第四时刻」——是为「铁墓」的加冕！
E: The "Fourth Instant" of the cosmos... is the coronation of Irontomb!

C: （三千万次轮回的起点，终于迎来了……）
E: (At last, the starting point of thirty million cycles... has finally welcomed...)

C: 无名泰坦大墓，「记忆」最深的角落。
E: The Great Tomb of the nameless Titan. The deepest recesses of "memory."

C: {NICKNAME}，这就是「记忆」的最后一块拼图啦。
E: This is the final puzzle piece of the "memories," {NICKNAME}.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「祂想验证的，是银河『死而后生』的答案。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"What THEY want to prove is how the cosmos would 'come back after being destroyed.'"</color>

C: 「那，就让我们各司其职吧？」
E: "Then, let us both do our duty."

C: 长昼月，我让晨昏变作「存护」的微光——
E: In the Month of Everday, I form twilight into the faint sparks of Preservation...

C: 姬子——杨叔！
E: Himeko! Mr. Yang!

C: 咕嘟咕嘟……
E: Bloop bloop...

C: 肺活量不错。
E: Nice lung capacity there.

C: 算了算了，反正从结果上看都一样——
E: Yeah, yeah. Whatever. It's all the same anyway...

C: 你可算醒啦~
E: Look who's finally awake~

C: 人创造神，神塑造人。造物主与信徒，究竟谁才是受困的一方呢？
E: Humans create gods, and gods shape humans. Who's really the one trapped? The creator, or the believer?

C: 不必担忧。天才与疯子的差别，就在于天才会将致命的真理共享，而疯子却试图将其强加于他人。
E: Don't worry. The difference between a genius and a madman is that a genius shares lethal truths, while a madman tries to force them upon others.

C: 终于来了。{NICKNAME}正有话想问你呢。
E: You're finally here! {NICKNAME} has something to ask you.

C: 千万别留下遗憾啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: Don't leave any regrets, {NICKNAME}.

C: 银河中也有很多跟风堇姑娘一样，到处救死扶伤的人吧？可得给他们立个好榜样哪。
E: There must be many others like Miss Hyacine out there in the cosmos, helping and healing people everywhere. You've got to set a good example for them, right?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「别怕摔，跑起来！命运就是只迟缓的若虫，它压根抓不住你！」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Don't be afraid to fall: just run! Destiny's just a slow-moving nymph. It can't catch you!"</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那两条路上都站着你。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And on both paths, I see you standing.</color>

C: 还记得最初，当神明出现在梦里，隔着一面薄薄的水晶，望着我的时候。
E: I still remember the first time I saw the god appear in a dream, looking at me from behind a thin veil of crystal.

C: 只要能将一线希望，放进他的心里……
E: If only someone could place even a sliver of hope inside his heart...

C: 昔涟；{NICKNAME}……
E: Cyrene. And {NICKNAME}...

C: 都注定是一个不同以往的浪漫故事。
E: It will be a romantic story like none that has come before.

C: 简单…而又美好的旋律。
E: A simple... but beautiful melody.

C: 翁法罗斯…会得救吗？
E: Will Amphoreus... be saved?

C: >>>嘻。小妖精。开心。
E: >>> Hehe. Little fairies. Happy.

C: 桃子。昔涟。小妖精。喜欢。
E: Peach. Cyrene. Little fairy. Like.

C: 你是不是，长大了？
E: That you... Grew up?

C: 既然如此，就努力学习吧！于是小妖精每天过来，守在水晶花旁，思考答案。
E: In that case, they should work hard to learn more! So the little fairy came every day to sit next to the crystal flower and think about the answer.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「我们」会成为她的代行者，阻断一切外部干涉。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"We" will become her representatives and stop all external interferences targeting her.</color>

C: 计算结果：你的备用计划…成功率无限趋近于零。
E: Calculation results: Your backup plan... has a success rate infinitesimally close to zero.

C: 黑塔
E: Herta

C: 剧本指导
E: Script Supervisor

C: 这是什么？
E: Huh. What's this?

C: （诈他试试）
E: (Try to dupe him)

C: 搞什么名堂啊，这老斑鸠。
E: What's he playing at, that old scoundrel.

C: （姬子跟空间站的人好像很熟，还是先找她商量商量吧。）
E: (Himeko seems to be on good terms with the folks on the space station. Maybe I should tell her first.)

C: 我这人吧，平时也没啥爱好，就爱听听八卦，然后…崇拜崇拜…这个，科学家。
E: I don't have any particular hobbies. I do indulge in a little tittle-tattling here and there, not to mention, admiring... of a certain scientist...

C: 哼，暮气沉沉，千篇一律…所有人都穿着相同制式的衣服。
E: Hum! Nothing special, it's so boring here... Everyone wears the same clothes.

C: 你在干嘛？
E: What are you doing?

C: 啊，真是不凑巧。有空翻翻看吧，你要是懂这玩意儿，还能帮我推敲推敲。
E: Oh, that's unfortunate. Take a look when you have time. Give me some suggestions if you know a thing or two.

C: 是吧！他们都嫌我不务正业，只有你懂得里面的情趣。说说看！你喜欢哪一版？
E: I know! They all say I am wasting my time. You are the only one who understands the fun of it. So tell me, which is your favorite?

C: 答应了？
E: Did she say yes?

C: 她，去了未来。而我，留在现在…是这样吗？
E: She has gone to the future, and I am left in the present... Is this what happened?

C: 真要有苦衷，那也只能是我…我不知好歹，一直纠缠她。
E: If she really has a reason, I am the only one to blame... I've been hassling her without knowing the boundaries...

C: 所以，{NICKNAME}，能不能……
E: So, {NICKNAME}, do you think you can...

C: 希望这不是你我的最后一面，有缘再会，{NICKNAME}……
E: I hope this is not our last encounter. Farewell, {NICKNAME}...

C: 有气势！
E: So inspiring!

C: 是我认识的亚伯拉罕？
E: Is it the Abraham I know?

C: 你紧盯着熄灭的屏幕，若隐若现的荧光似乎要进行危险的倾诉。感应到来者的靠近，画面中快速闪动着金与紫的线条。
E: You stare at the empty screen. The faint fluorescent light seems ready to begin its dangerous display. Sensing your approach, lines of gold and purple flash rapidly on the screen.

C: 观看录像带。
E: Watch the video.

C: 呼吸。奔跑。打开舱门，被锁定的导航界面，换下一个。直到你被一双手拦了下来，它们属于…一位正值壮年的法政科员，他有着鹰的眼神。
E: Breathe. Run. Open the hatch, lock the navigation interface and move on to the next one. Until you are stopped by a pair of hands. They belong to... a young geopolitics researcher with eyes like an eagle's.

C: 这只是你的怀疑而已，你还有什么其他的证据吗？如果没有，不必再继续聊了。
E: That's just your personal speculation. Do you have any other evidence? If not, there's no need to continue this conversation.

C: 你都梦见了什么？
E: What did you dream about?

C: 我没染头发。
E: I didn't dye my hair.

C: 我知道，找借口偷懒呗。
E: I know. You are just looking for excuses to slack off.

C: 帮我开下终端机。
E: Please turn on the terminal for me.

C: （…究竟，我存在于这个世界上的意义是什么呢？人如果没有自己的事业，和太空垃圾有什么区别呢……）
E: (...What on earth justifies my continued existence in this world? If a person is without any career, would they be any different from a piece of space garbage...)

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了？艾丝妲站长吩咐我们在此处等你。这片区域的设备损毁状况十分严重，我们得留在原地架设终端。收集信标数据的事就拜托你了。
E: {NICKNAME}, is that you? Lead Researcher Asta ordered us to wait for you here. The damage to the equipment in this place is so severe that we have to stay put and rig a new terminal. I'll leave it to you to gather the beacon data.

C: 失踪了？
E: Disappeared?

C: 当「反物质军团」与我擦肩而过的刹那，心里浮现的正是你们的容颜。坦白说没有你们，就没有现如今活生生的我。
E: The Antimatter Legion barely missed me, and that's when I saw your faces... It was all I could see. If it weren't for you, I wouldn't be standing here today.

C: （目瞪口呆，嗤之以鼻）
E: (Look skeptical and scoff)

C: 你询问卡波特关于修行和从心的事情……
E: You've asked Capote about the trial of the heart...

C: 今天你就算是要让波少当空间站的代理站长，他也不会告诉你「修行」的秘密！
E: Even if you promoted Master Capote to acting lead researcher, he wouldn't tell you about the trial!

C: 你将刚才发生的事情与收获的线索同步给了艾丝妲……
E: You've told Asta about what just happened and the clues you found...

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 总之…谢谢你们陪着小姐一起来找我。
E: ...Thank you for helping Lady Asta... and for coming to find me.

C: 我知道，但害怕麻烦，怎么干防卫科的工作？
E: I know, but how would I be able to work security if I'm afraid of trouble?

C: 慢走不送呵。
E: Kay, bye.

C: 看起来，那边的大人是有备而来。你要向我保证，一会不能说漏嘴，知道吗？
E: Looks like the adults over there are very prepared. You have to promise me you won't accidentally spill anything, okay?

C: 一紧张就把心里想的说出来了，对不起啊小阿德勒……
E: I am so sorry Adler. I let my nerves get the better of me...

C: 有机生命的协作，奇妙、高效——你们重建空间站的速度远远超出我的推演。
E: Such collaboration between organic lifeforms is magnificent and efficient — you're rebuilding the space station far quicker than I could have imagined.

C: 嗯。
E: Sure.

C: 先做个自我介绍。我叫伦纳德，是这座空间站的网络安全工程师。
E: Allow me to introduce myself. I'm Leonard, a cybersecurity engineer here at the space station.

C: 怎么突然来了一堆人，大家都不用工作吗？
E: What are all these people doing here all of a sudden? Don't they have work to do?

C: 所以，我是否应该停止这场已经背离初衷的合作？出于感性，我想要相信黑塔。但客观上：我必须立即执行。
E: Deep down, I want to continue to believe in Herta... the question is whether one should end a collaboration that no longer holds true to its initial intent. From an objective standpoint, I should end it immediately.

C: 也许有机生命的喜怒哀乐也是数据的一种表现形式，你不这么认为吗？
E: Maybe the emotions of organic lifeforms are an expression of data, don't you think?

C: 没什么想问的了…
E: That's all the questions I have...

C: 是说电梯间那幅画像吧？黑塔曾委托我为她设计一种加密工具，原来是用在了这里。
E: Hehe, she's talking about that portrait in the elevator room, no? Herta commissioned me to design an encryption tool for her — seems she ended up using it on her portrait.

C: 果然，那些涂鸦是诱饵？
E: So, the graffiti was bait?

C: 恐怕对方在入侵空间站时就已经想好了整个计划，布置涂鸦，留下后门，都是为了静待机会来临。
E: I fear she may well have had the whole thing planned out before hacking the space station. The graffiti and the back door were all in aid of honing in on just the right moment.

C: 不过，黑塔觉得这结果太过温柔，想要再添几笔。比如…此刻，她通过反向骇入，定位了你所有的星际网络账号——总计<unbreak>76</unbreak>个，很可观的数字。
E: However, Herta felt that this would be too easy on you and wanted to add something of her own. And that is why, in this very moment, she has reverse-hacked you and located all of your Interastral Network accounts — a total of <unbreak>76</unbreak> accounts. A very impressive number.

C: 这种涂鸦被称作<color=#dbc291ff>「骇入声明」</color>，除转移视线外没什么别的功能。为了增加真实感，我把它们也写进了程序里。
E: These graffitis are usually referred to as <color=#dbc291ff>"hacking callcards."</color> They don't serve any actual function other than to distract. I wrote them in the codes to make it more realistic.

C: 哈，让我想起自己刚加入公司的时候…真是段宝贵的经历，我会铭记在心的。
E: Hah! That made me reminisce about the time I joined the IPC... What a precious memory, I will never forget it.

C: 不不不，我还没说完呢。
E: No no, I'm not done yet.

C: 没事，你忙吧。
E: Oh nothing, I'll leave you to it.

C: 找到声音源头了吗？
E: Do we know where the sound came from?

C: 你的正义感出手消灭了虫卵。
E: Driven by your sense of justice, you eradicated the eggs.

C: 感谢。
E: Thank you.

C: 去主控室看看就知道了，出发吧…咦，有什么动静？
E: We'll see in the main control room. Let's go... Huh? What was that?

C: 火魔天性凶暴，燃烧和破坏是他们的本能。而阿弗利特尤为邪恶残忍，他所领导的「永火官邸」甚至和同为泯灭帮的「耶佩拉兄弟会」是死敌。
E: The fire demons have a cruel temper and instinctively ignite and destroy items. Ifrit is particularly evil and cruel, even among his kin. The Ever-Flame Mansion he heads is even the archenemy of the Jepella Brotherhood, despite both groups belonging to the Annihilation Gang.

C: 但下一次，我将亲自造访，用冥火为你们献上罪业的悼亡。
E: But next time, expect no intermediaries. I will come to personally offer you the demise of your sins with infernal fire.

C: 哦…那你又是何时确信的？
E: Oh... and when did you become convinced?

C: 请开始你的陈述——想清楚，再发言。
E: Please, begin your statement — and try to think before you speak.

C: 我不想黑塔为那些琐事操无谓的心，虽然她多半也不会在乎。
E: I don't want Herta to worry herself over these frivolous matters, even though she probably wouldn't care anyway.

C: 监控器良好运行着，监控着阳光房的植物培育状态。
E: The monitor is running smoothly, keeping an eye on the growth of the plants in the Sunroom.

C: 阮•梅女士，嘶嘶。
E: Madam Ruan Mei *buzz*.

C: 你可以不用瞒着我。
E: You didn't have to lie to me.

C: 这样会让我们…更加轻松。
E: It will make our lives... more relaxing.

C: （那里没有…我们的身影吗？）
E: (...Is there no place for us, where you're going?)

C: 在这里待一会儿吧。
E: Stay here for a bit.

C: 开拓者拯救世界！
E: Trailblazers save the world!

C: 您的花包好啦，时候不早了，我们也要回家了。
E: Your flowers are all wrapped up. It's getting late. I should head home.

C: 没想到居然是你接了委托，这束花真美，谢谢啦。
E: I never thought it would be you taking on the assignment. These flowers are beautiful. Thank you.

C: 呜呜…塔米拉小姐，有空的时候要回剧院看看啊。
E: Waaa... Miss Tamila! Make sure you come back to visit the theater when you have time!

C: 呜，{NICKNAME}你当时要是在就好了，呜呜……
E: *Cries* {NICKNAME}, if only you were here... *cries*

C: 波月古海。这四个字勾起了你的思绪——
E: The Lunarescent Depths. Those two words take you back...

C: 你回忆起在波月古海边捡漂流瓶的那段阳光灿烂的日子。
E: You recall the halcyon days when you would collect Drift Bottles along the Lunarescent Depths' shores.

C: …这就有点过了各位，不信任我没关系，但也不用装傻到这个地步嘛。
E: ...Come now, friends. I can understand the mistrust, but there's no need for the charade.

C: 聚居地在哪里？
E: Is there a settlement nearby?

C: …抱歉，我只是没有闲谈的兴致。「罗浮」之后，我一直在反省和思考…这过程十分伤神。
E: ...I'm sorry, I'm just not in the mood for idle chat. There's been a lot weighing on my mind since the Luofu... it was tough on the spirit.

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ…贝洛伯格……
E: Belobog... <unbreak>700</unbreak> years...

C: 星穹列车去过那么多地方，「无名客」个个见多识广，在这方面肯定比我强多了。
E: The Express has visited many worlds. I'm sure the Nameless have a far greater knowledge of such things than myself.

C: 领航员的日程还真是饱和…看来这次真的只有咱们俩了。
E: Navigators really do have their plates full, huh? Seems like it's just you and me this time.

C: 我的母星资源十分匮乏。为了生存，居民们不得不大量出售劳动力，从事为星间其它文明代工的职业——多数是化工行业或重工业。
E: My home planet was extremely resource-poor. To survive, people worked laboriously, manufacturing products for other civilizations in the galaxy — mostly in the chemical or heavy industries.

C: 放心吧小三月，就是我本人，如假包换。
E: Haha, it's the real me, March — real as they come.

C: 「长线的危机通常潜伏在繁荣的表面之下，一般人根本无从察觉。」
E: A looming crisis can often lie hidden beneath the illusion of prosperity, unnoticed by many.

C: 大守护者小姐？我刚刚还在想，你应该不会只把列车组推到我面前，自己缩在后面等结果吧…这可不像你的为人啊。
E: Supreme Guardian? I was starting to wonder whether you'd left the Express crew to fend for themselves! That would hardly be becoming of you.

C: 你得担起这个责任才行。
E: You have to shoulder this responsibility.

C: 结果到了最后，还是得由布洛妮娅自己来做决定啊。
E: Well, it's all in Bronya's hands now. She has to make the final call.

C: 会扣工资吗？
E: Will they cut your pay?

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 听着有些凶险，但你要做的其实很简单。我希望你能帮我调查一下这个所谓的「互助会」，看看他们到底在鼓捣什么。
E: ...It sounds dangerous, but what I want you to do is actually very simple. Investigate this so-called "Mutual Aid Society" and find out what exactly they're up to.

C: …你说的倒也有几分道理。哎，那小姑娘一直都对我尽心尽力，但我一直觉得自己是她的负担……
E: ...You're not wrong, I suppose. That girl certainly spares me no effort, but I always feel like I'm a burden to her...

C: 等…等一下！那我们的药怎么办？我们都等了这么久了……
E: ...W—Wait! What about our medicine? We've been waiting for ages...

C: 他是不是精神分裂？
E: I think he's insane.

C: …先不提这个了。收拾掉了瓦赫留下的烂摊子，我心里那块石头也能暂时放下。
E: ...Let's leave it for now. I'll feel a lot better once I've gotten rid of this mess that Vache left us.

C: 「可怕的影响」…？
E: Changed him...?

C: 随着{NICKNAME}您在本赛季中一路高歌猛进、彻底扫清一切障碍，本赛季也即将迎来尾声——
E: {NICKNAME}, as you charge your way through the current season's matches and clear all obstacles from your path to greatness, the super league has come to a close...

C: 装置要怎么做？
E: How do you make a trap?

C: 你不记得了吗？我听辛克尔夫人说过，你曾经用「不世之材」帮她修复过重要的道路缺损……
E: Don't you remember? I heard from Mrs. Hinkel that you once used Unearthly Marvel to help her repair major road defects.

C: 欸，是你啊！好险好险，幸好来的不是防卫科的人。
E: Hey, it's you! Close call! Luckily you're not from security.

C: 多言无益了，三月。至少有一件事很清楚：现在我们绝不能被逮捕。
E: We're wasting our words, March. At least one thing is clear: We mustn't be caught.

C: 「他」是谁？你的爸爸吗？
E: Who's "he"? Your dad?

C: …我再帮你一次。
E: ...I'll help you again.

C: 果然，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}也帮不了我吗？哪怕找到了解开谜题的办法……
E: So, you can't help me either? Even if you've found a way to solve the puzzle...

C: 啊，终于！我还以为你过不来了……
E: Ah, finally! I almost began to think you couldn't make it.

C: 我从小一个人长大，完全不知道自己的出生日月。养父母把我带到上层区以后，就把领养我的日子当做我的生日来过。
E: As an orphan, I never knew my birthday. My adoptive parents took me to the Overworld and made the day I joined the family my birthday.

C: 您还是和小时候一样，聪明又敏锐。实际上…上下层封锁后的头两年，我收到了很多封瓦赫少爷的来信。
E: You haven't changed a bit — smart and sensitive. The fact of the matter is... in the first two years after the passage was closed off, I received many letters from Master Vache.

C: 说不定是因为他的记性很好。
E: Maybe his memory's too good for lab notes.

C: {NICKNAME}，我想在聚居地再和其他人聊聊，再多收集些线索。
E: Well {NICKNAME}, I'm going to head for the settlement and see if I can get more intel from the locals.

C: 啊…让我看看。
E: Let's see...

C: 你好呀，克拉拉。你在这里做什么呢？
E: Nice to see you, Clara. What brings you to the Robot Settlement?

C: 一石二鸟。
E: Two birds with one stone.

C: 无论如何，这场闹剧已经在我们眼皮底下发生太久了。不管幕后的组织者有多神通广大，我们都必须把他给揪出来，向市民证明筑城者的决心。
E: In any case, this fiasco has been going on right under our noses for too long. Regardless of how cunning and talented the culprit may be, we must draw them out and demonstrate the resolve of the Architects.

C: 不过，若你们正被此事困扰得心神不宁，那我希望克里珀能将祂的赐福施于二位，愿你们早日找到犯下盗掠之罪的恶人！
E: However, if your hearts are troubled by this affair, then I hope that Qlipoth will bestow THEIR blessings upon you both, and that you may soon find the evildoer who committed such a crime!

C: ——之前我教你把「齿轮与智慧」拆散以后再藏起来，记得吧？你最后把它拆成了多少个部件来着？
E: That Gears and Wisdom sculpture I told you to take apart and hide away... Can you remind me how many pieces it had?

C: 是那座贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆么？没想到如今又要开张了呢。
E: You mean the Belobog History and Culture Museum? I didn't realize it was opening back up again.

C: 「志愿导览员申请表」…呵呵，还真是有模有样。
E: "Application Form for Volunteer Guides"... Hehe, it does look very official.

C: 不管怎么样…克拉拉要根据虎克的简历提问了哦。准备好了吗？
E: Anyway... I'll start asking questions about your resume. Are you ready?

C: 那么，下一题！克拉拉队员——你知道志愿导览员的职责是什么吗？！
E: Now, the next question! Are you aware of the duties of a volunteer guide?

C: 哈哈，可不是嘛——典型的筑城者做派。
E: Haha, exactly... It's typical of the Architects.

C: 好啊，包在我身上。
E: Sure. Leave it to me.

C: 就这样吧，挺好的。
E: This is it. It's already great.

C: …您说的对！不擅长赚钱的我，确实不适合这样的工作！
E: ...You're right! As someone who finds it hard to make money, I'm not suitable for a job like this!

C: 懂了！一二三，木头人！
E: Oh I see, so we're playing a quiet game, huh?

C: 哈，我听说她是追捕你们的银鬃铁卫，还以为你们之间挺不对付的…你在担心铁卫丫头？
E: Well, I heard that she's a Silvermane Guard that was sent to arrest you. I expected you to be less friendly around each other... Are you worried about her?

C: 谢谢你的关心，你们先回镇上吧，我和奥列格谈完就回去。
E: Hey... Thanks for your concern. You should head back to the town, and... I'll do the same when Oleg and I are finished.

C: 辛苦医生了。
E: Thank you, doctor.

C: 我忙一天了，实在没精力再折腾了。今天先让我喘口气吧，明天我来找你。
E: I've been on my feet all day. I don't have the energy for more headaches right now. Let me catch my breath and I'll come find you tomorrow.

C: 连洞洞机都带上了，不会是打算和流浪者干架吧……
E: She even took her Diggertron. Is she preparing for a fight with the Vagrants...

C: 嚯，了不起啊！可你不就是仗着手里那个「探测仪」吗？等我们把那玩意抢过来，看你还敢不敢嚣张！
E: Tsk, it's only because you have that detector. Let's see who's boss when we take it from you!

C: 你看吧！
E: See!

C: 多亏了你和娜塔莎医生啊…要不然我们父女俩多半要遭殃了。
E: Thank you again... If it weren't for you and Doctor Natasha, Hook and I probably would've been in big trouble.

C: 那些流浪者听说了这事，就指责我是叛徒…他们觉得，既然我也是从别的矿区沦落至此的流浪者，理所当然就该跟他们站在一边。
E: Then those vagrants heard about it and accused me of being a traitor... They believe that since I'm also a vagrant who came from another mine and ended up in here for a living, I should naturally be on their side.

C: 冲突结束之后，「地火」需要彻底清点伤员，我们就暂时离开了避难所。清点完人数以后再回去，我就发现探测器不见了。
E: When the fighting was over, Wildfire asked everyone to leave the shelter to get a headcount of the wounded. After that, I went back to the shelter, only to find that my detector was gone.

C: 我的推理好像有点儿问题…
E: My deduction might be a little flawed...

C: 费斯曼使用的十字镐。原本应该是退休的年纪，但是为了生计，费斯曼还是会和流浪者一起到矿道里做工。
E: The pickaxe used by Fersman. He's supposed to be retired, but to make a living, Fersaman would still work in the mines with the vagrants.

C: 诶？
E: ...Huh?

C: 如果一切都能恢复到十几年以前的样子…那矿队就不必生活在饥寒交迫之下了。
E: If things go back to the way they were <unbreak>10</unbreak> years ago... then the mining team can finally escape this poverty...

C: …抱歉，我不该对你说教。
E: ...Sorry, I sound like Dad.

C: 这次说不定有前所未见的怪物出现，我们多加小心。
E: It could mean something we haven't encountered before is waiting for us. Stay on your toes.

C: 不必担心，我们已让他们退到了安全区域。
E: Easy, they went back to safety.
██Stellaron█ ██ promises ██ █ Serval██ █...

C: 难道我们一起度过的那些时光…都是虚假的吗？
E: All that time we spent together... was any of it real?

C: 一起来吗？把它痛扁一顿。
E: Are you coming with us? Let's take it down!

C: 这是物主的名字吗？怎么听着有点熟悉……
E: Is that the owner's name? Sounds a bit familiar...

C: 这样就好了，是地钉的问题——忘记说了，在这种积雪比较深的地方，要用实心的铅铁钉才行。
E: The pegs. I forgot to mention — thick snow needs leaded iron pegs.

C: 这个板条箱…看起来很可疑啊。说不定能找到炉具的替换件……
