E: This crate looks promising. Maybe there are spare stove components inside...

C: …机械屋。
E: ...The workshop.

C: 哔——不用谢。克拉拉。
E: Beep — Don't mention it, Clara.

C: {NICKNAME}，你怎么才到？虎克都在这里等了好久了！
E: {NICKNAME}, what took you so long? Hook's been waiting here for ages!

C: 跟洞洞机肯定没得比啦。但那位叔叔的手很巧，总能做出些很精妙的小玩意。
E: Not as much as Diggertron, but that guy who gave it to me was pretty skillful. He could always make fancy things.

C: 最后…包裹…去……
E: In the end... the parcel... went to...

C: 是不是史瓦罗派你来的？快说！
E: Did Svarog send you? Spit it out!

C: 咻…还好，这台巡逻机器人和帕斯卡的核心都保住了，这个大家伙的外壳也几乎没有受损…谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Phew... Luckily, the patrol robot and Pascal's cores are still intact. The big fella's shell is only slightly dented... Thank you for your help.
███ ██ ████connection complete.

C: 啊…克拉拉差点忘记了。谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的提醒！
E: Oh, I almost forgot. Thank you for reminding me!

C: 书页与信纸被仔细裁剪，摞于一处。内容从幼儿寓言故事至过去的时政要闻，不一而足。
E: Book pages and letters all carefully cut and put aside, whose content varies from tales for children to outdated political news.

C: 这些书页，裁得好整齐…啊，还有一股地髓燃料的味道。
E: These pages are so neatly cut out... Oh, and they smell like Geomarrow Fuel.

C: …克拉拉？
E: ...Clara?

C: 怎么，这就困了？
E: Huh? Tired already?

C: 「地火」一向跟史瓦罗交恶，跟着你们只怕引起误会，帮了倒忙。我们会在不远处待命，如果事态不对，「地火」立刻赶到。
E: Wildfire's relationship with Svarog has been hostile for a long time now, accompanying you would only lead to misunderstandings. We'll be nearby, awaiting orders. If things go south, we'll be there in no time.

C: 你没事摸人家聚落干啥。
E: Clues for your own shady dealings, no doubt.

C: …我说各位，不懂就别强行装懂啊，又没人会笑话你们！
E: ...Uh, y'know friends, if you don't know the answer, you don't have to pretend you do. No one's gonna laugh at you.

C: 谁说的？「矿灯」巴列维提过，要从古代遗物的接口去考虑它的零件拼合。
E: How do you know? Balaway from Miner's Lamp said that you need to pay attention to the interfaces when assembling relics.

C: 马雷夫？他跟他弟弟连古代遗物的真假都分不清。我听说他被个卖假货的娘娘腔骗了。
E: Haha, Marev!? Him and his brother wouldn't know a real relic if it hit 'em in the face. Last I heard, he got scammed by someone selling counterfeit junk.

C: 哇！真的亮起来了，谢谢大家！
E: Whoa! It lit up! Thanks guys!

C: 所有高危个体，全部歼灭！
E: All subjects are high-risk individuals. Commencing complete annihilation!

C: 事到如今，你们要抽身事外？
E: With things as they are, you want to take a back seat?

C: 那孩子跟你我可不能相提并论啊，她是史瓦罗大佬信赖的家人。
E: Not even close! She's Svarog's trusted family.

C: 「天亮时，守护者要如闪耀的恒星，照亮人民的道路」。
E: At daybreak, the guardian shall be a glittering star, illuminating the people's path.

C: 你好像热衷于搅乱局面。
E: You seem to enjoy muddying the waters.

C: 这个大叔，好奇怪啊……
E: What a weird man...
Mm? *sigh*
...Here.

C: 这不是外来者吗？果然你也来拍卖会了啊。之前我们见过一面，还记得吗？
E: Outsider? I knew you'd show up. We met before, remember?

C: 啊？你是什么人？大哥，我看这俩家伙身上的油水肯定比这小屁孩多，要不改抢{F#她们}{M#他们}吧！
E: Huh? Who the heck are you? Boss, these two must have more money than this brat. Let's rob them instead!

C: 喂，你在干什么呢！虎克要生气啦！
E: Hey! What are you doing!? You're making Hook angry!

C: 别打了，别打了！我认怂，我认怂还不行吗！你们冷静点儿，探针给你们，你们也听我讲两句——
E: Okay, enough! I give up, okay!? S—Stay calm! I'll give you the probe, just listen to me...

C: …下一件竞拍品是古代遗物「地髓矿脉探针」，由流浪者营地的老牌淘金者提供。
E: ...The next item up for auction has been provided by a veteran prospector from the vagrant camp. It's an ancient relic — a Geomarrow Probe.

C: 虎克？
E: Hook?

C: 谢谢你！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Thanks for the help, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

C: 我安排了一个小学徒去参加拍卖，遗憾失手了。
E: I arranged for a young apprentice to attend the auction, but he lost out in the bidding.

C: 这样一来，史瓦罗就不用…呃，暂时不用…为下层区的「存护」发愁了吧？
E: Which means that you, Svarog — uh... You won't have to worry about preserving the Underworld... for the time being.

C: 谢谢三月姐姐…谢谢大家！老实说，克拉拉一开始没有抱太大的希望……
E: March, everyone... thank you so much! I wasn't sure you guys would be able to do it, but...

C: 你、你等会啊…让、让我组织一下语言，把昨晚的经历告诉你……
E: H—Hold on... I'll explain what happened last night. Just let me gather my thoughts first...

C: 因为、因为那家伙转身逃跑的时候，他身上带的刀具直接划过了我的脸！我当时真的以为要小命不保了……
E: B—Because when he turned to flee, he swung a knife right across my face! In that moment, I really thought I was going to die...

C: 偷零件的犯人，出来！面对我！
E: Come out and face me now, thief!

C: ——帕斯卡？！啊…它、它要跑了！
E: Pascal!? No... He's running away!

C: 帕斯卡身上有着其他小机器人没有的特质。那是…和我们——人类——拥有的「情感」很类似的东西。
E: Pascal possesses a quality that other small robots lack. It's kind of similar to the emotions we humans have.

C: …没错。
E: ...Correct.

C: 机械单元帕斯卡的故障概率及信息噪音比例仍在不断上升。一旦负荷率达到<unbreak>100%</unbreak>——
E: Both the risk of Pascal crashing and the amount of muddled information are increasing. When it approaches <unbreak>100%</unbreak>...

C: 你做出决定了吗？
E: Have you decided?

C: 选择权在你。我就在此处等候。
E: It's all up to you. I'll be waiting for you right here.
█Pascal█ ██ █very███happy█ ██ █finish█ █mission███—

C: 我老弟说禁区的能源管线出故障了，挺要命的。他又信不过外包的维修工…只好请我来打白工咯。
E: My brother said the restricted zone energy lines were malfunctioning — told me it was urgent. He doesn't trust those contracted maintenance workers... so he got me in for free.

C: 「机械热潮」又发新歌了，你听过了吗？
E: ...Mechanical Fever released a new song. Did you hear it?

C: 铁卫不会怀疑吗？
E: Won't the Guards get suspicious?

C: 谁来智取一下？
E: Brainwaves? Anyone?

C: 杰帕德经常在前线值勤吗？
E: Is Gepard on front line duty a lot?

C: 不过你也知道我们的审批流程是个什么状况…在那之前咱也只能坐着干等着了。
E: But you know what our approval system is like... Until then, we can't really do anything.

C: ——怎么又是你？
E: How come it's you again...?

C: 这…茉莉，不要这样…刚才是我言重了！我不是想打击你……
E: Well... Molly, please don't get nihilistic... Maybe I was being a bit too harsh just now. I didn't mean to upset you...

C: 斯捷潘先生说过，我不需要靠自己做出艰难的选择。只要是非常重要的场合…他一定会在我身边。所以…我只要等待就好了。
E: Mr. Stefan said that I don't have to make hard choices on my own. If it's an important enough occasion... then he'll be there for me. So... I'll just wait.

C: （她一直在等的那个人，是叫斯捷潘吗？他好像一直没有出现。或许我可以再试着帮帮她……）
E: (Is the person she's been waiting for this whole time called Stefan? It doesn't look like he's shown up yet. Perhaps I can try to help her again...)

C: 这就是…杰帕德提到的那片裂界？
E: Is this... the Fragmentum Gepard was talking about?

C: 七百年前，这里曾是贝洛伯格的北方边界，也是阿丽萨•兰德带领第一批银鬃铁卫抵御军团的古战场。
E: Seven hundred years ago, this was Belobog's northern border and the site of an ancient battle. Here is where Alisa Rand led the first Silvermane Guards in resistance against the Legion.

C: 不管它通向何处，想来就是这趟旅途的终点。
E: Wherever they lead, it must be the end of the journey.

C: 他俩应该已经习惯这种冒险了。
E: These two have gotten used to these expeditions.

C: 老实说，很难习惯啊！以前都得依靠姬子和杨叔……
E: To be honest, you never really get used to them! We always used to rely on Himeko and Mr. Yang.

C: 我们需要你——
E: We need you...

C: 被冰封的虚卒遗骸遍布这条山道，看来就连残暴的军团也无法抵御寒潮的威力。
E: The frozen remains of Voidrangers are scattered along the mountain path. Even the ruthless Antimatter Legion is helpless against the might of the Eternal Freeze.

C: 你现在在想什么？
E: What are you thinking about right now?

C: 你不必勉强。
E: You don't have to.

C: 开始吧！
E: Let's start!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>货运型的星槎</color>根据货运量区分，基本<color=#dbc291ff>只有红和绿两种颜色。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Freight starskiffs</color> are differentiated by the amount of cargo they carry, and are typically colored <color=#dbc291ff>either in red or green.</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你需要在规定时间内，记下往来这里的所有星槎的型号和颜色。等到结束之后，我会向你提问。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You will need to remember the models and colors of all starskiffs that pass by within the specified time period, and I will ask you a few questions at the end.</color>

C: 哎哟哟，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，俺没事，稍微躺一下就能起来了。
E: Oh, {F#young lass}{M#young fella}, I'm fine. Just hafta lay down for a spell.

C: 我得帮她把赔偿的事儿谈清楚，要是她自己来处理，肯定不了了之了。
E: I'll need to settle the compensation for her. If this were left to her alone, it would just fizzle out in the end.

C: …这，这确实是我的星槎。
E: This... is my starskiff.

C: 抱歉，我刚才有些走神。
E: Sorry, I got lost in thought.

C: {NICKNAME}啊…我正在物色助手。
E: Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}... I'm looking for an assistant.

C: 我能回报你的不止是钱，还有名声和知识。
E: I can give you more than just money! I can give you prestige and knowledge!

C: 去吧，我把批复的手续给你，别让我老人家等太久了。毕竟上了年纪，关节炎每一分钟都在惩罚我。
E: Go. I'll give you the approval documents. Don't let an old man like me wait too long. At my age, arthritis is a veritable torment.

C: 你怎么了…控制下表情。
E: I can tell from your expression that something's wrong...

C: 东西都拍好了。
E: I took picture of everything.

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Did you want something?

C: 你主人叫你回家，他想你了。
E: Your master asks you to go home. He misses you.

C: 你要怎样才肯回到小聪身边？
E: What would it take for you to go back to Cong?

C: 老夫？
E: Old timer?

C: 我知道两位的来意呱，但是请你们先回答我的问题——写诗最重要的是什么？
E: I know why you're here, croak. But before we address that, please answer my question — what about writing poetry is of the most importance?

C: 我今年六十二岁了，爸爸。朱明仙舟去过三次了。
E: I'm sixty-two years old, Dad. I've been aboard the Xianzhou Zhuming three times.

C: 很好，这首诗要讲的是哪一种离别呢？
E: Great. What kind of parting should this poem talk about?

C: 平仄平平仄仄平。哼，没有对仗工整，我必须亲自将你赶走！
E: This clause does not contrast with my line. I must oust you myself!

C: 谢谢你，但是对不起，我不接受，请你回去吧。
E: Thank you, but I'm sorry I can't accept it. Please go home.

C: 似乎是同一款。嗐，我就说嘛，男人送的礼，还能翻出什么花儿来。
E: I think it's the same as this one. Tsk, you can't expect any surprises from the things men give you.

C: …那只是孤屿的一厢情愿，这也是我想让你扔掉它的原因。你早已不是他了，他也和你无关，你应该去寻找自己的幸福，而不是寻找别人幸福的影子。
E: ...That is just his wishful thinking, which is why I want you to throw the lock away. You are not him, and he isn't related to you. You should search for your own happiness, not the shadow of someone else's joy.

C: 刚才大毫执事官说最近长乐天有贴小广告的，让我去揭掉。
E: Official Dahao told me that someone had been putting up advertising posters in the Exalting Sanctum, and he wanted me to remove them.

C: 如何看待《流云集》？
E: What is your take on Drifting Clouds?

C: 他人笑我胶柱鼓瑟，我笑他人数典忘祖。你表现不错，我很认可你。
E: They mock and scoff, my rigid stance they jest, yet I, in turn, deride their roots, long lost. Your splendid deeds, deserving my acclaim, I commend thee, for thou hast truly shone.

C: 要是能搞到那个「仙舟美丽狐仙聊天」的<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>，就能进一步了解内情了。
E: If we can get the Xianzhou Foxian Beauty Chat's <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>, we'll be able to have a deeper understanding of the situation.

C: 这家伙一听地衡司脸都变了…
E: As soon as we mentioned the Realm-Keeping Commission, that guy's face changed completely...

C: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
E: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

C: 原来如此，这些景色和老师信里说的一模一样啊。要是能早些欣赏到这片壮丽的……
E: These views look exactly the same as those described by my teacher. If only I could have admired them earlier...

C: 讲解完毕，出发吧。
E: That's all. You may set off now.

C: 没有，半点都不消停。但我还是得亲自去到那边，以表郑重。
E: No, he's never spared me. Still, I must be there myself to show my respect.

C: 老师提到过，传说中持明龙尊受秘法加持，除了能自在变化龙形外，其容貌也万世不改。
E: According to my teacher, the legendary Vidyadhara high elder is empowered by a secret spell. Not only can the high elder transform into the dragon form at will, but their appearance will also never change.

C: 请提交在丹鼎司找到的拓片
E: Please submit the rubbings found in the Alchemy Commission.

C: 陶德动作流畅地冲你欠身行礼，迅速转身离去。
E: Todd bows and shoots you a smooth salute, before turning to quickly leave.

C: 有点像持明族的蜕生…
E: Kind of like the Vidyadhara tradition of hatching rebirth...

C: 如果你和医护都像白露一样身高吃亏，那么这座石造景观后面也许是个不错的藏身处。再去找找还有没有更合适的地方吧。
E: If you and the nurse are both as short as Bailu, then this stone design would be enough to hide you. You shall find a better place to hide.

C: 我是景元将军的客人，懂了吧？
E: I'm General Jing Yuan's guest. Understand?

C: （前侧裤兜）
E: (Pants pockets at front...)

C: 说起来，这样的情景在我小时候也经常发生啊。每当我想和邻家扎着辫子的小姑娘一起玩耍时，我的父母就会像闹钟一样准时出现，把我带回书桌前。
E: Speaking of which, this kind of thing used to happen all the time when I was a kid. Whenever I wanted to play together with the pig-tailed girl next door, my parents would show up like an alarm clock and march me back to my desk.

C: 只能是卖惨讲讲故事了。
E: Anyone got a good tear-jerker?

C: 我们要把她押送回丹鼎司。
E: We need to escort her back to the Alchemy Commission.

C: 能讲一下不见面的理由吗？
E: Care to elaborate?

C: 白露小姐质朴天真，浑无心机。我等替她绸缪分忧，这才是侍者该为主人做的。
E: Bailu is simple and innocent, incapable of ill intent. It's natural for a servant to care for her master and share in her worries.

C: 需要我向其他人保密吗？
E: Should I keep this a secret from the others?

C: 何况丹枫选了她成为龙尊，那她便是罗浮持明的领袖。命运使然，奉其为尊，我等心甘情愿。
E: Moreover, Dan Feng selected her as high elder, making her the leader of the Luofu Vidyadhara. Fate chose her as our sovereign, and we bowed down before that destiny.

C: 「古海之水，奉龙尊号令，在此镇伏玄根。」
E: "Water of the ancient sea, upon High Elder's command, subdue the eternal roots."

C: 若不是你那些好友齐力将它斩杀，恐怕「建木」的封印也会毁于一旦。看着它殒落，你是不是倍感心痛呀？
E: If your allies hadn't united to slay it, then the abomination would have destroyed the Ambrosial Arbor's seal. Tell me, did it sadden you to watch the abomination perish?

C: 他以为持明族高人一等，还以为自己在持明族中又高人一等——好像没了他们的谋划，持明族就完全不能发展了一样。
E: He thought that the Vidyadhara was superior to other races and that he was superior to other Vidyadhara... As if the Vidyadhara would never progress without their plans.

C: 丹枫大人您对化龙妙法的更动，固然造就了大肆破坏的孽龙，但同时也创造了一个全新的生命！这正是持明族再度繁衍的希望！
E: Master Dan Feng, your changes to the Transmutation Arcanum created a draconic abomination that wreaked great destruction... but it also created a new life! This is the hope that will one day allow the Vidyadhara to reproduce!

C: 白露小姐？您没事吧，我等了好久都没见你们出现……
E: Miss Bailu? Are you okay? You were in there for such a long time...

C: 尤其是你，白露小姐，你根本就没有呼风唤雨的龙尊之力，我凭什么相信你能做得比丹枫大人更好？
E: Especially you, Miss Bailu. You simply do not have the power of the High Elder — the power to summon the forces of nature... Why should I believe you are superior in any way to Master Dan Feng?

C: 本地帮派的格局，也未免太低了些。
E: And there I was thinking you gangsters still had some decorum.

C: 嗐，我也分不太清。总之，我们查过，他在联盟的记录很干净。背后那个大箱子…那个观什么……
E: Hmph, I swear he said "coughing"... Anyway, we checked him out — his record on the Xianzhou is squeaky-clean. As for this "caffeine" thing...

C: 凭啥给你巡镝啊？什么跟什么啊？怎么就开始要钱了？
E: Pay you? What is this? You want payment for a simple favor?

C: 只记得…那两个黑衣人闻起来臭臭的。但这可能算不上什么线索啦。不好意思，你们专程跑一趟，但我没提供什么有价值的信息。
E: All I remember is... the two people in dark clothing — they smelled pretty bad. I guess that's not much of a clue. Sorry I can't give you any useful information.

C: 哎…毕竟还是我擅离职守导致的。
E: *sigh* At the end of the day, this wouldn't have happened if I'd stayed at my post.

C: 看来是时候发挥我神探三月七的侦探能力了。
E: I think it's high time detective March took the gloves off.

C: {NICKNAME}，远处似乎能看到有地方在冒烟。这是夕葵小姐派来的机巧鸟，用它飞上去看看吧。情况紧急，我们得抓紧时间确认坠机位置。
E: {NICKNAME}, looks like there's smoke rising in the distance. Miss Xikui sent us a cycrane — see if you can get an aerial visual. This is an emergency, we need to find where the starskiff crashed as soon as possible.

C: 妖物，别靠近我！我、我不怕你们！你不要过来啊！
E: Get back, you demons! I—I'm not afraid of you! Stay away!

C: 其实人生就是这样的，没人清楚打开豆汁罐子前，自己会是喜欢还是讨厌。独一无二的体验往往就藏在这种带有风险的抉择里。
E: Hehe, y'know, there are lot of "mung bean soda moments" in life — if you don't try you won't know. Unique experiences are often a product of risky choices.

C: 搞不太懂…
E: I don't get it...

C: 杨叔比较讲究。
E: Mr. Yang has rules for these things.

C: 你知道吗？那些残酷的事情从未击倒我。我、采翼，还有你的生父广渊，在入伍之初，我们心中就早有准备。
E: You know, the cruelty has never claimed victory. Me, Caiyi, your father Guangyuan... we were prepared for the worst when we enlisted.

C: 偷着去考？当时我要是说个「不」字，你以为你能走进考场，坐上斗舰？
E: Behind my back? Do you really think you could've walked into the test and sat in the cockpit if I hadn't given my permission behind the scenes?

C: 你说得对…我确实想帮助你。
E: You have a point... I'm here to help you.

C: 我知道你会回心转意的。谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I knew you'd come around. On the Xianzhou... you're the only person I can turn to for help.

C: 我要离开。
E: I'm leaving.

C: 幼不幼稚…
E: Sounds childish...

C: 如果不信的话，你就试试看吧。很快「还会发生一场战斗」。你能改变这个可能性吗？
E: If you don't believe me, try it for yourself: Soon we will face another battle. Can you change that possibility?

C: 地衡司的卧底我都识得，哪里有你？众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: I know all the undercover agents from the Realm-Keeping Commission, and you're not one of them. Everyone, take them down!

C: 开门的人一言不发，我也怀疑其中有鬼。
E: W—We found it strange ourselves when the gate opened but no one came to greet us.

C: 肯定是有人动了手脚，待我试试把锁撬开……
E: Seems like someone wants to make things difficult for us. Let me see if I can pry it open...

C: 各位止步。前方正在执行排查维护工作，需得确认安全才能再度开放。
E: Go no further. The area ahead is currently under inspection. The lockdown will be lifted when the safety is ensured.

C: …害帕！
E: ...This is giving me the shivers!

C: 是啊，她的运气从来都坏得惊人。但凡驾驶星槎出征，不是阴差阳错被丰饶民的巨兽当点心吞下，便是在敌人的大后方坠机。
E: Indeed, her luck always astonished us. Whenever she piloted a mission, you could almost guarantee a narrow escape from the jaws of some Abundance behemoth, or a miraculous return from behind enemy lines.

C: …就像你从未忘却。
E: ...like you never forgot.

C: 汪汪，汪汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof, howoof woof woof woof!

C: 你们…已读过其中的记录了吗？
E: You... already accessed the recordings?

C: 我叫彦卿，是正式录名在籍的云骑军。还没请教大姐姐的名字？
E: My name is Yanqing — I'm registered with the Cloud Knights. And your name is...?

C: …小弟弟，要拿人总该有个说法吧。
E: ...Young man, if you wish to apprehend someone, shouldn't you have a reason?

C: 对了，犯人要在各个洞天间穿行，还得依靠星槎。
E: Hmm... A fugitive would still have to rely on starskiffs to travel between different delves.

C: 你先行一步。
E: Lead the way.

C: 因为它所称呼的，正是仙舟人的大敌，如今被我们称为「寿瘟祸祖」的丰饶星神，药师。
E: It refers to none other than the enemy of the people of the Xianzhou — the one we now call the Plagues Author... The Aeon of Abundance — Yaoshi.

C: 我最近接获线报，趁着眼下局势混乱，长乐天一带似乎有人在蛊惑化外民。也许你可以从那里开始？
E: I recently received some intel. It seems that certain individuals are taking advantage of the current chaos to lure in outworlders around Exalting Sanctum. Maybe you could start there?

C: 你还真是个天才…
E: You really are a genius...

C: 这样吧…我想到一个好办法，可以让你加入药王秘传，也能让我全身而退……
E: Listen... I have an idea that will let you join the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and let me get the heck out of here in one piece.

C: 你来？你知道怎么处理吗？
E: Oh, you've dealt with this kind of thing before?

C: 抓住内鬼了吗？
E: Did we find the spy?

C: 我能见到老大吗？
E: Can I meet the boss?

C: 你好，是有什么事需要我帮忙吗？
E: Ah, why hello there. Anything I can help you with?

C: 好久不见了，{NICKNAME}。
E: It has been a while, {NICKNAME}.

C: 想知道长生的本质吗？
E: Would you like to learn about the true nature of immortality?

C: 大叔，你别逞英雄啊。
E: Don't try to be a hero!

C: 看来得使些不得已的手段了。你是准备自己动起来，还是我让身后那个穿白大褂的小伙儿把你塞进他的白箱子里运走？
E: *sigh* Looks like we're gonna to have to resort to unconventional methods. Are you gonna come with us willingly, or do I have to ask the guy behind me to carry you in his white death-box?

C: 过奖过奖，这画像上的东西我便不知道是什么。
E: You are too kind, miss. For one, I don't recognize that thing in the painting.

C: 唔…脑袋有些晕乎……
E: Uhh... My head is spinning...

C: 该离开的是你，我是不会放手的。
E: You're the one who needs to leave. I'm not letting this go.

C: 我…我也不知道啊？语气好吓人啊……
E: I... I dunno. She's being a little creepy...

C: 务必请坚定信心。不是所有的回忆都适合被唤醒的。一路走来，人们也承受了许多痛苦和负担。
E: Please be prepared. Not all memories are suitable for reawakening. People carry with them much pain and suffering.

C: 顺便一提，桑博宾馆的广告词是：「不应回望过去，只应憧憬未来。」我觉得这条广告词也很适合三月小姐。
E: I should mention — the Sampo Hotel's new slogan is: "Don't think about the past, strive for your future." Sounds like the kind of ad copy that Miss March would like.

C: 好久不见呀，希儿～
E: Long time no see, Seele~

C: 三月七，就算回望，你也只能找到混沌多变的过去。
E: March, if you insist on looking back, you'll find nothing but confusion and chaos.

C: 星穹列车是欢迎每个人的帕！不用担心，你只要做出当下最正确的选择就好，帕姆会为此后一切问题负责的。
E: The Astral Express welcomes everyone! Don't worry — do what you feel is right, and Pom-Pom will take care of the rest.

C: 不如你本人可爱。
E: Not as cute as the real you.

C: 你就这一句开场白吗？
E: Is that usually how you welcome customers?

C: 如果您需要时间准备，鄙店愿意无限期等待。
E: If you need time to prepare, we can humbly wait as long as you need.

C: …那、那这样吧，我先去做几道菜你们先吃着，不够再加。
E: Well... then I'll start making a few dishes, and if you need more, just let me know.

C: 真的不用再找找三月？
E: Are you sure we don't need to look for March?

C: 不用，我考虑过了，今天就放一天假吧。
E: No, I've thought about it. She deserves a day off.

C: 我曾经还见过不少道貌岸然的剑主，说起谎来就像是吃饭喝水一般自然。不过剑总是诚实的——剑会告诉我，它的主人不过是「附庸于神兵利器」的宵小之辈。
E: I've come across so many sword wielders who acted all righteous and moral but were really just liars. Their swords always told the truth though. They told me that their wielders were just a bunch of frauds who relied on their divine weapons for everything.

C: …你是？
E: ...And you are?

C: 你对鄙人的家乡感兴趣？呵呵，那敢情好，欢迎阁下有空来咱们那儿做客。
E: Oh, you're interested in my home planet? That's great! Your Excellency is welcome to visit us at any time.

C: 关于要不要把剑送回，议会里的老东西们吵了一架，却难得有了一致的意见：让「米卡•奇瓦沙」回到它该去的地方。
E: The old timers on council had a heated debate about whether to return the sword. They eventually unanimously agreed to let the Miekka Kivessä return to where it truly belongs.

C: 小妹妹怎么闹情绪啦？
E: What's wrong, Yunli?

C: 其实我是关心你才来的。
E: Actually, I'm here because I care about you.

C: 哈哈哈哈，那就多麻烦你了。
E: Hahaha, I'll be counting on you then.

C: 首先，云璃小姐在赠剑仪式当场就表露过偷取孤云的动机——几次三番说过要带走这把剑。而后又闯入工造司中，破坏金人，意图夺剑，我可有说错？
E: First, during the sword-gifting ceremony, Yunli openly expressed her intention to steal the sword. She even mentioned it multiple times. After the ceremony, she broke into the Artisanship Commission and destroyed aurumatons in an attempt to get the sword. Am I right?

C: 有没有可能是我偷了剑？
E: Could it be that I stole the sword?

C: 我能证明，{NICKNAME}离开工造司后，来到了我这里，没有偷剑嫌疑。
E: I can prove that {NICKNAME} came to me after leaving the Artisanship Commission, so {F#she}{M#he} couldn't have stolen the sword.

C: 这把剑的主人曾手执「米卡•奇瓦沙」为先民们斩妖除魔，而后又将宝剑交托给历代贤君。
E: The first master of the Miekka Kivessä slew countless demons and then passed it down to a line of wise monarchs.

C: 当然…这确实可能只是神话。毕竟谁也没真的听过这把剑开口发声。
E: Of course... it could just be a myth. After all, no one has actually heard the sword speak.

C: 「米卡•奇瓦沙」帮助过卡勒瓦拉先祖们创下基业，它绝不是什么「魔剑」！
E: The point is that the Miekka Kivessä did help the ancestors of Kalevala build a strong foundation! It's definitely not a "cursed sword"!

C: （也就是说…窃贼没有撬锁就取走了匣中的剑？）
E: (So... the thief took the sword from the case without picking the lock?)

C: 云璃小姐，您是否接受挑战？
E: Do you accept my challenge, Miss Yunli?

C: 「他们已知晓如何反抗怪物，而世间仍有最后一头怪物在徘徊。除掉它，我的老友。」
E: "They've learned how to fight monsters, but there's still one last monster lingering in the world. Kill it, my old friend."

C: 可是当我的使命完成时，我是否能像那个人一样，拥有选择自己命运的权利呢？因此，我请求纯美骑士帮助我离开，不必再陷入杀戮和战斗的轮回。
E: But once I fulfilled my mission, would I have the right to choose my own destiny like he did? So, I asked the Knight of Beauty to help me break free from this never-ending cycle of bloodshed.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 是位星际和平公司的职员，叫沙马里。听目击者说，有个人高马大的壮汉，穿得宽袍大袖，和沙马里擦肩而过时，突然一锤子砸了下去…
E: An IPC employee named Shamari. Eyewitnesses reported that a tall, strong man wearing a large robe with long sleeves walked right past Shamari, then suddenly assaulted him with a hammer...

C: 有了！他们三人为争夺二把手的位置，关系极其紧张，根本不可能合作！所以必然是其中一人单独作案！
E: Got it! Those three were all vying against each other to be number two. They couldn't have cooperated on anything! So it must have been one of them acting alone.

C: 我已备好案件卷宗，您可以向我了解更多有关嫌疑人的信息。
E: I've got the case file right here. If you want to learn more about the suspects, talk to me.

C: 最后是赌徒钟珊。他曾在一场赌局中输给花火大人，不得不交出自己的传家之宝，可能正因如此，他对花火大人怀恨在心。
E: Finally there is the gambler, Zhongshan. He lost a bet to Miss Sparkle, and he had to hand over his family heirloom. It's possible he harbored a grudge against her.

C: 在受害者口中…？
E: In the victim's MOUTH...?

C: 不必如此大费周章，如果你只是想确认这件事…我已经把答案告诉你了，花火小姐。
E: There's no need to take such great pains. If you just want confirmation... I've already told you the answer, Miss Sparkle.

C: 想再听听嫌疑人信息。
E: I'd like to hear about the suspects one more time.

C: 这有一根领带。
E: And there's the tie.

C: 要见太卜，径直去「穷观阵」那边就是。
E: If you want to see the master diviner, head straight to the Matrix of Prescience.

C: 准备战斗吧。
E: Here comes trouble.

C: 前面便是我太卜司引以为傲的大型玉兆算端——「穷观阵」。
E: This is the Matrix of Prescience — a large-scale jade abacus calculation terminal. It's the pride and joy of the Divination Commission.

C: 它们是那种行走于正道的人，永远不会告诉你的故事。
E: They're the kind of stories that folks on the straight and narrow would never tell you.

C: 「建木」被人注入了力量…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor was imbued with some kind of power...

C: 你要领兵攻打丹鼎司吗？
E: Are you leading forces into the Alchemy Commission?

C: 老乡，我是将军请来的救兵。
E: Fret not. I'm the cavalry the general sent for.

C: 我劝你们啊，要是还想活命，就别进去。
E: Please, if you plan on living a little longer, don't go in there.

C: 风寒来得挺及时哈？麻利个屁，我还想活久一些呢！
E: Under the weather!? How convenient. As for me — I'd rather stay alive, thanks!

C: 有什么好解释的！无非是「路过」「不小心」「门开着」这种糊弄人的借口。
E: What excuses do you have? Surprise me! Just passing by? Stumbled in? Door wide open? HMM?

C: 你是阿伟他们的老师吧？
E: Are you Awei's teacher?

C: 哈哈，老夫心里有数，景将军既请各位来这儿，那是必有深意，十成十是来解这工造司之危局的。
E: Haha, I'm sure General Jing Yuan must have believed wholeheartedly that you could save the Artisanship Commission from this crisis.

C: 本来，借着这玩意我能将各位送到对面去。谁知一个不注意，画屏竟被那木精的枝条给缠住了～啊！
E: Ordinarily I could've used this beauty to teleport you thither, but... Through earth and air the wretched branches boiled, the Shifting Screen entangled thence... encoiled!

C: 那怪物只在「建木」附近活动。我们四下看看，也许能有什么发现。
E: The monster only seems to be active in the vicinity of the Arbor. Let's look around and see if we can find anything.

C: 事不宜迟，乘着这些根须还没来得及长回来。
E: Let's hurry, before they've had a chance to grow back.

C: 第三、禁止和成年人括弧包括但不限于爸妈括弧缔结友好关系，与一切大人势力抗争到底！
E: Number three, no making friends with grown-ups — except your mom and dad. You must fight against all grown-up forces to the end!

C: 如果只是因为这点小小的愧疚就让你感到伤心，这条长路你还是一步也别走下去了。
E: So, if a little bit of guilt like this is enough to break your heart, then how will you manage such an arduous path?

C: 这是在下早年的日记，记录了很多自己当年战胜天缺的尝试。
E: This is a diary I kept — it records the many attempts I made to overcome my incompletions.

C: 我理解你的心情…我也曾被「朋友」欺骗过，那滋味很不好受。
E: I understand how you feel... I've also been fooled by someone I regarded as a good friend. It's a dreadful experience.

C: 无论如何，还是感谢你的帮助。我们会根据你的情报去搜捕丹枢的，辛苦你了。
E: Once again, thank you for all your help. With your intel, we will put a stop to Dan Shu.

C: （怎么突然联系不上钟珊了…不会真出什么事了吧？去鳞渊境看看吧，「放生帮」似乎经常在那里集会……）
E: (Why can't I reach Zhongshan... Has something bad happened? Let me check out the Scalegorge Waterscape, where the Unshackled members often gather...)

C: 可我最近想回去看看时，却发现它们全都不见了！
E: But when I went back home to check on them, I realized they were all gone!

C: 打从你跟我来见这四位的时候啊？怎么，我以为你愿意跟我来，是存了向善的心意，打算了解「丰饶」之道和放生帮呢？
E: When you agreed to come with me and meet them. Didn't you say yes because you wanted to do good and learn more about the way of Abundance and the Unshackled?

C: 首先是是冬妮娅，她想要让强而有力的猛兽摆脱人类的控制。
E: Firstly, there's Tonya. She wants to free powerful beasts from human control.

C: 我已经向他们展示了咱们打算放生的对象，不过大善人们似乎不太满意。
E: I've presented our plan to the Benevolent Ones, but they don't seem too pleased about it.

C: 你笑什么？
E: What are you laughing at?

C: 那太好了…如果他们打算进行任何有危害性的活动，请您立刻通知我们。
E: That's great... If they intend to carry out any hazardous activities, please inform us immediately.

C: 哎哟，冬妮娅，你怎么受了这么重的伤啊！
E: Holy moly, Tonya! How did you get so badly injured?

C: 原来他会好好说话啊……
E: It turns out he can be serious...

C: 嘿嘿，我从见到您那一刻就知道，您是干这个的。走吧走吧！
E: Hee-hee, I knew it! This is what people like us live for. Let's go!

C: 桂乃芬小姐，虽然一时半会儿很难解释清楚，但那些东西并不是你以为的幽灵鬼怪，请不要把家乡的传说套在仙舟的事情上……
E: Miss Guinaifen, it's hard to explain, but those things aren't ghosts. Please don't bring legends from your home world onto the Xianzhou...

C: 遵、遵命。
E: Y—Yes, ma'am.

C: 嗯，有劳你了。
E: Yes, thank you.

C: 没错，所以她需要你这样的同类抱团取暖，明白？快去！
E: Yes, which is why she needs other organic beings like you to support her! Get it? Go!

C: 藿藿向雪衣详细解释了此前的经历……
E: Huohuo informs Xueyi of what you have experienced so far...

C: 啊呀呀，大爷我感觉自己像是个被充上气的气球，被这小怂包给吹胀了啊！还等什么呢，走吧？
E: Exactly! You're welcome, by the way... So, what are we waiting for? Let's go!

C: 接下来就交给十王司吧，吾…也想好好休息一番了。
E: We can leave the rest to the Ten-Lords Commission from here... Even I feel like I need a rest.

C: …刚才已经穿过这面镜子了，镜子后面的雪衣大人应该是假的，别再去了。
E: ...We already passed through this mirror. The Madam Xueyi behind this mirror is most likely a fake. Let's not go there again.

C: 就这样吧。
E: That's all.

C: 你们给她做了什么治疗？
E: What sort of treatment did you give her?

C: 相关人员已经对她的情绪做了「处理」，她应该已经忘了那些不愉快的事。相对的，健忘、嗜睡、反应迟钝是难以避免的副作用。
E: The relevant personnel have already "handled" her emotions accordingly. She should have already forgotten all the unhappy memories. Conversely, forgetfulness, sleepiness, and dulled reactions are unavoidable side effects.

C: 还没有做好准备吗？我能理解…但你总有一天要做出选择。
E: Are you not ready yet? I understand... But you will have to make a choice one day.

C: 娜娜，你已经长大了，想好以后要怎么生活了吗？
E: Cocona, you're all grown up now. Have you thought about how you want to live your life yet?

C: 我就知道…就不该让她参加那什么学生合唱团！
E: I knew it... We shouldn't have let her join that student choir!

C: 柯柯娜…你能欺骗所有人，但骗不过自己。
E: Cocona... You can lie to everyone, but you can't lie to yourself.

C: 柯柯娜的恋人摆出滑稽的姿势，让她笑出了声。他们又重新依偎在一起。
E: Cocona's lover poses comically, eliciting a laugh from her. They embrace and cuddle up against each other yet again.

C: …「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」。
E: ..."Envision a Rose Forthcoming."

C: 我坚持不下去了…我受够了扮演所有故事里的悲惨配角。所有的不幸…求求你，让它结束吧……
E: I can't bear it any longer... I've had enough of playing the tragic support role in all these stories. All that suffering... Please, let it end...

C: …咦？！等…请等一下……
E: ...Huh!? Please... Please hold on...

C: 她的咬字方式很特别…
E: Her intonation is very unique...

C: 他是我的…是我的。
E: He is mine... He's mine.

C: 就是…字面意思。我被困在了这里，不知道该如何出梦。
E: It's... well, I'm literally stuck in this place and totally clueless about how to leave this dream.

C: 还有…还有他们口口声声念叨着的「梦境中的异常个体」，到底是怎么回事？
E: Also... Also they kept saying something about a "dream anomaly." What on earth could that mean?

C: 在入梦装置底部躺着一个信封，信封上没有任何署名或标识。
E: There is an envelope lying in the bottom of the dream device, with no signatures or markings on it.

C: 你将手指探入已经被划开的封口，随手抽出了一张泛黄的信纸。
E: You slide your fingers inside the already torn open envelope and pull out a yellow-tinged letter.

C: 这个房间的客人去哪了？
E: Where did the guest in this room go?

C: 但沧桑之态并未持续太久。在最后一丝光芒溜走前，一团火苗重新点燃了他的瞳孔。
E: But his downtrodden demeanor does not last long. Just as the last glint of light is about to fade from his eyes, a new flame kindles in his pupils.

C: 一个为了偶像可以舍弃一切——甚至包括「尊严」这座为人的基石——的人，恕我直言…只会令人感到恐惧。
E: A person who could abandon everything for their idol... Including the very cornerstone of human life, "dignity"... If I am frank, someone like this... They only fill me with fear.

C: 推开房门。
E: Push open the door.

C: 莱…迪恩先生，您好！从今天开始，劳烦您在工作上多多照应。
E: Les— Mr. Dean, hello! I look forward to learning from you in the future.

C: 幸会，芙洛拉小姐！您真是魅力四射，相信我们未来的合作一定会无比愉快。
E: It's a pleasure, Ms. Flora! You really are a charming young lady! I'm sure we will work wonderfully together!

C: 是的，「晖长石号」的所有权已转移到星穹列车名下，不过…根据最新协商结果——星穹列车方已指定您为此事全权代表。
E: Correct. Ownership of the Radiant Feldspar has been transferred to the Astral Express, but... according to the latest agreement's terms... the Astral Express has appointed you as the authoritative representative for this handover.

C: 罗莎吩咐船员们对空艇尾翼进行了涂装。
E: Rosa instructs the crew members to paint the airship's empennage.

C: 请您放心，我已先行检阅过，他的审美相当不错，足以将您的容貌还原出六七成。
E: Please be rest assured. I've checked it. His aesthetics are good. He's able to replicate at least sixty percent of your appearance.

C: 你拨通了前台的服务电话，拜托「同事」处理了他们的续住需求。
E: You dial the number of the hotel reception, and ask your "coworker" to handle their room extension.

C: （机械牛仔加纯美骑士，这对组合可真神奇。不知道他们能不能查出什么结果……）
E: (A cyborg cowboy plus a Knight of Beauty. What an amazing combo. I wonder what they'll be able to turn up...)

C: 这叫「突出个性」。你这么上镜，就别担心这种细节了。
E: That's called "leaning into your style." You're so photogenic, you don't have to worry about details like that.

C: 呃…抱歉，{F#女士}{M#先生}。您应该也能看出来，我们这里是酒店的饮吧，不是超市……
E: Er... sorry about that, {F#madam}{M#sir}. You should be able to work out that we're a hotel bar, not a supermarket...

C: （很好！苏乐达续杯畅饮，这是大堂经理才能享受的特权！）
E: (Great! Free refills of SoulGlad, a special privilege only the lobby manager gets to enjoy!)

C: 我想试着开始写自己的歌了，{NICKNAME}。我想把自己生命中所有重要的事物都写进去，然后……
E: I'd like to try composing my own songs, {NICKNAME}. I want to write about all the significant experiences I've had in my life, then...

C: 沉默！无言以对！阴暗的巨人，等待被矲主净化！
E: Silent! Speechless! Evil giant, you will be purified by the master!

C: 糟糕！你拯救{F#闺蜜}{M#朋友}心切，居然忘记了哈努兄弟的重要设定。
E: Uh-oh! You're so eager to save your kindred spirit that you have overlooked an important characteristic of Brother Hanu.

C: 哟，看样子这位小妹还是仙舟人？你好啊。
E: Huh, you from the Xianzhou, miss? Hello there!

C: 呵呵…我不得不承认，朋友——你很有性格。
E: Heh... I must admit, my friend, you possess quite a distinct character.

C: 怜悯巨人就是背叛教义…
E: Pity not the giants, for it breaches my creeds...

C: 唔，这就到告别的时间了啊……
E: Oh? Can't believe it's already time for us to part ways...

C: 又不是吃饭来晚了，今天没有买单的环节啦。
E: We're not going out for dinner. There are no bills to pay today!

C: 嘿嘿，云璃师父！
E: Hehe, Master Yunli!

C: 想打听下太卜大人的玉阙见闻。
E: What did you learn about the Yuque?

C: （要是做好了准备，就和彦卿一起等待接下来的客人吧……）
E: (If you are ready, await the next group of guests with Yanqing.)

C: 让我来告诉你一个职场的技巧吧，不管是不是上司想要的，只要有，就先带上。太卜大人说要什么，没带来的就是没有，有的我都带来了，就不用来回跑腿了。
E: Anyways, lemme tell you a pro tip for the workplace: If it exists, just bring it, even if your boss didn't explicitly ask for it. If the master diviner wants something and I don't have it on me, then I'll just say it doesn't exist, and everything that does exist is already with me. This way, I'll never have to run back for things.

C: 全是细节。
E: Ugh, how troublesome.

C: 我的老师莱恩是从其他世界来求学的短生种。
E: Master Ryan was a short-life species who came here as an outworlder student.

C: 你说是吧，铖杰。
E: Don't you think so, Chengjie?

C: 我快要分不清自己到底是想实现老师的梦想，还是只是在提醒自己不要忘记他。
E: Now I can't even tell if I really do want to fulfill my master's dream, or whether I'm just reminding myself over and over not to forget about him.

C: 其实，我是想偷偷把这艘船造好，让公输师傅大吃一惊来着。
E: Actually, I plan to build it secretly to impress Master Gongshu.

C: 这要是老夫自己的徒弟做出来的，我就直接说「滚回去重新做」了。
E: If this were my apprentice's work, I would have asked him to get out of my sight and redo the system.

C: 三艘、四艘……
E: Three, four...

C: 好吧，如果非要试试，就得赶时间趁现在了。我听说今天十王司的判官要与太卜大人会晤。
E: Well, if you really want to try, you have to hurry. I heard the judge of the Ten-Lords Commission would have a meeting with the master diviner today.

C: 噢，正是！实话告诉你们，我正着手筹备一个计划……
E: Ah, yes! So, I'm trying to get a plan going...

C: 卢卡！可算来了，我等你半天了……
E: Luka! You're finally here. I've been waiting for you for ages...

C: 呃…非要说的话，有一件事我到现在都想不太明白。
E: Not really... but here's the most mysterious part of all this:

C: 我想想…哦，还有一个细节，不知道能不能派上用场——
E: Let me think... Oh, there is one other thing, but I don't know if it's useful...

C: 你疯了？史瓦罗是个机器人，他才不懂什么搏击台上的礼仪！跟咱们不一样，他的拳头可不是肉长的——
E: Are you mad? Svarog is a robot! He doesn't understand the rules of the cage! He's different from us. His fists are made of steel—

C: 投降吧，你不是我们的对手！
E: Give it up! You're no match for us!

C: 看，他在那儿！
E: Look, there he is!

C: {NICKNAME}，走，我们跟上去。记得压低声音……
E: {NICKNAME}, let's follow him. Stay quiet...

C: 最后…我还想给下层区的大家争取更好的生活！
E: Lastly... I wanna make life better for the Underworld!

C: 快…落？
E: Blast... expedition?

C: 不知你们几位是不是熟悉罗浮仙舟的情况？
E: Are you familiar with the Xianzhou Luofu?

C: 这个好，我最喜欢自然风光了。那我们就先去鳞渊境吧。
E: Awesome. I love being out there in nature. Let's go to Scalegorge Waterscape first.

C: 将军也好、百冶也罢，都不过是应时加身的名头。老朽早已卸任数次，只是如今局势变化，元帅再度征召，我不得不走马上任。
E: Be it Arbiter-General or Furnace Master, these are merely titles given to me long ago. I've retired several times already, but with the current change in circumstances, the Marshal has called me back to duty, and I had no choice but to answer the call.

C: 还是先办正事要紧。
E: Let's just get down to business first.

C: 将犯人解往幽囚狱。
E: Deliver the prisoners to The Shackling Prison.

C: 我还想问你呢！怎么又遇见你了！
E: I was gonna ask you the same thing! Why do I keep running into you!?

C: 嗯，她就是那位从朱明仙舟被派来此处的新任司鼎。
E: Yeah, she's the new Cauldron Master assigned here from the Xianzhou Zhuming.

C: 博识学会为何会动用这么有悖人伦的技术？为了制造新的武器吗？
E: Why would the Intelligentsia Guild use such unethical technology? Perhaps they are trying to create a new weapon?

C: 我还要感谢您的救命之恩呢，多亏您剑术高超，击倒了这个大家伙。
E: I should thank you for saving my life. Your sword skills were impressive, taking down that big guy.

C: 种子一旦被埋下后，无论如何延阻其势，总会有发芽结果的时刻。
E: Well, once a seed is planted, no matter how long it takes, it'll eventually sprout and bear fruit.

C: 这就是演武仪典吗？
E: So, is this the Wardance?

C: 你小子…到底会不会看气氛？
E: Geez... you really know how to read the room, don't you?

C: 那你把账单寄到神策府上好了，就说是我指点那两个小家伙的教学费用。毕竟方才为了分开他们，我差点动了真格。眼下让我找个地方透透气……
E: Well, you can always send the bill to the Seat of Divine Foresight and say it's for mentoring those kids. After all, it was quite the effort splitting them up, I nearly had to get tough. Now, if you'll excuse me, I need to find a spot and get some fresh air...

C: 论说笑的本事，我还是不及你。
E: I'm no match to you when it comes to joking.

C: …哎？欸！老将军不会是认真的吧？
E: ...Huh? Wait! Are you serious, General?

C: 呃，讨论是不是跑题了？事情怎么会变成这样？
E: Uh... I think we strayed off topic. How did things even get to this point?

C: 我知道。
E: I know.

C: 我请来了列车的客人
E: I've invited some guests from the Express.

C: 是我们的人吗？还是公司的人？
E: Our people? Or someone from the IPC?

C: 你看向貊泽，他微微摇头，示意你现在实在不是个插科打诨的好时机。
E: You look at Moze, who shakes his head lightly at you. Guess this isn't really the time for jokes.

C: 吾等必恪尽职守…
E: We must fulfill our duty...

C: 是这样吗？
E: Like this?

C: 我还想问你呢！双剑本就强调灵活应敌、左右相援，还有什么比步法更重要吗？
E: I could ask you the same thing! Dual swords require agility, so what's more important than footwork?

C: 这和我几岁没关系。只要是练剑之人，自然会理解我的感受。
E: Age doesn't really matter. All swordmasters will understand how I feel.

C: 怎么，你要走了吗？你还没问我有没有梦想呢！我也练得很辛苦的！
E: What, you're leaving already? But you haven't asked me about my dreams! I've been working hard too, you know!

C: 那只粉毛狐狸刚刚欲言又止，怕是早已瞧出了什么端倪。只是他人生地不熟，所以临走前了留了个话茬暗示咱们，没想到你却不搭理他。
E: That pink-haired fox tried to say something. I'm pretty sure he sensed something fishy. Since he's not familiar with this place, he just dropped us a hint, but you didn't seem to be paying attention at all.

C: 小心，他们警觉起来了！
E: Watch out! They're on high alert!

C: 不管他们是谁，把他们的行动都拍下来作为证据。要是有什么罪证，那可就抵赖不了了。
E: Never mind who they are, let's just film them. That way, if they do anything bad, we'll have solid evidence against them.

C: 这些家伙到底施了什么障眼法？咱们刚才追踪他们时，他们看起来和一般的仙舟狐人毫无区别……
E: What kind of trick did they use? When we were tracking them earlier, they looked just like normal Xianzhou foxians...

C: 怎么了？
E: What's the matter?

C: 丹恒先生不必紧张，若是真有罪责，这也不是你一人能担起的。
E: Please don't worry, Mr. Dan Heng. If someone must be held accountable, it won't fall solely on your shoulders.

C: 看来关于无名客如何涉入这场建木灾异的细节…各位仍有一些无法自圆其说的地方啊。
E: Well, it appears that you are still unable to give explanations for several details about how the Nameless got involved in the Ambrosial Arbor crisis.

C: 以其凶残暴戾，所造杀孽不可胜纪，判入幽囚狱底，受无间剑树之刑直至天地荒灭，永无宽赦……
E: Due to his heinous acts, he has been imprisoned in the depths of The Shackling Prison and subjected to the punishment of the Forest of Swords until the end of time. He shall never be pardoned...

C: 这些孽物不是幽囚狱中关押的犯人…
E: These abominations aren't prisoners from this prison...

C: 难不成…怀炎将军想让我…代替彦卿…登台守擂…吗？
E: General Huaiyan... Are you asking me... to take Yanqing's place... as the ringmaster?

C: 真正的胜负不在竞锋舰的擂台上，在这儿。如果不能尽快将逃犯抓捕归案，以呼雷穷凶极恶的素行，他一定会闹个天翻地覆。
E: The real challenge lies beyond the ring on the Skysplitter. If we don't capture the fugitives soon, Hoolay will wreak havoc.

C: 在我看来，这些问题的答案并不难找。重要的是，能不能找到蛛丝马迹，牵出幕后黑手。
E: Finding the answers to these questions shouldn't be too difficult. What truly matters is if we can gather the clues that lead us to the mastermind behind all of this.

C: 在朱明仙舟，判官们将罪无可恕又百杀不死的丰饶孽物丢进恒星的劫火中焚烧。
E: On the Xianzhou Zhuming, the judges cast those unforgivable and nearly immortal Abominations of Abundance into the eternal flames of the stars, reducing them to ashes.

C: 这是一场刻意为之的表演，将「货物」的危险程度暴露在人前，只为了让它们能顺利被送进幽囚狱中充当劫狱的武器。
E: It was a deliberate display to showcase the dangerous nature of the "cargo" in broad daylight. This way, the cargo would end up in The Shackling Prison, serving as a tool for the prison break.

C: 每个提问之人的初衷都满怀善意。但是，世上所有通往灾难的道路，都是由善念铺就的。
E: Each questioner had good intentions, but the road to catastrophe is paved with good intentions.

C: 这些魔阴身衣甲武器齐备，显然不是仓促加入战斗的。
E: These soldiers are fully armed. Obviously, they didn't hastily join the battle.

C: 你以为凭一点小聪明激起呼雷大人的复仇心，就能拖延我们离开的脚步？
E: Do you really think you can delay our departure by provoking Lord Hoolay's desire for revenge with your clever little tongue?

C: 这位云骑大哥说，有公务需要我配合。
E: This Cloud Knight says there's official business that requires my cooperation.

C: 你们是什么人，不知道迴星港已经被封锁了吗？
E: Who are you? Don't you know that Stargazer Navalia is on lockdown now?

C: 那就请沿着通道继续前进，会到达安检处，那里的工作人员会指引你们前往选手大厅的。
E: Then please continue along this passageway. You will come to a security checkpoint, and the staff there will guide you to the contestants' hall.

C: 云璃师父，审美水平有待提高。
E: Master Yunli doesn't have good taste.

C: 无可奉告。
E: No comment.

C: 那…刚才是有些尴尬哈。
E: Ah, so... that was a little bit awkward.

C: 有发现什么状况吗？
E: Have you noticed anything out of the ordinary?

C: 你的心要是不跳了那才麻烦。好好感受一下气氛，做好准备吧。
E: It's when it stops beating that we need to worry. Just take in the atmosphere and prepare yourself.

C: 但在我看来，这些都不过是障眼法——
E: The way I see it, this is all nothing more than misdirection...

C: 我必须…撑下去…
E: I must... hold on...

C: 步离人的复兴…会来的…
E: The borisin resurgence... shall come...

C: 别担心你的任务。你不是还有我吗。别被爷爷「代表罗浮守擂」的出战名头给唬住了。
E: Don't worry about your mission. You have me here too, right? I know my grandfather said that you must "represent the Luofu as the ringmaster," but don't let that intimidate you.

C: 放心吧小娃娃，这里的空间还很宽敞，有足够藏下你们尸体的地方。
E: Don't worry, children, there's plenty of space to hide your bodies over here.

C: *欢呼的声音*
E: *cheering*

C: 演武仪典到此为止了！
E: Your Wardance ends here!

C: 拜托，我可是代表罗浮出战的剑士，三月七！
E: Please, I am March 7th, a swordmaster who will represent the Luofu in glorious battle!

C: 尊敬的各位来宾，各位选手，欢迎各位莅临罗浮仙舟星天演武仪典！
E: We would like to welcome all of our honored guests and contestants... to the Xianzhou Luofu's Luminary Wardance ceremony!

C: 呼雷的动作变迟钝了？
E: Hoolay's movements are slowing down?

C: 总有一天，我会被这股狂怒点燃、烧尽。我会成为被帝弓光矢所追逐的怪物……
E: One day, this rage will ignite and burn me alive. I will become the very monster that the Reignbow Lux Arrow hunts...

C: 我将为自己开辟一条全新的道路，将决定猎群命运的权力交给你——曾经的步离战奴，未来的狐人之主。
E: I will create that new path for myself. I will pass the right to decide the destiny of the borisin on to you... former borisin war slave and future foxian ruler.

C: 在我还是个孩子的时候，为了逃离狼头的皮鞭和枷锁，我的双手第一次沾上了血。
E: When I was just a child, I stained my hands with blood for the first time, in order to escape the whips and shackles of the wolf masters.

C: 事到如今，哪还有逃的选择？
E: After all this, do you still think running is an option?

C: 云璃师父，你不也是大战了一场吗？
E: Master Yunli, didn't you also engage in combat?

C: 由过往行事的风格来看，比起武力上的胜利，幻胧更希望能在盟友之间凿开不和的裂缝，播撒混乱的种子。如果联盟无法弥合这些裂痕，最终就会崩解成一盘散沙。
E: Rather than outright victory, Phantylia's motive seems to lie in breeding discord and chaos among allies. Should the Alliance fail to mend these rifts, it risks disintegrating into a pile of sand.

C: 好啊。托景元先生的福，{RUBY_B#罗刹与镜流}那两位囚犯{RUBY_E#}，玉阙已审讯完毕了。
E: Alright. Thanks to Mr. Jing Yuan, the interrogation of {RUBY_B#Luocha and Jingliu}the two prisoners{RUBY_E#} on the Yuque has concluded.

C: 你还记得自己的名字吗？
E: Do you remember your name?

C: 感觉很麻烦，溜了溜了。
E: This looks like a chore. Time to leave.

C: 下次吧，朕还有公务要处理。
E: Next time. I still have business to attend to.

C: 不愧是陛下，行善的号召力越来越强了啊～
E: You're not the Emperor for nothing! Your propensity to attract kindness blooms evermore!

C: 身为皇帝，帮助臣民解决问题只不过是分内之事，谈不上功劳不功劳。
E: As an Emperor, it is my duty to help my subjects with their problems, and there's no credit to be taken.

C: 喂，灰骑士，灰骑士！发什么呆呢！
E: Hey, Gray Knight, Gray Knight! Stop standing there in a daze!

C: 只不过，纺锤花乃是平民百姓钟爱的廉价花卉，拿去赠与皇帝陛下，会不会显得有些……
E: It's just, spindleblooms are bargain-bin flowers for commoners. To present them to His Majesty, would that be somewhat...

C: 人能做到的无非是「付出代价」而已，你肯付出代价，这已经足够好了…但别妄想这会让你内心平静，消弭你的罪恶——你不配。
E: All a person can do is to pay the price. And you will pay for it. That much is enough... But don't think for a moment that your sins will be erased just because you've made peace — you are not worthy.

C: 「先皇」似乎是个暴君。
E: The late Emperor was apparently a tyrant.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 的确如此。他在自己擅长的领域取得了轰动寰宇的成果。
E: He is, for his groundbreaking achievements in his areas of specialization.

C: 欢迎回到匹诺康尼，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。有什么我能为您效劳的吗？
E: Welcome to Penacony, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. How can I help you?

C: 螺丝咕姆…？螺丝……
E: Screwllum? Screwy...

C: 就是这里吗？
E: Is this the place?

C: 那天在控制室里也是我最后一次看到杜德利。或许现实就和他说的一样，棋子是不配拥有名字的。
E: That day in the control room was the last I saw Dudley. Perhaps, it's true that pawns don't deserve to be mentioned, just like how he put it.

C: 我现在需要帮助，螺丝先生……
E: I need help, Mr. Screwllum...

C: 你知道，我可不经常夸人…但咱们俩研究的领域有很多重合的地方。你发表的虚数应用理论不止一次给过我启发，甚至有点让我…唔…羡慕。
E: You know, I don't usually give compliments... But our fields of study share many commonalities. Your work on the theory of imaginary applications has sparked my inspiration on more than one occasion, and I have to say, it's even made me... umm... a tad jealous.

C: 空间站闹鬼了？！
E: Is the space station haunted!?

C: 莫伊拉直直地盯着你，你从她眼中看到了恼怒和无奈。
E: Moira stares daggers at you, and you can infer both angst and resignation in her eyes.

C: 这里究竟是什么地方，杜？
E: What exactly is this place, Dud?

C: 你听到查德威克发出一声满意的笑…然后不再说话。
E: You hear Chadwick emit a satisfied laugh... and then he no longer speaks.

C: （折纸小鸟共有五种颜色…但这里的传奇筑梦师只有四位！到底谁才是「湛蓝爵士」？）
E: (Origami birds come in five colors... but there are only four legendary Dreamweavers here! Which one is Dr. Blues exactly?)

C: 我应该认识他们，甚至说，很熟悉……
E: I should know them, or rather, I'm very familiar...

C: 我相信冯恩先生也只是想要句道歉而已——对吧？
E: I believe Mr. Vaughn just wants an apology... right?

C: 哼，你原本就是监狱中的囚犯，是「家族」为你担保，让你获得改过自新的机会，是你不珍惜！
E: Hmph, you were a prisoner to begin with. The Family vouched for you and gave you a new lease on life. But you didn't treasure it!

C: 认识是认识…
E: I do...

C: 呵呵，你是说让我当一只卡通小鸟，不能筑梦、不能认识朋友、甚至不能让别人看见，这样继续活在梦里吗？
E: Hehe, are you telling me to merely exist as a cartoon bird, devoid of the ability to weave dreams, to make friends, and to remain invisible to the eyes of others? Is this the solitary existence I am to endure within the realm of dreams?

C: 我这次不会离开了，在这片梦境中，我们再也不会分开。
E: I'm not leaving again, and in this Dreamscape, we shall never be separated again.

C: 只有你记得筑梦师们曾痛苦挣扎的过往。
E: You alone hold the memory of the Dreamweavers' arduous and painful past.

C: （门外传来脚步声，有人要进来了？）
E: (Footsteps from outside the door. Is someone coming in?)

C: 那可能某天，格拉克斯师父就会*不小心*发现你藏在房间里的那些猫头鹰老师周边吧——
E: Then there might come a day when Master Glaux *accidentally* finds out about the Professor Owl merchandise that you've got stashed in your room...

C: 无所谓，我会出手。
E: We have no choice. I will stand in.

C: 我其实只想抖机灵…
E: I just wanted to pit my wits against him...

C: 什么问题？
E: Yes?

C: 我对局势已经了如指掌！
E: I've got a complete grasp of the situation!

C: 这不是很正常吗？
E: Isn't this normal then?

C: 理解。只有当行善的代价可以承受时，人们心中的善才会被激发出来。
E: Understood. 'Tis only when the price for a kind act is bearable, that our benevolence is roused.

C: 先不说这个，你们为什么不去圣城指定的避难所？那里有卫兵驻守，比这里安全得多。
E: That can wait. Why didn't you go to the holy city's designated shelter? There are sentries garrisoned there. It's much safer than here.

C: 人命关天，已经没时间走流程了…等问题解决之后，再向元老院报备吧。
E: Lives are at stake. We've got no time to do it by the book... We'll report this to the Council of Elders when the problem is resolved.

C: 不，这里面肯定有什么误会…你是和黄金裔并肩作战过的英雄，求你帮吾师做做解释吧，卫兵们肯定会听的！
E: No, there must be some misunderstanding here... You're the hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs. Please, you have to explain Master's case to them. I'm sure the guards will listen!

C: 那么，在辩论开始前，现场有哪位公民要提问吗？
E: Now then, before the trial starts, do any citizens present have any questions?

C: 据圣城护卫查证，没有发生金钱交易的痕迹。请控方代表不要假定事实。
E: According to the city guard's findings, there was no evidence of any monetary transaction. I will ask the prosecution not to make any frivolous assumptions.

C: 以黄金裔盗取火种打比方。
E: Use the Chrysos Heirs stealing Coreflame as an example.

C: 你有没有想过，如果所有人都像你一样自私，谁来将黎明背负？奥赫玛又怎么能成为永恒之城？
E: You ever gave a second thought about this? If everyone was as selfish as you, who would bear the burden of dawn? How would Okhema even become the Eternal City?

C: 如果外邦人真是我们的伙伴，为什么奥赫玛被疯王眷属围攻时他们没来？
E: If the outlanders are really our allies, why did they not come to our aid when the Mad King attacked Okhema?

C: 我想问你一些问题。
E: I want to ask you some questions.

C: 是吧，既然你自己也没想清楚自己的动机，崇高道德也很难对你加以信赖。
E: Right? As you were not even clear of your motivation, the high morality finds it hard to place their faith in you.

C: 天呐，是小帕里斯！你还活着！婆婆都准备好给塞纳托斯为你摆渡的祭品了！
E: Heavens! Young Paris! You're alive! I was all prepared to give offerings to Thanatos for your safe passage!

C: 来吧，就算你没有品尝蜜酿的喉舌，也能与我一起聆听乐曲与欢笑！
E: Come! Even if you don't have the tongue to savor honey mead with me, you can listen to the songs of celebration and laughter with me!

C: 但是为了大家的安全，还是请这位客人离开这里吧——比起宴会，你更该在战场上起舞。
E: However, I would ask you still to leave this place for the safety of our citizens... You are more suited to dancing on the battlefield than at a banquet.

C: 登上战场…若是和帕里斯一起…或许……
E: Go to the battlefield... If I am with Paris... Maybe...

C: 来，姑娘，拿好，它的长度足以延展到城外了。
E: Come, girl, hold this. It is long enough to stretch outside the city.

C: 第一个猎物，是你的同乡。他在军队的最前排，向你行起悬锋的礼仪，却被你贯穿了心脏。
E: Your first prey is your very own kin. On the Kremnos army's frontline, he gives you a salute, yet you shoot through his heart.

C: 你来的太迟了…
E: You're too late...

C: 哇，他居然能抬动雕像小姐，力气真大…快跟上，要是让他们遇到卫兵就麻烦了！
E: Woah, he actually managed to lift the statue lady! He's so strong... We have to catch up with him. If they run into the guards, then we're in big trouble!

C: 旧日的奥赫玛城中，一位战士在岁月的流淌中迷惘着……
E: Within the old Okhema, a soldier is lost in the flow of time...

C: 你怎么跟使唤宠物似的？人家要生气了！
E: Why are you treating me like a pet! Mem's gonna get angry!

C: 呼，好难过的表情，她手里的那个是？日记？
E: Phew, what a sad expression. What's in her hand? A diary?

C: 欧洛尼斯的眷属？
E: Oronyx's kin?

C: 无论你逃到哪里，命运无处不在，它永远会跟在你的身后，就像过去的每一次那样。只剩下黑暗与死亡，死亡与黑暗，黑暗与死亡……
E: No matter where you escape, destiny is omnipresent. It will always follow in your shadow, just like every time it did in the past. There's only darkness and death, death and darkness, darkness and death...

C: 命运啊，<color=#dbc291ff>请您救救我的女儿</color>。
E: O destiny, <color=#dbc291ff>please save my daughter</color>.

C: 那，就让我把故事再讲一遍吧？
E: Well then, shall I tell you the story again?

C: 其后，斩黑潮、过试炼，饮鲜血佳酿，退灾厄惑星；平宿怨、护圣城，归沉沦故土，登玛瑙王座。
E: Thereafter, he hewed down the black tide, passed the trial, drank the crimson brew of blood, drove back the calamitous star of misfortune. He settled old grievances, guarded the holy city, reclaimed his sunken homeland, and ascended the Agate Throne.

C: 我和螺丝达成了共识：很遗憾，权杖的答案就是「毁灭」。你能在数据库中找到更详细的论述。
E: Screwy and I have reached a consensus on that. Regrettably, the answer given by the Scepter is indeed "Destruction." You can find a more detailed discussion in the database.

C: 但你的表情里没有困惑。我猜，你不是来寻求答案的。
E: But there's no confusion in your expression. I'm guessing you're not here for answers.

C: 迷鹿…麋鹿不好呜呜！米露，坏呜呜……
E: Losh... lots is bad! Loss, bad! Wooo...

C: 听起来完全不像干不动…
E: It doesn't sound like you can't move at all...

C: 我已经开通了星际和平公司旗下十六家流媒体平台的年费会员了，现在我还有…呃，一部、两部、三部…还有四十八部连载剧集要追。
E: I have now paid for subscriptions to <unbreak>16</unbreak> different streaming platforms owned by the Interastral Peace Corporation. Now I still have... Er, 1, 2, 3... <unbreak>48</unbreak> shows to watch.

C: 我想多了解一下人类在网络上的表现，大家平时会看什么、聊什么呢…我真的很好奇……
E: I'd like to learn more about human behavior online. What are people interested in? What do they talk about? I'm so curious about these things...

C: 哎，人老了不中用了，看我这脑子，差点就忘了——谢谢你来教导希拉如何做人。
E: Alas, I am old and useless now. Look at me, I almost forgot — thank you for teaching Sheila how to act like a human.

C: 真的非常感谢。
E: Thank you so much.

C: 我早就想拆开检查一下了…还好没有，要不然就不能保修了。
E: I've wanted to take them apart for ages and see what's wrong... But it's a good thing I haven't done that, otherwise they'd void their warranty.

C: 所以麻烦你，帮我找找那附近有没有脱落的零件吧！
E: Could you please help me see if there are any loose parts around the robots' route?

C: 负荷已满，推进装置已经报废。
E: Maximum load reached. Thruster compartment needs to be replaced.

C: 对，就是这个模块有问题！
E: Right, that's the module with the problem!

C: {NICKNAME}，要是没你帮忙，这事我还拿不定主意呢！
E: {NICKNAME}, I would never have made up my mind if it weren't for your help!

C: 当然，这也是多亏了您……
E: Of course, it's all thanks to you...

C: 是…不过我这也只是推论！是我从某些科员那儿听来的。
E: Yes... But this is just a hypothesis! I only heard about it from some researchers.

C: 哇真的吗，那你得仔细听听，看看你捡到的是不是怪谈里「幸运签」哦！
E: Really? Then you need to listen carefully, and see if you've picked up the fortune leaf mentioned in the ghost story!

C: 空间站里很常见啊！
E: Those colors are everywhere in the space station!

C: 我从很久以前开始就一直在追问自己，人生到底还有什么是值得追求的？就在不久之前，我独自冥想的时候…答案突然在脑海中显现了。
E: What is there in life that is worth pursuing? For a very long time, I've been asking myself this question. And then one day, the answer came to me when I was meditating alone.

C: …看完了，然后呢？这不就是张普通的照片吗？
E: I looked at it. What about it? Isn't this just an ordinary photo?

C: …什么？她看过照片了吗？她有说什么吗？
E: What...? Has she seen the photo? Did she say anything?

C: 还有这一句——「朋友，这一辈子太过漫长，你还有足够的时间去感受人生，直到贝洛伯格送别最后一个垃圾箱」，一个人要经历多少悲苦，才能写出如此浪漫的文字？
E: And this — "My friend, we have a long life ahead of us and you still have time to experience your life, until Belobog sends off the last trashcan." How much sorrow does one have to endure before one can write such romantic prose?

C: 好家伙，手脚够利索啊。东西给我，钱你拿走。
E: Oh my, you're just as reliable as you look. Give them to me. Take your reward and leave.

C: 多问一句…
E: Can I ask...

C: 什、什么老大呀，别瞎说！要是被虎克老大听到就惨啦。
E: Wh—what boss? Don't talk nonsense! I will be in trouble if Boss Hook heard it.

C: 啊——这是我之前下单的机械零件！没想到这么快就送到了，「地火」的效率可真高啊。
E: Ah — these are the mechanical parts I ordered earlier! I didn't expect these to be delivered so quickly. Wildfire is really efficient.

C: 哎，要是照你说的写，就算是一家人恐怕也很难置信吧？我还是改得稍微务实一点儿吧。
E: *sigh* If I write it as you said, it would be hard even for my family to believe me, right? I'd rather be a little more convincing.

C: 快，我们快点回去找邓恩吧，别让他等不耐烦了。
E: Come on, let's hurry back and talk to Dunn. We shouldn't keep him waiting.

C: 不过…你确实蛮聪明的，下次再来挑战吧。…不不不，你还是别来了，怪麻烦的。
E: But... you really are quite smart. Let's give it another try next time. No... no no, actually don't come back. It's too much hassle.

C: 嗯…嗯？什么东西？算了，看来你也只能到此为止了啊！
E: Mmm... hmm? What? Ah, no matter. Looks like this is as far as you come, then!

C: 哦哦，知识挺大！就这还领导呢？说的都什么语法？
E: Oh, oh... "real eyes"! That makes sense I suppose...

C: 把曼娅出的题目复述给了雷金……
E: Tell Regin about Manya's question...

C: 哦，对了——关于波瓦大臣退休的消息，有待教育部内部进一步核实…还请您配合我们的工作，不信谣、不传谣。非常感谢！
E: Oh, right. That news about Minister Bova's retirement still needs to be verified by the Ministry of Education. Please work with us here and refrain from believing or spreading any rumors. Thank you very much!

C: 嗯…嗯…有意思，他们的题库还真是千奇古怪啊。
E: Mmm... interesting. Their quiz pool is utterly bizarre.

C: 那个，这话我只跟你说…我有时候也在考虑，是不是该转型当个「脑筋急转弯科学家」——毕竟我最近才发现，自己还挺擅长这个的。
E: How about this, then: I've been thinking about maybe changing careers and becoming an Expert Quizmaster. After all, I recently came to realize that I'm rather good at these.

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 我想接受测验。
E: Yeah. I wanna take the quiz.

C: 没别的事的话，我要继续看书了。再见。
E: If there's nothing else, I'll get back to my book. See you later.

C: 当时我还纳闷呢，像她这种咖位的明星，身边的仆人、助理肯定少不了吧？碰到这种体力活，她居然亲自上阵…啧，真不一般。
E: At the time, I was still wondering what a star like her was doing without any servants or assistants around to help her, right? But seeing someone like her performing her own labor like this... well, it's uncommon, to say the least.

C: 谢谢你~这是给你的谢礼~
E: Thank you. Here's a token of my appreciation!

C: 关于塔米拉的一切…
E: Everything about Tamila...

C: 我…我就是去做义工！
E: I—I'm going to do volunteer work!

C: 所以我就想请两天病假休息一下。但我们主编又说请病假必须提供医生证明…实在没办法，我只好通过「会社」发布委托了。
E: So, I want to take a break and get a couple of days of sick leave, but the chief editor says I need a doctor's letter... I'm all out of ideas, which is why I put up a Society commission.

C: 我的需求就是这样啦。你可以接受吗？不行的话我就再等等别人好了……
E: Well, that's my task. Do you want to take it? If you don't, I'll just wait for someone else...

C: 你将尼古莱的话转告了亚诺……
E: You told Amo what Nika had said...

C: …呃，总感觉忘了点什么事。是什么来着？
E: ...Um, I feel like I forgot something. What could it be?

C: 嗯…这倒是贝洛伯格的特色菜。不过大家都吃腻了，所以没什么人会专门点这种红肠拼盘吃。
E: Well... That's indeed a Belobog specialty, but everyone's tired of it. No one really orders that anymore.

C: 呜、呜呜…我明白了……
E: *sob* O—Okay...

C: 可惜他们今天还没开门——怎么，要不咱一起等着？跟你说啊，我可是这儿的常客了！他们家的「爆辣蓬蓬菇」可是一绝嘞……
E: Pity they haven't opened yet. Wanna wait for them together? I'm telling ya, I'm a regular here. Their Spicy Puffy Mushroom is an absolute treasure...

C: 不过你这炒饭…啥味道也没有啊？倒也没看起来那么难吃，但口感跟矿渣似的……
E: But this fried rice... It doesn't taste like anything. It ain't as bad as it looks, but it feels like eating mine dust...

C: 哎…不过您也教训的是，我还是找份正经工作吧。从前我总想着这样来钱快，但说到底也是克里珀堡上走钢丝…不知道哪天就把自己赔进去了啊。
E: But what you say is right. I should find a proper job. I used to think stealing would make a quick buck, but it's like walking on a tightrope on top of Qlipoth Fort... I'll end up falling to my doom sooner or later.

C: 他们也开始休息了。
E: They take a break too.

C: 这封信的态度让我有些生气！
E: Their attitude in that letter made me mad!

C: 有报酬？包在我身上吧！
E: Compensation? Sure, leave it to me!

C: 来来来，先喝这杯试试，你若是觉得这一杯还不够滋味，别急，喝了这一杯接着还有一坛子呢。
E: Here, feel free to give it a try, and if you feel like drinking more, there's plenty where that came from.

C: 最近我偶然得到些灵感，先连以滋补药材和新鲜蔬果为配料，栽了好些跟头，好不容易才捣鼓出新的配方。
E: Lately, I've been trying to make something new with fresh herbs, vegetables, and fruits. After some setbacks, I've finally developed a new recipe.

C: 躺椅的角度刚好能让人平视对面的壁画，上面描绘着云石天宫的传说：黎明机器、永恒之城、众神的光辉......
E: The lounger is perfectly angled for you to fully take in the mural. The legend of Marmoreal Palace is painted on it: The Dawn Device, the Eternal City, the radiance of the gods...

C: 似乎具有精巧的结构，音律一刻不停地自行流淌。
E: A seemingly intricate construct that flows with music on its own.

C: 黄金裔的餐桌，通过上面的餐点，似乎可以猜到有谁不久前曾在此落座。
E: The Chrysos Heirs' dining table. From its spread, one can guess who was just here recently.

C: 赞颂你，负世的泰坦！你令奥赫玛不必怀念阳光。
E: Praise you, the Titan with the world on its back! Okhema no longer longs for sunlight because of you.

C: 大地兽工坊
E: Dromas Workshop

C: 于是，这里欢呼歌唱，热情漫舞，喝它个迷醉方休！
E: Thus, they sing jubilantly and dance passionately. Drink and be intoxicated!

C: 至少，那位女神如是所言。
E: At least that's what the goddess claimed.

C: 「泰坦徒劳践行宿命，信徒蹒跚亦步亦趋。」
E: "Titans trudge on, following fate, while believers stumble after their steps."

C: 不，或许我和它也没什么不同。
E: No. Perhaps this creature and I are one and the same.

C: 只是恰好贪嘴——据说有几位刚到圣城的难民重拾旧业，他们的手艺相当不错，还非常少见。
E: I am simply here to satisfy my appetite... I hear that there are recently arrived refugees in the holy city that have resumed their old trades. Their talents are outstanding and not commonly seen in this area.

C: 我又该如何将它们化作金线，纺织明日。
E: How can I turn them into golden threads with which to weave tomorrow?

C: 名为歌耳戈？哈哈！你的父母也着实足够狂妄，岂不知此乃悬锋建城者的名讳？
E: Your name is Gorgo? Haha! Your parents have some arrogance! Do they not know that was the name of the one that built Kremnos?

C: ——特赐以督战勇士之荣誉。克拉特鲁斯，你可愿担下此名？
E: ...I bestow unto you the title of Watcher of Warriors. Krateros, will you accept this name?

C: 此事休要再提，我心中有数。现在，班师回城吧，我们有太多阵亡的战士需要祭奠了。
E: Do not mention this matter again. I understand the situation. Now, let us return to the city. We have far too many fallen soldiers to honor.

C: 你记住了「神秘的召唤仪式与始终沉默的巨树」
E: You remembered "The Secret Summoning Ceremony and the Ever-Silent Giant Tree"

C: 光环中的身影庄严肃穆，传说这是瑟希斯在第一次降下恩赐时出现的神迹。据记载，在这幅壁画完成的那天，整个树庭能听见瑟希斯授课的声音。
E: The figure within the halo is solemn and majestic. Legend has it this was the divine vision of Cerces' first Miracle. According to records, on the day this mural was completed, the entire Grove could hear Cerces' voice delivering a lecture.

C: 给我。我给你，利衡币，学位，换不来报酬。
E: Give it to me. I offer you... Balance Coins. Degree. Cannot trade... for unpaid effort.

C: 果然，还是做一团火焰更加逍遥自在。呼呼。
E: I knew it — being a flame is so much more carefree. Phew.

C: 你说话真好听。
E: Your words are music to my ears.

C: 在纷争世有位名叫库玛的女预言家，同我打过几次照面。她从不假借预言行私，却蒙受异端之名，著作全数遭到销毁，就连名字也被抹去。
E: In the Era Bellica, there was a prophetess named Kuma. I encountered her a few times. She never abused prophecy for personal gain, yet she was branded a heretic. Her works were all destroyed, and even her name was erased.

C: 或许是金丝的链接遇到了阻碍，亦或是衣匠本身承受了过多损伤，它并没有第一时间做出反应。让它先缓一缓吧。
E: Perhaps the connection of the golden threads encountered an obstacle, or the Garmentmaker has sustained too much damage. It doesn't respond immediately. Let it take its time.

C: 衣匠小心地接过记忆残晶，轻轻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker carefully receives the Memory Crystal Shards and gently refines them.

C: 若虫本身才是最可贵的力量。将它们招至麾下，对我来说比解开预言更加关键。
E: The nymphs themselves hold the most valuable power. Bringing them under my control matters more than interpreting any prophecy.

C: o((-'ω´- )o「哼哼，要不要和豹豹一起玩一会会儿~」)∋
E: o((-'ω´- )o "Ho-ho~ Wouwd you wike to pway wif me?" )∋

C: 有本事跟咱碰碰！
E: I'm going to cwush you!

C: o((='ω´= )っ「这症状是非常典型的…吃撑了欧」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )っ "This is the typical symptom of... overindulging." )∋

C: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ「你再好好考虑一下！」)∋
E: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ "You should reconsider your answer!" )∋

C: 是欢乐的代价吗？
E: Is this the price of joy...?

C: 这下你也成为英雄了。
E: Now you've become a hero too.

C: 但我想做的，只是站在英雄们身后，在金色的浪潮将世界推向新生时，尽己所能疗愈每一个可能会溺亡的普通人。
E: But what I truly wish is to stand behind the heroes, healing every ordinary person who might drown when the golden tide pushes the world toward its rebirth.

C: 命运之初，门径之末，塔兰顿家的屋顶上，瑟西斯常去的餐馆里——
E: The dawn of fate, the end of Passage, the rooftops of Talanton's estate, and Cerces' favorite restaurant...

C: 我下次再来。
E: I'll come back next time.

C: 等回到列车上，就把这东西<color=#dbc291ff>摆到留声机旁边</color>好了。
E: Once you're back on the Express, set this thing <color=#dbc291ff>right next to the phonograph</color>.

C: 绝望地闭上眼睛。
E: Close your eyes in pure dread.

C: 教官怎么改教舞蹈了？
E: Since when did our drillmaster start teaching dance?

C: 在写了，你先下来。
E: I'm writing it right now. Get off there.

C: …名字的话题就到这吧，那刻夏老师，这两位可一句话都还没说呢——
E: ...Let's rest the topic of names for now, Professor Anaxa. The two of them haven't gotten a word in yet—

C: 我们回到辩题本身——神性完美否？
E: Let's return to the debate — Is divinity perfect?

C: 滚开…！
E: Get lost...!

C: 是啊，明天见，多么美好的祝愿呀……
E: Yes, "See you tomorrow." What a beautiful wish...

C: 我已是碎片中存世最久的一枚…因为你不舍让我离去，不是吗？
E: I am longest in existence among the fragments... it's because you couldn't bear to let me go, isn't it?

C: 我们已经交手过很多次了，不过回想起来，他的手上…却没有佩戴这只臂鞲。
E: We've crossed blades countless times already, but thinking back... he never wore this bracer.

C: 身为「大地」的子民，却要仰望星空？
E: As children of Earth, must we gaze up at the stars?

C: 真的…可以吗？我好感动喀。
E: Really? You mean it? How nice of you, crrk!

C: 我将以机械形态出击。
E: I will strike in mechanical form.

C: 快跑，强盗来了嗡——
E: Run! The bandits are coming, buzz—

C: 好悲伤的声音…
E: Such a sad voice...

C: 不清楚，帕姆也说不上来，它只是有种直觉。
E: Not sure, Pom-Pom couldn't put it into words. It's like a gut feeling.

C: 呜哇！连你也没有发现……
E: Wahh! Even you didn't find anything...?

C: 话音未落，你就抡起棒球棍砸向女孩。球棒穿过她的身体，又穿过镜子，仿佛她们根本不存在。
E: Before any words are spoken, you swing your baseball bat at the girl. The bat goes through her body and through the mirror as if they don't even exist.

C: 介绍下流光忆庭？
E: Tell me about the Garden of Recollection.

C: 当然，这么方便也不是没有代价的——代价是我得凭借人们的记忆才能四处活动。唔…所以这种存在形式究竟算不算自由呢？
E: Of course, there is a price for the convenience — the price is that I rely on the memories of others to move around. Erm... And would you consider this kind of existence to be free?

C: 没有捷径——只有战斗。
E: There's no shortcut — only combat.

C: 再等等。
E: One second.

C: 你好，开拓者。你要前往造物之柱吗？
E: Hello, Trailblazer. Do you want to go to the Pillars of Creation?

C: 佩佩歪着头沉思了起来，你努力克制着抚摸它毛茸茸的头顶的欲望。
E: Peppy tilts its head in contemplation. You resist the desire to ruffle its fluffy head.

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof woof!

C: 不知道诶，这种事你还是问别人去吧。
E: I don't know. It's better if you ask someone else about it.

C: 去去去，哪里来的狗。
E: Shoo shoo shoo, where did this dog come from?

C: （我先解除同步了！你回去好好休息吧！有消息了我再喊你！）
E: (I will desynchronize now! You can go back and rest well! I will holler if I have any news!)

C: 这个作息对我来说很正常。
E: This is a normal routine to me.

C: 呀，画面出现在脑袋里了！不行不行，快讲点别的！
E: Gah, now I've got that image stuck in my head! No, that's no good. Let's talk about something else!

C: 那个…没听懂哎。不过你是想逗人家开心，对吧？
E: Um... I have no idea what that means, but you're trying to make me laugh, right?

C: 但是很棒，我喜欢这个，人家也想{NICKNAME}！
E: But it's great. I like it. I miss you too, {NICKNAME}!

C: 问来问去，人家更摸不着头脑了，还是等我长大一些，再来找{NICKNAME}聊这种话题吧！
E: As I keep asking, I only get more and more confused. Maybe I'll wait until I've grown a little more before discussing these things with {NICKNAME}!

C: 比如呢？
E: Got some examples?

C: 要是我那些蠢货徒弟能有你这样的干劲儿就好了。
E: If only my blockheaded apprentices have your drive.

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment, I have something else to do.

C: 真是无趣。
E: Boring.

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment, I have something else to do.

C: 还想再继续做测试啊…
E: I want to do more tests...

C: 哎，我也只是拿钱办事，不敢多问，就怕引火烧身……
E: *sigh* I'm just on retainer. I never ask anything else for fear of getting burned...

C: 例行占算吗？
E: Routine divination?

C: 来就来。
E: Here I come. I'm not scared.

C: …可恶。
E: ...Darn you.

C: 不是，你是谁啊…
E: Huh? Who are you?

C: 我把架设「枘凿六合」私服的人找了出来，然后以暴制暴。
E: I found the culprits responsible for the Hexanexus private server and punished them through violent means.

C: 当然缺点也是显而易见的——我快要自闭了。
E: Of course, the downside is evident — I'm on the verge of becoming socially withdrawn.

C: 请记住「枘凿六合•Remake」天下第一！我先去忙去了。
E: Just remember that Hexanexus: Remake is the world's number one game! I should get to work now.

C: 滴、答？
E: Tick, tock?

C: 「宜创想，宜冥思。」
E: "Suitable for creative thinking and rumination."

C: 好多人，我的两个朋友在哪呢…等大家都到齐了，记得要来找我们玩啊！
E: So many people, where are my friends... When everyone's gathered, don't forget to hang out with us!

C: 是的，衣匠可代我在各个场合传递言语，如此也省去了与人争吵的麻烦。
E: Yes, the Garmentmaker can convey my words in various situations, which saves me the trouble of arguing with others.

C: 嗯…有位织者文采斐然，又对过往颇为留恋。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>荒野的枯树下</color>吟诗，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... a weaver conjures magic in its writing, nostalgic for the past. The golden thread brings tidings: It is reciting poetry <color=#dbc291ff>beneath a withered tree in the wilds</color>. Go look for it there.

C: 嗯…有位织者苦心孤诣，执着于解开晦涩的谜题。金丝带来消息，它仍在<color=#dbc291ff>某扇门前的机关上</color>苦苦思索，去助它一臂之力吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is fascinated by the challenge of solving obscure puzzles. The golden thread brings tidings: They now ponder intently <color=#dbc291ff>about the mechanism of a certain door</color>. Perhaps you could lend a hand.

C: 就在这「万径之门」前，我得给点颜色瞧瞧，教欧洛尼斯知道，玩弄这种把戏是什么下场！
E: Right here, before the Gate of Infinity, I'll teach you a proper lesson! I'll show Oronyx what happens if they play these games!

C: 唉，这里的氛围实在让人毛骨悚然。一帮鬼迷心窍的战士，像机器一样厮杀赴死。就连墙上的雕塑都会说话，说些什么「勇者…勇者…再靠近些」之类的……
E: *sigh* The air around here sure is eerie. A band of warriors mechanically fighting to their deaths as if possessed by madness. Even the sculptures on the walls can talk, whispering things like "Warrior... Warrior... Come closer"...

C: 说起来，我这么清闲，您实在功不可没。您总是在出人意料的时刻打断我的火热手感，害得我都提不起劲了。
E: Come to think of it, you're to blame for my idleness right now. You keep appearing at the most inopportune moments and interrupting my hot streak — I can't even get into the groove of things now.

C: 「智慧让你远离愚钝，愚钝让你靠近幸福。」
E: "Wisdom brings you farther from foolishness, but foolishness brings you closer to happiness."

C: 哈哈，我的盗窃生涯，比墨涅塔的金丝连起来还长；我偷过的东西，比艾格勒的眼睛更多。
E: Haha, my tales of thievery are even longer than Mnestia's golden thread... I've stolen more things than Aquila has eyes.

C: 您要是想装出一副同情我的模样，再假惺惺地劝我从良，那可大可不必。
E: If you're thinking of pretending to empathize with me, then pretentiously persuading me to turn over a new leaf, you can save it.

C: 「泰坦不应该有小脚趾，人也不例外。」
E: "Titans should not have little toes, and neither should humans."

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: ——桀桀，你以为我会这么说吗？告诉你，这回巴特鲁斯可是为你准备下了天罗地网！做好觉悟吧！
E: Hehehe, thought I'd be that nice? This time, Bartholos has set up something special for you! Prepare yourself!

C: 这位英雄——敢问您尊姓大名？您若是放我一条生路，我一定逢人便说，您才配坐咱这一行的头把交椅…不对，您就是祖师爷！
E: Oh mighty hero — could I get your name? Spare me, and I'll tell everyone you're the best in the business... no wait, you're the legend itself!

C: 怎么回事？这种骗术对像你这样的大英雄应该很有效才对啊……
E: What's going on? This trick usually works like a charm on heroes like you...

C: 不过，这的确也是游戏的一部分，就这么着吧！
E: Fine. It's all just a game, anyway.

C: 它的确是一位特别的朋友。
E: They truly are a special friend.

C: 我大人不记小人过。
E: I'm generous enough to forgive your petty crimes.

C: …这样，我稍后把你拉进我们在传信石版上的秘密讨论组；只要你攻略到更多的「黄金替罪羊」，那位学者前辈就能阶段性地把自己新的翻译成果发在讨论组里——
E: ...Well, why don't I add you to our secret discussion group on the teleslate? Once you overcome more of the Golden Scapegoats, the scholar will be able to send her newer translations to the group.

C: 恩维尔麻利地带上了特质的细铜丝帽子，躺下以后迅速地睡着了。你不禁疑惑，拥有如此强悍的入睡能力，这是否意味着他平日里对塞纳托斯的「称颂」真的起了效果？
E: Avilius puts on the special hat made from thin copper strands, and lay down before quickly falling asleep. Seeing how little effort it takes him to fall asleep, you can't help but wonder if this is the effect of his usual praises for Thanatos.

C: 也或许…是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}给出的许可。请问，你对这墙上的装置可有了解？
E: Or perhaps... it's a sign of permission granted by {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}. Tell me, do you know anything about the mechanism on this wall?

C: 噢噢！感谢阁下！第十次的委托，终于有所回应了！请让我拜领神谕！
E: Oh! Thank you, great one! This is the tenth time I've submitted a request, and finally, there's an answer! Please, let me receive the prophecy!

C: 还有这边！
E: And here!

C: 其实我已经去过了…
E: Yeah, I've actually done that...

C: 我也想赶紧逃跑…但找到它，就能让更多人免于痛苦。
E: I want to run, too... but if we find it, then we can save so many more lives.

C: 这回总该开出来了吧？
E: This has to be the one, right?

C: 只有凯妮斯女士和「清洗者」知晓余火所在的火种匣。所以在您来之前，我利用被封存的一份遗物，独自完成了成为「清洗者」的仪式。
E: Only Lady Caenis and the Cleaner knew which Casket held the ember. So before you arrived, I used a sealed relic to perform the Cleaner's ritual on myself.

C: 捅了篓子？
E: Mistakes?

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 为什么需要我？
E: Why do you need me?

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 好巧啊！又遇到你了。
E: What a coincidence! We meet again.

C: 「我很伤心。」祂突然变得悲伤，「为什么你会死去？」祂痛苦地呜咽，泪水蹭过你的手背，你感到自己真的*死亡*过。
E: "I am so sad." THEY suddenly became sorrowful, "Why did you die?" THEY whimpered in pain, as tears ran down the back of your hand. You felt like you really had died.

C: 我很健康，不需要打。
E: I'm psychologically well and don't need to hit anything.

C: 你看不清了！你企图动用别的五官…你闭上眼睛开始聆听：祂的巨锤落下，震慑大地的却并非巨响，而是锤下之物毫无生息的呜咽；你又隐约觉得那声音中有种笑声，或是有万种声音的合奏……
E: You can't see it anymore! You try using your other senses... With your eyes closed, you focus on your hearing: The Aeon's giant hammer falls, but what shakes the earth is not the thunderous sound, but the lifeless whimper of the thing that is hammered. From the sound, you hear what sounds like subtle laughter or the symphony of numerous sounds...
████You are waiting in place.██ █████You feel sleepy,████████████████ yet nothing happens████████████████.

C: 我想被祂吃进胃里！
E: I want to be eaten by THEM!

C: 至少你有家，不是吗？这使你不会被「虚无」吞没。
E: At least you have a family, isn't it? Because of that, you won't be engulfed by the Nihility.

C:
「亦又是何人制梦牵引，感染嬗变之意志？吾将控制秩序之一切，将搅局者清除出局。」
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖ ♬ Eme-Clent-J. I. Vadnbg。<unbreak>1935</unbreak>-<unbreak>1942</unbreak>
「扰乱世间者不得存留，贪婪者无应苟活；狡诈多变之混沌，是之为宇宙秽尘废埃也。」
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖♬ " Secréiat Ineional es mpers"。<unbreak>1894</unbreak>-<unbreak>193</unbreak>
E: "Who is the dreammaker that pulls and influences the will of transmutation? I shall keep the Order under complete control and eliminate the troublemakers."\n(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖ ♬ Eme-Clent-J. I. Vadnbg. <unbreak>1935</unbreak>-<unbreak>1942</unbreak>\n"The troublemakers shall not remain, and the greedy shall not be spared. The treacherous and fickle chaos is what contaminates the universe."(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖♬ " Secréiat Ineional es mpers." <unbreak>1894</unbreak>-<unbreak>193</unbreak>

C: 你看向祂——祂也同样看着你。
E: You look at THEM, and THEY look at you.

C: 「筹码：螺丝。」螺丝咕姆回答，「黑塔女士称其渴望研究小螺丝的生命起源。补充：黑塔女士的赌注是空间站。」
E: "Chips: Screws." Screwllum answers, "Madam Herta said she wanted to study the origin of the life of small screws. Additional info: Madam Herta's bet is the space station."

C: 别忘了你正扮演阿基维利，化作凡人藏在人群里是你最擅长的事情；不用担心，只需闭上眼睛——将四肢变得柔软、放松，你会惊觉自己的感官身处一片无限绚丽的画廊中央…接着，你迅速翻阅着变幻的画面……
E: Don't forget you're playing as Akivili. Turning into a mortal and hiding in the crowd is what you do best. Don't worry. Just close your eyes and relax your limbs, and you will find your senses in the middle of a gallery of a plethora of colors... Then, you start browsing the changing scenes quickly...

C: 下一站你们就将抵达蠹星。他的眼神熠熠发光，是的…你很清楚：他相信那破解了一半的倒放呓语——<color=#dbc291ff>「他发起征服；他建立文明；他最终找到失去的自我。」</color>
E: At the next landing, you will arrive in Lepismat. His eyes gleam... and you are aware that he believes in the half-deciphered whispers that were played in reverse. <color=#dbc291ff>"He conquers planets. He establishes civilizations. He finds his lost self."</color>

C: 「为了均衡。」一个声音突然从你的头顶传来，它并不期待你的反应。
E: "For Equilibrium." A voice suddenly calls out to you overhead, but it does not hope for your response.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 倒是挺有趣的…
E: It's quite interesting...

C: 「我特别好奇一件事：模拟宇宙的引导为什么按在我头上？变成我的职责了？」黑塔讥笑着，好像想到了点法子，「我得把阮•梅和螺丝咕姆接进来，让他们做点实事，{NICKNAME}，你要见大人物了。」
E: "I'm really puzzled as to why I'm in charge of the tutorial on the Simulated Universe. When did it become my responsibility?" Sneering, Herta seems to have come up with a brilliant idea. "I must bring Ruan Mei and Screwllum here and let them do some real work. {NICKNAME}, you're about to meet some big shots soon."

C: 这是…好熟悉的地方…
E: This is... a very familiar place...

C: 你假装，世界就是真的……
E: As long as you pretend, the world is real...

C: 躲避。
E: Avoid them.

C: 她俯身，亲吻你的额头，邀请你完成这场计谋的逻辑闭环。
E: She leans over to kiss your forehead, inviting you to complete the logical loop of this scheme.

C: 沿着使节留下的轨迹与药师的传说，你是多么羡慕那些受祂恩赐的子民。
E: Following the trail left by the envoy and the legend of Yaoshi, you envy greatly those who have been blessed by Them.

C: 请治好我们的病。
E: Please cure our illnesses.

C: 「外包装挺大，里面的机器这么小。导师，学会就拿这么个玩意打发咱们？」博识尊用一只手把你举了起来。
E: "The exterior was quite large, yet the machine inside is so small? Teacher, is the guild just giving us this thing to keep us occupied?" Nous picks you up in a single hand.

C: 「我实在跑不动了，导师，咱们休息一下吧。」小雅一屁股坐在杂草堆里。
E: "I really can't run anymore, teacher. Let's take a break." Xiaoya flops comfortably into a pile of weeds.

C: 你试图从老者怀中取走果实。老者猛然惊醒，语无伦次地怒骂着，一只手护着果实，一只手从大衣口袋中掏出一把枪。你本能地掏枪射击，老人倒在血泊中。你横竖看不出这枚果实有多么宝贵，值得老人以命相护。你咬了一口，嗯，味道不错。
E: You try to pry the fruit from the arms of the old man. Waking up in a violent shock, the old man flies into a flurry of incoherent cursing. He tries to protect the fruit with one hand and reaches for a gun in his pocket with the other. Instinctively, you draw your gun and fire. The old man collapses into a pool of blood. You measure up the fruit, unable to see what was so precious that the old man would give his life to protect it. You take a bite. Mmm, not bad.

C: 「孩子需要一个正常的成长环境。」你的妻子带着女儿离开了家。
E: "The children need to grow in a stable environment." Your wife and daughter leave you.

C: 「她的前半生不属于任何学派，和大多数无名学者一样。后半生则成为炙手可热的桂冠，每个学派都希望通过她的加入给自己贴金。」
E: "For the first half of her life, she was not affiliated with a particular school, much like most unknown scholars. In the latter half, she became a coveted laureate, with every school keen to recruit her in hopes of elevating their prestige."

C: 求求你，不要再谜语人了…
E: Please stop speaking in riddles...

C: 四个寰宇难题。
E: Four Cosmic Conundrums.

C: 你是谁？回答：<color=#dbc291ff>梅尼科</color>，鲁珀特帝国的尖兵，帝皇的锋刃，螺丝星的喀纽齐卡是你的上级汇报单元。
E: Who are you? Answer: <color=#dbc291ff>Menik</color>, elite soldier of the Rubert Empire, the Emperor's Blade. Khanuzika on Planet Screwllum is your superior reporting unit.

C: 数万名自认为是无机体梅尼科的学士占领了「权杖」，即刻对学会开战。以摧毁<unbreak>122</unbreak>台「权杖」的代价为前提，动乱终于得以平息。
E: Tens of thousands of scholars who think of themselves as inorganic Meniks have occupied the Scepters, instantly declaring war on the Guild. The chaos is eventually quelled, at the cost of destroying <unbreak>122</unbreak> Scepters.

C: 帕提维娅将意识接入核心。超距作用下，帝国疆域内所有的「权杖」瞬间连接成完整的神经系统，侍奉它们久违的新王。
E: Patavia connects her consciousness to the core. In an instant, all Scepters across the vast distance of the Empire reform into a complete nervous system, ready to serve their long-awaited new ruler.

C: 她曾与那人交谈过数次，那位缥缈的女士，面目模糊，却言简意赅。她的语词如手术刀般锋锐精准，总是切开困惑，解去迷障，也叫她心生自惭形秽。
E: Patavia had spoken with that person a number of times before. That floating and insubstantial woman with an indiscernible face, but concise and absolute speech. Her words are piercing and precise like a surgeon's scalpel, always cutting through Patavia's confusion and resolving Patavia's self-doubt, whilst filling the scholar with a sense of inferiority.

C: 你们知道<color=#dbc291ff>知识圈</color>吗？
E: Do you know about the <color=#dbc291ff>Circle of Knowledge?</color>

C: 逻辑：你似乎在为这些客观的阻碍，赋予某种主观的特质。请容我提醒，主观臆断是研究之敌。
E: Logic: You seem to be applying a subjective quality to these objective obstacles. Allow me to remind you, subjectivity is the enemy of research.

C: 「为我准备的陷阱么…」糖果色的杀手扼住风暴的咽喉，手术刀切、刺、划……代码尽数化为支离的碎片。她举手投足，高视阔步，目光所及之下一切观测系成了僵死凝固的铁板，回归井然有序。
E: "A trap prepared just for me...?" The candy-colored killer grips the storm by its throat, using her scalpel to slice, stab, and cut... The code is shattered into pieces. With each movement, her gaze freezes everything in sight into a rigid iron panel, restoring order to the chaos.

C: 你大笑，在场的所有人，所有代码，万事万物开始大笑。
E: You burst into laughter, and soon everyone present, every line of code, and all things begin laughing.

C: 风太大，我听不清。
E: The wind is too loud, and I can't hear you.

C: 「……」你一度以为她的人偶停止了运作。
E: "..." You temporarily believe that her puppet has stopped working.

C: 我是一段美梦。
E: I am a dream.

C: 生长啊，生长啊，不死的怪物冲出实验室，蹒跚地爬进立宪国的广场。此刻开始，又一颗星球被宣判死亡。
