E: Grow, grow! The immortal monster bursts out of the laboratory and staggers into the plaza of the constitutional state. It was at this moment that another planet was pronounced dead.

C: 他们当然有兴趣，这可是模拟宇宙，谁不喜欢？我已经在和他们谈落地了。
E: Of course, they would be. Who wouldn't? I'm already discussing with them about the implementation of the project.

C: 你们的打赌……
E: About the bet between you two...

C: 嘎！
E: Quack!

C: 你惊讶地在商店门口发现螺丝咕姆的投影——他正悉心研究模拟宇宙中出现的异常现象。
E: You are surprised to find Screwllum's projection before the store's doors — He is immersed in studying the abnormal phenomena occurring in the Simulated Universe.

C: 你惊讶地在商店门口发现螺丝咕姆——他正悉心研究一串公式。
E: Much to your surprise, you stumble upon Screwllum at the store entrance — he is utterly engrossed in studying a series of equations.

C: 我不相信你说的话。
E: I don't believe you.

C: 老旧电视机开始泛起雪花屏，它的信号变得越来越差。很快，你完全无法听清声音了。
E: Static appears on the old television as the signals get weaker. Soon, you cannot even hear the sound clearly.

C: 但它却一跃而起，用尾巴扫了下你的脸！你被打得好痛！
E: However, it leaps and smacks its tail against your face instead! It hurts a lot!

C: 你露出了宽慰的、悲怀的笑容。
E: A relieved and sorrowful smile breaks out on your face.

C: 一位狐人舞者来到你面前。她狡黠地对你使了一个嘘的手势，接着为你掀开「会堂」的门帘。
E: A foxian dancer approaches you. She makes a mischievous shushing gesture at you before lifting the curtain to the hall for you.

C: 「我尝试复制黑塔女士的奇物。」它说，「别问我是谁，这只是我的虚拟形象。给你些宝贝…不过和普通的奇物不太一样。你得先付出代价，才能有收获。」
E: "I'm trying to replicate Madam Herta's Curios. Don't ask me who I am. This is just my virtual avatar. I'll offer you something nice... but they're different to how normal Curios work. You have to pay the price first before you get the rewards," it says.

C: 也不知道这段数据是上哪儿找来的，你总感觉模拟出来的版本比本体还要欠揍。
E: Who knows where this data came from. You always feel as though the simulated version is worse than the original.

C: 冗长的泊停登记磨灭了你的耐心，外星细菌消杀更是令你陷入了长达二十个标准时的空腹时间。
E: The long and drawn-out docking registration process has destroyed your patience and the alien bacteria extermination process has sent you into a long, <unbreak>20</unbreak>-hour period of fasting.

C: 还有那尾巴，它自由地在空中晃荡，轻柔，绵软，仿佛不属于身体一般，做出无序的混沌运动，美得宛如洛德尔吸引子模型。
E: And that tail... it is jauntily swaying in the air, soft and comfy, like it is its own entity. It moves with a mind of its own in orderless chaos, as mesmerizing as a Lodell oscillator model.

C: 学会放弃沉没成本的瞬间，你已经比学会一半的人都要聪明了。
E: The instant you learn to let go of the sunk cost is the instant you become smarter than half the Guild members in existence.

C: 改变了语言，是否就等于改变了世界？
E: If we change language, does that mean we've changed the world?

C: 你驶入一团废弃的历史数据。在这里，你是黄柑橘星云的舰队前锋，驾驶着需要十只触角操控的意识融合式飞船，在敌人的蜂群浮游炮中来回游走。
E: You navigate into a cluster of deserted historical data. Here, you assume the role of the fleet vanguard of the Yellow Citrus Nebula, who pilots a consciousness-integrated airship that requires ten tentacles for control, deftly maneuvering through swarms of enemy floating cannons.

C: 一团垃圾数据以极高的速度与舰船碰撞在一起，渗透的代码撕裂你的载具，同化负载的数据。在自己被拽进黑暗深处前，你不舍地按下了紧急弹射按钮。
E: A cluster of junk data collides with the ship at a rapid pace. The infiltrating code tears your vessel apart, assimilating the data it carries. Just before being dragged into the depths of darkness, you reluctantly activate the emergency eject button.

C: 「据悉，被告的人生成功指数高达<unbreak>99.9</unbreak>。违背了迪兰特星第二宪法典的规定，严重透支了本星系的总体成功额度，是对他人资源的侵占。」
E: "It has been reported that the defendant's life success index stands at an impressive <unbreak>99.9</unbreak>. In violation of regulations of Dirante Star's Second Codex, this has grievously overdrawn this system's collective success quota, constituting an egregious invasion upon the resources of others."

C: 「谢谢你，小友。」他接下硬币，恋恋不舍地看向尚未被冥河淹没的尘世，消失在湍流深处。
E: "Thank you, young friend." He takes the coin, looks forlornly at the world still untouched by the River of Souls, and disappears into the torrential depths.

C: 忍耐不住的眷属们竞相跃入海中，争抢蜜酿，因歌声而来的鱼群也彼此归去。你小心翼翼地驶过礁石，在烂醉如泥的眷属中央，大海的宝藏正熠熠生辉。
E: The Titankins, unable to resist, leap into the sea and scramble for the honey brew, while the fish drawn by song return whence they come. You carefully steer past the rocks — amidst the drunken throng of Titankins, the treasures of the sea sparkle with radiance.

C: 每当它从天上遁逃，滑落的红色贼星便会揭露它的轨迹，谕示诡计的灾厄就要降临。
E: Whenever they escape from the sky, the falling red Thief Star unveils their path, foretelling an imminent calamity of deception.

C: 什么都没有，全是谎言。
E: Nothing but falsehoods.

C: 它在果实表皮刻下最初的裁决，宣告因果，令丝线舒展成框架，支撑世界。有寒冷便有温暖，有获得便有失去，如此，万事万物方能在平衡中诞生。
E: They carve the initial judgment into the fruit's rind, declaring cause and effect, allowing threads to stretch into frameworks that support the world. Where there is cold, there is warmth. Where there is gain, there is loss. Thus, all things can emerge in balance.

C: 黑潮和灾厄无可抵挡。
E: The black tide and calamity are unstoppable.

C: 大地兽吞完最后一块红土，满足地打了一个饱嗝，这也意味着今天的工作要开始了。身为哈图西里远近闻名的大地兽饲养员，你要为这些大家伙分配任务。
E: The dromas lets out a deep, contented burp after swallowing the last chunk of redsoil — a clear signal that the day's work is about to begin. As the most renowned dromas handler in Hattusili, it falls upon you to assign tasks to these towering beasts.

C: 眼前的两扇门融化了，青铜和黄金像岩浆般淹没了你，等你好不容易挣扎出来，背包已经干瘪，里面的财宝化为乌有。
E: Before your eyes, the two doors liquefy, and the bronze and gold engulfs you like molten lava. You fight to escape, but by the time you claw your way free, your backpack is completely deflated — all your treasures, gone, swallowed by the tide.

C: 自人子间的第一起冲突开始，无数年来不乏文明的城邦被蛮军摧毁，也有正直勇敢的英雄惨遭小人谋害，但这些都不足以成为撼动天平的砝码。
E: Since the first conflict among humankind, countless civilized city-states have fallen to barbarian hordes, and noble heroes met their end by schemers' hands, yet none of this could tip the scales of cosmic justice.

C: 它将敞开怀抱，迎回逝去的孩子。为了表达它的哀悼，它将陷入苍茫的沉睡。
E: They opened their arms to reclaim their lost children and sank into a mournful slumber.

C: 它的一举一动关乎气象。
E: Their every movement affects the weather.

C: 「说到故事…」少女变出一本似曾相识的厚书，书页被风翻动，发出沙沙的声音。
E: "Speaking of stories..." The girl conjures up a seemingly familiar, thick book, and its pages rustle in the wind.

C: 将它扔进垃圾桶。
E: Toss it into the trashcan.

C: 啊？你说什么？哎哟，到底是哪个嘛！
E: Huh? What's that? *Sigh* which one is it then?

C: 你悻悻地收回手，目送着那位科员抱起宝箱就此离去。
E: You resentfully withdraw your hand and watch the researcher pick up the treasure chest and leave.

C: 一阵令人不适的眩晕感后，你被「新世界大门」带到了主控舱段。
E: After a period of uncomfortable dizziness, you are transported to the master control zone by the Door to A New World.

C: 思来想去，你还是放弃了求证。反正也看不懂，你想，我只是奉命来调查「家族」的…如果一切顺利，或许能够拿到通向匹诺康尼的邀请函——这才是你的目的。
E: After some consideration, you decide not to ask anything, since you cannot understand what's going on anyway. After all, you're only here to investigate The Family... If everything goes well, you might get your hands on an invitation letter to Penacony — that's what you are after.

C: 舱外的海洋依旧闪烁着星星点点的光芒。你下意识地握紧与莉亚相牵的手，以免那星光从指缝间悄悄溜走。
E: The stars are still sparkling on the ocean outside the cockpit. Instinctively, you tighten your hold on Leah's hand to prevent the starlight from slipping through your fingers.

C: 「真该死！」你咕噜咕噜，盯着碾作一团、火花四溅的摩托残骸，不知如何是好。这里离公寓还有多远？你毫无头绪，只好仰望天空，想要问问群星的意见。
E: "I can't believe this!" You bubble as you stare at the motorcycle reduced into a pile of burning wreckage, not knowing what to do. You have no idea how far you are from your condo. You can only look up at the sky and ask for advice from the stars.

C: 仪表盘显示你们所处的海拔正在不断下降。现在已经是三位数了。你见舷窗外的风景从云层乱流变为华美屋宇的穹顶，确认了这一事实。
E: The dashboard shows your altitude has been decreasing rapidly, dropping to a three-digit figure. The view outside has changed from wispy clouds to the roofs of exquisite houses, confirming the descent is taking place.

C: 在那天，他宣布将终其一生追溯恩•德芮的过去、现在与将来。接着，他便彻底消失了踪迹，自此再无音讯。
E: On that day, he vowed to spend the rest of his life tracing the past, present, and future of Anne Duray. Then, he disappeared and has not been heard from since.

C: 我也是豹，我是迷糊姐姐的圣兽…难道我看起来不像吗？
E: I am a seal too. I am Miss Daze's divine beast... Don't I look like a seal?

C: 我、我只是穿上了黄金款皮肤而已，这是我抽奖抽出来的——我可不是在晒嗡！
E: I... just put on a golden outfit. I got this from a reward raffle. I... I'm not showboating!

C: 偷？这怎么能叫偷呢嗡，明明我也是金黄色的——应该是志趣相投才对嗡！
E: Stealing? How do you figure that? Why, I'm golden myself, too — and as they say, like fancies like.

C: 是真话喀。前面的区域，以后再来探索吧。
E: True that. How about we explore the area ahead of us later?

C: 虽然，我也付出了惨痛的代价喀……
E: Despite the heavy price I had to pay...

C: 有人说那位选手只是昙花一现，但我俩都不这么觉得。迟早有一天，「冷面小青龙」会卷土重来，靠着硬实力席卷磐岩镇的搏击圈……
E: Some say that fighter was a one-hit wonder, but we don't think so. Someday, Cold Dragon Young will come roaring back and take Boulder Town's mixed martial arts circle by storm...
Three... two... one...

C: 我怎么找都找不到！你到底藏在哪里了呀？
E: I can't find you! Where in the world were you hiding?

C: 我是接到报案的银鬃铁卫。
E: I'm a Silvermane Guard, responding to a report.

C: 但你放心！为希露瓦大人拍照这种事，也是一种「存护」的体现！
E: Don't worry! Taking a picture of Lady Serval is just another form of Preservation!

C: 哦哦哦，动起来了，动起来了喀！
E: Whoa, it's moving! It's really moving!

C: 欢迎来到理性赐福的树庭，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}裂分之枝{RUBY_E#}的伟大不言自明！
E: Welcome to the Grove, a place blessed by Reason. The majesty of the {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Bough of Rift{RUBY_E#} speaks for themself!

C: 别、别踩了！投降，投降喀！
E: No more, no more stepping! I yield, I yield!

C: 喀…奇怪，这个成分…怎么是甜的喀！和资料上的完全不一样喀！
E: Crrrk... odd, this ingredient... it's sweet! Nothing like what the records say!

C: 柔软温暖的金茧…
E: Tender, cozy golden cocoon...

C: 不抽象、无艺术！
E: No art without abstraction!

C: 记住…不要轻视自己的选择。任何选择。
E: Remember... never forget the importance of your decisions. Any decision.

C: 我手上有一小撮晶石…
E: I'm holding a fistful of crystals...

C: …有吗？也许吧。不论如何，我们得先聊聊你为什么会出现在这里……
E: ...Have I? Maybe. Anyway, we need to talk about why you are here...

C: 你盯上了这座广场的正中央。老实说，这里根本没有办法藏匿任何东西，或者任何人。站在这里，你只能感到自己沐浴在众人的目光中，一览无遗……
E: You set your sights on the center of the plaza. To be honest, it's basically impossible to hide anything or anyone here. Standing here, you can feel everyone's eyes on you...

C: 对不起，漆黑的虎克大人…
E: Sorry, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great...

C: 就躲在这里！
E: I'll hide here!

C: …荣誉队员。
E: ...Honorary member.

C: 人群散去。你打量着自己的双手：这对紧握球棍、历战无算的无情铁手，如今仿佛被里里外外仔细抛了光…很可能比大矿区的地髓还要亮。
E: The crowd has dissipated. You take stock of your two hands. These invincible hands have held on to the baseball bat and fought so many battles, but now they look like they've been carefully polished to shine... They might be even shinier than the Geomarrow in the Great Mine.

C: 你羞恼不已。再给你一次机会，你一定会给它点颜色瞧瞧。
E: You are embarrassed. If you are given a second chance, you'll teach it a lesson.

C: 我懒得猜。
E: I'm not really interested.

C: 但是，我原谅你——
E: However, I forgive you—

C: 命运牵引着你，来到我的藏身处了嗡！
E: Fate has guided you to my hiding place, buzz!

C: 这里是距那些亡语蝶最近的地方，仿佛能看见它们身上的鳞粉——<color=#dbc291ff>它们飞舞的轨迹似乎是八个字符？</color>
E: This is the closest place to those Eulogistic Butterflies. You can almost see the scales on their wings — <color=#dbc291ff>their flight path seems to spell out eight characters?</color>

C: {F#丫头}{M#小子}，不要小看了贼神的力量——「诡计」的神偷甚至可以把你兜里的钱替换成破瓦片，只需要擦肩而过的一瞬，并且保准不露馅！
E: {F#Lass}{M#Boy}, don't underestimate the power of the Thief God —the divine thief of Trickery can even replace the money in your pocket with a shard of pottery in the blink of an eye, without you ever noticing!

C: 你现在就给我飞走。
E: You can go ahead and fly away now.

C: 要警惕人工智能觉醒毁灭人类。
E: It's a warning of an AI awakening that will destroy mankind.

C: …结果还做出了能说会道的版本，这不是比鹤运物流的技术部门好太多了吗？
E: ...Then they went a step further and made a version that could speak. Isn't that a technical skill that's better than the Technology Division of Heron Express?

C: 哼，那你是没有见过真正的赌王。
E: Hmm, then you've never seen a real gambling god before.

C: 我只是在感叹，要是我还像过去一样只是做着物流工作，肯定体会不到突如其来的变数，也不会有机会主宰自己的命运。
E: I'm just lamenting my past. If I were just a courier like before, I'd never have such diverse experiences, or get the chance to take control of my own fate.

C: 你不是机巧鸟，你不知道机巧鸟的快乐。
E: You're not a cycrane, so you don't know the joys of a cycrane.

C: 没错，这除了你你你你你，还有谁呢……
E: Yes, who else is around here besides you, you, and you?

C: 你在找我对吧？
E: Are you looking for me?

C: 我们以后还有作业要写，还有用得着老大的地方，请你不要多管闲事。
E: We still have work to do, and there's still plenty for the boss to do. Please don't interfere with our business.

C: 请您在这里稍等片刻，等其他选手就位，比赛马上开始！
E: Please wait here for a moment while the other contestants take their places. The contest will begin soon!

C: 我命令你放水，奖励统统归我！
E: I order you to throw the contest, and I'll take home all of the prizes!

C: 嘎乌握库惹！（{F#她}{M#他}晕过去了！）
E: Ghee phainphed! ("{F#She}{M#He} fainted!")

C: 那位女孩则更是可怜——她手中那将吃未吃的包子都被惊得掉在地上了。一时间，你不知是该心疼女孩还是心疼包子，或者心疼你自己。
E: The girl is even more pathetic — her uneaten buns drop straight out of her hands onto the ground. For a split second, you don't know whether to feel sorry for the girl, for the bun — or for yourself.

C: 奇怪，里面的图案似乎并不完整，难道和那些创生若虫有关？
E: Weird, the patterns inside don't seem complete. Could it have something to do with those Creation Nymphs?

C: 奇怪，画面还是不全…盘面似乎指明了其中一部分，但不是全部。我该去哪里找其他部分呢？
E: Weird, still not complete... The surface points to part of it, but not the whole. Where do I look for the rest?

C: 这只若虫意气风发地站在金属手掌上，仿佛要驾着它驶向天外。
E: This nymph stands proudly on the metal palm, like it's ready to ride the palm beyond the sky.

C: 有点恶心的感觉。
E: Kinda disgusting.

C: 你喜欢森森！
E: You like Sensen!

C: 敷衍？哈哈，怎么会呢。
E: Humoring? Haha, how could I?

C: 什么呀？我又不是来寻短见的，我只是累了坐下来歇会儿。
E: What? I'm not here to off myself. I was just tired, so I sat down to rest.

C: （将持明小孩的事告诉他）
E: (Tell him about the Vidyadhara child)

C: 这小家伙才多大啊，心思怎么这么弯弯绕绕的，想想就吓人……
E: This little guy's thoughts are already so twisted and convoluted... it's scary to think about...

C: 只是不知道，这些红色的涂鸦和弹孔，是否也是艺术的一部分？
E: You're just not quite sure if the red graffiti and bullet holes are part of the art style, too?

C: 也许它们不是气球，而是被坏魔法师抓住的灵魂，在漫长的时间里等待新的替罪羊。
E: Perhaps they aren't balloons at all, but souls that were captured by an evil sorcerer, suspended in the depths of time, awaiting a new scapegoat.

C: 这里是梦境，如果大家都怀有一颗童心，在未来某天，涂鸦也会变成真正的太阳。
E: This is the Dreamscape. If we are able to keep within us the innocence of a child, perhaps someday in the future, the graffiti can become an actual sun.

C: 越是危险的区域，反倒越对它着迷，这就是有机生命说的情调吗？
E: The more dangerous a place, the more they are fascinated by it. Is this what organic beings mean by "emotional appeal"?

C: 人生就是一段上不去的楼梯。
E: Life is a flight of stairs that you can't climb.

C: 可是为什么？明明它只是一张平平无奇的沙发，既没有炫酷的螺旋喷射系统，也没有热血的合体变形装置，除非…它是一张能坐的沙发！
E: But why? It's obviously just a plain old sofa without a flashy spiral spray system or an awesome compound transformation setting, unless... it's a sofa that you can sit on!

C: 如此空旷的制高点，站在那里，你将横扫一切敌人，成为世界的中心。
E: Standing over this vast highland, you sweep away your enemies, becoming the center of the world.

C: 你试图与扑满交流，但只发出了几声很酷的*哼*，扑满并没有理你。
E: You try to communicate with the Trotter, but all they do is snort aloofly at you a few times. The Trotter pays you no attention.

C: 再站一会儿吧。
E: Stand here for a little longer.

C: 以前朝下看还不觉得，此刻你望着粼粼波光的地面，感觉自己像在海上漂泊。忽有眩晕感袭来。
E: You didn't feel this when you previously looked down. Right now, as you gaze at the shimmering waves on the floor, you feel like you're drifting on the ocean's surface, and suddenly feel dizzy.

C: 更新工作日志…
E: Updating the work log...

C: 开始例行维护…
E: Initiating regular maintenance...

C: 该泡澡啦。
E: Time for a soak.

C: 伙伴们都说，只要祈愿满三百次，下一次祈愿必然应验。现在算来，应该也快到我的大保底了。
E: My friends all say that if I prayed <unbreak>300</unbreak> times, the next prayer is sure to come true. By my estimations, my guaranteed prayer should be coming up soon, then.

C: 常回家看看
E: Don't Forget About Home

C: 对了…那个，{NICKNAME}乘客以后可不可以多回来列车…才不是想你了。
E: Oh right, {NICKNAME}, could you come back to the Express often... It's not that Pom-Pom missed you.

C: 灯光也调过了…音乐也放过了…都没有用！好烦帕，好想休息休息，但是怎么也睡不着。
E: Pom-Pom's turned down the house lights... and played music... But that doesn't work! Pom-Pom just can't get to sleep.

C: 呜呜…还好…空间站怎么也有…呜…然后…然后……
E: *sob* Okay... How come the space station has... Um... Then... And then...

C: 落地的声音非常清脆，你相信帕姆一定听到了这个声音…
E: The sound of the mug smashing on the floor was so crisp that you trust Pom-Pom must have heard it...

C: 「今天不努力，明天做苦力；今天不拼命，明天喝空气！」
E: "If you don't work hard today, you'll have more hard work tomorrow. If you don't try your hardest today, you'll have nothing left tomorrow!"

C: 专人只负责正式科员。
E: The medical staff only provide their services to the researchers.

C: 没惹你吧，我怎么你了？
E: I didn't remember messing with you. What's your problem?

C: 非常抱歉，但我下次还敢！
E: I'm sorry, and I'll do it again next time!

C: 抱歉，我不是故意的。
E: Sorry, I didn't mean to dirty the floor.

C: 呜呜，甚至就连在列车上打扫卫生过久，也会感觉特别疲劳，喘不上气。
E: *sob* I also feel tired and get breathless easily when I'm cleaning the coaches longer than usual.

C: 确实如此…身体才是担任列车长的本钱！
E: That's right... Being healthy is crucial for a conductor!

C: 我将带头削减开支…
E: I will lead the way in cutting spending...

C: 可惜这里没有我喜欢的歌…
E: It's a pity that there is no song I like here...

C: 话说回来…你能感受到吧，{NICKNAME}？这空气里的压迫感……
E: By the way... Can you feel the oppression in the air here, {NICKNAME}?

C: *电波滤音*我们已经侦测到异变的范围在不断缩小，这一切努力果然没有白费。
E: *electronic voice* The anomaly's impact area has become smaller. Looks like we're making progress.

C: *电波滤音*记住，<color=#dbc291ff>不必恋战</color>，目标一直是次元扑满。我们保持远程联系，请一路小心。
E: *electronic voice* And just a heads-up, <color=#dbc291ff>don't engage those monsters</color>. Our main focus is the Warp Trotter. We'll stay in contact remotely. Please be careful.

C: 不出意外，次元扑满总是能抓住一切机会狐假虎威，这毕竟也是它的可爱之处。
E: Unsurprisingly, Warp Trotters will always try to trick you at every opportunity, but that's part of what makes them so adorable.

C: 我想了解一下你们这个…会社。
E: I'd like to know more about this... Society of yours.

C: 我只能说，「黑暗拳斗大赛」只有被选中的战士才能受邀参加。这可是货真价实的拳头比拼……
E: All I can say is that only selected fighters get to enter the high-class fisticuff known as the Dark Fist Tournament.

C: 「四大天王」怎么只有三个人？
E: Why are there only three people in the Formidable Four?

C: 还在嘴硬？看来必须得让你尝点苦头才行了——
E: Backtalking, are you? Guess I got to put some hurting on you...

C: 我真的知错了！我再也不敢了。
E: Please stop! I won't do it again!

C: 呃…我……
E: Uh, I...

C: 呃…光道歉有什么用？
E: You think an apology is enough?

C: 幸运的是，你的手比大脑更冷静，它暂时还未伸向那诱人的皮箱；不幸的是，你不知道这箱子里滴答响的东西究竟是炸弹还是金表。
E: Fortunately, you are calmer than what your words suggest, and you haven't reached into that alluring suitcase. And unfortunately, we still don't have a single clue about whether it's a bomb or just some kind of timepiece.

C: 我当然有。
E: Of course, I have.

C: 把视线带回贝洛伯格。
E: Now back to Belobog.

C: 投掷硬币许个愿吧。
E: Toss in a coin and make a wish.

C: 你就这么静静站着看他。男人脸上一阵青一阵白，仿佛在评估着彼此的实力。
E: You just stand there in silence, looking on. The man's face turns blue and then white, as if sizing you up.

C: 别跟我谜语人…
E: You sound like the Riddlers...

C: 应该没有人会这么做吧…
E: Nobody would think to do that...

C: 当然…没问题！一切为了回信。
E: No problem! Anything for this reply.

C: 「一孔之见，愿效绵薄之力。尔不妨……」
E: "...my humble opinion for your assistance. You may consider ..."

C: 今天的工作就到此为止了，这是您应得的酬劳，请您收下吧！
E: That's all for today's work. This is your well-deserved reward. Please accept it!

C: 太感谢了！走吧，我送你过去～
E: Thank you so much! Let's go. I'll send you there~

C: 请问您是找我有什么事情吗？
E: Is there anything I can do for you?

C: 我随身带着厂里的小零件，不断提醒自己，要成为一名「善良的银行家」，可惜刚才从星槎上下来的时候，零件弄丢了。
E: I like to carry little components from the factory around with me as a reminder to myself to be a "Good Banker." But it's a real shame that I dropped the component when I was getting off the starskiff.

C: 没想到客人已经从小零件换到昂贵的药材了。
E: I didn't expect you to score expensive pharmaceuticals like that from just a small component.

C: 搞错了吧？
E: Could there be a mistake?

C: 那我确认一下哦…确实没搞错。你得付款，我才能把货物给你。当然了，你也可以拒收，我们会把货物退给寄件人。
E: Okay, I'll check that again for you... And it's no mistake. Please pay first, and then I'll be able to release the item to you. Of course, you're welcome to decline, and I can just return it to the sender.

C: 先别开门！等一下！我现在没穿衣服！
E: Don't come in! Wait up! I'm naked!

C: 你看看你看看，这地方都是些什么人啊。
E: Just look! Look at the kinds of people that come here.

C: 你怎么被困在这里？
E: How'd you get stuck here?

C: 抱歉！我已经很努力地在控制自己了…但……
E: Sorry! I've been trying very hard to control myself... but...

C: 那些声音、那些颜色、甚至…我每天都能听到、都能看到。不是此刻这般远远倾听或观望，它们是如此强烈、如此鲜明，气势汹汹地逼近，像洪水一样近乎将我淹没。
E: Those voices, those colors, and even... I hear and see them every day. Instead of listening or observing from a distance like we are now, they are intense and brilliant as they aggressively approach, almost drowning me like a torrential flood.

C: 掏出手机。
E: Pull out your phone.

C: 如您所言，那位先生的状态确实有些糟糕…但我现在……
E: As you say, that gentleman's indeed in a bit of a pickle... But right now I...

C: 夏布罗此刻看起来分外平和，就连脸上的褶子都仿佛不那么锋利了。
E: Chabro looks extremely at peace right then. Even the wrinkles cracked across his face seemed to be less sharp.

C: 我这双眼啊…就是在她眼前彻底失去了光亮。我敢发誓，她这辈子都忘不了——
E: These eyes of mine... they've completely lost their brightness due to her. I swear, she is going to never forget...

C: 嗯？看我干嘛，你也想吃？好吧，看在我们聊得还算开心的份上…分你一块也不是不行。
E: Well, what are you looking at? Hungry, too? Alright, seeing as we've been chatting nicely... it's not like I can't share some of this with you.

C: 真好，终于可以休息了……
E: It's wonderful. I can finally rest...

C: 好呀，科琳船长的故事多到说不完。你喜欢听什么样的故事？
E: Alright, Captain Colleen's got many a story. What kind of stories do you like best?

C: 就在我聚精会神、眼观六路的时候，一个张牙舞爪的外星人忽然飘到了驾驶窗前……
E: Just as I was focusing all my attentions on the six directions around me, the snarling teeth and claws of this alien suddenly floated into sight...

C: 后来我又对这片星区做了些勘探，发现那些小行星并非自然形成。它们是一场爆炸产生的碎片，原本来自同一颗星球。
E: Later on, I did some digging around this star system and discovered those asteroids were not formed naturally. They were fragments from an explosion, and were all sourced from the same planet.

C: 有机会的话，你真该亲眼见识下那副景象…也许可以把它做成梦泡？
E: If you get the chance, you really should try and see that sight with your own eyes... Maybe you could make it into a dream bubble?

C: 你们两个在这干什么？
E: What are you two doing here?

C: 毕竟，我是一个海盗。
E: After all, I am a pirate.

C: 但在死亡的威胁面前，他们别无选择。
E: But faced with the threat of death, there were no other choices available.
Hmm...
Seven... Seven!?

C: 我、我请…嗝…请您喝苏乐达…管够！
E: I, I will... *burp*... buy you some SoulGlad... You can have as much as you want!

C: …啊？你认真的…不是，他认真的？
E: ...Huh? Are you serious... I mean... Is he serious?

C: 那群傻*同事也是，跟着这种嫉贤妒能、邀功诿过的上司，能有什么出路……
E: I don't understand why my co-workers are still sticking with a boss who's jealous of talented people and takes credit for everything. What kind of future do they expect when they work for Feinman...

C: 嗯…嗯嗯……
E: Hmm... hmmm...

C: 嘿——嘿呀——
E: I'll... rip it off...

C: 但如今投身娱乐业的逐梦客一代比一代不靠谱，公司旗下的娱乐产品也开始侵入匹诺康尼的文艺市场，前景不容乐观啊……
E: But nowadays, the new generation of Dreamchasers who enter the entertainment industry are getting more unreliable, and the IPC's franchises keep invading our entertainment market. The future doesn't look too bright, to be honest...

C: 我…对不起，我还没想清楚怎么跟他当面道歉。
E: I... I'm sorry... I haven't figured out how to apologize to him face-to-face.

C: 别废话了，波波特，我们走吧。
E: Let's go, Popott. Don't waste our time on this meaningless conversation.

C: 她错了？哈哈哈，不是的，她没有错。
E: She's wrong? Hahaha, no. I don't think she is.

C: 他已经走了。
E: He's gone.

C: 哈哈哈…我猜这些年轻人听到我的想法一定会很开心的！
E: Hahaha... I can imagine how thrilled those youngsters would be when they find out what I think!

C: 唉，想法可以轻易转变，但对艺者们造成的影响没法轻易消除…看来我的过错不能洗刷，只能慢慢补赎。
E: Alas, it's easy to change my mindset, but the impact of my actions on my talents is hard to erase... Looks like my mistakes can't be erased overnight, and must be slowly made up for my mistake.

C: 我认为「纯美之歌」真的很美，但在无人欣赏的处境中，我也开始想要放弃歌唱…直到一场意外的星际交通事故，我和族人们被困在了一个「原始博士」残害的世界中。
E: At first, I genuinely believed the Song of Beauty was truly beautiful. However, when nobody appreciated it, I started contemplating giving up singing... until an interstellar traffic accident left us stranded on a world maimed by Dr. Primitive.

C: 唉…我生在夜鹰的草窝，却又向往阳光下的高空。乘风的鸟儿随心扇动翅膀就能轻松高飞，而我想要去往同一片天空，就必须违心逆风而行……
E: *sigh* I was born in a night hawk's humble nest, yet I yearn for the sunlit heights. While an eagle effortlessly soars high by riding the wind, I must defy the wind and my own desires to reach the sky...

C: 她没有表情，没有言语，但却像是在无声地质问我——凭什么？凭什么她死了，我却能好好活着？
E: She was expressionless and didn't utter a word, but she seemed to be confronting me in silence. Why? Why am I still alive when she's dead?

C: …你是一个好人。
E: ...You're a good person.

C: 已经过去的事无法挽回。
E: What's done cannot be undone.

C: 你去的酒馆…正经吗？
E: What kind of tavern was that?

C: 但实际上呢？这些人的脑子比空垃圾袋还要浅薄，我一眼就把他们望到底！
E: The truth is, their mind is as empty as an unused trash bag! I can see right through them at a glance!

C: 呵，我知道啊，我都知道的……
E: Ha, I understand. I get it all...

C: 我本不愿与那些攻讦我、诋毁我的同僚计较，也早已练就了「在唾沫星子里捞金」的本事，可这次……
E: I didn't want to stoop to the level of my colleagues who degraded and slandered me, and I've long mastered the skill to see the good in the negative remarks made about me, but this time...

C: 我没法去做那些惊天动地的大事、影响整个银河，但却可以做到力所能及的小事，影响身边的人。
E: I'm not capable of doing groundbreaking stuff that can affect the entire cosmos, but I can do small things within my capacity to affect the people around me.

C: 我是家乡的罪人吗？我是不是亲手葬送了大家的未来呢……
E: Was I the culprit who ruined the future of my home planet?

C: 你脑子里的雷达突然尖叫起来——跑、赶紧跑、跑得远远的，以免被这座即将爆发的火山波及。
E: Your mind's fight-or-flight instinct suddenly screams at you to run as fast as you can, or risk being swallowed by an erupting volcano.

C: （这个「东西」…大概就是麦考先生的姐妹吧？）
E: (This "thing"... is probably going to be Mr. McCoy's sister, right?)

C: 为什么要这么做？
E: Why did you do this?

C: 想和你打听些事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 每场令宾客满意的盛会，都是周密的筹备和编排的结果。如此说来，这间「冷清」的公馆才是一切令人陶醉的美梦的起点。
E: Each and every event put on to please our guests is painstakingly prepared and arranged. That's why this "deserted" pavilion is actually the springboard for all the mesmerizing dreams here.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 那是很久以前的事了。当时我的公司还没做到这么大，不过也算小有名气。
E: That was a long time ago. Back then, my company wasn't really up to much but it still had made a little name for itself.

C: 可当我跟着定位找到她时，看见的却是她的葬礼。我这才知道，她毕生都致力于为战区民众提供医疗援助，最终被战火波及而死。
E: But when I made it over to her location, all I saw was... her funeral. Only then did I learn about how she'd dedicated her whole life to supplying medical assistance for refugees in war zones — and in the end, those flames of war had caught up with her.

C: 当然，你们也可以去找星际和平公司和博识学会，只要他们肯卖。
E: Of course, you could also approach the IPC or the Intelligentsia Guild — if they're willing to sell.

C: 这不可能！你怎么、怎么…一定是误打误撞解开的…对、一定是！可恶，算你走运……
E: This is impossible! H—How did you... You must have fixed it with sheer luck... That must be it! Argh, you'd better thank your lucky stars...

C: 不过，树林里每一只小鸟的成长老鸟都看在眼里——他曾经也是一只迷茫的小鸟，现在看来依然需要老鸟的呵护。
E: However, I also keep watch over every fledglings' growth in this forest. He was once a confused fledgling too, and it seems he still needs some care from this old bird.

C: 这三个家伙我是爱莫能助了，但愿我开的猛药可以帮到之后的学生——能救一个算一个。
E: There's nothing more I can do to help those three. I only hope my stricter regimen will help future students — even if I can only save them one at a time.

C: 不过没办法，必须要有一位校长。要是谁有能力替我头疼，这把交椅让给他也无妨。
E: But there's no way around it. The position of dean is a necessary one. If anyone is capable of taking over this headache from me, I wouldn't mind handing my position over to them.

C: 再往后，匹诺康尼成了盛会之星，谐乐学院也随之成立。它主要负责培育优秀的乐手、歌者和艺人，知更鸟小姐就是我们的名誉校友之一。
E: Later, Charmony Academy was established when Penacony became the Planet of Festivities. Charmony Academy is mainly responsible for nurturing talented musicians, singers, and artists. Miss Robin is one of our honorary alumni.

C: 先聊这些。
E: That's all for now.

C: 等上菜的期间，可以好好欣赏我的杰作——这几张餐巾可都是我亲自折起来的，是不是很好看啾！
E: Take a good look at my masterpieces while you're waiting to be served. I folded these napkins myself! Aren't they nice, tweet?

C: 忽然间，它冰冷坚固的外壳消失了，你的手指失去了依靠。一股奇怪的吸力传来，你的手指连带着整个身躯，向前栽去——
E: But the cold shell suddenly disappears, leaving your hand without any support. Drawn by a strange force that sucks you past the threshold, your fingers and the rest of your body begin to fall forward...

C: 伐木为什么要用机枪？
E: Why would you need a machine gun for tree-felling?

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 这钱花得也算值，不是吗？
E: The money will be worth it though, don't you think?

C: 当时只顾着读书...咳，这些闲话日后再说吧。
E: When I was young, all my efforts went on studying... Ahem. We can save this idle chit-chat for another time.

C: 不可能吧，你可别开这种玩笑啊。
E: No way. Don't make these jokes!

C: 人家要回家了啾，请客人下次想个更浪漫的搭讪方式啾！
E: I need to get back home, tweet. Please think up a more romantic way to flirt next time, tweet!

C: 我早就看出来了。
E: I saw that coming from a mile away.

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 算啦，反正今天已经玩儿得够久了，就先回去了啾。
E: Forget it. I think we've played enough today. I'm going back, tweet.

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个好奇心重的孩子总被各类小玩意儿吸引，或许可以在<color=#dbc291ff>树杈间的「望远镜」附近</color>找到它啾！
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet tweet... That's right! A curious kid is always getting distracted by all sorts of knick-knacks. You might be able to find it near <color=#dbc291ff>the telescope between the tree branches</color>, tweet!

C: 啾唔…真是不好意思啾……
E: Tweet... Sorry about that, tweet...

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 怎么才能上去呢？
E: How can we get up there?

C: 更希望吐出来的是钱…
E: I'd prefer some money instead...

C: 还是回去请教一下黄金公子吧。
E: Maybe I should go back and ask Young Master Gold.

C: 要打败坏蛋，就必须成为更大的坏蛋才行。
E: If you want to defeat a villain, you have to become an even greater villain!

C: 我从迷宫外一路潜行进来，就是为了夺取宝藏，验证我小镇第一高手的技术啾。
E: I snuck all the way into the maze to steal the treasure and prove that my technique is unmatched in Dreamville, tweet.

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 哼哼…来得早不如来得巧，本公子的影片正在筹备，客人您既然这么感兴趣，就来顺便帮帮忙吧。
E: Hmm... Your timing is perfect! My film is in development as we speak. As you are so interested, dear guest, why don't you lend a hand!

C: 感谢您的赞赏，我们会再接再厉的啾。
E: Thank you for your praise. We'll keep working harder, tweet.

C: 你做得不对。
E: You're in the wrong.

C: 完全没有抓到羽毛的手感，仿佛这只折纸小鸟正处于另一个奇异的位面一般。
E: There's no tangible feeling of feathers. It's as if this origami bird is in another bizarre dimension.

C: 你好啾，路过的朋友，能否解答我的一个疑问？
E: Hello, tweet. Passing friend, can you solve a riddle of mine?

C: 你不是会飞吗？
E: Don't you know how to fly?

C: 喝水的时候请安静啾。
E: Please be quiet when drinking water, tweet.

C: 多么迷人...
E: So charming...

C: 一次都没有输过...
E: Completely undefeated...

C: 是会带来好运的小花，不是野草噢。
E: They're flowers that can bring you luck — not weeds.

C: …快！快去！救…救永仁！
E: ...Quick! Go! Save... save Yongren!

C: 你以为只有你会云骑的技艺吗？已经跟你说过了，给个机会嘛，可你既然不听，那就由不得你——
E: Please. You think you're the only one trained in the Cloud Knights' martial arts here? I've pleaded with you for a chance to do the right thing, but if you won't listen, then I guess I'll have to...

C: 我一早知道阿仁你是卧底，你以为就凭你那么烂的医术功底，是怎么在他们眼皮子底下没被发现的？还不是我替你遮掩去了！
E: I knew you were a mole from the beginning. You really think you managed to evade their notice right under their noses with your incredible feats of "espionage," brother Yong? Come on, it's me who'd been covering for you! Your medical knowledge was terrible!

C: 阿仁，给个机会我，我想做个好人……
E: Please, just give me a chance to do the right thing, Yong...

C: 看来，我不得不消灭你了。
E: Looks like I'll have to destroy you.

C: 鑫鑫和咪咪有说有笑地离开了。
E: Xinxin and Mimi leave with smiles on their faces.

C: 那，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，能允许小鱼和丹枢大人告别吗？上一次，小鱼就没来得及说一声再见。
E: But before that... Can I bid farewell to Lady Dan Shu, {F#miss}{M#mister}? I didn't have time to bid farewell to her last time...

C: 你认识倒霉的阿幸吗？
E: Have you heard of the jinxed A-Xing?

C: 「小风二世、五世和十三世，享有不被知识支配的清净。」平平无奇的一块墓碑上记载着满满当当的一大家子，令你咋舌。
E: "Xiaofeng the Second, Fifth, and Thirteenth all enjoyed the purity of not being subjugated by knowledge." You are left speechless at how the names, enough for a huge family, fill up this plain and ordinary tombstone.

C: 你这地方太荒凉了。
E: This place is too bleak for you.

C: 别别别！
E: No, please don't!

C: 你什么都不会做的，但是…你可以随时回来。
E: You're not doing anything, but... you can also come back any time you want.

C: 鼓发出了一连串打击乐声。无论触感还是外形，它都表现得像一面普通的鼓…你沉浸在节奏中，忘我地拍打着鼓面。
E: The drum erupts into a wave of percussion. Everything about this drum from texture to shape seems completely normal... You lose yourself in the rhythm and continue banging on the drum.

C: 宝箱变成了…一个皮皮西人，他已经被你的「观察力」彻底打败。
E: The chest transformed into... a Pepeshi. He has been completely defeated by your "powers of perception."

C: 我只是随手开个宝箱…
E: I just wanted to open the chest...

C: 那个人可惹不起…
E: You don't want to get on his bad side...

C: 盛典的筹办已经完成，随时可以进行。您做好准备了吗？
E: The preparations for your grand ceremony are complete and we can proceed at any time. Are you prepared?

C: （用球棒殴打！）
E: (Hit it with a baseball bat!)

C: 感谢您的好心肠。我会再捋一捋线索，希望您能去周边的目击者那儿走访一遭，看看有没有重要的线索。
E: Thank you for your kindness. I'll try to piece the clues together. Would you be able to go and interview the witnesses around here and see whether they have any important leads?

C: 我的朋友很少…
E: I don't have many friends...

C: 所以桶王降下祂的神体，只要把钱投进这个铁桶，祂就会代你承受对应的苦难。
E: That's why the King of Cans made THEIR holy body descend. You just need to insert your money into this iron can, and THEY will bear the suffering on your behalf.

C: 伟大的桶王啊，让我变成铁桶吧！
E: Oh, mighty King of Cans. Turn me into an iron can!

C: 梦泡电影看多了，真以为你一个人能打过我们流梦帮？
E: You've been watchin' too many dream bubble movies! Ya really think one person can beat the Dreamflux Gang?

C: 识相的{F#小妞}{M#小子}，期待你的下次光临。
E: We look forward to your next visit, smart {F#girl}{M#boy}.

C: 经你这么一说，我终于想明白了，太感谢你了！
E: After talkin' to ya, I finally know what to do. I'm so grateful!

C: 知更鸟？是你吗？
E: Robin? Is that you?

C: …谢谢你，让我看看吧。
E: ...Thank you. I will have a look.

C: 没问题，我就是想买。
E: No problem. I'm keen to buy it.

C: 身后传来熟悉的声音，你意识到自己的违法行为再次被抓住了。
E: A familiar voice comes from behind you. You realize that you've been busted once again for breaking the law.

C: 好的，请稍等。
E: Understood. One moment, please.

C: 姬子握住了你的手，体温传来的温暖令你回过神来。
E: Himeko holds your hand, the warmth from her own restoring you to your senses.

C: 是，魂停大人。
E: Yes, Judge Hunting.

C: 这本书有什么特殊之处吗？
E: What's so special about this book?

C: 说到底还是想打我？
E: So, at the end of the day, you still want to get back at me?

C: 我感觉有东西一直跟着我们。
E: I feel like something's following us.

C: 所以，我在想这里其实也没有别人，我们是不是可以……
E: But since there's no one else in the area, perhaps we can...

C: …不知道，我看这里就只有我。
E: ...No idea. I only see myself here.

C: 你目所能及之处都是集装箱对吧？这是幽囚狱存放证物的仓库。
E: You see all these freight containers around us? This warehouse is where the Shackling Prison stores all the articles that were used as evidence in their cases.

C: 用机巧鸟不就直接能飞过来吗？
E: Couldn't you have flown here with the cycrane?

C: 你俩要不先统一下意见？
E: Why don't I give you a moment to get on the same page?

C: 所以，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，我想请你帮我个小忙。
E: So, {F#miss}{M#mister}, we wanted you to help us with a little favor.

C: 仁科你瞧，就说这小家伙是咱的救星！
E: See, Renke? I told you they were our savior!

C: （没见过啊，不会是啥领导吧……）
E: (I've never seen {M#him}{F#her} before. {M#He's}{F#She's} not some kind of leadership, is {M#he}{F#she}...)

C: 他要放炮。
E: He wants me to fire the cannons.

C: 怎么？我一直都是用手机。
E: So? I watch everything on my phone.

C: 而且老夫还突然感应到，门外有位高手。
E: Plus, I can sense that there is a powerful someone behind that door right now.

C: 总之看我兄弟两人强强联手，救回爷爷吧！
E: Just sit back and watch our powerful combination as we save our grandpa!

C: 算了算了…孙子？孙子何在？快点再来个孙子！莫要辱没了我家的门风！
E: Forget it... Grandson? Where are you, grandson? I need another grandson! I cannot allow our family to be disgraced like this!

C: 军爷！快把我抓起来吧！我投降，我自首！这老头找了一帮子精神病，用车轮战来轮番折磨我啊！
E: Sir! Please, take me away! I surrender, I confess! This old man sent an army of crazy people to come and torture me one after another!

C: 你专注地望向讲台，如饥似渴地聆听着，仿佛沙漠中偶遇绿洲的旅人，不肯放过每一滴知识的甘霖。
E: You focus your gaze on the lectern, listening intently like a voracious learner, as if you are a traveler who stumbles upon an oasis in the desert, greedily gulping every drop of knowledge.

C: 嘿嘿，谬赞谬赞~商业机密不便透露，不过同学你要是实在感兴趣，「财富学院服务套餐」了解一下？
E: Heh-heh, flattering will not get you trade secrets, you know? But if you're truly interested, care to learn more about the Fortune Academy Service Package?

C: 这是…钟表小子？！
E: This is... Clockie!?

C: ——全剧终。
E: ...The end.

C: 我们找过来一看，没想到圣烛还有再度点燃的一天，实在是令人怀念。
E: We came to take a look again and didn't expect to see the candle lit once more. Really takes us back.

C: 莫说这些，莫说这些，来来来，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，顺手从宴会上带了些吃的喝的，你也尝尝，就当是为我们的老朋友共同举杯吧。
E: Let's not talk about that. Come on, {F#young lady}{M#young fellow}, I brought some food and drink from the banquet. Try some. Let's just treat this as a toast to old friends.

C: 不远处的商铺传来阵阵骚乱声——
E: A commotion can be heard from a nearby shop...

C: 诶，这位同学，请留步！这里是瑟希斯的「圣烛」，不容他人亵渎。
E: Wait! Please, hold! This is Cerces' holy candle. No one is to violate it.

C: 你喜欢通过答题为自己领取一个标签——如果这个标签不够恰当，你甚至会考虑重新测试，直到拿到够酷的那个！
E: You love collecting labels for yourself by answering the questions in the assessment — and if that label isn't appropriate enough, you'll even consider re-doing the assessment until you get the coolest label!

C: 似乎也没那么成功…难道……
E: It doesn't seem to be that successful... Is it possible that...

C: 不要，我怕黑。
E: Don't. I'm terrified of the dark.

C: 更何况，这城中擅长玩弄悖论的何止是本狮？都是在广场、街头和法庭里学来的吼！
E: Moreover, I am not the only one adept at paradoxical plays in this city. I learned it from the plaza, streets, and justice court!

C: 墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
E: There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.

C: 哦吼？有趣，有趣，看来你不是个倒霉蛋，就是个恶作剧高手。无论是哪一种，都让本狮非常愉悦啊，哈哈哈……
E: Oh-ho? Interesting, interesting. You're either an unlucky fool or a master prankster. Either way, I am highly amused, hahaha...

C: 你想起在开拓经历中胖揍过的无数公司职员，他们各个都带着一副「聪慧而隐忍」的面庞。
E: You recall the countless IPC employees you beat to a pulp along your trailblazing expedition. All of them had a "wise yet restrained" face on them.

C: 咬不到手的狮子，就只能急得干瞪眼啦！
E: A lion that can't bite a hand can only simmer in rage!

C: 呜呜，还请缇宝大人不要再说了，长这么高，也不是我能决定的。到底是哪个没眼光的工匠把我造成这样的啊！
E: Boohoo, please stop it, Lady Tribbie. It was never my choice to be stuck at this height. It was some second-rate craftsman who made me this way!

C: 哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！
E: O-ho? Even those in pursuit of wisdom may find it out of their reach. The ones who abhor wisdom might never even have a glimpse of it.

C: 罪恶之人就藏在他们当中。勇士，请指出唯一的那位罪人吼！
E: The guilty is lurking among them. Warrior, find out who the murderer is!

C: 吼吼！确实，桥梁的筑造者最有可能动手脚，出了事故嫌疑最大的肯定也是他——但很遗憾，答错了吼！
E: Ho-ho! Indeed, the bridge builder is most likely to have tampered with it, and he would be the prime suspect if anything suspicious happens. However, that is a wrong answer!

C: 公司开发的软件加密核都嘎嘣硬，和嚼石头似的。
E: The encrypted software developed by IPC has stone-like hardness for chewing.

C: 查杀快完成了，求你早点回来！
E: The check is almost finished. Please come back soon!

C: 后半段是……
E: The second half of it is...

C: 布匹上写着一行笔走游龙的仙舟文：古法草木染实验•零零肆号（低温冷却法）。暂借冰箱一用，抱歉。
E: There is a Xianzhou language note on the fabric written in bold, flowing calligraphy: Legacy Plant Dye experiment: #Nil-Nil-Four (low temperature cooling method). Using your refrigerator for a while, sorry.

C: 呼呼。你是谁？我的灵火已经所剩无几了，不能分给你！
E: *crackle* Who are you? My spiritual flame is dwindling. Sharing is off the table!

C: 钱是万物之源…
E: Money makes the world go round...

C: 天啊，你居然让我讨好别人？你简直是在侮辱我！
E: Are you telling me to kiss someone else's derrière? Humiliating!

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 怎么能不给贵宾面子呢？家族的脸都被你给丢尽了！
E: How could you ignore the gesture of the VIP? You'd be such a disgrace to The Family!

C: 用道理劝说他。
E: Talk some sense into the person.

C: 将他殴打至不敢再犯为止！
E: We need to beat him up until he promises to never repeat the mistake!

C: 哦！拥抱秩序！
E: Oh! Embrace Order!

C: 这位好心人，能打发点吗？老夫已经好久没开过荤了。
E: Kind-hearted stranger, spare something? I haven't had a decent meal in a while.

C: 说吧，要多少钱？
E: How much?

C: 有拜师礼物吗？
E: If I accept you as my disciple, are you going to offer me a present?

C: 现在的我已经不是过去的我了，我现在能感受到每一片垃圾的声音…它们在呼唤我！
E: However, I am no longer the same trashcan of before. I can sense the voices of every piece of trash... They are calling out to me!

C: 往垃圾桶里投垃圾。
E: Pour trash into the trashcan.

C: 然后是中间…咪发迷对冒险故事很感兴趣，给它讲什么好呢？
E: Now for the middle... Mifamem's into adventure stories. What should you tell them?

C: 接着替白厄回信吧！
E: Keep replying for Phainon!

C: 迷迷！
E: Mem!

C: 可惜，你还以为能召唤出小精灵呢。
E: Aww, and you really thought it'd summon a sprite or something.

C: 风铃发出了悦耳的声音。你知道，昔涟的魔法已经用完了，什么都变不出来——
E: The wind chime sings a lovely tune. You know it now that Cyrene's magic is gone. There's nothing left to summon.

C: <size=28>迷——！</size>
E: <size=28>Memememe!</size>

C: 怎么，难道是…害羞了？来尝试一下嘛。
E: What's the matter? Are you... shy? Come on over and give it a try.

C: 昔涟对着小稻草人捣鼓了半天，来看看她的劳动成果吧。
E: Cyrene fiddled with the little scarecrow for a long time, let's take a look at her handiwork.

C: 果然，在这里呀……
E: I knew it'd be here...

C: 昔涟从海边找到的一枚缎带，与她身上所佩者模样相同，只是看上去有些磨旧，好似缝埋着岁月的低语。
E: A ribbon Cyrene found by the sea — just like the one she wears now, though this one's rather worn out. It feels like it's been sewn together by the whispers of time itself.

C: 你看，三千万世…是不是感觉离「永远」已经很近了？人家可是确确实实失去了这么久的昔涟的记忆哦。
E: You see, thirty million lifetimes... Feels pretty close to forever, right? That's how much of Cyrene's memories I've lost.

C: （指向奥赫玛的方向）
E: (Point in the direction of Okhema)

C: ——愿塔兰顿给予他与牺牲相等价的馈赠。愿他的灵魂安息。
E: ...May Talanton reward him with a gift fitting of his sacrifice. May his soul rest in peace.

C: 悬锋城。
E: Castrum Kremnos.

C: …去往「拉冬城」的那个。
E: ...The one bound for Ladon.

C: …去往「埃普斯」的那个。
E: ...The one bound for Epos.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all I wanted to know.

C: 埃普斯实在太过遥远，开「门」的消耗巨大。愿雅努斯为它指引前路。
E: Epos lies too far beyond our reach. Opening the "Passage" there demanded too great a toll. May Janus light that foal's way.

C: 啊！
E: Ahhhh!

C: 如…如果还能被星神大人所注视的话……嘿嘿……
E: If... If I am really being watched by the great Aeons... Heheh...

C: 小友莫不是{NICKNAME}？想必你也是受到「复兴宣言」感召，前来应征奇物收容志愿者。
E: If it isn't the infamous {NICKNAME}? Surely you are here to volunteer in the Curio Collection Squad, inspired by the Declaration of Revival.

C: 奇物再收容小队？
E: Curio Collection Squad?

C: 还有些事想问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 我是那位年轻有位的星神学者莱斯莉的妹妹，目前在密卷科担任科员，我叫埃美丽。
E: I'm the younger sister of Lesley the prodigy Aeon scholar. I am Emily. I currently work as a researcher at the Department of Insight.

C: 看你的穿着不属于任何一个科室…呼，放心了。
E: You don't look like you belong to any department... Phew, I'm relieved.

C: 你也给我整一个奇物呗。
E: Give me a Curio, too.

C: 你这种刚来空间站的新人，很多时候做事儿是糊涂的。多和我温天翁聊聊，也算是借鉴一点老人的经验嘛！
E: As a newcomer on the space station, it's normal that you'll make mistakes sometimes. Chat with me to gain some experience from an old fellow!

C: 和你扯闲篇，够劲儿，开心！年轻人，下次有空再来，别的没有，故事管够！
E: It was fun chatting with you. I liked it! Come here again when you have time, kiddo. I might not have much in my possession, but I sure have more than enough stories to share.

C: 现在的年轻科员，又静不下性子来做整理的活儿。哎，最后还得是我这把老骨头，来收拾残局。
E: Young researchers nowadays never have the patience to organize things. Old people like me always have to stay behind to clean up the mess.

C: 如果等到之后，就连温天翁那个结实的身板都忙得受不了，那我再来麻烦你这位小年轻吧。
E: If even someone as strong as Wen Tianweng couldn't handle this, I guess I'll have to seek help from you.

C: 不打扰你工作了。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 抱歉，我刚才专心在安排工作，没有注意到你过来了。
E: Sorry, I was busy arranging work for my team. Didn't notice you were here.

C: 黑塔女士没拿你怎么着吧？
E: Did Madam Herta give you some attitude?

C: 噢，不影响他为我办事就行。
E: Doesn't matter. As long as he keeps running errands for me.

C: 平时人挺老实的，吩咐他做点小事也很麻利。
E: Honest fella, does what he's told.

C: 算了，我早该知道的，我这种过时的口味，为什么我还要抱有一丝希望呢？
E: Forget it. I should have known better. As an outdated snack, I shouldn't have harbored any more hopes of being liked.

C: 可恶，你不记得我啦？你连尊贵的芝士流心大人都忘了？
E: I can't believe you don't remember me! Have you forgotten about Lord Molten Cheese Tart too?

C: 吉奥里亚是哪位神明，大家不会不知道吧？
E: Surely everyone knows who Georios is, yes?

C: 你这预言是不是自己编的啊。
E: Did you spin this prophetic yarn yourself?

C: 搁这刮痧呢？
E: This is for scratching backs or something?

C: 智慧是最重要的美德，看来这位朋友对我们的论辩格外感兴趣。若是如此，不妨再次参与到讨论中来，让在场各位听听你的新想法？
E: Intellect is the most crucial of virtues. It seems that our friend here has taken an interest in our dispute. If that is the case, why not join us in debate once more and share your views with us all?

C: 眼睛看不见，手摸不着，难道就是不存在？若是如此，那世间将无物存在，因为所有事物都处在流变当中，我们也无法谈论任何内容。
E: Are you saying that if I can neither see it with my eyes nor feel it with my hands, then it does not exist? If that were the case, nothing would exist in this world, as everything is in a constant state of flux. There would be nothing for us to discuss.

C: 察觉到危险，波瑟芬妮跟随哈德斯出城避难，却没想到自己的丈夫也参与其中。
E: Sensing potential danger, Possephone followed Hadez out of the city to escape and had no idea that her husband was actually caught up in everything.

C: 哎——你听说了吗，拉达曼被卫兵带走了。
E: Hey... Did you hear about Rhadaman getting arrested by the guards?

C: 哎…若真是这般简单就好了……
E: Oh... I wish it were that simple...

C: 你的钱袋——为了和本地人打成一片，你特意兑换了一些实体的利衡币——已经不翼而飞了。
E: Your money pouch — you exchanged some physical Balance Coins to try to fit in with the locals — has vanished.

C: 是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
E: Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}...

C: 我不确定…但这种可能性很高。
E: I'm not sure... but it seems highly likely.

C: 你突然觉得胸口有点不舒服——就像是衣服浸了水、沉甸甸黏在身上的那种感觉……
E: You suddenly feel a pressure on your chest — like your clothes suddenly all became drenched in water and are sticking suffocatingly to your skin...

C: 喏，就眼前这玩意呗。
E: Well, the thing right in front of you.

C: 今天中午连午饭都没时间吃，哎，快忙晕了。
E: I didn't even have time to eat my lunch today. *Sigh* I'm crazy busy these days.

C: 你的简报里怎么没有废话。
E: Why is there never any time for nonsense in your briefings?

C: 别这么严苛嘛，我看我们科室的孩子都挺不错呀。
E: Don't be so harsh. I think the youngsters in our department are all great.

C: 你别打岔！总之就是突然感到很孤独很心寒，所以我就去找「螺中笑声」了。
E: Don't cut me off! Anyway, I suddenly felt so lonely and cold, so I went looking for the Crackup Conch.

C: 可这是王的意志！你要公然违背万敌殿下的命令吗？
E: But this is the will of our king! Are you going to openly defy Lord Mydei's orders?

C: 去死吧——泰坦——
E: Die— Titan!

C: 哦——有道理啊。
E: Oh... Fair enough!

C: 尊敬的，「一日塔兰顿」，{NICKNAME}大人，公正的裁断，请做出。
E: Honorable One-Day Talanton, {M#Sir}{F#Madam} {NICKNAME}, please deliver your just verdict.

C: 可要是你说的属实，她的名字和相貌应该早就记录在贵宾册里了。
E: But if what you're saying is true, her name and appearance should already be recorded in the VIP register.

C: 这边…真的能上去吗？
E: Can we really go up here?

C: 救命…我怕是不行了……
E: Help... I don't think I can make it...

C: 原来只是恐高吗…
E: So it's just a fear of heights?

C: 你们怎么在这儿？
E: What are you guys doing here?

C: 我真心想要你的签名了。
E: I'd love to get your autograph now, seriously.

C: 我们来了！
E: We have arrived!

C: 但愿再创世后，他们真的能够站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点。到那时候，你们也一定要去看看「奥凯纳斯运动会」的盛况啊！
E: I hope that after Era Nova, they truly rise to become the finest merchants in Okhema. When that happens, you absolutely must witness the grandeur of the Okeanas Games!

C: 任意外出原本是非常危险的，我本来计划遇到怪物就回去，好在——感谢刻法勒的庇护，一路上我们都没有碰到怪物。
E: It's extremely dangerous to wander out recklessly, so I intended for us to return the moment we encounter any monsters. But thanks to Kephale's divine providence, we didn't cross paths with any.

C: 黎明机器…好大，好近，它会不会从天上砸下来？砸中我们？
E: Dawn Machine... So big. Will it fall on us?

C: 那你，却又来祈祷了一次…？
E: Then why did you come to pray again?

C: 当务之急，是分头把他找到。{NICKNAME}贵客，实在不好意思，得拜托你也搭把手了。
E: The most urgent matter now is to split up and find him. {NICKNAME}, I'm terribly sorry, but I'll have to ask for your help with this too.

C: 委托名「这歌声的源头在哪里」，推演结果是「在那深处」。
E: Request: "Where does this song come from?" - Extrapolation Result: "From the depths."

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 一口闷！
E: Bottom's up!

C: 那倒也是。
E: Indeed it has.

C: 哪有这么大的糖！
E: I don't think they make candy that size...

C: 虎克觉得，列车被很多星星包围着，就像是在糖果中穿梭的移动游乐园……
E: All these stars surrounding us... The Express is like a traveling theme park warp-jumping through candy...

C: 虎克想邀请帕姆到磐岩镇来玩，但虎克刚知道帕姆不能下列车……
E: I wanted to invite Pom-Pom to come visit Boulder Town, but I just found out Pom-Pom can't leave the Express...

C: 有了这么多好点子，感觉真是越来越难挑了，让我好好斟酌一下……
E: It's hard to say which name I like the best — they all have something about them. I'll have to think about it...

C: 这种感觉对于一个从没离开过贝洛伯格的人来说，真的很神奇。
E: It's an amazing feeling for someone who's never left Belobog before.

C: 那…那只是那帮家伙的玩笑话！你不要当真，也不要跟着他们学！
E: I... Th—Those guys aren't serious when they refer to me like that, y'know. Anyway, please don't start using it yourself too...

C: 从食物下手或许有帮助……
E: It might help to start with food...

C: 你叹什么气！
E: What's with the sighing?

C: 常来列车叨扰各位，这里有些薄礼，聊表谢意。
E: I hope my presence here has not proved a nuisance to you all. Here, a few meager gifts as tokens of my appreciation.

C: 当然，我也可以选择加入公司，或者巡海游侠，甚至利用一下泯灭帮，只要能让我奔向银河，走哪条路都可以。
E: Of course, I could have also joined the IPC, the Galaxy Rangers, or even the Annihilation Gang. Whatever road takes me across the galaxy is the one I'm willing to travel on.

C: 姬子的咖啡啊…之前本小姐来列车时喝过…跟药水一个味道，我不喜欢。
E: Himeko's coffee? I tried it when I came aboard the Express — yuck! Tastes like medicine.

C: 有姬子的咖啡。
E: We've got Himeko's coffee.

C: 听上去是有科学原理的。
E: Sounds pretty scientific.

C: 不过，你应该也知道了，现在的她已经不是原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>号了。
E: But you probably also know she is no longer Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>.

C: 你喜欢猫吗？
E: Do you like cats?

C: 你能为我提供什么帮助吗？
E: How can you help me?

C: 但既然你主动发问，我还是为你解答——毕竟我生而为人的职责，就是解答他人的困惑！
E: But since you asked, I will answer — After all, my life's duty is to dispel others' confusion!

C: 或许这就是所说的，由内而外，无法控制吧？
E: Maybe it's just a part of me that's beyond my control.

C: 你看到我们身旁那些粉丝的目光没？那炽热灼灼的眼神，就是被化解苦难之后的最好证明！
E: Do you see the burning gazes of the fans around us? Those passionate looks of rapture are the best evidence of having had their pains soothed!

C: 我没什么想要问的了。
E: I don't have anything else to ask.

C: 所以当他讲完自己的深刻反省以及对我的歉意之后，我一下子没能说出来一句话。
E: I couldn't even say anything when he stated how deeply he had reflected on himself and how sorry he was.

C: 他说，有一柄「歼星大剑」，足有一百二十尺，唯有巨大的机器人才能挥舞得动。
E: He mentioned a <unbreak>120</unbreak>-foot sword called Star Bane that only a giant robot could wield.

C: 「歼星大剑」…嗯，回去讲给将军听听，也许他会愿意请工造司试试看吧。
E: Star Bane... Hmm, once I get back I'll talk to the general about it. Perhaps he'd be willing to get the Artisanship Commission involved?

C: 老师，你们的列车长帕姆老师，到底是什么来头啊？
E: Where did the Express' conductor come from?

C: 没打扰你吧？
E: Am I interrupting anything?

C: 研究课题进度如何？
E: How's your research?

C: 卡波特做了什么？
E: What did Capote do?

C: 那些东西世玲早就安排对应负责人进行回收了，你别瞎操心。这件事就当翻页了！以后不准再提了！
E: I already got the relevant parties to take back those Curios. Don't you worry about it. Just treat it as water under the bridge! Don't mention it ever again!

C: 被你这么一问，我脑子里还真糊涂起来了。一下子好多事儿都冲出来了。真是不能提，不能想啊。
E: Now that you brought it up, I am actually confused. I just remembered so many things all at once. The past really doesn't bear being remembered.

C: 真不用我带着你转转？
E: You don't want me to show you around?

C: 可以试试看。
E: Nothing to lose.

C: 谢谢你的建议，但我想自己还是更擅长情报官的工作——也正由于这个原因，我实在没办法抛下工作去随意旅行……
E: Thanks for your suggestion, but I think I'm more suited to be an Intelligence Officer... Besides, I can't just drop my work and go travelling...

C: 可你还有很多工作吧？
E: But you have lots of work, right?

C: 下层区最近太平得很，用不上这些东西。所以我寻思还不如分给列车组，指不定能派上些用场。
E: It's been pretty peaceful in the Underworld recently, so we don't have a lot of use for this stuff anymore. I figured I might as well share it all with the Express Crew.

C: 风景还不错……
E: The view is not bad...

C: 长知识了。
E: You learn something new every day.

C: <unbreak>4567</unbreak>。
E: <unbreak>4567</unbreak>.

C: 把<unbreak>73153</unbreak>分解质因数。
E: Prime factors of <unbreak>73,153</unbreak>.

C: （疑惑的声音）
E: (Confused noises)

C: 哈？和你有什么关系？
E: Ha? What's it got to do with you?

C: 当时听闻传说中游云天君的虹车抵达罗浮，我心说无论怎样都得偷闲来瞧瞧。只是先前公务繁忙，抽不开身。眼下难得有空，便不请自来了，诸位莫要见怪。
E: When I heard that the Cloudstrider's legendary chromatic echelon had arrived at the Luofu, I knew I'd have to sneak over and take a look for myself... a pity that official matters prevented me for so long. I hope my unannounced visit won't cause you any trouble.

C: 哈哈，神策府的陈设初见之下确有几分雄阔肃杀的意思。但我看神策府，神策府看我，翻来覆去看上几百年，怕是都互生倦怠了。
E: Haha, the Seat of Divine Foresight may seem imposing at first, but having stared at it — and it back at me — for hundreds of years... we've grown rather tired of one another.

C: 他好得很。
E: I'd say he's having a great time.

C: 但同样是那一天，我认识了你，还认识了捉鬼小队，这算是好运的象征吧。
E: But it was also the same day I met you and got to know the ghost-hunting squad... That must be a sign of good luck, I suppose.

C: 欢迎随时来列车做客。
E: Welcome aboard the Astral Express.

C: 至于螺丝咕姆…是位不错的贵族。只是他所在意的领域，与我的研究目的并不相投。
E: As for Screwllum... he's a good-hearted noble. It's just that his area of interest doesn't quite align with my research goals.

C: 敢于承认这点，你已经比大多数人有悟性了。
E: The fact that you can admit this already indicates you have more insight than most.

C: 「白日梦酒店」太大了，我打扫客房总是会犯错…有机会一定要向列车长讨教打理列车的方法。
E: Yeah, keeping up with the cleaning at "The Reverie" can be tough due to its sheer size. I wonder if the conductor might share some organizing tips with me.

C: 哈？催吐！他宝贝的，原来是剂猛药啊…
E: Huh? Vomit-inducing!? Holy forkeroni. So, it's a powerful drug...

C: 最近想根据性格给自己打造一个全新面具，换一副样子玩玩。有没有什么推荐？
E: I've been thinking about making a brand-new mask based on some trait. You know, switch it up a little. Any recommendations?

C: 我相信总有一天，她现在的经历会成为独一无二的回忆。
E: I trust that one day, her present experiences will become unique memories.

C: 未来一片光明！
E: My future is as bright as the sun!

C: 希望这次的占卜能对你有所帮助。不过，运势占卜的结果仅供参考，只能作为当下的建议。可不要让自己陷入思维的怪圈哦~
E: I hope this divination was of help to you. Of course, the results of this fortune-telling are merely a reference — nothing more than suggestions for now. Do not become trapped in your own thoughts.

C: 是熟悉的感觉…
E: How familiar...

C: 出名的朱明糕点，大多以咸甜和烟熏口味为主，所以我对这种纯粹的甜香毫无抵抗之力……
E: The pastries that the Zhuming is known for are mostly salty-sweet or smokey in flavor. So there's no way I can resist this kind of pure sweetness.

C: 去吧，成为宇宙商人！
E: Go! Become a galactic merchant!

C: 呸，它的话我才不信呢。你是不知道吧，这家伙本名叫「芝士流心」，土得很，装什么见过世面的样子，哼……
E: Bah, I don't believe it. You don't know, do you? This guy's name is "Molten Cheese Tart," is incredibly uncultured, but likes to pretend that it's seen the world. Hmph...

C: 你又来了啊……
E: Here you are again...

C: 那你倒是写上地址呀——这人怎么没头没脑的？
E: Why isn't the recipient's address provided? The sender is so careless.

C: 我跟你说，我可是本地最大的中介商！没有我卖不掉的房子。
E: Trust me, I am the best local property agent. There hasn't been a house that I couldn't sell!

C: …啊！可恶，又让它跑了，都怪你——噢，原来是你啊。找我有什么事吗？
E: ...ah! Dang it. It got away again. It's all your fault — Oh! It's you. Did you need something?

C: 这垃圾桶很特别吗？
E: What's so special about the trashcan?

C: 我被下水道的声音吓了一跳。
E: Just got startled by what sounded like things going through the sewer.

C: 而且演音乐剧是我从小的梦想…就这么放弃太可惜了，我还得再试试。
E: Plus, musicals have always been my passion... I don't want to simply give up like this. I still want to give it a go.

C: 嗯嗯～那小女子就继续开嗓了…啊！这部新剧还没开始公演呢，可不能泄露出去。你瞧我，这种事都能忘记~
E: Okay, I shall continue warming up my voice... Oh, no! The play isn't open to the public yet. I'd better not spoil it. I am so forgetful!

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 趁着年轻，多加把劲。
E: It's good to push yourself when you are young.

C: 工作加油，再见。
E: Good luck with your work!

C: …似乎有点印象。
E: ...It rings a bell.

C: 没错！互助会的成员都是受骗经验丰富的老前辈，我们团结在一起，为的就是共同总结经验教训，帮助市民提高防范意识！
E: That's right! The members of the Association are all former victims. We are united to share what we have learned and help the public by raising awareness!

C: 走开，走开！你再不走，我就让银鬃铁卫来逮捕你了！
E: Get out! If you don't leave, I'll have Silvermane Guards come and arrest you!

C: 「法律问题」？你可太看得起贝洛伯格的老百姓了。他们来找我解决的问题和法律可一点都不沾边，无非就是些家长里短的抱怨。
E: Legal issues? You think too highly of the people of Belobog. What they come to me for has nothing to do with the law. It's all complaints about daily life.

C: 实不相瞒，我亲眼看着大守护者…
E: To tell you the truth, I saw with my own eyes that the Supreme Guardian...

C: 二十多的小伙当大官，五十岁的老头儿干后勤……
E: Get a <unbreak>20</unbreak>-year-old boy to be an official, get a <unbreak>50</unbreak>-year-old geezer to do logistics...

C: 你误会了。
E: You misunderstand.

C: 先自我介绍一下，我是史考特，「搏击俱乐部」的老板。我听他们说，你身手特别好…啧，看你这副模样，卖相倒也不错。
E: Let me introduce myself. I'm Scott, the owner of the Fight Club. I heard that you are very good at fighting... Hmm, you also look pretty good.

C: 咳，扯远了，全当我在自言自语吧。你就当没听见，行吧？
E: Ahem, I've said too much. Just consider this as me thinking out loud....pretend you heard nothing, okay?

C: 这小姑娘话里有话啊…
E: She is referring to something else...

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}今天是特意来看阿丽娜的吗？好开心喔～
E: Are you here to see me? I'm so happy!

C: 大家都知道我的脾气，时间长了也都习惯了我的生活方式…说到底，我又没碍着谁的事，也没挡着谁升官发财，对不？
E: They all know how I am and over time they have become used to my lifestyle... After all, I'm not in anyone's way, am I?

C: 我…我以为你也是来讨债的……
E: I... I thought you were here to collect a debt, too...

C: 你老爹生病了？
E: Is your dad sick?

C: 总之就是这样啦。你还有别的问题吗？
E: Anyway, that's all. Do you have any other questions?

C: 上层区就不一样了。听说那里有一家远近闻名的「机械屋」——我老早就想去那里看看了！搞不好在那里能弄到我想要的「逻辑语言中枢」，还有其它珍稀的零件……
E: It's different in the Overworld. I heard there's a famous "workshop" up there — I've always wanted to see it! Maybe I can get the language module I've been looking for up there — or other rare parts...

C: 还能折现？
E: I can exchange that for cash?

C: 真要是这么回事啊，到时候我就歇业几天，收拾行李到上层区探亲去！哈哈哈。
E: If that's the case, I'm gonna take a few days off, pack up my things, and go up to the Overworld to see some family! Hahaha.

C: 你为什么想抓洞螈？
E: Why do you want to catch olms?

C: 希儿是个行动派，她在互相推诿的会议桌上没法发挥自己的强项。她清楚自己最擅长什么…作为朋友、战友，我理应支持她的选择。
E: Seele is a doer. She can't do what she does best at the negotiation table. She knows where her strengths lie... And as a friend and fellow fighter, I support her choice.

C: 你已经成长很多了，希儿。
E: You have already grown a lot, Seele.

C: 不过，贝洛伯格的命运尚且掌握在它的孩子们手中，没有什么比这更值得欣慰的了。
E: Although, there is nothing more comforting than knowing that the fate of Belobog still lays in the hands of its children.

C: 你们什么时候有演出？
E: When's the next gig?

C: 估计你也不是来修东西的…啊，我这不是在抱怨，别误会～
E: I'll hazard a guess that you didn't come looking for repairs... I'm not complaining. Don't get me wrong.

C: 茉莉小姐最近如何？
E: How's Molly?

C: 茉莉这姑娘干起活来毫不含糊呢，还对各种机械结构有自己独到的见解……
E: Molly's such a good worker, and she forms her own insight into various mechanical structures...

C: 嗯…还是被你看出来了。
E: Ah... you can see right through me.

C: 最近都在忙什么？
E: What have you been up to lately?

C: 我这里的一份资料显示：自从这些黑衣人驻扎下来后，造物之柱的工程效率整体提升了近<unbreak>40</unbreak>个百分点。
E: There is a report here that shows productivity on the Pillars of Creation construction project has increased by nearly forty percent since these people in black got stationed here.

C: 我理解了。
E: I understand.

C: 鼹鼠党有死对头吗？
E: Do The Moles have any archnemeses?

C: 年轻人嘛，有一腔热血总不是坏事——哪怕以后没能在上层混出头来，回头想想也是一段无悔的经历。
E: You know young 'uns, it helps that they are brimming with passion. Who knows when they'll make it someday in the Overworld? At least they won't reminisce and be filled with regret.

C: 我相信她能让贝洛伯格重现封锁前的样貌，甚至做得更好。毕竟那个叫「星核」的玩意已经被你们解决了，对吧？
E: I believe she will restore Belobog to when it was before the blockade, or perhaps even better. I mean, you all already took care of that Stellaron thing, didn't you?

C: …嗯哼？
E: ...Uh-huh?

C: 好，我清醒了。你特意跑到雪原里找我是有什么事吗？
E: All right, I'm awake. What brings you all the way here to the Snow Plains?

C: 你是极地探险家？
E: So, you're an extreme environments explorer?

C: 佩拉是我的好朋友。我们在贝洛伯格士官学校读书的时候就认识了。
E: She's a good friend of mine. We go way back to our days at the Belobog Cadet School.

C: 也不知道她将来会选择什么道路…啊，要是能考上士官学院就好了！从那地方毕业的，各个都是人才……
E: I wonder what path she will take in the future... Ah, it would be great if she could make it into Cadet School! All graduates from there have promising futures...

C: 据说就是他们把「便携式通讯装置」——哦，就是手机啦——带来了这颗星球，但显然他们完全没有顾及到「售后服务」。真是不负责任。
E: Rumor has it that they were the ones who brought "portable communicators" — known to us as phones — to this planet. But apparently, they don't care about customer service at all. How irresponsible!

C: 我要去跟托帕告状。
E: I'll report this to Topaz.

C: 对不起，唯独这个真的不能说！
E: I'm sorry, but I just can't spill the beans on that one!

C: 我很想，但贝洛伯格的参赛选手已经有许多了。
E: I'd love to, but there are already too many participants in Belobog.

C: 听见了吗？那是胜利的哼声。
E: Did you hear that? That's the oink of victory.

C: 我算咂摸出味儿了……
E: I can smell something's up...

C: 好像有点意思……
E: Sounds fascinating...

C: 下层上好洞螈肉！
E: Top-shelf Olm meat from the Underworld!

C: 克拉拉小姐…对我们真是太好了！
E: Miss Clara... She's really spoiled us!

C: …你就会这一句了是吗？
E: ...Is that the only thing you know how to say?

C: 转让一张今晚的门票……
E: I'd like to transfer one ticket for tonight...

C: 听说了吗？矿队正在招人……
E: Have you heard? The mining team is hiring...

C: 哎，瞧您这话说的——我这小摊有专门的供货渠道，您尽管放心！
E: Hey, watch what you say — our stall has dedicated supply channels. Rest assured!

C: 壁外冻河鱼肝油！
E: Exterior glacial cod liver oil!

C: 「故乡的星星总是走不准」
E: "O, wandering stars of my hometown so aimless"

C: 五十。
E: Fifty.

C: 哔——啵，发现克拉拉的朋友。开启礼仪模式。
E: Beep-boop. Clara's friend found. Polite mode, on.

C: 前方危险，闲人免入。
E: It's dangerous ahead. No entry.

C: 总有一天，我也要造大机器人。
E: One day, I'll build a giant robot.

C: 你说说看，我可以尽量为你解答。
E: Let's talk, I will do my best to answer your questions.

C: 总之…如果你在参观过程中觉得有些不满，还请你多见谅——这已经是我们能尽到的最大的努力了。
E: Anyway... please understand — if you feel dissatisfied during the tour — this is the best that we can do.

C: 不瞒你说，我现在正在这儿担任志愿导览员呢——当然，也顺便逗逗那位情报官小姑娘——就让我看看能在她眼皮子底下藏到什么时候吧，嘿嘿。
E: To be honest, I'm currently volunteering as a tour guide here. Also, I'm teasing the intelligence officer lady over there... Let's see how long I can hide while within her purview, teehee.

C: 啊…我好像和你见过面——你也是来寻觅希露瓦大人的身影的吗？
E: Ah... I think I've seen you before... Are you here to look for Lady Serval's divine countenance too?

C: 简而言之，就是确保幽囚狱内的犯人待在监禁区域。一旦有犯人敢越雷池半步，我会动用一切手段让他回去。
E: To put things simply, my duty is to ensure all prisoners in The Shackling Prison remain within the prison area. If any one of them were to take even half a step beyond the boundaries of the prison, I am expected to employ any possible measure to force them right back.

C: 我现在就有些问题...
E: I have some questions for you...

C: 不会是故意帮我求了下下签吧？
E: Did you make me pick a dire fortune on purpose?

C: 收破烂的？
E: So you buy trashed items?

C: 后来我才知道，那片遗迹只有四百多年的历史。
E: I later found out that the ruins were actually just four hundred years old.

C: 啧，这些实体书可麻烦了，占着地方，还得每日清理。
E: Tsk, these physical books are such a pain. They take up space and need daily cleaning.

C: 说来也是机缘巧合，刚进来的时候我也一度迷茫，感觉整个人生就要荒废在这个鬼地方了。那愁的我是整日挠头啊，耳朵上的毛都被我挠秃了。
E: It was purely by chance. When I first arrived, I was totally lost. I thought I was going to rot away here for the rest of my life. I would scratch my head in frustration every day until the fur between my ears fell out.

C: 不过最近这市场大环境是一天比一天差了！本来我们集团前景一片光明，不仅交易额节节攀升，集团规模也扩大到了三人……
E: However, the general market conditions have been on the down lately! Originally, our group had a bright future. Our transaction volume was rising, and we even expanded operations and recruited a third person...

C: 只要攒满了这<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「奇功」，我每周就能离开一次幽囚狱了！唉呀妈呀，越想越激动！太温情了，十王司！
E: Once I accumulate <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Outstanding Accolades," I'll be able to leave The Shackling Prison once every week! Darn, I'm feeling excited just thinking about it! The Ten-Lords Commission is truly compassionate!

C: 执事官每天的工作都是什么呀？
E: What does an officer do every day?

C: 不然呢？我爹娘这都有胳膊有腿的，不靠他们靠谁啊？
E: So what? They've got arms and legs to help. Who else could I rely on?

C: 是啊。可惜只有我们觉得惨没用，得司衡大人也觉得惨才行。
E: Sure is. Unfortunately, we're the only ones who think it's a real shame. If only management felt the same way.

C: 枯萎的哪里是枝条啊，明明就是我的血汗钱……
E: What wilts is not the tree branches, but my hard-earned money...

C: 策士是做什么的？
E: What do counselors get up to?

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 哎…真拿你没办法，这有个重大机密，你可千万别外传……
E: *sigh* Alright, fine. Here's some top secret intel, so don't leak it...

C: 而且，您或许有所不知——景元将军他对待我们这些侍卫…可以说是相当宽松。
E: Also, you may not know this, but General Jing Yuan... He can be very lenient with the guards.

C: 想了解工造司…
E: Tell me about the Artisanship Commission...

C: 关于工造司的职责…
E: About the job scope at the Artisanship Commission...

C: 这工作干这么久不枯燥么？
E: Do you not find it boring and monotonous, having worked here so long?

C: 就闲聊到这儿吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat, then.

C: 哎，竟然还有人愿意和我这么个老头子说话…咳咳…人老了以后喝口水都容易呛成肺炎。我这老化的气管…
E: Oh, so there is someone still willing to chat with this old coffin dodger... Ahem... When people get older, they can catch pneumonia just by having a sip of water. My aching aging throat...

C: 怎么？你也对我们埃伊加文明感兴趣？也好，容我给你好好讲讲，也省得你再产生什么刻板印象。
E: Huh? Are you interested in our Aigaian civilization too? That's great. Let me fill you in so you don't formulate any negative stereotypes.

C: 好啦！不谈我的事了。您来找我这幽囚狱主簿，一定是有什么事吧？若是有什么想问的事，请尽管开口。
E: Alright! Enough about me, personally: You're here to see the Shackling Prison's secretary, right? There must be something you need. If you have a question, feel free to ask.

C: 还可以吧。主簿这个工作，其实说重要吧也没那么重要，但是必须有人做这件事。
E: It's acceptable. Perhaps the role of a secretary isn't that important in itself, but someone has to do this work.

C: 而偏偏我还是个过目不忘的人。那一桩桩一件件惨案，对我来说，时时刻刻都犹在眼前。
E: And I am someone who doesn't forget. Each and every tragic case is carved into my mind's eye, there every single moment.

C: 但三百多年过去，我也长大了，观众也看腻了，我也就做不成摇钱树了，唉…后来我就和家里闹掰了。没办法，对他们而言，我已经没有价值了。
E: But three hundred years went by, and I grew up. The audience got bored, and I wasn't that valuable anymore... *sigh* Then, I got estranged from my family. There's nothing for it. To them, I'm worthless.

C: …太卜司这地儿莫不是有点问题，天天都有人问我有什么「最新消息」「内幕消息」的。这究竟是有什么风声了？你们倒是仔细说说，别光问我啊！
E: ...Could it be that there's something wrong with the Divination Commission? People keep asking me day in day out whether I have the "latest news" or "inside scoop." What kind of talk is this? Just be straight up with me, and stop asking all these questions!

C: 好了，没什么事的话以后再聊吧，我手里还有一大堆活儿没做完呢。
E: Okay, if there's nothing else, then let's talk again later. I've still got a mountain of work to get through.

C: 危机总算解除了…
E: The crisis is finally over...

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 您要是听到些什么风声，倒是可以跟我说说，反正我闲着也是闲着嘛。
E: Fill me in if you hear any rumors out there. In any case, I'm just going to be stuck here.

C: 小孩子干这行？
E: They let kids do this?

C: 行呀，客人要是不嫌弃，咱们多聊一会儿也行。不过，要是有其他客人来了的话，我们俩的闲谈就停下吧。
E: Okay, we can keep chatting on if you wish. However, if another customer comes along, I'll have to attend to them.

C: 这么一想，我觉得还是应当回到丹鼎司，继续做这个破医士。也许我什么都做不了，但总比什么都不做要强。
E: At that thought, I decided to remain a healer at the Alchemy Commission. I might not be able to accomplish anything huge, but it's better than nothing.

C: 啊，受不了了，每天唯一的想法就是想逃跑，想逃到外星球去……
E: Ugh, I just can't take it. I spend every day thinking about how to escape to another planet...

C: 那我继续越狱了。
E: Then I'll get back to my jailbreaking.

C: 我并不是在凶你，只是我正准备推演卦象，容不得外人干扰，请见谅。
E: I'm not being mean. I just can't be disturbed when I'm preparing for a hexagrammatic inference. Please don't be bothered by it.

C: 至于阵法的细节，涉及太卜司机密的事…恕我无可奉告。
E: I'm afraid I can't disclose the details of the matrix as it involves confidential information about the Divination Commission.

C: 有点好奇，同僚是如何评价你的？
E: I'm curious about what your colleagues have to say about you.

C: 这金人巷要是打算继续卖破烂，我劝这里的商户赶紧破产算了。
E: If Aurum Alley keeps selling junk like this, those merchants won't be in business for long, at least not if I have anything to say about it.

C: 那算了，我不问了。
E: Fine, never mind then.

C: 每天放生一本日记，只要坚持下去，我身上纠缠的业缘定会散尽，假以时日…嘿嘿……
E: Release a diary book every day. Keep it up, and I'll be purified of my karma. And then... Heehee...

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 最近不外出上门收旧货了，客人要是有什么旧货修理，还得到我这「陈机铺」门店上来。
E: I've stopped heading out to collect used goods. If you have any old gadgets that needs fixing, you'll need to bring them to my Oldies Depot shop.

C: 再说了…您要是真觉得贵，过来瞧瞧也无妨，就当是帮我们掌掌眼嘛，无任欢迎！
E: Besides, if you really think my stuff is too expensive... you're always welcome to stop by, take a look, and help us set a fairer price! You're welcome either way!

C: 你还能变成什么？
E: What else can you transform into?

C: 想在长乐天搞套房子怎么这么难，不想卖就别卖，搞这么多限制干什么！
E: Why is it so hard to buy a place to live in Exalting Sanctum? They can just tell us straight if they don't want to sell. Why do they have so many restrictions instead!?

C: 咦，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，怎么又是你，你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Hey, it's you again, {F#young lady}{M#young man}. What brings you here this time?

C: …我不擅长闲聊，客人有什么事吗？
E: ...I'm not good at small talk, dear customer. What can I do for you?

C: 放心，你的演奏水平很高。
E: Fret not, you are indeed a skilled minstrel.

C: {NICKNAME}，是你啊…本来想着来仙舟还能多个{F#学妹}{M#学弟}，我们的课题组也算后继有人啦。
E: It's you, {NICKNAME}... I initially thought that with a new {F#junior soror}{M#junior frater} on the Xianzhou, our research would have a worthy successor...

C: 什么意思？看不起人是吧？
E: What's that supposed to mean, huh?

C: 像有些细节不够完美的，你别看有瑕疵，但这都是名家大师手工制作，莫说仙舟，便是放眼银河也是只此一件的绝版货。
E: Some fandangles may have flaws in details, but they are genuine products handcrafted by revered artisans and are unique in this Cosmos.

C: 这位化外民小朋友，要不要来看看杂技啊？
E: Want to enjoy an acrobatic show, my Outworlder friend?

C: 好的。请你闭上双眼，在心中默念自己所问之事。
E: I see. Please close your eyes and meditate on the question in your mind.

C: 问吧问吧～不过别聊太久，手头还有点事没结～
E: Ask away! I can't chat long, though. I still have some matters to take care of.

C: 主要是因为在丹鼎司，正常研究实在太束手束脚了嘛！想要复现一些典籍中记录的生物技术和古代药方，得走层层审批～流程繁琐的要命～
E: Mainly because there were too many restrictions around conducting research at the Alchemy Commission. I had to navigate layers and layers of red tape just to replicate some biotech processes and ancient prescriptions recorded in tomes. It's so bureaucratic!

C: 此象得主远离尘世纷扰，悠闲自得。对于你所问之事——不必求而有所得，刻意追求反落了下乘。活在当下寻欢作乐，便自有福缘傍身。切勿为升斗米而折腰，切记功名利禄皆为身外物，平平淡淡才是真。
E: The bearer of this sign is far away from worries and living a carefree life. As for the question in your mind — do not deliberately pursue anything. Live in the moment and everything will be fine. Do not go against your nature for fame and fortune, because these are not what really matters.

C: 你一定是听了别人随意编造的话本故事…这些书都是一个套子，左右不过写些英雄气短、奇遇迭出、儿女情长。
E: I see, you must have listened to those made-up stories. Those fictions are all the same, just dragging on and on about heroic deeds, bizarre adventure, and frivolous love affairs.

C: 平时工作压力大吗？
E: Do you feel stressed out at work?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 原因一：「我们」无法构成威胁。原因二：「我们」具备科研价值。
E: Reason 1: We are not a threat. Reason 2: There is value in studying us for scientific research purposes.

C: 加油呀！你们一定能成功！
E: Good luck! I'm sure you guys can do it!

C: {NICKNAME}，虽然收伏岁阳的任务告一段落。但是…这、这里还不算安全，请你要当心……
E: {NICKNAME}, we have successfully subdued the heliobus for now. However... Th—This place is still not safe, please be cautious...

C: 放心，我的身手你还不了解？
E: Fear not, do you still not realize my skills?

C: 先不聊了。
E: Talk to you later.

C: 没事，我就随便看看。
E: I'm fine, just browsing.

C: 刚才多有不敬，稍等，我这里有些小礼品，您先拿着，不用客气！
E: If I have offended you in any way just now, please, have some of our gratuity here. Just take them! Don't need to be shy!

C: 「六者，窃夺机要。七者，破狱释囚。八者，离间盟契。九者，造作兵祸。十者，倾覆仙舟。」
E: "Six, Illicit Espionage. Seven, Prison Break. Eight, Sowing Discord. Nine, Incitement to Riot. Ten, Capsizing Xianzhou."

C: 没其他问题了，下次见。
E: I don't have any other questions. See you next time.

C: 定睛一看，云骑军的覆面铁甲已经完全变形。这异星而来的铁皮囚犯能够用意念控制金属，这两名云骑军根本不是他的对手。于是他再次向青年发问——
E: Upon closer observation, the iron visors that the Cloud Knights wore were completely mangled. This iron-skinned prisoner from another star could use his will to control metal, and these two Knights were definitely not his match. And so, he once again asked the youth —

C: 「这里就是牢狱最深处？」
E: "Is this the lowest depths of the prison?"

C: 这座擂台足有一丈五尺多高，擂台上站着是一位凶神恶煞、面带伤疤的擂官。这人来历非凡，和台下的入伍新兵截然不同。
E: This ring towered over fifteen feet and in it stood a ringmaster, his visage scarred and brutish. This man was tempered in battle, a stark contrast to those greenhorns below the ring.

C: 茶汤的讲究、饮茶的规矩…样样都是学问，还望老师不吝赐教。
E: Brewing tea, rules of the tea ceremony... it's all knowledge. Please be generous with your tips and tutelage.

C: 怎么想到在这里开一家茶馆的？
E: What made you want to open up a teahouse here?

C: 想再多了解一些你的经历。
E: I'd like to know more about your past.

C: 想听你聊聊异世界经历。
E: I want to hear your stories of other worlds.

C: 你看他警告咱们了，别的故事有机会再讲给你听吧。
E: They're warning us already. I'll tell you about other stories when we get the chance.

C: 关于金人巷的相声录音…
E: About the Aurum Alley crosstalk comedy recording...

C: 不小心搭话而已，我现在就走。
E: Uh, I wasn't trying to start a conversation. Gotta go!

C: 哟，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}来了，想跟我聊聊，还是有什么别的事情？
E: Ah, our {F#girl}{M#boy} is back. Have you come to chat with me, or is there something else?

C: 你相信有这种东西存在吗？我知道天才俱乐部中曾有人构想过类似的东西，「以利亚萨拉斯探针」。那是一种会利用环境，自我增殖、自我修复的机器。
E: You think such a thing exists? I know someone in the Genius Society once conceptualized something similar with the Elias Salas Probe. It was a machine that could self-propagate and self-repair by utilizing the environment.

C: 我听闻这建木是星神造物，虽不知是真是假，但看仙舟严阵以待的架势，我劝你可别把主意打到建木上去，免得犯了他们仙舟人的忌讳。
E: I heard that the Ambrosial Arbor is an Aeonspawn. I'm not sure whether it is true, but seeing how seriously Xianzhou treats the issue, I suggest that you stay away from the tree and don't dabble in their taboo.

C: 村里的老人们都说，天有九重，上面有宫殿，宫殿里住着容颜不老的仙人。咱原来以为都是哄小孩子的故事，没想到这都是真的！
E: The older folks in the village say there are nine layers of heaven, with a palace at the very top where the eternally youthful celestials live. I thought it was just a fairy tale, but it's actually true!

C: 爸爸妈妈一直教咱，要像周大善人一样多做善事，这样咱和咱的阿菜都可以得道成仙！哎，也不知道阿菜现在怎么样了…阿菜是咱养的狗狗啦！
E: My parents always taught me to do lots of good deeds like Kind Zhou. That way, Veggie and I could become celestials too! Oh, I wonder how Veggie's doing... Veggie's my dog!

C: 对啊！仙舟民自恃长寿，对历史文物丝毫不懂得珍惜…等等，你不会是在套我的话吧？哎，算了，我也不与你计较。
E: Right!? Because of their longevity, they don't even have the smallest care about historical relics... hang on, are you trying to pump a confession out of me? Ack, forget about it. I don't have any beef with you.

C: 这项工作很无聊，但非常重要，每年都有很多仙舟人，自以为拥有漫长的寿命，却因为危险驾驶星槎而早早离世。
E: This job may be boring, but it's extremely important. Every year, many Xianzhou natives die a premature death due to dangerous driving — despite their natural longevity.

C: 啊，我明白了，想再多了解我一些对吧？好啊，那你问吧。
E: Ah, I get it. You want to know more about me? Fine, ask away.

C: 过去我在天外行商的时候也遇到过你这样的家伙，说话耿直，不看气氛。
E: I've met people like you during my time in the guilds beyond the sky — straight to the point, and can't read the room.

C: 虽然她自称在商业上缺乏天赋，但我看来决然不是。驭空大人常常不动言语就能镇住那些投机倒把、心怀鬼胎的说客，很少有人在她的面前含糊其辞。
E: Although she claimed to be lacking in trade acumen, I beg to differ, as she could often shut schemers and opportunists down without a word, and few can manage to play with words before her.

C: 在我看来，虽然和八面玲珑的做法有些差异，但终究是殊途同归。驭空大人在场时，商业洽谈也顺利了不少。
E: To me, the end is the same even when the approach is not. The negotiations go a lot smoother with Madam Yukong present.

C: 唉，无敌对一位武人来说，是多么寂寞和悲哀。我还得继续寻找那「尚能一战」的对手，你要是想到了什么，可以随时告诉我。
E: Ah, it's so lonely at the top. But I won't give up on searching for a worthy opponent. If you ever think of somebody that fits the bill, let me know.

C: 仙舟只是在委婉地拒绝吧。
E: It's just Xianzhou's way of declining politely.

C: 不会吧，没想到你是一个这么绝情的人，是我呀，温符瑞。
E: Come on, you forgot about me already? I'm Wen Furui!

C: 什么诈骗啊，我们本来就认识的啊，你看看你手机上的联系人，有没有我！
E: Scam? We know each other! Check the contacts on your phone!

C: 哼，你可不能给代理站长说什么「错误的决定」啊，我好不容易才外驻成功的。
E: Pfft, don't say that. I worked hard to get myself transferred out of there.

C: 我想问你点事。
E: There is something I want to ask you.

C: 好像咱们故乡…那个…水…
E: It's like our hometown... That... Water thing...

C: 感觉这个广告过时了…
E: I think this ad is out-of-date...

C: 你这报告登记了啥！
E: What did you register this one as?

C: 运力要被击穿了。
E: Its capacity will take a hit.

C: 这种内容真的没问题吗？
E: Are you sure that content won't get you in trouble?

C: 我真的是狐人！
E: I really am a foxian!

C: 喝茶其实有很多讲究的…
E: There're actually lots of details to pay attention to when sampling tea...

C: 怎不叫人好伤心！
E: I just can't bear to think of losing my mom!

C: 将军为此准备了很久啊
E: The general is putting in a lot of time into the preparations.

C: 是啊，是啊。在你眼中是废话，在岁阳看来却是真实不虚的预测。
E: Sure, sure. It's all nonsense in your eyes, but to a heliobus, it's a perfectly sensible, true prediction.

C: 你还蛮骄傲自豪的哦？
E: You're pretty smug, aren't you?

C: 到那个时候，他们就彻底没能耐掀起什么风浪啦～
E: When that time comes, they simply won't be strong enough to make any waves~

C: …应该是在说熏香的事吧？
E: ...You mean the smell of the incense?

C: 怎么样，还算是不错的建议吧？
E: What do you think, some pretty good suggestions, right?

C: 下次再聊吧。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 那为何执着于当将军？
E: Why do you insist on being the general, then?

C: 你懂什么，这叫草书！
E: What would you know? This is called cursive script!

C: 那咱们也能长生不老啦？
E: Then can we live forever too?

C: 之前就是这样的吗？
E: Was it always like this?

C: 还是聊点能聊的吧…
E: Let's talk about something else...

C: 你得坚强。
E: You have to be strong.

C: 为了去码头整点油炸土豆条。
E: To get some fried potato sticks at the docks.

C: 观察…判断…
E: Observe... Judge...

C: 还…还是要念念发朵吗？
E: Do... do I still have to say "fawer"?

C: 灰子，要说随机应变，关键时刻还是得靠你！
E: Gray Mystery, when it comes to thinking on your feet, you're the one we can count on in a pinch!

C: 咦，灰子，你、你怎么说出这么肉麻的话！
E: Huh? Gray Mystery, h—how could you say something so mushy!

C: 啊，不好意思让您见笑了，孩子们吵着要见圣女大人，但排队的实在是太多了。
E: Ah, sorry for the embarrassing scene. The kids were begging to see the Holy Maiden, but the queue was just too long.

C: 您就别开玩笑啦，这里已经忙不过来了。
E: Come now, stop joking around. We're already swamped here.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 老友，{F#她}{M#他}这是何意？
E: Hey, old friend, what's {F#she}{M#he} getting at?

C: 你果然和我在「永夜之帷」的记忆中看到的一样…活泼。
E: You're just as lively as I saw in my memories of the Veil of Evernight...

C: 得闲时来我的肩膀上坐一坐，一起离那片星空更近一些吧。
E: When you have time, come and sit on my shoulder. Let's get a bit closer to those stars together.

C: 阁下的话，感觉试试{F#扎个高马尾}{M#把额头露出来}，应该挺不错的。
E: For you, I think {F#a high ponytail}{M#showing your forehead} would look quite nice.

C: 我们可以替你编头发，每天都不重样哦。在哀地里亚圣殿，我可学到了不少呢。
E: We can style your hair differently every day. I learned quite a few ways at the Aidonia Temple.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，这里有些吵闹，抱歉招待不周了。
E: {NICKNAME}, I apologize for the noise. Please excuse our poor hospitality.

C: 快！遐蝶，从侧面为它拍下特写，要全像素高清版。我来从正面拍。还有{NICKNAME}，麻烦你马上联系山之民商人，要大量新鲜的红土……
E: Quick! Castorice, get a close-up from side profile, full-resolution HD. I'll take the front shot. And {NICKNAME}, contact the Mountain Dweller merchants right away. We need massive amounts of fresh redsoil...

C: 不错，蛰伏在吕枯耳戈斯记忆中的年岁里，我得以窥见天外知识的一角。
E: That is accurate. During the years I lay dormant in Lycurgus's memories, I caught a glimpse of knowledge from beyond the sky.

C: 呜嗡…嚼嚼…翁法罗斯万物生灵现在都有了自己的归宿，我也可以安心享受美味的红土了。
E: Grumph... Nomnom... Now that all the Amphorean creatures have found their places, I can finally enjoy my delicious redsoil in peace.

C: 依我所见，他不像人们形容的那般苛刻，反倒是位耐心的好老师。
E: From what I've seen, he's not as harsh as people make him out to be. On the contrary, he's quite patient and a good teacher.

C: 我记得…怎么清零了？
E: I remember that... How come I don't have any left!?

C: 新的帝帝帝帝帝皇即将诞生…
E: The new e—emperor is about to be born...

C: 当然可以。
E: Of course.

C: 练拳健身来了解一下么？
E: Interested in martial arts for fitness?

C: 哦，那智械确实没有经脉。
E: Oh. True. We don't have those.

C: 「人有五名，代价有三……」
E: "Of five people, three must pay a price..."

C: 猜猜看吧…
E: Make a guess...
