C: 重犯无生侯的囚室，复仇与愤怒的呓语穿过长梦，渗透进现实。
E: The cell of the criminal, Void Existence. The sleep talking full of vengeance and anger seeped into reality through the long dreams.

C: 重犯瞽目王酋的囚室，由于完全真空化的处理，就连最微小的振动也感受不到。
E: The cell of the criminal, Blind Chieftain. Due to being subjected to a complete vacuum, not even the smallest of vibration can be felt.

C: 每一尊石狮子都有不同的性格：有些敦厚老实、有些暴躁易怒、有些爱开玩笑。不过，你很难了解它们的性格——毕竟它们都很酷，不爱聊天。
E: Every stone lion has a different personality — some are good-natured, some are irritable, and some have a good sense of humor. Yet, it's hard to get to know them well, considering they are aloof and hate small talk.

C: 易燃易爆的香炉。
E: A highly explosive incense holder.

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 跨越种族的悲恋与单相思
E: A tragic story of unrequited love between different species

C: 「全都去死吧！」
E: "Blast them all to hell!"

C: 好了好了，幻想到此结束，希望你已经满足了。
E: All right, all right. The fantasy is over, I hope you had fun.

C: 沉肩坠肘，含胸拔背…
E: Sink your shoulders, drop your elbows, tuck in your chest and arch your back...

C: 货运星槎的保险装置紧锁，并不存在「随意开走」这种选项。
E: With the safety device of the freight starskiff tightly locked, the possibility of it being driven off by unauthorized personnel can be ruled out.

C: 金人设计大赛包括了蓝图设计、胶板制作、零件组装、渗线喷涂、特效绘制、地台搭建等多个环节。如果你囊中羞涩，那最好别碰这个。
E: The Aurumaton Design Competition consists of various phases such as blueprint design, glue board making, parts assembly, hollow lines inking, special effects design, platform construction, etc. Do not be a part of this if you are not loaded.

C: 你尝试触碰卷轴，手指碰到了无形的阻碍。看来你需要获得许可。
E: You reach out to the scroll, but your fingers are stopped by an invisible barrier. It seems like you need to get permission to touch it.

C: 「视肉是具有变形和增生能力的胶状原虫，智慧虽低，但极为致命。其行动模式与其说是敌人，不如说是一种病原体。」
E: "Viscorpi are a colloidal protozoan with the ability to change into different shapes and reproduce. Despite their low intelligence, they are extremely deadly. They attack like a pathogen instead of an enemy."

C: 这面宣传栏似乎已经有段时间没有得到维护了。
E: This side of the bulletin board has fallen into disrepair.

C: 明明写着别人的名字！
E: It clearly has someone else's name on it!

C: 真的吗？那你的人生非常丰富多彩了。
E: Really? Then you must have a rich and wonderful life indeed.

C: 出于朴素的道德观念与人道主义精神，可能还带有一定程度的好胜心，你将密封数字单据拆毁，打开了快递盒……
E: Out of simple moral obligation and the human spirit — and perhaps starting to feel a little competitive — you tear off the digital label and open the courier package...

C: 往下是一只只手掌大小的小盒子，里面塞满小小的画片儿。多半是某种游戏卡牌。
E: Below this, are small palm-sized boxes stuffed with small pictures. Probably some kind of card game.

C: 别了吧，这可不好。
E: Don't do that. It's bad.

C: 翻箱子。
E: Check the package.

C: 那似乎是一袋包装完好的蛋白米。也许…它并没有过期变质？
E: It looks like an intact bag of protein rice. Perhaps... it is not expired and spoiled?

C: 水平依旧很高，可惜啊…
E: Their sound is definitely still fantastic, but...

C: 你无论如何都无法相信眼前的现象，索性把心一横，用球棒对着这个空箱子狠狠砸了下去。
E: You just cannot bring yourself to accept the phenomenon in front of you. You throw caution to the wind and whack the empty box hard with your bat.

C: 「人们惊讶地发现，只要在其中投入金银首饰或其他贵重物品，就能获得祈福，未来的人生一片顺利。」
E: "To people's shock, they realized that if they placed gold, silver, jewelry, or other precious items inside the boxes, their future lives will be blessed and full of good luck."

C: 你秉承着理性思考的原则，对这个莫名其妙的「午夜谜箱」视若无睹。
E: You stick to your principles of rational thinking and ignore these mysterious Midnight Mystery Boxes.

C: 失恋的味道特别上头。
E: The taste of breakups is especially heady.

C: 门后传来噼里啪啦的老式打字机声响，清脆而急促，随后是纸张被狠狠撕碎的声音，每次撕扯仿佛都带着无边的疯狂与恨意。
E: From behind the door, you hear the sound of an old-fashioned typewriter, clicking and tapping with a crisp, hurried tempo, followed by the sound of paper being furiously torn to scraps, each tear done with what feels like a frenzied hatred.

C: 虽然名为钟表，但这块大家伙并不真能显示时间——只有抛弃刻度的桎梏，你才能全心全意地享受美梦。
E: Though called a "clock," this thing cannot actually display the time... Only by abandoning the shackles of time can one fully enjoy and embrace their dream.

C: 能够自动办理入住手续的机器。但由于操作繁琐，许多访客还是更青睐人工通道。
E: A machine that can automatically complete the check-in process. However, as it can be a pain to operate, most guests prefer the manual approach.

C: 据传某男子曾蓄意破坏消防栓，只为喝到「更猛烈」的苏乐达。他离开梦境的姿势不算体面。
E: Rumor has it that a man deliberately destroyed a fire hydrant just to get his hands on a "stronger" SoulGlad. He didn't leave the Dreamscape with his dignity intact.

C: 「乌通蓬自动车，成功人士的豪华尊享。」
E: "Utopon Motion Maverick, luxury indulgence for the successful."

C: 面包，最适合果腹的食品之一。它在梦里远比现实中香甜许多。
E: Bread, one of the most suitable food to fill the stomach. It is even more delicious in the dream than in reality.

C: 这家店铺贩卖的东西弥足珍贵，唯有数目庞大的金钱才能衡量。
E: This store sells items so precious that they can only be valued with a large sum of money.

C: 会所内免费供应苏乐达——再强调一遍，这里都是成年人！
E: SoulGlad is provided at no charge in the club — I repeat, only adults around here!

C: 混沌的时钟，怪诞诡谲一如其所在的混沌梦境。
E: A chaotic timepiece, strange and absurd, just like the disordered Dreamscape in which it exists.

C: 柔软的沙发，仿佛童年最甜美的梦。
E: A soft sofa akin to the sweetest dreams of childhood.

C: 如果说下水道是一座城市的地底迷宫，那么通风管道便是高居穹顶的幽邃秘境。
E: If the sewers are a city's underground labyrinth, then ventilation ducts are the dome's well-kept secret.

C: 某种预感告诉你，哪怕是梦境建成之后，这架梯子也不能爬。
E: A hunch tells you that even after this Dreamscape is built, you won't be able to climb this ladder.

C: 「没什么…这没什么，我们可是亡命之徒，记得吗？现在给我坐下，喝了这杯…我们应付得来，我们绝对能挺过去……」
E: "It's nothing... This is nothing. We're desperados on the lam, remember? Now sit down and drink this... We'll manage, and we'll definitely overcome this..."

C: 舒适的沙发。适合在上面尽情舒展、来回翻滚，就好似小丑鱼在艳丽珊瑚丛中嬉戏——只可惜你根本坐不下去。
E: A comfy sofa. Perfect for stretching out, or rolling about, like a clownfish playfully weaving about colorful coral. A pity you can't even sit on it.

C: 「干杯！」酒杯们在空中彼此相碰，假装出这里还有人时的热闹景象。
E: "Cheers!" The wine glasses are clinking in the air, pretending that there is still a bustling scene filled with people.

C: 空荡荡的舞台，倒也符合酒吧现在冷清的气氛。
E: An empty stage. It suits the currently desolate ambiance in the bar.

C: 有些人会告诉你，筑梦边境不欢迎游客到访。但在我看来，你出现在此处并无不妥。
E: Some may tell you that guests are not welcome at the Dream's Edge. But if you ask me, I'd say there's nothing wrong with you being here.

C: 当然，我同样欣赏那些优秀的喜剧作品。但我总觉得现在的自己就像是…某部劣质剧本中的可悲丑角一样。
E: Of course, I'm also a fan of well-made comedies. However, I always feel like... I'm currently a pathetic clown in some poorly-written script.

C: 我感觉自己受到了欺骗、侮辱…我为自己的盲目和轻率感到羞耻。
E: I feel cheated and humiliated... I'm ashamed of my ignorance and recklessness.

C: 呼呼…要发财了！许多人梦寐以求的机会，终于落到了我的头上！
E: Hahaha, I'm gonna be rich! The opportunity that many can only dream of... is finally upon me!

C: 我们橡木家系的成员，绝不会亏待朋友！
E: We Oaks would never do our friends dirty!

C: 呜呜…从来没人爱过我，就算有谁搭话，也只是想骗我……
E: *sob*... No one's ever loved me, and those who talk to me all have ulterior motives...

C: 哈，哈哈哈哈。
E: Ha, hahahaha.

C: 你来匹诺康尼的目的…
E: Your reason for coming to Penacony...

C: 你好。站了这么久，是对旧机器感兴趣吗？我这里应有尽有，可以随便观看。
E: Greetings. You've been standing there for a while. Interested in old machines? I've got everything you need. Feel free to browse.

C: …别动。脚并拢了，背挺直！不准弯膝盖！站稳点，让我仔细瞧瞧。
E: ...Stand still! Feet together and back straight! Stay there and let me take a good look.

C: 所有设施都是按照常规体型修建的，根本没有考虑到皮皮西人使用时的情况。酒吧的高脚椅、礼堂的阶梯、甚至汽水瓶的尺寸，对皮皮西人来说用起来都很不方便！
E: All facilities are built based on conventional body types, without considering use cases for the Pepeshi people. Bar stools, lobby steps, and even the size of soda bottles are inconvenient for the Pepeshi people!

C: 我的梦境护照呢？！
E: My Dreamscape Pass?

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 所以我们匹诺康尼的媒体人都遵循一个原则：报喜不报忧。
E: So us media here in Penacony tend to stick by a common rule: Report feel-good news only.

C: 那它为什么讨人喜欢啊？
E: Then why is she everyone's favorite?

C: 脆筒无动于衷。
E: The Cone doesn't move an inch.
Everything... Is getting...... Slower............ And Slower...............

C: 或许变化是和此处的忆质有关——这可真是了不起的大发现！
E: Perhaps this change is due to the memoria in this place... This is truly an astounding discovery!

C: 不知不觉之间，一曲终了——
E: Before you know it, the music reaches its conclusion...

C: 但既然你能出现在这里，想必是得到了上头的批准，我也就不多问了。
E: But since you're here, you must have gotten the thumbs-up from the higher-ups, so I won't ask anything.

C: 哎——没想到！竟然还是他乡遇故知啊！怪不得今儿日历上说是宜出行，敢情在这儿等着我呢！
E: Ooh, how unexpected! A friend from a distant land! No wonder the calendar said that it was good to travel today — an encounter was waiting for me right here!

C: 这个「正经事」嘛，过去对我而言是做买卖谈生意、为家族牟利…而现在，我只想让自己开心。
E: As to how I got my money, I used to deal in trade in my younger days, turning profits for The Family... But now, I just want to be happy.

C: 再见，朋友，小心别让自动乐团破坏了你的审美。
E: Goodbye, my friend, be careful not to let the automated orchestra ruin your artistic taste.

C: 唉，仔细想想…我所做的一切应该都是徒劳啊……
E: Alas, upon reflection... It seems that everything I've done has been in vain...

C: 我最喜欢的「时刻」，没有之一。十分满分的话我给它九点九分。
E: It is my favorite Moment, without exception. I'd give it <unbreak>9.9</unbreak> out of <unbreak>10</unbreak>!

C: 我原本来到这匹诺康尼，是为了拓展自己作为二次元艺术家的眼界，可事到如今，倒是陷入了困惑，不知道到底什么才算是二次元了……
E: I originally came to Penacony to expand my outlook as an anime artist but... I find that I have fallen into confusion and no longer know what anime even IS anymore...

C: 阿锡卡的脸上并没有露出任何羞愧的神情。
E: Asika's face shows absolutely no signs of embarrassment.

C: 瞧啊，这不是那位把大堂闹了个底朝天的大人物嘛？来来来，咱们赶紧认识一下！
E: Hey, aren't you that big shot who caused a commotion in the lobby? Let's get acquainted!

C: 「星辰的时刻」是第十一个梦境，那里遍地都是俱乐部，每天都在不停进行着各种比赛——球笼、机动球、独轮车大赛…什么都有！
E: The "Moment of Stars" is the eleventh dreamscape, where you'll find all sorts of clubs and various competitions all day... Spheroid, Roboball, Unicycler... you name it!

C: 呃…没什么想问的了。
E: Uh... I don't have any more questions.

C: 白日梦酒店人流量巨大，到访的客人自然也是五花八门。与我而言，印象深刻的就只有那些不守规矩的逐梦客。
E: The Reverie attracts a diverse range of guests. I must admit that the most memorable ones are Dreamchasers who cause trouble in the Dreamscape.

C: 拖欠房费的、非法偷渡的、诈骗碰瓷的、打架斗殴的……
E: For example, those who fail to pay their room charges, who illegally enter Dreamscape, or who engage in scams or disruptive behavior...

C: 至于获取梦境的途经，绝大多数都来自客人的主动贡献。熟悉「黄金的时刻」的宾客都知道，爱德华医生会以公道的价格回收有趣的梦境！
E: Most of the dreams come from voluntary contributions by guests. Guests familiar with the Golden Hour know well that Dr. Edward acquires interesting dreams at a fair price!

C: …但末日没有降临！伟大的漆黑王虎克驾驶着经过上百番改造的「帝皇造物引擎」，乘着撕裂黑云的耀眼光芒，骤然出现在了克里珀堡的上空！
E: ...But the doom never comes! The almighty Hook, the Pitch-Dark Lord, pilots the Imperial Engine of Creation that underwent hundreds of modifications, appearing in the sky above Qlipoth Fort, emitting a dazzling light that pierces through the dark clouds!

C: 给他讲和仙舟相关的梦。
E: Share your dreams about the Xianzhou ship.

C: 并且，您在梦境中似乎刻意美化了他们的形象——根据规定，梦境贩售店不能回购类似的梦。
E: Furthermore, you seem to have intentionally glorified them. Unfortunately, the rules dictate that I'm not allowed to purchase such dreams.

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 你记得我么？
E: Do you remember me?

C: 你怎么知道？
E: Wait, how did you know?

C: 它曾经也是辆正常车，出过几次事故后就变得奇怪了。
E: Eh, it used to work fine until a couple of accidents changed it.

C: 你一口吃掉了脆筒，酸酸甜甜的奶油在口腔飘散…味道不错。
E: You stuff the cone into your mouth, savoring the sour and sweet flavor of the cream... That's yummy.

C: 你开始思考，这座城市里的脆筒是否会有被你吃完的那天。
E: You begin to wonder whether you will finish up all the cones in this city one day.

C: 你咀嚼着甜筒，不禁开始思考——既然街上有这么多免费的甜筒，为什么之前它们没有被吃光呢？也许这就是梦境吧。
E: While chewing on the cone, you wonder why the many free cones on the street haven't been eaten. It's probably only possible in a dreamscape.

C: 答案是「有」——玩嗨了的人可不知道什么叫理性消费。
E: The answer is yes. People who are having a blast couldn't care less about spending wisely.

C: 这场无声的角力还在继续。不知你们谁会是最后的胜者。
E: The silent staring contest continues. No one knows who's going to win.
...Hey.

C: 哼，别想假装不认识。实在闲得慌，就去找{RUBY_B#折纸小鸟聚集地}「大树」{RUBY_E#}的那几只鸟吧，它们应该有事要拜托你。
E: Hmph, stop pretending we're strangers. If you're really bored, go seek out the birds at the {RUBY_B#Origami Birds' gathering spot}Great Tree{RUBY_E#}, they should have some requests to ask of you.

C: 列车锅，我最中意的那口列车锅…那家伙，到底什么时候才能把它还给我呢？
E: Express Special... My favorite Express Special... When will that guy give it back to me?

C: 所以这里甚至可以称为是全匹诺康尼最安全的地方——对那些擅入者来说，光是寻找进入这里的方法就得费上一番功夫了。
E: So, you could go as far as to say that this is the safest area in all of Penacony. Those that would try to infiltrate this place would have a hard enough time simply trying to find a way in.

C: 虽然在才干上不及橡木家系的「铎音」，我依旧愿意充当希佩的代言人，聆听并赦免你的全部罪过。
E: I might not be able to stand toe-to-toe with the Bronze Melodia of the Oak Family, but I am more than willing to be Xipe's representative, to listen to you and forgive all your sins.

C: …流程结束。不得不说，你的经历…确实让我另眼相看。
E: ...The process is complete. I have to say, your experiences... do paint you in a new light.

C: 可眼下还有更好的办法吗？难道我们要为了所谓的安宁，放弃追求福祉、同谐同乐的底线吗？
E: But what other better solution is there? Are we supposed to sacrifice our goal of pursuing happiness and harmony, all for the so-called peace?

C: 上次有人来找我倾诉，说他沉迷梦境，连着疯玩了好几个月；等回到现实才发现，自己远在天外的年迈养母已经因病离世，而自己错过了她的最后一面……
E: The last time someone came for confession, he said he was obsessed with the Dreamscape, running amok inside for months. Only when he returned to reality did he discover that his own foster mother at home, far away from him, had passed away from illness, and he had missed the chance to see her for the last time...

C: 我曾天真地认为，作为一名「艺术家」，我所需要做的就只是投身创作、尽情挥洒我的天赋与才华。
E: I once naively thought that, as an artist, all I need to do was to pour my creativity into my work and flaunt my artistic talent.

C: 虽然像是笼中鸟，但好歹吃喝不愁…这笔买卖怎么看都不亏吧，我在那一个劲儿纠结什么呢…哈、哈……
E: It's a cage, but at least I'll be clothed and fed... I see no downside to this deal, so why am I struggling with this decision... Ha, ha...

C: 你应该认识下托帕……
E: You should meet Miss Topaz...

C: 有怪物入侵梦境了？
E: Has the Dreamscape been invaded by monsters?

C: 是啊，我也是犯傻了。我就不该在那个失眠的深夜，把自己做过的事都告诉他。
E: You're right. I was being dumb. During that insomniac night, I shouldn't have told him everything I've done.

C: 我的父母是匹诺康尼最常见的那种家族成员，年轻、冲动、自负而野心勃勃，相信梦境里到处都是财富，竭尽所能想爬到更高的位置。
E: My parents were the kind of Family members you'd see all the time. Young, impulsive, conceited, and ambitious to a fault. They believed that the Dreamscape was full of wealth and would give anything to claw themselves up to a higher position.

C: 哈哈哈，现在说这些还是有点太理想了。慢慢来，走一步看一步吧。
E: Haha, maybe it's a little too idealistic to be saying things like that for now. We'll take it slowly, step by step.

C: 公馆主人的众多收藏品之一，彼此间几乎没有共同点。他的个人美学简直像家族的成分一样复杂。
E: One of the pavilion master's many collected items, none of which seem to share anything in common. His personal tastes seem to be as complicated as the composition of The Family itself.

C: 你听说公馆的主人有非常严重的强迫症，但这张圆桌的状态证明他痊愈了。
E: It's said that the master of this pavilion suffers from severe compulsions, but this table clearly shows that he has been cured.

C: 想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about this lounge.

C: …嗯？你找我有事吗？
E: Oh? Can I help you with anything?

C: 抱歉，我扔偏了。
E: My bad, I missed.

C: 对了，还有个奇才——她宣称创造了一种完美的社会形式，到处推销，甚至偷偷溜进大剧院，准备趁剧目的中场休息阶段上台演说……
E: Oh, yeah. Then there's this other special person. She declared that she created a perfect form of society and was pushing the idea wherever she went. She even snuck into the Grand Theater and planned to take to the stage during intermission to give her spiel...

C: 黑爪女士露出深邃的笑容，似乎在期待你会如何回应。「钟表把戏」似乎没有产生作用…「家人」的实力恐怖如斯。
E: Lady Black Claw has this profound smile on her face as if in anticipation of how you are going to react. It looks like Clockwork isn't taking effect. The strength of "Family members" sure is terrifying.

C: 我的音级远高于那些普通的家人。虽然我不知道你的小把戏来自哪道命途的力量…但无论如何，这种挠痒痒似的把戏，在我身上只会被「同谐」的力量「啪」地弹开。
E: My scale degree goes far beyond the average Family member. I may not know what Path your little trick drew power from, but... that trifling ability merely bounces off of me thanks to the power of Harmony.

C: 谁问你了？
E: Who asked you?

C: 哈哈，看来你平时走在路上，应该没少被人要签名吧？
E: Haha, I bet loads of people bug you for autographs whenever you're just walking around in public, right?

C: 我个人建议你订阅一份，这玩意还挺实用的。
E: Personally, I suggest you get a subscription — it's actually really useful.

C: 这届比赛中有位——至少在你这匹黑马杀出来之前——非常有潜力夺冠的种子选手。
E: There's one seed in this competition who harbored a lot of winning potential — that is, until a dark horse like you came onto the scene.

C: 可惜路上都是正常人，要是能再多点迷因怪物就好了……
E: It's just a shame that everyone I met along the way was so normal... If only I could have encountered a few more memetic monsters...

C: 您是…流梦礁本地人？还是误入的游客？能请您分享一下美梦以外的恐怖…我是说有趣经历吗？拜托您了，这对我真的很重要。
E: Are you... a Dreamflux Reef native? Or are you a guest who stumbled upon this place by mistake? Would you care to share with me your terrifying... I mean interesting stories in life outside the dream? Please, this is very important to me.

C: 哈哈，好吧。至少你没有随便应付我，这份诚实值得认同。
E: Haha, fine. At least you didn't just give me some perfunctory response. I praise your sincerity.

C: 这地方也没阳光啊。
E: But this place has no sun.

C: …啊哈哈，倒也没有那么拟真。每天浇一遍苏乐达就够了。
E: ...Ahaha, farming here is not that realistic. I just have to water them with SoulGlad once a day and they're good.

C: 例如机械制造、园艺、烹饪这样的课程…是的，它们非常实用。
E: You mean like engineering, gardening, cooking...? You're right. They've been very practical subjects.

C: 我也感觉到了！
E: I felt it too!

C: 你是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 曾有这样一位女性，是她首创了对于忆质运动的科学研究。
E: There was a woman who pioneered the scientific study of memoria movements.

C: 她是「钟表匠」的伙伴，在灾难中的岁月为美梦无私奉献，留下诸多珍贵的手稿，而后籍籍无名地死去。
E: She was the Watchmaker's companion and selflessly dedicated herself to the dream during years of disasters, leaving behind numerous precious manuscripts, yet she passed away without any recognition.

C: 你见过匹诺康尼现实的星空吗？许多年前，战火还未停息的时候，它们就挂在那儿。我们坐在一片废墟里望着它们，它们也望着我们。
E: Have you seen the real stars of Penacony firsthand? Ages ago, before the war ceased, they adorned the sky above us. We sat in the ruins and gazed upward at them as they looked down upon us.

C: 这是来自折纸小鸟的「谢礼」。拿好，慢走不送。
E: This is a gift from the origami birds. Take it, and don't let me keep you.

C: 嗯…你喜欢寻宝游戏吗？有只小鸟沉迷在寻宝游戏里，现在估计也站在<color=#dbc291ff>线索版附近</color>扮演引导者呢。
E: Hmm... You like treasure hunts? There's a bird that's obsessed with it. It's probably still standing <color=#dbc291ff>near the clue board</color> pretending to be a guide.

C: 嗯…有只当售票员的小鸟总在<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机附近</color>抓人套票。但那台售票装置似乎坏掉很久了，不知道它在用什么卖票……
E: Hmm... That ticket vendor bird is always catching scalpers <color=#dbc291ff>near the pinball machine</color>. But that ticket vending machine's been broken for a while now, I wonder how it's selling its tickets...

C: 怎么办？怎么办？急死鸟了啾。
E: What do I do? What do I do? Ooh, I'm just about to tear my feathers out, tweet.

C: 你试试？
E: Why don't you give it a go?

C: 那些可怜的孩子，从诞生起就必须遵从取悦宾客的使命，无法探寻自己的欲望与情感，让我想到了过去的自己……
E: From the time they are made, those poor children have been instructed to entertain their guests, unable to explore their own desires and emotions. They remind me of my former self...

C: 讲讲你自己的经历吧。
E: Tell me of your experiences.

C: 我出生在匹诺康尼的监狱星时期，我的生父生母都是曾在阿斯德纳开采忆质的星际囚犯的后人。
E: I was born when Penacony was still a prison. My biological parents were once descendants of interstellar criminals during Asdana's memoria harvesting period.

C: 我想再多了解一下流梦礁。
E: I wish to learn more about the Dreamflux Reef.

C: 在那之后，加拉赫用「神秘」的力量重新激活了这片不受家族掌控的梦境飞地——这就是流梦礁的来历。
E: After that, Gallagher used Enigmata's power to once again activate this soaring Dreamscape unfettered by The Family's shackles — this is the origin of Dreamflux Reef.

C: 人们精心铺垫、委婉试探，乔装目的、巧饰修辞…可最终又收获了什么呢？
E: People carefully pave the way for tactful probing, concealing their goals and disguising their rhetoric... but to what end?

C: 请原谅我如此失礼，但可否让我一个人安静会儿？
E: Please excuse my lack of manners, but could you leave me be for a while?

C: 而坏消息——即使是她，在承受那种程度的伤害后，也不得不在漫长的时间中独自沉睡，疗养自身。
E: The bad news was those grievous injuries forced her to enter a deep sleep for an extended period of time in order to recover.

C: 结束啦，知道吗，你刚刚…目睹了某种生命的全部人生。
E: That's it. You just witnessed the entire lifespan of a certain life form.

C: 显然，她注意到了你的目光，一丝怯意从她眸子里一闪而过。但她定了定神，以一种不算标准的营业声线向你*提出需求*——就像她以往在职场上做的那样。
E: She has clearly noticed your gaze, shyness flickering in her eyes. But after a brief pause, she proceeds to make a request in a less-than-perfect polished tone, similar to the one she uses at work.

C: 啊…这…这样吗？实在抱歉…哈哈。
E: Ah... I—Is that so? My apologies...

C: 其实在你搭话之前，我老早就注意到你了。
E: I had noticed you long before you came over to chat.

C: 我感觉你和空艇上的人都不一样——你给我一种疏离感…就好像我站在你面前，但是我们之间却隔着一层玻璃。
E: You feel different from everyone else here on the airship — there's a sense of detachment about you, as if there's a glass pane separating us, even when we're talking face to face.

C: 她小有名气，出身很差，头脑简单，但靠着真人秀算是有点名气的。名气，就是名利场的入场券。至于什么出歌出碟的，那些都是不重要的点缀。
E: She's a simple-minded nobody from a humble family, but going on reality shows brought her reputation — her ticket to fame and fortune. Music, albums, and the whatnot are just frivolous add-ons to her portfolio.

C: 有。但很抱歉，我可不是来匹诺康尼度假的。
E: I do, but sorry to disappoint, pal. I did not come to Penacony for a vacation.

C: 唔，虽然很想帮客官，但人家想不起来它们跑去哪里了，啾……
E: Oh, I would love to help you, but I can't remember where they went either. Tweet...

C: 我没什么想说了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 请随便提问，汪！只要我能答得出来，一定尽力为您解答，汪！
E: Ask me anything, woof! I'll do my best to answer, as long as I have one, woof!

C: 零嘴和周边，都是空艇上的特色产品，享誉匹诺康尼的时尚单品。
E: Airship specialties: Snacks and merchandise. These are also trending fashion pieces on Penacony!

C: 还好有船长您，谢谢您对我的信任。
E: It's a good thing you're not like them, captain. Thank you for placing your trust in me.

C: 补充：出于「好奇」，就像您现在这样。
E: Addendum: Out of curiosity, just like right now.

C: 他歌中唱的故事像物理课本一样晦涩而无趣，讲的是一位宇航员被派往探索银河，却意外落入了时间的圈套。
E: The lyrics of the song were abstruse and boring like a physics textbook. They told of an astronaut who fell into a trap of time after he was sent on a cosmic voyage.

C: …后面忘了。总之来参加派对就是！
E: ...I forgot the rest. Anyway, just come to my party!

C: 唉，就没有比那个建房子的傻梦想更靠谱的提案吗……
E: *sigh* Is that silly dream of building buildings really the most promising proposition out there...?

C: 我提供的商品，是他们堆放货物的仓库！不论竞争多么激烈，这笔生意绝对稳赚不赔！
E: I, on the other hand, am offering them storage space for their goods! This business idea is sure to rake in profit, no matter how intense the competition gets!

C: 车手必须得有过硬的心理素质和信仰，以撑过极端的比赛环境——长达二十四系统时的拉力赛、失重、十倍重力…多样的考验。
E: Drivers need outstanding psychological parameters and faith in their own capabilities. That's what it takes to navigate the extreme racing environment. The <unbreak>24</unbreak>-system hour rally, weightlessness, tenfold gravity... All sorts of trials await.

C: …呃，啊…对、对不起！让你看到丢人的事了……
E: ...Uhh, ah... S—Sorry! Sorry you had to see me like that...

C: 我就不明白了，有些人到底哪来的优越感——爱好小众怎么了，一没花你苜蓿币，二没喝你苏乐达，管这么宽干嘛？
E: I don't know where everyone gets their sense of superiority... What's wrong with having a niche hobby? I'm not spending your Alfalfa credits or drinking your SoulGlad, so why are you sticking your nose into my business?

C: 整天见了人一口一个「颠子」、一口一个「怪胎」…啧，再「哔哔哔」个没完，小心我往你们汽水里塞老鼠！
E: All day, I have people calling me "wacko" and "weirdo"... Tsk. If you keep up your whining, I'll stick a rat in your soda!

C: 你就是传说中的那位无名客啊，没想到能在这里遇见你，真是我的荣幸。
E: You are the legendary Nameless, aren't you? I never imagined I would meet you here. It is a true honor!

C: 人各有志，强求不来。与其对着不可知的将来瞎想，倒不如脚踏实地，把基本功练好。
E: Everyone has their own ideals. They cannot be forced. I think that, rather than focusing on an unknown future, it is best to go one step at a time and master your fundamental skills.

C: 学院代表给了那位同学足够的补偿，他对乐队活动原本也没多少兴趣，所以很快就解决了，但…关于*绩点优先*原则，学生内部出现了不少反对的声音。
E: The academy representative gave that student sufficient compensation. He wasn't all that interested in band activities anyway, so it was settled very quickly, but... students have started to protest about the grades first principle.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 乱破不会在意的。
E: Rappa won't mind.

C: 希望谐乐学院未来能接受更多样的风格和艺术形式，别局限在狭隘的视野里了。但对那群老教授而言，做到这点恐怕相当不容易吧。
E: I hope Charmony Academy will be more accepting of other styles and artistic forms in the future, and not be restricted by the narrow walls of their vision. But it's probably not that easily accomplished for those old professors.

C: 我谨代表筑梦学院，对你们付出的努力表示感谢。
E: On behalf of Dreamweaver Academy, I extend my gratitude for all the work you've put in.

C: 可一转眼，这玩意不火了，那价格跌的跟跳水似的，啧啧……
E: But in a blink of an eye, that novelty lost its hype and the price plummeted, tsk tsk...

C: 总有一天，我一定会拿到更重要的角色的。在芮克先生未来的某部作品里，我如果能成为那个女主角就好了……
E: I'll clinch a more important part one day. It'd be great if I get to be the female protagonist in one of Mr. Reca's future works...

C: 我不吃香蕉。
E: I don't eat bananas.

C: ——这是{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}为我撰写的起源故事。
E: ...This is the origin story my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous owner{RUBY_E#} created for me.

C: 答案：「帝弓七天将」中最强壮的人是「飞霄」。因为她是「添肌将军」。
E: The most cunning of the Seven Arbiter-Generals is Feixiao because she is sly as a fox.

C: 我们将要前往下一站了吗？
E: Are we leaving for the next stop?

C: 冰点苏乐达，添加苍蓝薄荷精华，为您带来冻结星辰的寒冬。
E: Ice SoulGlad with blue mint essence brings you the cold blast of a frozen star.

C: 「你把一些数字放到我桌上，以为这样我就能为你办事，若你这样想…朋友，你该去找赏金猎人。」
E: "You put down some numbers on my table and think that'll allow me to take care of things for you. If you really think that way, then... friend, you should go look for a bounty hunter."

C: 我…有点冷。
E: I'm... a little cold.

C: 看来是卖不出去了。
E: Looks like they won't be sold.

C: 有十年前的苏乐达吗？
E: Do you have any <unbreak>10</unbreak>-year-old SoulGlads?

C: 我跟你说啊，学历是天下最没用的东西……
E: I'm telling you, school grades are the biggest scam in the world...

C: 朋友，车站人流量大，注意安全。
E: My friend, there are lots of people around the station. Stay safe.

C: 那种躺在家里的梦呢。
E: A dream where I can just lie flat at home?

C: 音乐也很动听。
E: The music is pleasing to the ear too.

C: 啊？！你这牌运……
E: Huh!? What kind of card table luck is this...

C: 梦原本就是混乱的。
E: Dreams are meant to be chaotic.

C: 按设计图造出的场景。
E: If you create dreams based on a blueprint...

C: 玩物丧志！
E: The decadence!

C: 因为身材焦虑吧…
E: Probably cos of body image anxiety, I guess...

C: 生为报纸，我很抱歉…
E: I'm so sorry for being born as a newspaper...

C: 考虑到你之前展现出来的风险评估能力，我合理建议你放弃这个打算。
E: Considering the level of risk assessment skills you've shone so far, I'd reasonably advise against that idea.

C: 哼，有什么了不起的，不过是从现实里多带了点钱而已。
E: Hmph, what's the big deal? They just brought some extra money from reality.

C: 唉，也就说说而已…为什么，为什么我现在还是个穷光蛋？！
E: Well... I'm just kidding... But seriously, why am I still poor even in my dream!?

C: 咦，怎么投不进币，刚还好好的……
E: Hey, why can't I insert coins? It was working just now...

C: 别一直「汪」来「汪」去的，你到底是同意还是反对啊！
E: Don't just give me "woof"! Are you agreeing or disagreeing?

C: 嘁，那我还是钟表匠呢。
E: Oh, then I am the Watchmaker.

C: 嘘。她最近经常失眠。
E: Shh. She's been having trouble sleeping lately.

C: 希望能帮她分担点啊。
E: I hope I can help her take care of some of it.

C: 行吧，所以你那位心上人究竟是…？
E: Fine, so this man you've fallen for is...?

C: 你也很欣慰吧，亲爱的？可惜凭我的寿命，怕是没法陪你再来一次了。
E: Are you happy too, my love? It's just a shame that with my old age, I may not be able to come here with you again.

C: 我这样会不会被认出来？
E: Do you think they'll recognize me like this?

C: 比赛都结束了谁关心这个？
E: Who cares? The competition's over.

C: 我们旗下的艺人…
E: The artists under our banner...

C: 不知道啊，希望不要有太大变动…哎，未来的事，谁说得准呢。
E: No idea. I hope there won't be much change... Bah, who knows what the future holds.

C: 可不能出问题…
E: Nothing can go wrong...

C: …明白，请您放心。
E: ...Understood. Please do not worry.

C: 听你这么一说，我倒想试试了……
E: After hearing you say that, I kinda wanna try it....

C: 这段麻烦重新录——大家好，我是折纸大学的毕业生，我深沉地爱着这所学校。
E: Let's re-record this part — hello everyone, I'm a graduate of Paperfold University and I have a deep love for this school.

C: 你从未见过这位家主本人，但与她相关的故事散落在匹诺康尼的各处，或是一场华丽而不切实际的戏剧，或是一个美好到不真实的梦。
E: You've never seen this family head in person, but the stories about her are scattered across Penacony, in a gorgeously surreal theater play, or in an ephemerally splendid dream.

C: 无人打扰的僻静角落，适合独处、阅读和沉思。
E: In a secluded corner undisturbed by anyone, it's a perfect place for solitude, reading, and contemplation.

C: 有兴趣的话，可以来我们的社团参观！
E: If you're interested, you can take a look at our club!

C: 你的校园体验变得更完整了！
E: Your campus experience is all the more fulfilling because of it!

C: 是！那我就…回座位了？
E: Alright! Then I'll be... returning to my seat?

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 房间灯光的开关，在拉动时会发出「咔哒」一声。
E: The switch for the room lights emits a "click" when flicked.

C: 你输了，在这场精神角力里。
E: You lost this mental tug-of-war.

C: 扑满的鼻子格外敏感，有什么东西正在酝酿......
E: The trotter's nose is extremely sensitive. Something seems to be brewing...

C: 一个巨大的喷嚏...幸亏以太灵没有鼻涕。
E: It is a gigantic sneeze... Thankfully Aether Spirits don't have snot.

C: 没问题，您想聊什么？
E: Of course! What's on your mind?

C: 嗐，你们年轻人想得就是简单…婚姻这东西哪能这么儿戏？你现在一时冲动，以后怕不是要后悔半辈子呢！
E: Tsk, you youngsters and your idealism... Marriage isn't a game. Rush into things now, and you'll regret it forever!

C: 你很有主见。
E: You've definitely got a mind of your own.

C: 在它生效前做好准备…
E: Get ready before it takes effect...

C: 所以它是什么呢？
E: So, what is it?

C: 我不清楚，另一个我你觉得呢？
E: I'm not sure. What do you think, other me?

C: …蕉？蕉蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉……
E: Ba? Nana, banabana...

C: 行了，那我就先走……
E: Well, I should get going...

C: 欢迎来到奥赫玛，年轻人，对这边的生活还适应吗？
E: Welcome to Okhema, young one. How are you finding life here so far?

C: 当然，这种聚会多少还是见不得人…再怎么说{RUBY_B#公认的黑潮元凶}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}也不是什么良善的泰坦，只不过它和它真正的信徒对一切都毫不在意罢了。
E: But of course, these gatherings can't exactly be held in broad daylight... After all, {RUBY_B#the black tide's assumed cause}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} isn't exactly a friendly Titan. It's just that they and their true disciples couldn't care less about anything.

C: 打工辛苦。
E: Working for a salary is no walk in the park.

C: 「直到水源枯干、树木凋敝，天空晦暗、土地贫瘠——无情的战争还在继续，只因满腔欲念未曾止息。」
E: "Waters dry, trees fade, skies weep, lands stripped bare. Unyielding war rages on, fueled by boundless desire."

C: 当然，阿格莱雅大人应该已经给您简单介绍过这里了，那请允许我说明一下——
E: Of course. Lady Aglaea must have told you about this place, but allow me to give you a thorough introduction...

C: 它们各自具有不同的功效，您可以通过香气来辨别。另外…有人说直接饮用可以获得更好的效果，但我个人非常不建议您这么做。
E: They all offer different effects, and you can tell the difference from their aroma. Also... some people say that imbibing the bath water directly yields even more effective results, but I strongly suggest against that.

C: 领导逐火之旅，很劳累吧？
E: Leading the Flame-Chase Journey must be exhausting.

C: 裁布纳衣亦是我所钟情之事。经纬翻飞之间织出与世人之美相衬的华服，能为我带来珍贵的满足感。
E: Tailoring is also a passion of mine. Weaving warp and weft to create costumes befitting the beauty of this world brings me a precious feeling of satisfaction.

C: 有时候人们明明说不出理由，却能在心里精准地勾勒出对一个人的印象。比如在*我们*眼中，小灰就特别可靠，是和阿雅和小白他们不一样的那种可靠！
E: Sometimes people have a clearly defined idea of a person but cannot give an exact reason for it. In our eyes, you are an extremely reliable person, Little Gray! Though you are not Agy or Snowy, you are just as reliable as they are.

C: 小灰，好有志气！可普通人怎么想都不可能学会「百界门」的啦。
E: Ambitious, Gray Hair! It is impossible for ordinary folks to understand how to use the "Century Gate."

C: 别这么凶，就聊几句。
E: There's no need to be so harsh. Let's have a chat.

C: 虽是流亡，但他们的锐气比起悬锋军将有过之而无不及。拉冬、哀地里亚、厄涅俄努斯，皆有我等威名传颂。
E: Though they were exiles, their drive exceeded even that of the soldiers of Kremnos. Word of our might spread across Ladon, Aidonia, and Aenionus.

C: 不过如果阁下不介意，我还有其它一些有趣的故事可以与你分享。
E: However, I have other interesting stories that I could share with you. That is, if you do not mind.

C: 我要听野史！
E: I want to hear historical rumors and gossip!

C: 抱歉，我有点太激动了，希望没吓到你。
E: Sorry, I let myself get carried away. I hope I did not scare you.

C: 我？我很好，非常好。只是有时候会听到些声音...你听到了吗？那些尖叫声？
E: Me? I am great. Really great. It's just that I hear voices sometimes... Do you hear them? Those screams?

C: 你想知道奥赫玛的什么？让我想想…就从日常生活说起？
E: What would you like to know about Okhema? Let me think... Perhaps I should start from daily life?

C: 那个黄金裔系列的陶罐你知道吧，我看着样式不错，想定制个同款的刻法勒陶罐，结果他跟我说至少要排队半年！你说气不气，啊，气不气！
E: You know about that Chrysos Heir dolia series, right? I liked the look of them and wanted to order a Kephale dolium for myself. Then he tells me I have to wait at least half a year for it! Don't you think that's ridiculous? Ridiculous, right!?

C: 唉！怎么说话呢这孩子——信仰的事，怎么能说是浪费呢！
E: Ah! Watch your mouth, child — something done out of faith could never be described as a waste!

C: ——不是不是，我是说，我可没有想过骗人或者碰瓷什么的啊！
E: ...No no, what I mean is I've never thought of cheating or scamming people about anything before!

C: 前些日子，我在给它们做检查的时候，表现得就很奇怪…放在以前，它们虽然害怕，但还是乖乖地排队，顶多就小声哼唧两句…不像现在……
E: A few days back when I was checking in on them, they were acting out a little... In the past, whenever they were afraid, they'd still line up obediently and would just grumble a few words... But now...

C: 它们出什么事了？
E: Did something happen to them?

C: 因此，我正计划着系统采集不同浴池的泉水样本，并用它们灌溉我种植的「泪葱」，以观察不同泉水对作物生长的具体影响。
E: Therefore, I am devising a system to collect water samples from each of the baths, which are then used to water tear onions that I've planted to observe how different spring waters impact crop yield.

C: 没事了，你先忙吧。
E: No worries. I'll leave you to it.

C: 真希望也有这样的命运能眷顾一个只知道躺着的懒人…祝你能在奥赫玛玩得开心！
E: I pray that such a fate could care for an idle person who spends all their days lying down... May you enjoy your time in Okhema!

C: 抱歉，我只是路过。
E: Sorry, I'm just passing through.

C: 不相信也没关系，睡觉本身就很舒服——因为躺椅是世界上最伟大的发明！
E: It's fine if you don't. Sleeping itself is such a comfortable thing... Because the lounger is the world's greatest invention!

C: 我刚打算动手呢。
E: I was just about to make my move.

C: 阳光、酣歌、秘酿…秘酿…我要秘酿……
E: Merry, rowdy, ambrosia... Ambrosia... I want ambrosia...

C: 见你前来，大工匠放下了手里的锤子。
E: Seeing your presence, the Grand Craftsman puts down his hammer.

C: 讲讲贼之手。
E: Talk about the Thief's Hand.

C: 没想到，你竟如此挂念那城邦的往事…那就让欧洛尼斯来为你重演那逝去的岁月吧。
E: I never expected you to be so nostalgic for that city's past... Then let Oronyx reenact for you those years gone by.

C: 聆听厄境的惨状。
E: Listen to the horrors of adversity.

C: 居住在阿卡索斯的人们，自然对城邦有着认识，任何来到过、见过或是听说过阿卡索斯的人，也会形成对应的认识。
E: Those who live in Icatus will naturally have a cognition of it. Anyone who has been to, seen, or heard of Icatus, will help form the corresponding cognition.

C: 经过详尽的思考，他得出「阿卡索斯」的知识，并教给了其他人。
E: Through detailed reflection, he obtains knowledge of "Icatus" and teaches it to others.

C: 他吓坏了，结结巴巴的告诉对方今天是星期三……结果对方莫名其妙的咕哝了一句听上去像是「还没到吗」的话，就从他身边的山崖上跳了下去！
E: Terrified, he stammered out that it was Wednesday. The man in black murmured "Not yet" before leaping off the cliff next to him.

C: 诶呀，你终于愿意和我聊这个了？我可是等得法吉娜都要清醒了。
E: Oh, you're finally willing to talk with me about this? I've been waiting for so long that Phagousa is about to wake up.

C: 哈哈，那说不定我们真就是失散多年异父异母的亲兄弟呢~
E: Haha, then maybe we are long-lost brothers that share a single parent.

C: 所以，我只好拿出一些铁证了，无论如何我都要冲进那黄金裔浴池一次。
E: So, I had no choice but to gather some solid evidence. No matter what, I must break into that Chrysos Heir bath at least once.

C: 那其实不是雕像…
E: Well, it's not really a statue...

C: 那年，浴场刚刚完成它有史以来规模最大的一次全面修缮，整个光鲜亮丽了许多。但人们有所不知，那同时代表建筑师们都要没活可做了，我也是其中之一。
E: That year, the bath had just finished its largest renovation in history, becoming much more splendid. But what people didn't know was that this also meant the architects would be out of work, and I was one of them.

C: 奇美拉啊奇美拉，你为何偏偏是奇美拉……
E: Oh, chimera, chimera, why did you have to be a chimera...

C: 趣事？那就不得不提之前对奥赫玛的战争中，悬锋军遭遇断粮的事了。
E: Interesting stories? I must talk about the war on Okhema last time, when the Kremnoan army ran into a food shortage.

C: 咳咳…总之，于我而言，战争只是一种加班，被许诺的报酬是荣耀而非金钱。既然如此，何必那么卖力呢？我只是个卫兵，不是英雄。
E: Ahem... Anyway, war is just a form of overtime to me, and its compensation in glory instead of currency. If that's the case, why work so hard? I'm just some guard, not a hero.

C: 说说呗，虽然你的见识很少，思想也不够深刻，但总能帮我解解闷不是？
E: Speak. You may be short of intellect and have no profound ideas to speak of, but at least you can help me pass away the time, hmm?

C: 为什么你需要记忆残晶？
E: Why do you need Memory Crystal Shards?

C: 我偏不。
E: (Refuse to move.)

C: 在你来之前就完成过啦，先扫后拖，地面光溜溜的就跟我的小脸一样。清洁工具也交还给列车长啦。
E: I finished cleaning before you arrived — swept and mopped, the floor is as smooth as my interface. All cleaning tools have been returned to the train conductor.

C: 贝洛伯格就这么大，整个上层区我都熟门熟路，来来回回就是那几张面孔。
E: Belobog isn't that large, I practically know everyone in the Overworld area by now.

C: 可以是可以…但我似乎并不认识您……
E: I guess so... But I don't believe I know you...

C: 只是…或许、或许其中有什么误会也说不定呢……
E: It's just... Maybe, maybe there has been some kind of misunderstanding...

C: 当然是靠进货啦！我向{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}起誓，这些全是产地直销，可谓正统的无本实诚买卖！
E: It's all about sourcing! By {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, I swear these are all directly from the producers, genuinely honest dealings!

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 嗯…小灰已经和缇宁一起去到往世的雅努萨波利斯，看到过*我们*的过去了吧？
E: Little Gray, you've traveled with Trinnon to the past Janusopolis and seen our past, haven't you?

C: …怎么连声线都变了。
E: ...Even your voice has changed.

C: 遐蝶如今身在冥界，守候着翁法罗斯的生死流转。现在你之所见，只是复现而出的残像。
E: Castorice is now in the nether realm, guarding the cycle of life and death for Amphoreus. What you see now is simply a reflection, a lingering shadow of the past.

C: 记忆的残像似乎晃了晃，过往对话的回忆因其承载的情感之重杂糅在一起……
E: The fragment of memory seems to waver — memories of words once spoken blend together due to the emotion they contain...

C: 不可否认，直到加入逐火之旅，我依然觉得自己不够成熟，尤其是在与诸位伙伴相较之时……
E: To be honest, even after joining the Flame-Chase Journey, I still felt pretty immature — especially when compared to my companions.

C: 你是做慈善的？
E: Are you running a charity now?

C: 学者啊，让我来告诉你，恩贝多克利斯的遗体在下面栖息。
E: Oh scholar, hear me. The body of Empedocles rests below.

C: 嗯…有位织者不畏艰辛。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云崖的石壁上</color>，向最高处攀登呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver fears no hardship. The golden thread brings news that it is climbing to the highest point on <color=#dbc291ff>the stone walls of Dawncloud</color>.

C: 我会把这些数据移到安全的书柜里。多谢你，真是帮大忙了。
E: I'll move this data to a safe bookshelf. Thank you, you've been a great help.

C: 「纯黑的潮汐，在岩石上留下没有名字的水。纯粹的真实之水、死亡之水——也因此没有名字。」
E: The ebony tide, leaving nameless water on the rocks. Pure water of truth, water of death — thus, it remains unnamed.

C: …的确很像是「再创世」的隐喻。
E: ...It certainly feels like a metaphor for "Era Nova."

C: 嗯…有位织者心怀信仰。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>拱廊尽头的墙面上</color>，聆听他人的告解呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who holds faith. The golden thread brings tidings: They are listening to confessions on <color=#dbc291ff>the wall at the end of the arched walkway</color>.

C: 天空的火种既被夺取，无法预料这里还会发生什么…贵客，请务必小心。
E: The Sky Coreflame have been stolen, who knows what may yet befall this place... Honored guest, do take care.

C: 跳起来，迷！
E: Jump, memi!

C: 能和我说说白厄吗？
E: Can you tell me about Phainon?

C: 这是什么种子？
E: What kind of seeds are these?

C: 那么多技艺都失去了传承，那么多学识都被我们忘记，那么多美妙的诗歌，都变成了毫无意义的「迷迷迷」！
E: So many crafts have been lost. So much knowledge forgotten. So many lovely poems have become nothing but meaningless notes of "Memi Memi Memi"!

C: 都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！
E: Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, step right in, come and taste it, memi!

C: 二十二颗蝉蜕，十五颗半鹅卵石，以及七枚花瓣。我的全部家产，四舍五入下能买下半个迷境迷。
E: Twenty-two cicada shells, fifteen and a half cobbles, and seven flower petals. That's my entire fortune — rounded up, I could buy half of the Maze, memi.

C: 不对，我好像确实有翅膀嘤！
E: Wait — don't I already have wings, eep!?

C: 那，该做些什么好呢？
E: Well then, what should we do next?

C: 不过，也许是沉溺推杯换盏的欢宴太久的缘故，我的灵感好像被蜜酿泡坏了，偶尔想写几句，却怎么看都不满意……
E: Still, maybe it's from indulging in too many toasts and banquets. It feels like my inspiration's been soaked and soured by honey brew. Every time I try to write a few lines, nothing ever seems quite right...

C: 不过，真到了那个时候，我的伙伴们，还、还有阿波罗尼，一定会在我身后大声鼓励的吧！
E: However, if it comes to that, my comrades a—and Apollonius will probably cheer me on from behind!

C: 中途，人们厌倦了单调的口味，于是用几种不同口味的蜜酿，配合鲜奶果浆等混调，发明出了各式奇美拉蜜酿！
E: During which, the people grew tired of its monotonous taste and mixed different flavored honey brews with fresh milk, jam, and other ingredients. And that's how the various types of chimera honey brew were invented!

C: 喝下之后会不自觉地说出各种奇怪的话，比如「你好会上班哦」云云——后来大家经常因为这事打起来，奇美拉蜜酿就没有人再喝了吼！
E: After you drink it, you'll unconsciously say all sorts of bizarre things, such as "you're so good at going to work!" And so, this often sparked fights, and nobody drank chimera honey brews thereafter!

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: …哈…哈，当然没有！你别乱说。
E: ...Ha... Ha... Of course not! That's nonsense.

C: 别激动，年轻人。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}神谕…嗯，如果元老院也同意的话，那这就是它许诺的结果。可你们看，如今元老院不同意……
E: Relax, youngster. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale's{RUBY_E#} prophecy... Hm. If the Council of Elders agrees, then that is Kephale's promised outcome. But as you can see, if the Council does not agree...

C: 我记得上次获奖的剧目里，王子杀死了自己的父亲，又娶了自己的母亲，当他知道一切真相时，陷入了深深的绝望和自责中。
E: I remember that, in the last award-winning play, a prince slew his own father and married his own mother. But when he uncovered the truth, he fell deep into despair and self-blame.

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 啾啾，所有小鸟列队重来一遍，我来起头…我们是猫头鹰老师引以为傲的学生——
E: Tweet, tweet, all birds line up and start over, I'll take the lead... We're the students that Professor Owl is most proud of...

C: 哪种表情？
E: What face?

C: 感谢你的理解，希望你远离还未开辟的受灾区域，注意自身安全。
E: Thank you for your understanding. Please stay away from the affected areas that have not opened up yet. Stay safe.

C: 这次的军团就是最好的证明！
E: This Legion is the best way to prove this!

C: 大家总之会被我的一些肢体语言或者是眼神所吸引注意，这一点我也十分困扰。
E: People always get attracted by my body language and my eyes. I find it really frustrating.

C: 那你目前有什么发现？
E: What have you found so far?

C: 波少吩咐的工作，自然就是我应该做的工作啊。
E: Master Capote ordered me to do these things. Of course they are part of my job.

C: 离开这里，又有什么地方是绝对安全的呢？稍微想一想就能知道答案。
E: Where can I find absolute safety if I leave? It's a no-brainer.

C: 对于波少的爱好，我可是了如指掌。就连他喝咖啡只加三块半的糖，我都铭记于心底。
E: I know Master Capote's hobbies like the back of my hand. I even remember he adds three and a half cubes of sugar to his coffee.

C: 如果之后有什么问题，可以随时来问我。
E: Feel free to come to me if you have any questions.

C: 当然，我们聊点什么吧…
E: Of course. Let's chat...

C: …我会和留在树庭的同伴们好好聊聊，我们将去往何方。
E: ...I'll have a good talk with my companions who stayed in the Grove about where we should go next.

C: 荒笛大人说真正的引领是「让大地的生灵们各行其是」，我想，终有一天，大地会回应荒笛大人的理想吧。
E: Lord Terravox says true leadership means "letting all beings of the land follow their own path." I believe that one day, the land will respond to Lord Terravox's ideals.

C: 你真去过很多地方吗？
E: Have you really been to many places?

C: 或许，这则预言并非指向泰坦，而是在暗示某种对应关系？
E: Maybe this prophecy isn't about the Titan at all, but rather hinting at some kind of correlation?

C: 这座人台站在角落，悠扬的风吹起它的衣摆。
E: The mannequin stands in the corner, its clothes fluttering gently in the breeze.

C: 「喜欢」可是种宽泛的说辞哪。孩子们，能否告诉我，有关「成为战士」，你们的真正的兴趣所在？
E: "Like" is quite a broad term, isn't it? Kids, could you tell me what truly interests you about "becoming a warrior"?

C: 哼…我可再不想被那群蒙祖荫庇的蠢材指手画脚了。
E: Hmph... I'm done having those privileged fools tell me what to do.

C: 还是熟悉的奸商…
E: Still working your sneaky angles, I see...

C: 别打断我，我是在说一种心理的感受！
E: Don't interrupt me, I'm trying to express my feelings here!

C: 总不会是夏宝吧？
E: Surely it wasn't Naxy?

C: 话是这么说，可是该教些什么呢？
E: That's true, but what should we teach?

C: 好搭档，你终于来了。
E: Partner, you're finally here.

C: 无疑，奥赫玛的领袖需要能够纵览万物的金丝；而一位普通的织者，却只需要一双明媚的眼眸。
E: Without doubt, the leader of Okhema must command golden threads that can see all things, while an ordinary weaver only needs a pair of bright eyes.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 都种了些什么花？
E: What kind of flowers did you plant?

C: 哈哈，悬锋城流传过一句古语：猫要么在睡觉，要么在捣乱。我猜，阿格莱雅会更先按捺不住，要给她找点营生干一干了。
E: Haha, there's an old saying in Castrum Kremnos: cats are either sleeping or causing trouble. I bet Aglaea will be the first to get restless and find the cat something to do.

C: 仪式剑…指的应当是欧洛尼斯仪式剑，我还记得它那月牙般的形状。可源头又该如何理解？
E: The ceremonial blade... must be referring to the Oronyx ceremonial blade. I still remember its crescent-moon shape. But how should we interpret the source?

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 看来你还挺中意这称号？
E: Looks like you're quite fond of that title, huh?

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 哔嘟…「家用寻物仪」查宝为你服务。请使用语音输入目标物件关键词。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Findie the Home-Use Object Finder at your service. Please say the target object you want to search for.

C: 看好了啊，这玩意叫转盘控制器。你把手放在这儿，再这样一下……
E: Watch carefully. This thing is called the turntable controller. You put your hand here, and then do this...

C: 就这些，我讲完了。你刚才哼哼唧唧没蹦出半句话，也不知道到底学会没……
E: That's it, I'm done. You just groaned and moaned and didn't say anything, so I'm not sure if you're getting all of this...

C: 看到没？我早说过，但凡有点脑子的都早该学会了！
E: See what I mean? I told you anyone with half a brain should've learned all of this ages ago!

C: 不过你也看到了，师傅他还精神得很，完全没必要现在退休。他虽然口口声声说自己老了，但我觉得他还能再干上个二十来年……
E: But as you can see, my master is still going strong. There's absolutely no need for him to retire now. Although he claims to be old, I think he can still work for another <unbreak>20</unbreak> years or so...

C: 给你的报酬就在那边，快清点一下吧。
E: Your reward is over there. Go take a look.

C: 哎，不对。是不是黄灯来着…？
E: Wait, no. Is it yellow lights...?

C: 满载到黄灯，还得记得装满地髓……
E: Full cart to yellow, and remember to load the Geomarrow...

C: 哼，滴哼答！
E: Hmph, tick-hmph-tock!

C: 哎呀，我之前是不是说了些奇怪的话？看来我自己也需要点治疗了呢。
E: Ahh, did I say something strange previously? It seems like I also need some treatment.

C: 容我先自我介绍一下——我叫布凯辛，是应物科的I级科员。
E: First, allow me to introduce myself — my name is Grumpy, and I'm a Level 1 researcher at the Department of Implement Arts.

C: 嗯，你说吧。
E: Mhm, go ahead.

C: 《太空大战争》吗？嗯…说实话，我也不知道。我没听说过这游戏，问了下熟悉这方面的朋友，好像是部有些年头的作品。
E: Cosmic Warfare? To be honest... I dunno. I've never heard of this game. I asked all my buddies who know about this kind of thing, and I think it's some kind of an old game.

C: 正好正好，鄙人刚完成了这幅风景画——贝洛伯格的远景——我准备给它起名为《晨曦》！
E: What great timing. I've just finished with this landscape piece — a vista overlooking Belobog — and I'm gonna call it Ray of Dawn!

C: 雷比尼如风卷残云般消灭了一整只岩烧洞螈……
E: Rebini ravenously wolves down an entire stone-grilled olm...

C: 但至少——没有和声能将它伴唱——！
E: But at least — nobody can harmonize with me —!

C: {NICKNAME}！你可终于来了！我正到处找你呢！
E: {NICKNAME}! You're finally here! I've been looking everywhere for you!

C: 重点描述「初到上层区」吧。
E: Focus on her arrival at the Overworld.

C: 尽管如此，母亲大人仍将我当作最亲爱的女儿——或许她是将所剩无几的温情留给了我，而非她的子民……
E: Nevertheless, mother still regarded me as her dearest daughter, perhaps leaving what little warmth she had left for me, instead of her people...

C: （幽灵星槎好像消失了……）
E: (The phantom starskiff disappeared...)

C: 晴霓小姐就是为了打探这个才来的吗？
E: Miss Qingni, are you here to find out more about the skiff?

C: 因为在它看来，它认得我，它…很想念我。
E: Because, as far as it is concerned, it recognizes me. It... misses me.

C: 狐眠冢有什么特别之处？
E: What's special about Foxsomn Tomb?

C: 它变化成了我阵亡的战友，采翼的模样。
E: It has taken form of my fallen comrade-in-arms, Caiyi.

C: 看来我离出名也不远了——这份礼物，请你收下！感谢你的支持，我会继续努力的！
E: Looks like I'm right on the cusp of becoming famous... Here you go, take this gift! Thank you for your support, I'll keep at it!

C: 有话好好说，以后老桑博随便你拍，好不好？
E: Hey, we can talk about this. How about this: You can take photos of me whenever you like in the future, alright?

C: 所以说…{NICKNAME}，我们拍张合照留念吧！
E: So... Let's take a photo together to commemorate this moment, {NICKNAME}!

C: 哼哼，多谢夸奖~
E: Hehe, thanks for the praise~

C: 这你可问对人了，虽然我跟你一样都是初来乍到，但是这里的美食我都尝了一遍。
E: Well, you've come to the right person. It's my first time here too, but I've tried everything.

C: 你问我小吃，算是问对人了，我是大名鼎鼎的「食探」，最擅长去大小饭馆里探店。
E: Well, I can help you with that — I'm known around here as the "forager" — I venture into all manner of culinary establishments to taste test their food.

C: …客人别嫌我唠叨，你从外面的世界来的，了解星际和平公司吗，风评好吗？
E: ...I hope you don't mind me prattling on, but since you're an Outworlder, are you familiar with the IPC? Do you know if it has a good reputation?

C: 来一份「貘馍卷」。
E: I'll have a tuskpir wrap.

C: 小姑娘，这样的赌约对你一点好处都没有…是我们连累了你。
E: Miss, there's no reason for you to take such a bet... we're the ones who dragged you into this.

C: 这真是太好了。
E: Excellent.

C: …你也不想我在那么多人面前学小狗叫吧？而且，我真的很想帮金人巷一把。
E: ...You don't want me to have to bark like a dog in front of all those people, do you? Besides, I'd really like to help the people in Aurum Alley.

C: 我现在就给你们几个「材料」，你们一定要仔细确认。
E: I will present you with a few items, and you need to examine them carefully.

C: 材料我都确认过一遍了。
E: I've looked over everything.

C: 我没有看到什么箱子，只看到了「浓云金蟾」。
E: I didn't see any boxes, only the Golden Cloud Toad.

C: （这句话好像不太对劲……）
E: (I sense a hole in his logic...)

C: （这句话好像不太对劲……）
E: (I sense a hole in his logic...)

C: 就算能还上码头的租金，那用来竞标金人巷的资金呢，你们有吗？
E: Hmph, even if you pay back the debt, where are you gonna get enough money to win the bid for Aurum Alley?

C: 看来真相已经水落石出了。请收下阿丰师傅的证词，你们也许能用得上。
E: It seems that the truth has come out. Here is Mr. A-Feng's testimony — it may come in useful later.

C: 多亏了各位的努力，金人巷不仅还上了码头的租金债务，还提升了码头的吞吐量，我安排码头工人将原本闲置的码头清理了出来，升级了「码放货物」的规模。
E: Thanks to your help, the lease was paid off and the dock capacity is increasing. I told the workers to clear out areas that weren't utilized and use them to store extra cargo.

C: 我建议你做出一些让步，以缓和商铺的态度，比如采用明曦他们的做法，或是由明曦暂代你的职务。
E: I suggest that you make some concessions to appease the merchants. If you don't follow Mingxi's plans for the dock, she will temporarily take over your position.

C: 有很多商铺反对本地商会、支持公司，也是合情合理的。
E: It makes sense that there are many merchants who oppose the Merchant Guild and support the IPC.

C: 别谈了，我支持公司。
E: Forget it. I support the IPC.

C: 要是他不答应呢？
E: What if he refuses?

C: 有种「心诚则灵」的感觉…
E: Things might just fall into place if we try hard enough.

C: 那你就别逃避，和人家好好聊聊。
E: If that's what you're worried about, just give 'em a little training.

C: 心里有数，眼里有活，我再帮你们找个活。
E: *sigh* He's hard to impress. I'll find you some more work.

C: 我谨代表天舶司，受邀主持金人巷商会的公开会议。小秘书，你们人到齐了吗？
E: I will be hosting this hearing on behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission. Mingxi, are your people all present?

C: 公司当然还会竞标，我会堂堂正正拿下金人巷的经营权。
E: Of course not. We'll win the operating rights to Aurum Alley fair and square.

C: 不过形式上应该会是「超值单人餐」、「畅享双人餐」以及「缤纷家庭餐」……
E: Although some basic options should include Meal for One, Meal for Two, and Family Meal.

C: 这不是地衡司的公益广告吧？
E: ...Did you just turn into a public service announcement?

C: 我叫阿丰，是我将那个带有「浓云金蟾」的箱子带出来的。
E: My name's A-Feng — I was the one who brought out the box containing the Golden Cloud Toad.

C: 我叫阿丰，是我将那个带有「浓云金蟾」的箱子带出来的。
E: My name's A-Feng — I was the one who brought out the box containing the Golden Cloud Toad.

C: 我没有看到什么箱子，只看到了「浓云金蟾」。
E: I didn't see any boxes, only the Golden Cloud Toad.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>（这句话好像不太对劲……）</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>(I sense a hole in his logic...)</color>

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 你说的没错，但是我请假的时候，绝不会告诉别人的！这样是不会暴露什么的。
E: Exactly! But when I take my absence, I won't tell anyone! That way, no one will notice a thing.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 你怎么上来就说我是假扮的。
E: How can you just come up and say that to me?

C: 一台机器，责任心这么重吗？
E: A machine with a sense of responsibility this strong?

C: 听见码头工人摆货前大喊「开摆！」，我总是心里一紧。
E: The dock workers are always yelling "lay 'em out!" before stocking the merchandise. It scares me to death every time.

C: 货运星槎的运输成本不低，尽可能充分利用空间吧。
E: Transportation via freight starskiffs can be costly. Use the space available to the best of your ability.

C: 我看看啊，劳烦您给我指指路，从这里去「美馔阁」该怎么走啊？
E: Let me see... Could you please show me the way over to the Delicacy Pavilion from here?

C: 按照接下来的工作安排，我俩要去「杜氏茶庄」取货，然后再去录入剩下的地图数据。
E: Next up, we should head over to Du's Teahouse to pick up the delivery, and then fill in the remaining map data.

C: 我估摸着应该是在外卖配送环节上出了问题。物流公司那边派了这只谛听过来，让我顺着订单的路线去查…但我眼下手里还有一堆订单要处理，实在是抽不开身了。
E: I realized something was wrong with the delivery, so I contacted the delivery company. They sent me this Diting and asked me to follow the route and find out what had happened... But now I'm having too many orders to look into this issue.

C: 不要听我在这里干巴巴地解释了！您还是亲自去擂台上体验一下「斗技」的魅力吧！
E: But don't just listen to all these dull details from me! Get in the ring and experience the charm of "martialism" for yourself!

C: 若您有想法了，随时与我联系即可！
E: No worries. If a question does arise, feel free to ask me anytime!

C: 不过…怎么是碎片？难道说是那个什么「神奇的扑满」偷走了我的手稿，甚至还撕碎了它！
E: But... why are they in pieces? Did that Mystery Trotter steal my notes and rip them apart?

C: 你…你给我站住！哎，腿冻僵了…阿嚏！阿嚏！
E: F—Freeze! Ohh, my leg's frozen numb... Achoo! Achoo!

C: 这里似乎堆放了很多杂物，难道是有东西…躲在杂物里？
E: This place looks like it stores a lot of things, could... something be in there?

C: 我的宝贝<unbreak>223</unbreak>号感应仪，可是不会有问题的！
E: My precious Sensor No. <unbreak>223</unbreak> will never malfunction!

C: （路灯之下的异常…难道说的是那群小孩子附近？再去听听看他们在干什么吧。）
E: (The anomaly beneath the streetlamp... Is it near the kids over there? I'll go and see what they're doing.)

C: 今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
E: Is today's set of ingredients ready?

C: 这枚梦泡仍在测试和开发阶段。关于它的内容，梦泡制作组委托我做些反响调查，所以接下来我会问您几个问题。
E: As the dream bubble is still undergoing the testing and development stage, the developers have enlisted my help to carry out a survey regarding its content. Now, I'll ask you a few questions.

C: 你们的工作是什么？
E: What's your job about?

C: 滴答，太好了，这样我手下的所有迷钟应该都被修好了，谢谢您！
E: Tick-tock, that's wonderful! Now all the Dream Tickers in my team should be all up and running properly. Thank you!

C: 家族一定有所隐瞒！
E: The Family is definitely hiding something!

C: 他可没这么说…
E: He didn't say anything like that...

C: 看不清啊…可惜，再到其它地方找找看吧。
E: A shame that it's so scratchy... Well, let's check other places.

C: 嗯…那位服务生汉密尔顿进入了梦境酒店，而且周围的人都在用奇怪的眼光看他……
E: Hmm... That attendant, Hamilton, entered the hotel in the Dreamscape, and the people around him started looking at him funny...

C: 在和它们交手的时候，找准它们的弱点，就能夺取特定观众的收视率，这会让你在战斗中占据优势。
E: When you're fighting with them, you can focus on their weaknesses to gain more audience ratings. This will give you an edge in the battles.

C: （手动换台）
E: (Switch the channel manually)

C: 汪！我什么都没做，全部都是荷官先生的错哇！
E: Woof! I didn't do anything! It was all his fault!

C: 最近舒翁总是不在，没人陪我玩，我好寂寞，所以才想和荷官先生出去玩……
E: Siobhan hasn't been around recently. There's no one for me to play with. I'm so lonely. That's the only reason I wanted to play with the dealer...

C: 辛苦了，但你的表情可把你给出卖了。跟我讲讲呗，遇到了什么事？
E: Thanks for your hard work, but your face says it all. Tell it to me straight. What happened?

C: （…约好了要聊聊，那个闹钟应该还在酒吧里等我吧？）
E: (I have a meeting to attend... Is that alarm clock waiting for me at the lounge?)

C: 汪！没问题哇！我先去做准备，调查舒翁可能会在的地方哇！
E: Woof! No problem! Let me make some preparations and figure out where Siobhan might be!

C: 我们是不是得先调查…
E: Let's focus on our investigation...

C: 你们——在大街上遛什么狗呢？跑得还挺欢，嘻嘻，我看是狗在遛你才对吧！
E: Hey, guys... walking your dog, huh? He looks so happy, hee-hee! You know, I think he's the one taking you for a walk!

C: 它们真的不会伤人。
E: They really won't hurt anyone.

C: 丢下几句狠话后，猎犬家系的成员暂时离开了。你清楚听到了身后传来的呜咽声。
E: After leaving a few harsh words, the Bloodhound Family members take their leave for now. You can clearly hear sobbing from behind you.

C: …被噩梦影响而发狂了？只凭我们还怎么执行任务啊！
E: ...Are they affected by the Nightmare and going frenzied? How are we supposed to carry out this task without them?

C: 很高兴认识你，{NICKNAME}，看来你…就是列车长选中的无名客了？
E: A pleasure to meet you, {NICKNAME}. Looks like... you are a Nameless that was chosen by the conductor of the Express.

C: 银河，很神奇吧！
E: The cosmos moves in mysterious ways!

C: 现在已经变成白雪皑皑的世界了。
E: It has become a world blanketed in snow.

C: 我想问的差不多了。
E: That's all I wanted to ask.

C: 我就知道你会和历史上那些最出名的无名客做出一样的选择。
E: I knew that you'd make the same choice as all the greatest Nameless throughout history.

C: 嚯，还有意外之喜。
E: Oh? More unexpected surprises!

C: 那这批客户名单…
E: So, this list of clients...

C: 我不会放弃的，我的家里还有好多好多石头，还有好多好多鳄鱼……
E: I'll never give up. I still have plenty of stones and crocodiles back at home...

C: 传说中，热砂会场的建造者在不为人知的地方藏了宝物，等待着像您这样优秀的选手去发现。
E: Legends speak of how Scorchsand Hall's builders concealed a treasure within its walls, awaiting discovery by an exceptional contestant like yourself.

C: 亲爱的朋友，你是来寻找宝藏的吧？
E: My dear friend, are you here for the treasure?

C: 苏乐达，苏乐达，整天就是苏乐达！
E: SoulGlad, SoulGlad, it's SoulGlad all day!

C: 不过，看来您已经凭借自己的实力找到了宝物之所在。这份线索交给您，或许能对您的寻宝之旅有所帮助。
E: However, it seems you managed to find the treasure all by yourself. This clue is for you. Maybe it'll help you along your treasure-hunting journey.

C: 打扰了。
E: Sorry.

C: 因为一场不愉快的争吵……
E: Because of an unpleasant argument...

C: 久等了，我是十二时刻商业街的营销代理人，此次前来与您沟通广告合作一事。
E: Sorry to make you wait. I'm the agent for the Twelve Hours' business street. I've come to speak to you about working on a commercial together.

C: 「当钟表小子来到美梦边缘最高的大树边，却发现此处已怪物占领。」
E: "When Clockie arrives at the tallest tree by the Dream's Edge, he realizes that the vicinity has been occupied by monsters."

C: 「苏乐达——欢乐的源泉、美梦的精华！」
E: "SoulGlad — the source of joy, the quintessence of dreams!"

C: 那我继续往下讲——「汽水先生开始调配一种神秘的饮料，这是为了用甜美抚平镇民的痛苦 / 赚一笔大钱 / 用汽水控制镇民的心智。」
E: Let's keep going then: "Mr. Soda began to brew up a mysterious beverage. All of this was to soothe the people's pain with sweetness / make a huge sum of money / use the soda to control the minds of the people."

C: 哎哟，我的老天，大导演，这种话可不敢乱说！
E: Oh, my word! Director! Please! Can you not say such crazy things?

C: 不过听说最近梦里有个喜欢搞事的无名客，招惹猎犬家系、骚扰王下一桶、乱摸皮皮西的绒球——倒也像是石头老板的作风。
E: However, I did hear about one Nameless who likes messing around in the Dreamscapes. Getting tangled up with the Bloodhound Family, harassing the Lordly Trashcan, even randomly stroking Pepeshis' fluff balls... That kind of style doesn't seem too dissimilar to Boss Stone.

C: 原型？咱们之前不是聊过吗——石头老板肯定是匹诺康尼以前的敌人，破坏过美梦的大坏蛋。
E: Who he's based on? Didn't we already cover this? Boss Stone must have been the old nemesis of Penacony — the big bad guy who'd had his dreams shattered.

C: 第一个形象是我在「匹诺康尼大博物馆」找到的，展馆的看板上说，哈努努是一个<color=#dbc291ff>凶狠无情的罪犯</color>，曾犯下过滔天大罪。
E: The first story I found was from a Penacony Grand Museum, where an information board claimed Hanunue was a <color=#dbc291ff>merciless criminal</color> who had committed a flurry of serious felonies.

C: 仓鼠球骑士是美梦小镇的球笼明星！美梦小镇的镇民最喜欢看的就是球笼比赛——这点和现实的梦境没什么区别！
E: Hamster Ball Knight is the Spheroid-racing celebrity of Dreamville! The townsfolk love watching Spheroid races — it's not that different from real life!

C: 没关系，我会打劫。
E: No worries. I'll get the money. Somehow.

C: 弃武从文，成为银河笔杆子侠！
E: Spurn arms and take up the pen: Become the literary hero of the cosmos!

C: 是恶作剧吗？
E: Is this a prank?

C: …现在，我们将为您选择适合您的挑战，祝您闯关顺利！
E: ...Now, we will select a challenge suitable for you. Best of luck!

C: 书接上回，一场大雨拯救了倒在沙漠中的你们。这场雨浇灭了你心中的愤怒，你看着身边已经毫无斗志的同伴，想要安慰她……
E: Picking up from where we left off, a heavy downpour saves you both stranded in the desert. This rain quenches the anger in your heart. You look to your companion, now completely devoid of fighting spirit, wanting to comfort her...

C: 咦？我们还什么都没做…她也太能脑补了吧？
E: Huh? But we haven't even done anything... Is her imagination running wild again?

C: 准备好了吗？一，二，三……
E: Ready? One, two, three...

C: 这关不会是要我们话疗它吧…
E: So, this stage is requiring us to cure this thing with a whole therapy session now?

C: 他们只是受到了惊吓，并无大碍。
E: They're just in shock. It's nothing serious.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，记忆是梦境的温床。您经历过无数生死攸关的死斗，那些死斗的背后都存在着潜在的「终末」。也许那其中就藏着「终末」的踪迹。
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, memory is the breeding ground of dreams. Behind each of the many do-or-die battles you have experienced lies a potential Finality. The traces of Finality can probably be found therein.

C: 「终末」是一切的终点吗？
E: Is Finality the end of everything?

C: 我曾向他发出邀请，希望他能作为博识学会的代表，为天才们的研究增添一些外来血液。结论：他拒绝了。
E: I once invited him to bring fresh perspectives to the research conducted by the geniuses as a representative of the Intelligentsia Guild. Conclusion: He declined.

C: 三月七一剑就能击碎你的机甲！
E: March 7th can cut through your mechs with a single slash!

C: 放心，我已经找到了专业的助教{NICKNAME}帮我安排课程，肯定没有问题的！
E: No worries! I've found my professional teaching assistant, {NICKNAME}, to help me organize the lessons. So, there won't be any problems!

C: 没有胜算。
E: You wouldn't stand a chance.

C: 有风险怕什么？你见过战略投资部里那些大人物吗，你看他们谁会做稳赚不赔的买卖！
E: Yeah, it is. So what? Have you seen those big shots in the Strategic Investment Department? Do they ever make safe bets?

C: 哼哼，说到「绝活」，我已经准备好了烈焰浓茶。
E: Hmhm! Speaking of secret moves, I've prepared some Flaming Potent Tea.

C: 你这个例子举得不错，你会醉剑吗？
E: Good example. Do you know how to do the drunken swordplay?

C: 我是说，我没有别的工作安排了吗？我一直监视别人小姑娘学剑，感觉有些浪费时间，心里有些过意不去……
E: I mean, don't I have other important tasks to do? It feels like a bit of a waste of time to keep tabs on some random girl's swordplay training...

C: 在那之前，按照老规矩……
E: But let's not forget about our bet...

C: 想什么呢？本大爷只是抢走他内心最扭曲的欲望而已，你们就瞧好吧，哈哈！
E: Come on, what are you thinking? I just stripped away his most twisted desire! Watch what's about to happen, haha!

C: 稍等，我还有些事情。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 三月七小姐，就别挖苦我了。
E: Miss March 7th, please don't patronize me...

C: 代价是什么呢？该不会是变成僵尸，只能口吐歪比巴比之类的胡话吧？算了，我不想学。
E: At what price? I don't suppose it's becoming a zombie and sputtering gibberish, is it? Forget it, I'm not learning any of that.

C: 如果再给我一次机会，我一定努力练剑，不会再输了！
E: If I get another chance, I'll practice even harder and won't ever lose again!

C: 少装傻，这不是你们偷偷塞我口袋里的吗？
E: Oh, stop playing dumb! Didn't you slip this into my pocket?

C: 内部检举…这件事涉及的大部分人，要么没动机，要么没证据…会是谁呢？
E: An internal tip-off... Most of those involved have neither the motive nor the evidence... Who could it be?

C: 只不过？
E: Just what?

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 你做了什么？
E: What did you do?

C: 你向公司的机甲注入病毒，篡夺控制权，这是侵犯公司知识产权与生产资料！
E: You injected a virus into the IPC mechs and took control! That's an infringement of the IPC's intellectual property and assets!

C: 你你你你你你你别看！那是我的个人隐私！谁允许你私自窥探的，快不许看了！
E: Y—You... you... you... stop! Stop right there! That's private! Who told you you could invade my privacy? Just stop it!

C: 有没有可能是岁阳控制的呢？
E: Could it be controlled by a heliobus?

C: 那就一言为定了，你得帮我啊！
E: That's a deal! You need to help me!

C: 有可能？！看看这位武学高人怎么说！
E: It's possible!? I want to see what this master has to say!

C: 哦，看来这就是小麻雀找来的两位帮手？
E: Oh, if it isn't the little sparrow's two little assistants?

C: 不得不说，有你帮忙之后，「在研究死线前完成课题」的理想便不是梦了。连我的胃疼都好了一半。
E: I have to say, finishing my research in time for my deadline is no longer a crazy pipe dream now that I have you to help me! My stomach was starting to hurt from the stress!

C: 资产复用是吧？
E: You're repurposing assets?

C: 不要狡辩了！你翻找垃圾桶时的英姿，我全都看得一清二楚。
E: Quit trying to make excuses! I've seen your charming form as you dived into a trashcan up close and personal!

C: 我的「友谊魔法」招式，好像没有想象中的可爱。不知道玲宝的会是怎么样的。
E: My Magic of Friendship attack isn't as cute as I imagined it would be... I wonder what Lynxy's would be like...

C: 难道这就是「文化冲击」？
E: Could this be what they call a "culture shock"?

C: 再稍等一下。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 星穹列车，你们之前帮贝洛伯格斡旋债务问题，现在又帮他们参加演武仪典…哈哈，孩子年纪不小了，也该学着自己走路了吧。
E: The Astral Express helped mediate Belobog's debt previously, and now you're assisting them in the Wardance... Haha. When a child is growing up, they need to learn to find their own footing in the world.

C: 她就把你一个人留下了？
E: She left you here alone?

C: 能拜托你去吗…那边不认识的人太多了。
E: Could you? There are too many unfamiliar people over there.

C: 那我去叫她回来吧。
E: Ok then, I'll go call her back over.

C: 我稍微准备一下。
E: I have to prepare a little.

C: 真是个…比预想中要沉重的故事啊……
E: This story... got much heavier than anticipated...

C: 头有些晕…咱们赶快去看病吧。
E: I feel dizzy... Let's hurry up and see a doctor.

C: 呜呜呜，你嫌弃我～
E: Boohoo, you don't like me anymore!

C: 么？么！么么么么！
E: Mehr? Mehr! Mehr mehr mehr mehr!

C: 小哥，我想问一下，去「不夜侯」该怎么走？
E: I'd like to ask, how can I get to the Sleepless Earl?

C: 嗯，我同意！战士就是要不断挑战自己，挑战强敌。如果止步不前，被眼前的强敌吓住了，那过去的每一次战斗也就失去了意义。
E: Yeah, I agree! Warriors have to keep challenging themselves and strong enemies. If you stop moving forward and get scared by the enemy in front of you, all past battles become meaningless.

C: 蓝方选手是万众瞩目的贝洛伯格拳王——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: In the blue corner, the highly anticipated boxing champion from Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 原来你们这么熟啊？
E: You guys are close?

C: 行了，你就送到这里吧，赶紧回去忙你的事。
E: Okay, this is far enough. Go back and take care of your business.

C: 笑死老子，你说的这不是废话吗？
E: My sides! You're killing me here. You're a real comedian. Isn't that just common sense?

C: 卢卡选手的粉丝在哪里？让我听到你们的尖叫声！3、2、1，燥起来！！！
E: Where are the Luka fans? Let me hear your holler! 3, 2, 1, make some noise!

C: 我宣布！本场比赛的胜者，亦是有机会挑战守擂者的选手是——「铁臂」卢卡！！！
E: I declare the winner of this match, who also earns the chance to challenge the ringmaster — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 她也不能，但她一直坚称她能。
E: She can't, but she always insists that she can.

C: 将军，天舶司的星图航路上显示…这个世界，已经熄灭了。
E: General, the astral charts of the Sky-Faring Commission indicate that... this world has been destroyed.

C: 接下来，我要登上演武台，和那些咱们从没谋面过的陌生人一较高下了。这一路走来…真是崎岖漫长。善逝，你在听吗？
E: Next, I'll be climbing onto the stage, competing to be the best against strangers we've never met before. It's been such a long and arduous road... Sugata, are you listening?

C: 我…贫僧受戒不久，还没能断绝争斗心。这次来到仙舟，原本不该由我这样修持不深的新人登台比武。只是……
E: I... I've not been ordained for long, and I am still unable to abstain from the desire to compete. The Xianzhou should not have witnessed someone as inexperienced in cultivation as me step onto stage to compete. But...

C: 哎？祝我胜利？…卢卡先生，你是个奇怪的人。
E: Eh? Wishing for my victory? ...Mr. Luka, you are a strange person.

C: ……交易成立。
E: ...This deal is successfully concluded.

C: 戒条为律己之法，若是连心中的法都无法约束，浊世的洪流更无你抵抗的余地。
E: The commandments are a method of self-discipline. If even the laws within your heart cannot be bound, then the turbulent waves of the world will leave you no room to resist.

C: 结论：我已不再是丹轮寺的弟子，仅是一介罪人。但，这里还有最后一位僧侣。
E: Conclusion: I am no longer a disciple of Claretwheel Temple, but a lowly sinner. However, there is still one last monk present.

C: 抱起梦貘，进入梦乡。
E: Hold the tuskpir in your arms and enter the dreamland.

C: 下一场比赛的对手是…让我看看……
E: The next opponent is... Let's see...

C: 以及来自星核猎手的——「萨姆」！天啊，竟然是凶狠残暴的星核猎手！怎么办？卢卡选手！真的要面对如此恐怖的敌人吗？
E: And SAM — from the Stellaron Hunters! My goodness, I can't believe it's actually the savage and ruthless Stellaron Hunter! What are you gonna do, Luka? Are you going to face this terrifying opponent head on?

C: 扑满们看着卢卡，眼神中充满了沉重的嘱托。
E: The Trotters look at Luka with doe-eyed expressions, their gaze full of heavy responsibility.

C: 哪里哪里！我们才是受益良多。等我们三人的武功更精进一些后，万望能再度与你交手。
E: No no, the pleasure was ours! We've learned a lot from this. We hope to be able to spar with you again once we've improved our skills.

C: 我们现在状态火热，信心十足，谁遇到我们谁倒霉。不管对手是人是鬼，全都一样，干就完事了！
E: We're raring to go right now, and we're pumped. Whoever is matched against us is out of luck. It's all the same — human or ghost, let's just fight them!

C: 喂喂，我们俩这么说就太生疏了吧。
E: Hey hey, it's not like we don't know each other.

C: 前排左手边第一位。
E: Front row, first from the left.

C: 展现出你华丽的招式，让观众为你尖叫吧！
E: Show off your flashy moves and make the audience cheer for you!

C: 这哥们还挺逗的。下次有时间再去牢里看看他吧。
E: This fella's pretty funny. I should go visit him the next time I'm going to the prison.

C: 恭喜啊，{NICKNAME}！你成为了咱们庙会速通大赛的普通难度亚军！
E: Congrats, {NICKNAME}! You're our Normal Mode runner-up at our temple fair speedrun competition!

C: 哈哈，做梦。
E: Haha, in your dreams.

C: 社团的宗旨是——
E: The society's creed is...

C: 不过这个梗确实过气了…或许我们该叫你「忍友」！
E: But this meme is probably outdated... Maybe we should call you "friendja" instead!

C: 不瞒你们说，我也曾是拥有百万粉丝的大主播。
E: Truth be told, I was once a major streamer with millions of fans.

C: 所以对于乐队而言，各位口中的才能、绩点、效益都不重要——重要的是这个人要能领导乐队，为学生们带来一场精彩的演出才行。
E: For a band, what truly matters is not talent, GPA, or efficiency, but the ability to lead the band and deliver a captivating performance for the audience.

C: 喂，你在胡说什么。就算是知更鸟小姐指定的队长，也不能这么打击人吧？
E: Hey, how dare you spew such tripe? Even if you were the leader appointed by Miss Robin, there's no need to be this harsh, is there?

C: 列车无名客，星间旅行好快乐。
E: Astral Express Nameless, it's really fun to travel the stars.

C: 来了来了！群友的智慧果然无穷无尽。都给你整理好了，看看吧！
E: Got it! Can't beat the collective intellect of group chat. I've got it all here for you. Take a look!

C: 出于对您与学院的信任，我会等首场演出结束后再做判断…您不要抱有什么期待就好。
E: I'll trust in you and the academy, and wait till the first show ends to pass judgment... Just don't expect too much out of it.

C: 音乐派对很重要吗？
E: Is the music party very important?

C: 咕咕，我知道你在急什么，是为了咱们折纸树林里的「啾啾晚会」吧？老鸟听说你在这次晚会中承担很重要的职责，真了不起。
E: Hoot hoot. I know why you're in a hurry: It's for our Paperfold Woods' Chirpy Banquet, isn't it? This old bird has heard that you have an important duty to perform this night. How admirable.

C: 话说其余三位音忍呢？他们在先前的音律•狩猎结束后便再未露面…难道是在准备庆功会？
E: Come to think of it, where are the other three sound ninjas? I haven't seen them since the end of the last Sound Hunt... Could they perhaps be preparing some kind of celebration?

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 我要开始走咯。
E: I'm about to take a step.

C: 这是最后通牒。今后不要再和我扯上关系。
E: This is my final ultimatum. Do not come near me again.

C: 演出的水平很高啊，旋律也不错…纯路人，感觉把键盘换成吉他会不会更好一点？
E: The performance was great, and the melody wasn't bad... I'm not a musician, but, maybe swapping the keyboard for a guitar might be better, though?

C: 决定了——
E: It's decided...

C: ——音乐派对的闭幕演出即将开始，请表演乐队登台。
E: ...The music party's closing show is about to start. Performing band, to your positions please.

C: 请欣赏我等带来的，至为精彩的演出吧！
E: Please enjoy the spectacular performance we bring to you!

C: 咕咕咕，愿老鸟和钟表小子想出来的校训，能指引你们不惧前行——
E: Hoot hoot, may this old bird and Clockie's school mantra guide you all forward, steadfast and fearless...

C: 哼，哼哼——
E: Hmph, hmphhmh...

C: 来吧。
E: Bring it on.

C: 这项委托旨在收集波提欧在匹诺康尼的近况情报，筛选出和他无关的信息，所以需要一位胆大又机灵，还能进出匹诺康尼的人士来干——我想啊，这人选就非你莫属了。
E: This assignment is to collect all recent intel related to Boothill on Penacony, and then filter out all unrelated information. Which is why we need a bold and astute person who can freely enter and exit Penacony to do this — I thought you'd be perfect for this job.

C: 长久以来，帕姆都任劳任怨地帮我们解决各种生活上的问题，可我们却一直没能好好感谢它。
E: For the longest time, Pom-Pom's helped us solve all sorts of daily life problems without the slightest grumble, but we've never properly thanked them before.

C: 看本姑娘沙包大的拳头能不能妙手回春！
E: Let's see if my fists of steel are capable of restoring your memory!

C: 都说了，我没有作弊。
E: I already said, I wasn't cheating.

C: 好吧…那你加油打扫帕。
E: All right... Good luck with the clean-up then.

C: 「还迷信学术权威呢？哈那德是个剽窃的小贼，利尔他也不过为了骗点经费。」
E: "Still believe in academic authority? Harald is a plagiarizing little thief, and Aiden just wants to swindle the meager funding."

C: 真拿你们没办法…列车长会考虑这个提议的帕。
E: So many demands... I shall consider this suggestion.

C: 列车需要一些*开拓*。
E: The Express needs some Trailblaze.

C: 看种类，这应该是「锡毗露蛞蝓」。恐怕是从上次采购的那批腐殖土里面孵化的吧。
E: Looking at its species, should be the Tinplate Slug. I fear they must have hatched from the humus we purchased previously.

C: 极速通关了！
E: Game over just like that!

C: 游戏开始后不久……
E: Not long after the game starts...

C: 默念倒计时，直到心跳的律动和倒数混融为一……
E: Meditative counting down, till the heartbeat's rhythm and countdown are one...

C: 哦，你倒还真是…直接。
E: Oh, you're very... direct.

C: 这是为你好。
E: It's for your own good.

C: （潇洒的发型也是一大亮点…暂且还是不打扰了。）
E: (A dashing hairstyle is also a big plus... Better not cramp its style for now.)

C: 诶…那边的广告牌怎么打起来了？
E: Hey... Why are the billboards there fighting?

C: 呃…这张照片真的有这么打动人心吗？{NICKNAME}，给它起个名吧。
E: Err... Can this photo really invoke such strong emotions? {NICKNAME}, you should give it a name.

C: 嘿嘿，开了个好头呢。按照芮克先生的建议，接下来可以试试拍…睡蕉小猴？
E: Hee-hee, that's a good start. According to Mr. Reca's suggestion, next up we can try shooting... a Slumbernana Monkey?

C: 我想到了个好主意…
E: I've got a good idea...

C: 按我的观察，它们应该是在模仿仙舟先祖，开办吟诗咏歌的「雅集」。
E: If my observations aren't wrong, they should be doing impressions of the Xianzhou forefathers — a hosting of literati engaging in poetry and song.

C: …要不咱先咽下去再说？
E: ...How about swallowing before we talk?

C: 邀请星核猎手！
E: Invite the Stellaron Hunters!

C: 片刻后，参展期间偶遇的朋友们来到了现场。
E: Moments later, the friends from the exhibition arrive.

C: 至于那些危险的误差值，我想，拉帝奥先生知道该如何处理。
E: As for those dangerous discrepancies, I think Mr. Ratio knows how to manage them.

C: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一则泰坦们的捉贼轶事得以被闻见：
E: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and a story of Titans apprehending a thief can be heard:

C: 神也莫要轻易卑视凡人的决心。
E: And gods should not take light of the resolution of mortals.

C: 并不陌生的离场方式，你只是眨了下眼，眼前的孩子便消失得无影无踪，只留你一人在原地消化她的话语。
E: In a most familiar mode of departure, in the blink of an eye, the child before you has vanished yet again, leaving you standing alone to digest her words.

C: 跟我想的不太一样。
E: They're different than what I imagined.

C: 跟我没关系！是这家伙一点用都没有，只会在那哭，我不要和它一起！
E: This has nothing to do with me! It's this fella who's utterly useless — it only knows how to cry, so I don't want to be with it!

C: …不是。这群奇美拉怎么「嗷呜嗷呜」地全跑掉了？
E: ...Wait, why'd these chimeras run off "awoo-awoo"ing?

C: 我很能坚持的，坚持每天偷懒。
E: I will! I will keep slacking off every day.

C: 还是再想想吧…
E: Best to think it over...

C: 我决定了！
E: I've decided!

C: 你们商量了好久，才总算制定了谈话要点……
E: You all discuss for a long time before finally settling on the key points...

C: 但是，我们必须看到，随着团队规模的扩大，竞争水平的提升，面对的问题也越发复杂。这也要求我们进一步提高工作能力，保持更积极的工作状态……
E: But, we must be able to realize that with the expansion of the squad, so will the rise in the competitive benchmark, as well as the increasing complexity of the challenges we face. This also requires us to take further steps to improve our work capabilities and maintain an even more proactive work attitude...

C: 灰宝作为管理员，也来说点什么吧。虽然要和超级强的缇宝老师比赛，但气势上不能输！
E: Grayie, you should say something too as their administrator. We may be competing against the overpowered Tribbie, but that's no reason to lose out in spirit!

C: 奇美拉都很辛苦…
E: The chimeras sure don't have it easy...

C: 由人类担任管理员的队伍，终将被更强大的奇美拉团体取代！
E: A human-led squad will be eventually replaced by an even stronger chimera community!

C: 眼前的男性趴在地上，指了指排行榜上的队伍名称，又指了指自己。
E: The man before you crouches on all fours, points at the squad's name on the leaderboard, then points at himself.

C: 但就像人类那样，奇美拉也有自己的性格与工作习惯。作为管理员，最重要的并非是催促它们干活，而是要找到最适合团队，适合每个成员的协作方式。
E: But just like humans, chimeras have their own personalities and work habits. As their administrator, the most important thing is not to rush them, but to find the squad with the best fit, and the best way to maximize their teamwork.

C: 这不晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号吗？
E: Isn't this The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand?

C: o((〒ω〒; )o「豹豹哭哭」)∋
E: o((〒ω〒; )o "wittle seal cwy" )∋

C: …要是能抠下来一块给我，我都不知道该有多幸福啊！
E: ...I'd be in heaven if I could just get my hands on even a tiny chunk of it!
Halt—

C: 等等，让我辩解一下。
E: Hold up, at least let me explain myself!

C: 留在这里只会让你污染赛场，看我一头把你撞飞！
E: Your presence taints this arena — I'll blast you right out of here!

C: {RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}现在什么水平，就这么几个小海豹？你泡泡一个什么奇美拉也在场上。它能撞吗？撞不了，没这个能力知道吗？
E: So, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} has fallen so low that their festival only attracted barely a dozen baby seals? There's even a chimera on the field — can it even slam? It's not even built for it.

C: 你是怎么想的呢？泡泡。想要跟灰宝一起，还是想和小奇美拉们一起，你自己来决定。
E: What's your decision, Bubbles? Do you want to team up with Grayie, or would you prefer to stick with the little chimeras? It's your call.

C: 怎么会这样…这不过是预言梦境。我并没有真正输给你……
E: Impossible... This is but a prophetic dream. I haven't lost yet...!

C: 铭记你的胜利吧，此次战役被后世的小海豹们称为「天地裂变之战的序篇」。
E: Remember your victory. This battle shall be remembered as the "Prologue to the Cataclysmic War" by the baby seals to come.

C: 灰宝，地板上太凉了，你还是快起来吧。
E: Grayie, it's too cold on the floor. Better to get up.

C: （预言中的异邦勇者出现了…！）
E: (The prophesied outlander warrior...!)

C: 嗷呜，我来助你！
E: Awooo! You can count on me!

C: 小飞儿总是躲着阿雅，*我们*连她的影子也捉不到，她应该不会来参加比赛吧。
E: Little Ciphy is always hiding from Agy. We can't even catch her shadow. She's probably not participating.

C: 你看看这些黑泥…
E: Take a look at this black mud...

C: 可、可我这么做是有原因的——
E: B—But I did that for a reason!

C: 呵呵，看来灰子你也做了一个不能说的那种预言梦吧。
E: Hah. Looks like Gray Mystery is in the same boat concerning this unspeakable dream.

C: 虽然一路我们都在赢，但得知这是「预言的安排」后，泡泡很失落……
E: I know we've been winning all the way, but knowing this is "the prophecy's arrangement," Bubbles feels disappointed...

C: 「诡计」的半神，赛飞儿，她的出现就是「诡计」本身。
E: Cipher is the demigod of "Trickery" — her presence is trickery in itself.

C: 后来大伙都去看公司的《鸡窝头侦探》和《流星怪盗卢布朗》了，我们家也就逐渐没落了……
E: However, everyone watched the IPC's Tousled Detective and Leblanc: The Meteor Thief, so my family gradually declined...

C: 这些灵感会储存在设备里，之后传输给我。可以说，你玩这个游戏的过程，就是在为我提供素材。
E: The device stores all that inspiration and sends it my way. So really, you're helping me gather material by playing.

C: 虽然距离上次会面已过去了很久，但有句话说得好：「此时此刻，恰如彼时彼刻」——请看我身边的这台机器，你是否觉得有几分熟悉？
E: Though it's been a while since we last met, there's a saying that goes: "This moment is just like that moment back then" — look at the machine beside me. Doesn't it seem a little familiar to you?

C: 有人抄袭我的名字！
E: Someone plagiarized my name!

C: 哈哈，请放心，诚如我们的某位开发者所言：「一切吝于给予玩家正反馈的游戏体验都是耍流氓！」
E: Haha, don't worry, as one of our developers likes to say: "A game that doesn't reward players properly is just cheating them!"

C: 见识我真正的力量吧！
E: Face my true power!

C: 场地内突然响起震耳的广播通知。
E: A deafening broadcast announcement suddenly echoed across the venue.

C: …等等，我收到新消息。您认识「巡海大鲨鱼」选手吗？他想把赛车托付给您。
E: ...Wait, I just received new information. Do you know the contestant for Sea Hunter Shark? He wants to entrust his race car to you.

C: 要是换作他人，我们根本就不等，立刻取消比赛资格。您的话…我们得等。
E: If it were anyone else, we wouldn't wait at all, we'd disqualify them immediately. But for you... we are pleased to wait.

C: 感觉她有点太随意了…
E: Seems she's kinda casual about this...

C: 「四尺圣堂」复活，找上你了？
E: Did the "Four-Foot Hall" come back to haunt you?

C: 这银河里哪里有「吉利的诅咒」啊喂！吉利的那叫祝福！
E: As if there's such a thing as a "lucky curse" anywhere in the cosmos! If it's lucky, it's called a blessing, genius!

C: 啾？*愤怒的鸟语*——啾！
E: Tweet? *Angry bird speak* — Tweet!

C: Lancer啦，Lancer。虽说咱确实和你有过些不快的回忆，怎么也算是托负过后背的战友吧？
E: Lancer. Sure, we've had some not-so-great memories, but we've fought together too. Doesn't that count for something?

C: 就这么把我忘了可不太厚道。
E: Forgetting me so easily is rather rude.

C: 认识你也有段日子了，不管你认不认，至少我打心眼里觉得你算是值得交往的朋友。来，这点东西，就当是给你的礼物了——可别嫌弃啊。
E: I've known you for a while now. Whether you admit it or not, I consider you a friend worth having. Here, take this. Just a little gift — don't turn it down.

C: 你还是爱说些大家听不懂的话。不过，倒也挺有趣的。
E: You've got a way of saying things no one understands. But... it's kind of intriguing.

C: 不准这么叫我！
E: Don't call me that!

C: （愉快的叫声）
E: (Joyful Noises)

C: 汪呜——我是您忠诚的「宠物管家」汪，大事不好了汪！
E: Arooo... I am your faithful "Pet Butler," with urgent news, arooo!

C: 这个配方暂时先试到这里吧。
E: Let's call it a day for this recipe trial.

C: 真理医生竟然也会逛酒吧。
E: Even Dr. Ratio visits lounges, huh?

C: 有意思有意思，这种乐子竟然藏着掖着，真把我当外人了呀~
E: That's quite interesting. So you've been keeping all the fun to yourself? That's not how you treat a friend?
