C: 其实我才是真的…
E: But... I am the real one...

C: 真正的死亡，是被人遗忘……
E: Real death... is being forgotten...

C: 可别小瞧它，没准是喝了后，就会「嗖」地传送到另一处的神奇调饮也说不定呢~
E: Don't underestimate it. Who knows, maybe it'll whisk you straight to another place like some kind of teleporting drink!

C: 它的伴星碎了。至于原因，你得问萨姆。
E: Its companion star shattered. If you want the reason, ask SAM.

C: 我想找你维护这个数字版的我，看看她能不能应付各种状况。
E: I need you to monitor this AI version of myself and see whether she can manage different scenarios.

C: 就在我们谈话的此时此刻，无数调查员正潜伏在各个星球的交易市场，将当地的关键商业数据汇聚到「货币战争」。
E: As we speak, countless investigators are lurking in trading markets across different planets, gathering local critical business data for the Currency Wars.

C: 别别别，宝贝都被他挖走了，还下去犯这个险干吗？
E: No no no, he's cleared out all the treasure. Why take that risk and go down there?

C: 您知道仙舟上流行的幻戏吧？呃，搁公司那头也许该叫交互式幻境体验。喝，那里面的战斗，可刺激多了。什么飞檐走壁、时空断裂，要什么有什么……
E: You know about the Immersia genre we have here on the Xianzhou, right? Or perhaps it should be called an interactive fantasy experience, despite what IPC thinks. Well, those fights are exhilarating. Leaping onto roofs and over walls, splitting open time and space, anything goes...

C: 稍等我再歇会儿…
E: Let me catch my breath again...

C: 「{NICKNAME}必能将这些智慧活用此处，找到司鼎秘藏之物。」
E: "{NICKNAME} was determined to put this knowledge to use and find the Cauldron Master's secret treasure."

C: 面寒如霜，身动如龙，好名字！
E: Cold as frost, but nimble as a dragon — a fitting name!

C: 存在感…
E: Sense of existence...

C: 当我长大了，在人海中找到了她，她却即将寿终正寝…一念及此，我就忍不住泪如雨下。
E: When I grew up, I found her out there in the world, just as she was about to die of old age... Just the thought of that made me burst into tears.

C: 不许跪。咱仙舟上早不兴这套礼节了。
E: Kneel ye not. This custom has long disappeared from Xianzhou etiquette.

C: 记住了吗？接下来，你要前往工造司深处，以此口诀铸炼宝剑。
E: Got it? Next, go to the depths of the Artisanship Commission and use this formula to forge the weapon.

C: 先放入柄材，再加入无根纯水。
E: Put the hilt-wood in first, and then the Bona Aqua.

C: 我就知道{NICKNAME}也是满腹才学啊，此剑如风有灵，如月照影，正合其名「风灵月影」，端的是好名字！
E: Ha! I always knew that the great {NICKNAME} was a very cultured {F#young lady}{M#young man}. This blade is more than just a physical weapon — it connects, deciphers, and even modifies the rules of the world itself. An unusual but fitting name!

C: 哎哟，这位客官，总算把你盼来了。
E: Oh, you're finally here, customer!

C: 确实…哎，不对，我确实个什么劲儿。抱歉，在下方才嘴瓢了一下，请见谅。
E: Indeed... Ugh, my bad, I didn't mean to come off as arrogant. Sorry about that.

C: 要是我夜里梦见的，第二天醒来保管哈喇子淌满一枕头。
E: If I ever got a chance to do this in my dreams, I'd wake myself up from laughing so hard.

C: 打着鉴宝节目的噱头，泊阳成功招徕了几位潜在顾客。
E: With the gimmick of a treasure appraisal event, Boyang has attracted a few potential customers.

C: 俗话都说，真的假不了，假的真不了。本次「鉴宝」活动由我们「清玩斋」独家举办，各位观众，有请我们的鉴宝人{NICKNAME}——
E: As the saying goes, the fake can never be real! This treasure appraisal event is hosted by Elegance Pagoda! Now, here comes our appraiser, {NICKNAME} —

C: 对不起，我不是铁卫…在现实中当不成银鬃铁卫，就只能在游戏里过把瘾了。
E: Sorry, I'm not actually a Silvermane Guard... I couldn't become one in real life, so I can only fantasize in games.

C: 我看还是别来了吧…听起来怪危险的。
E: I think it'd be better if the IPC avoided it... it sounds pretty dangerous.

C: 接下来，就让我回答一下三月小姐的问题吧——如您所见，「星际决胜庆典」即将在这颗美丽的冰雪星球举办……
E: Now, let me answer Miss March's question — as you can see, the Interastral Tournament Festival is about to be held on this beautiful icy planet...

C: 哈哈哈，太过疑神疑鬼对身体可不好。
E: Hahaha, you've certainly got quite the active imagination!

C: 哎，我有我有——我想提问！
E: Actually... I have a question.

C: 乔瓦尼先生说得对！正好，我们也借这个机会，体验体验这款游戏吧。
E: Mr. Giovanni is right! Now's our chance to check out this game and see if it lives up to the hype.

C: 原来如此，既然埃里克这么说了…那看来只好由我们来保管了。乔瓦尼先生觉得呢？
E: I see. Well, when you put it that way... looks like we'll hold onto it for now. What do you think, Mr. Giovanni?

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 习惯了，习惯了～我和佩拉已经劝退不少新手玩家了。
E: Totally used to it~ Pela and I have already struck fear into the hearts of more than a few newbies.

C: 哼哼！哼——
E: Oink, oink! Oink...

C: 不辛苦，应该的。预祝二位顺利拿下<color=#dbc291ff>「流云渡的资格徽章」</color>……
E: Oh, it's nothing! I wish you both the best of luck on your quest for the <color=#dbc291ff>Cloudford Mastery Mark</color>.

C: 桂、乃、芬！桂为嘉木，乃者「是」也，芬即芳香，是不是好听又好记？
E: Gui, nai, fen! "Gui" means fine wood, "nai" means to exist, and "fen" means fragrant — rolls right off the tongue, doesn't it?

C: 你最好别打什么坏主意。
E: You better not be up to anything fishy!

C: 不不不，我想说的不是这个！您先听我讲……
E: No, no! You've got the wrong idea. Please, just let me explain...

C: 他们连头都不扭一下…这防守也太无懈可击了吧？
E: Look at them, standing there like statues! It might be tricky getting around these two.

C: 调用完成——请操作「自动机兵•蜘蛛」引发爆炸，驱散捣乱的员工——
E: Access granted. Please take control of the Automaton Spider and trigger an explosion to disperse the disruptive workers.

C: 居然是乔瓦尼先生？！——虽然我先前已经有些预感了……
E: Mr. Giovanni! I guess it's not that surprising...

C: 如果你们真的想要向<color=#dbc291ff>「命运」</color>发问，并且得到问题的<color=#dbc291ff>「答案」</color>，那就在对决中击败我，向我证明你们的<color=#dbc291ff>「决心」</color>吧！
E: If you truly wish to question <color=#dbc291ff>fate</color>, and learn the <color=#dbc291ff>answer</color>, then defeat me in a duel and show me your unwavering <color=#dbc291ff>resolve</color>!

C: 徽章呢？快交出来！
E: Hand over the Mastery Mark — chop chop!

C: 你愣着干什么呀，等下他们要起疑心啦！
E: What are you waiting for!? Hurry up or they'll start getting suspicious!

C: 来进行「超链接对决」吧！
E: Let's have a "Hyperlink Match"!

C: 别急，你还不知道这些游戏的套路吗？虽然说是福利，但肯定是需要条件才能领的。
E: Hold on, you still don't know how this works, do you? They are benefits, but there are conditions that have to be met to claim them.

C: 大屏幕上明明显示着那位星核猎手姑娘…但场地里怎么没见到人呢？
E: It's the Stellaron Hunter girl... I can see her on the big screen, but where is she in the arena?

C: 不知道…你们是否享受这段旅程呢？
E: So... you guys been having fun?

C: 嘿，这下大家就都站在我们这边啦！
E: Nice, sounds like we've got a few fans out there too!

C: …是乔瓦尼先生！
E: ...Mr. Giovanni!

C: 这里也安静过头了吧…我有点害怕……
E: It's eerie how quiet it is here... It's kinda creepy...

C: 将军……？
E: The general...?

C: 若你赢了，我便重续当年的对决。若是输了，你要回答他们一个问题——不可说谎，不可狡辩。成交？
E: If you win, you can have your rematch. If you lose, you will answer one question of their choice — no lies, no tricks. Can you accept these terms?

C: 无聊到令人心碎，连偶尔有飞虫掠过都成了乐趣。
E: This boredom is killing me... the only entertainment I have around here is watching the insects fly by.

C: 此事之后，我们打算与朱明仙舟通信。那座仙舟受帝弓神话的影响，人们与岁阳共生，又能不受其左右。吾等当能从那儿求得抵御岁阳之术。
E: After this is all settled, we intend to make contact with the Xianzhou Zhuming. That ship is under the influence of the mythical Reignbow Arbiter — the people there are able to coexist with the heliobi and at the same time be free from their manipulation. We hope that from them we can learn the art of breaking free from the influence of the heliobi.

C: 哈哈哈哈，对哦！好像确实没人问过你肯不肯加入这个捉鬼小队，就默认你是小队的一员了。
E: Hahahaha, oh yeah! No one asked you if you wanted to join the ghost hunting squad — we just took you in by default.

C: 只是岁阳的障眼法罢了……
E: Remember, it's just a heliobus illusion...

C: 阿灼，他们是来找我的。天色都暗了，我是不是该回去了？
E: Luxie, they came here looking for me... It's starting to get dark, maybe it's time for me to go back now?

C: 可是，我也没办法呀。再长的嬉戏，也总有结束的那一刻。
E: There's nothing I can do about it... playtime can't go on forever...

C: 虽然记忆有些模糊，但我之前好像做了很多奇怪的事情……
E: I... everything's so fuzzy... Did I do something bad?

C: 滴，打卡。
E: Clocking in...

C: 命运…不是注定的。
E: Destiny... is not pre-ordained.

C: 道路永远只有一条…
E: There is only one way...

C: 说起来，青雀，你为什么还在这儿，眼下你不该在书库值勤吗？
E: In any case, Qingque, why are you still here? Shouldn't you be on duty back at the repository?

C: 这里是…？
E: What is this...?

C: 没错，「听我说」，{NICKNAME}。在这片小小迷宫中放入机巧，对其下令，它便会按令寻路，走向出口。这与身在命运之中的人类何其相似？
E: That's right. Now listen, {NICKNAME}. If you place an ingenium in this little maze and give it a command, it will find its way to the exit precisely as it was commanded to do so. Are humans not the same as they navigate the path of destiny set before them?

C: 你们会帮我的，对吧？
E: You're all gonna help, right?

C: 嗯，只要你用得上咱们。
E: If we can help, I'm in.

C: 别做傻事。
E: Don't be foolish.

C: 彦卿成了危险…
E: It's that Yanqing has become the danger?

C: 那个啊…那个…容我和{NICKNAME}商量一下。
E: Well, about that... let me discuss it with {NICKNAME} first.

C: 嗯，我已经有了怀疑对象。
E: Correct. And I think I might know who the culprit is.

C: 后来我嫌她烦，我又说「尾巴跟我一样四分五裂了，变成了什么都记不得的小火苗」，你们没看到她脸色吓得煞白，哈哈哈哈！
E: In the end, I became fed up with her constant nagging. I told her that her beloved Tail had splintered and been reduced to an ember without a single memory... You should've seen her face!

C: 全靠你了，尾巴！
E: It's all up to you now, Tail!

C: 原来，尾巴还真的是藿藿小姐的尾巴呀！
E: Well, well, Tail actually does belong to Miss Huohuo!

C: 放心吧，虽然岁阳没有形体，但并非无法被有形之物击败，浮烟终究只是在硬撑而已。
E: Take it easy, kid. Heliobi might lack physical form, but they're not impervious to physical attacks. Cirrus is merely putting on a brave face.

C: 万一只是谣言怎么办？
E: What if all the leads we get turn out to be fake?

C: …妹妹她还好吗？
E: ...Is my sister okay?

C: 好胆识！
E: I like your courage!

C: 事情是这样的…我隔壁住着个独居的狐人鳏夫，叫做文远。
E: It's like this... My neighbor is this old foxian grandpa who lives by himself called Wenyuan.

C: 太卜司最近是多事之秋，自——
E: There has been a lot of trouble in the Divination Commission lately, ever since—

C: 但青雀这孩子，我和她聊过，她来太卜司工作求的不过是一个安稳和自在…很难想象这样的人突然之间就想尝一尝创业艰辛了。
E: But I have spoken with Qingque before, she only came to work for the Divination Commission for stability and comfort... It is extremely hard to imagine that a person like this would suddenly want to try starting a business.

C: 多半是同占据我的犀焰一样，放大了内心某处的不安感。
E: Something must be enhancing one of her latent insecurities, like did Keralum when it possessed me.

C: 看来本座对她日常的教诲，她全然没有感激，反而留下了很深的心理阴影。
E: It seems that she isn't even slightly grateful for my teachings. In fact, it seems they've left a shadow on her psyche.

C: 想的虽然很美，可惜无名客却不会答应你。
E: You have great aspirations, but the Nameless will not indulge you.

C: 我开始有些理解了。
E: I think I'm starting to understand.

C: 之后我会继续找下去。尾巴比星燏强大许多，它一定不会有事的...嗯，不会有事的。
E: I will continue to search for Tail. It is much stronger than Stafyre, and I'm sure it will be fine... Yes, nothing will happen to it.

C: 罢了罢了，你再过来贴我一次试试看。
E: Forget it. Come and slap it on me again.

C: 朋友…我，我不懂。但我明白你的意思。
E: Friends... I—I don't understand... but I strangely know what you mean.

C: 好顽强的战斗意志，又冷又硬。
E: What a tenacious will for battle! Cold and resolute.

C: 你们不会再见了。
E: ...you will never meet again.

C: 别忘了我们的老规矩，桂小姐让我提醒你发帖…拜托你了。
E: Don't forget our routine. Miss Gui asked me to remind you to make the post... Please.

C: 你想怎么「送」？
E: How are you going to "give" it away?

C: 好呀，特写镜头多来几个！
E: Fine. The more close-ups the better!

C: 来到仙舟之后，我做了各种各样的尝试，杂技、探店、主播，也包括我们捉鬼小队的各种探灵活动，我真的很幸福，尤其是这个账号达成的成就——
E: After coming to Xianzhou, I tried all sorts of things: Acrobatics, store visits, streaming, and the ghost-busting stuff with our ghost-hunting squad. I'm really blessed, especially with the milestones reached with this account...

C: 我这里没发现有什么异常之处，看起来挺正常的，就是这附近有点…空旷？
E: Nothing special around here. It all seems pretty normal. It's just that everywhere around here just seems kinda... empty?

C: 相关用品已清点完毕，现在你可以试试，将培育出来的造物安置好。
E: Relevant items have all been cataloged. Perhaps you can try using them to accommodate the creations you've nurtured?

C: 或许可以给它们个教训？
E: Maybe we can teach them a lesson?

C: 很可惜，即便以我这聪敏的脑袋，还是得不到想要的答案。我的研究遇到了瓶颈，现在，我需要你的帮助。
E: Unfortunately, even with this brain of mine I still can't get the answer I'm looking for. My research has hit a bottleneck, and now I need your help.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem

C: 我还没洗脸……
E: I haven't cleaned up yet...

C: 它的模样让你想起了一位故人，将它梳洗一番后，你为它拍下了特写照。
E: Its appearance reminds you of an acquaintance. After giving it a quick groom, you take a close-up photo of it.

C: 你…你在和它对话？！
E: You... Are you talking to it!?

C: 为什么是我？
E: Why me?

C: 但既然你如此好奇，那听听这个故事吧……
E: But seeing as you're so curious, then why don't you give this story a listen...

C: 影子将军一边玩着手中的琼玉牌，一边笑着说：「小玄子，我们打个赌吧。我赌他们的枪里没有子弹。」
E: The shadow general smiled as she flitted a jade tile between her fingers, and said: "Oh, Fu-Fu — let's make a bet. I bet there's no bullets in their guns."

C: 不信，你们看——
E: If you doubt my words, you...

C: 后面就交给你们了，别玩得太过火就好。
E: I'll leave the rest to you. Just don't go overboard.

C: 行呀。人家要提问了哦——「有句著名的诗不是说过嘛，『自由』和『爱情』不能兼得，要是你的话，会选哪个呢？」
E: Alright, here's my question. You must have heard of this famous quote, "For liberty, I will sacrifice my love." If it were you, which one would you choose? Liberty or love?

C: 汪！实在是太好玩了！太好玩了哇！
E: Woof! It's so much fun! Yeah, so much fun!

C: 我…我有点想上厕所。
E: I... I need to use the bathroom...

C: 熟悉的天花板。
E: Ah, the familiar ceiling.

C: （这样的事经常发生吗？）
E: (Does this happen frequently?)

C: 按原本的设想，你永远不可能到达这个房间。因为房卡被弄丢了。
E: Originally, reaching this room would have been impossible, because the room card was lost.

C: 呀！人家对你根本没兴趣！
E: Gah! I'm not interested in you at all!

C: 过去看看吧。
E: Let's go check it out.

C: …选点数小的。
E: ...I'll choose small.

C: 得看我的心情。
E: Well, it depends on my mood.

C: 在这个破烂的酒吧里，谁都得听我的，整天调饮料有什么前途，要是选择站在我这边，我保你后面能过得顺心！
E: Everyone in this lousy lounge takes orders from me! What's the point of mixing drinks all the time? Stay on my side, and I'll ensure you a happy life!

C: 可惜，我的爱早已遗失在了过去。
E: Unfortunately, my love became lost in the past.

C: （淑女打算去找忧郁派…希望刚才的聊天能帮它下定决心。）
E: (Lady decides to find Melancholy... Hope the conversation just now can help it make up its mind.)

C: …冰块？
E: ...Ice cubes?

C: 继续。
E: Go on.

C: 汪…好像和我预想的不太一样哇，亲爱的调饮师，你是没认真工作嘛？
E: Woof... It's a little different from what I expected. My dear drinksmith, are you sure you're serious about your job?

C: 戏剧的高潮已过，我们这些演员该谢幕了。衷心祝您过得愉快。
E: The climax of the play is over. It's time for us actors to bow and take our leave. We hope you have a good day.

C: …可以帮我调饮料吗？
E: ...Can you help make drinks for me?

C: （不过…听到了不少司令的信息，感觉更理解它的想法了。）
E: (But... I feel like I understand Mr. Bigwig more now listening to it.)

C: 到
E: Got it

C: 不<rhythm>要<rhythm>多<rhythm>想
E: No <rhythm>need <rhythm>to <rhythm>overthink

C: 一<rhythm>切<rhythm>都<rhythm>正<rhythm>常
E: Everything <rhythm>is <rhythm>normal <rhythm>as <rhythm>usual

C: 汪汪
E: WoofWoof

C: 现在，准备开始正式的合奏吧！
E: Now, prepare to begin the ensemble proper!

C: 现在是「火箭筒与音乐」的进阶试炼。
E: This is the Advanced Trial for Rocket Launcher and Music, tweet.

C: 算了！别看我个头小，心里头却是一等一地宽容！
E: Forget it! I may be small, but I have a big and tolerant heart!

C: 喔唷，实际状况可比我听到的版本的糟糕多了，怎么才给这点儿钱？
E: Geez, the actual situation is way worse than what I heard. If that's the case, why is the pay so paltry?

C: 眼前的小鸟轻轻松松叼起比你还大的街机，拍拍翅膀飞走了——
E: The little birdie in front of you picks up an arcade machine larger than you with ease and flies away...

C: 快点快点，我早就准备好了！
E: Hurry up! I'm ready to go!

C: 屁嘞，我更高，所以我先来的，懂？
E: Shut your trap. I'm taller, so I got here first. Got it?

C: 你与银狼兴致勃勃地吃着这没头没尾的瓜。然而由于太过投入，你们并未注意到苏乐达瓶内渐渐飙升的气压……
E: You and Silver Wolf are so immersed in watching the drama that neither of you notices the rising pressure in the SoulGlad bottle...

C: 啧啧，你这家伙…倒是很会嘛，难不成还是个恋爱养成游戏老手？
E: Tsk tsk, not bad... Could you have been a pro in romance games?

C: ……很抱歉，到头来我还是得拒绝您的好意。
E: ...I'm sorry, but I have to decline your generous offer.

C: 我没拿公司一分钱！我已经拒绝了！
E: I haven't taken a single cent from the IPC! I refused their offer!

C: 前日那场卢卡对铄金的比赛，想必让很多观众心中颇有愤懑吧？勇敢正直的铄金选手，怎么就输给了阴险狡诈的卢卡选手？这简直太令人意难平了！
E: The recent match between Luka and Shuojin likely left many spectators feeling outraged. How could the honorable and brave Shuojin lose to the cunning and deceptive Luka? It's simply too much to bear!

C: 请各位放心，「玛米图<unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus战斗用外骨骼」现提供免费客制化服务，为不同身体结构的客户量身定做适合自己的外骨骼！
E: Rest assured. Mamitu <unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus Combat Exoskeleton now offers free customization services, tailor-made for customers with different body structures!

C: 发布会开始前<unbreak>12</unbreak>系统时
E: <unbreak>12</unbreak> system hours before the launch event

C: 呵…一个广告代言单子就想收买我？别傻了，我纵横拳台这么多年，难道还差这一点钱吗？而且我可早就听说你本想签下卢卡作为代言……
E: Do you think a mere endorsement deal can sway me? I've dominated the fighting scene for years. Do you think I'm that desperate for money? Besides, I've heard you were originally aiming to sign Luka as your spokesperson...

C: 看到这块广告牌了吗？上面会印着你的脸，罗浮上的每个人都会认识你。
E: See this billboard? Your face will be on it, and everyone in the Luofu will know you.

C: 我就说吧…他和公司有一腿
E: I told you... he's involved with the IPC.

C: 「不可知域」…我已经迫不及待地想知道，还有什么在等着我们了。
E: The Unknowable Domain... I already can't wait to find out what awaits us.

C: 她本可以成为「完美的学者」，拓宽宇宙的知识总量，但自我怀疑却最终让她止步了。
E: She could have become "the perfect scholar," broadening the overall quantity of knowledge in the universe, but self-doubt eventually made her halt her advance.

C: 我们要怎么解开「不可知域」？
E: How will we solve the Unknowable Domain?

C: 顺带一提，三月七小姐和列车长刚刚去了楼上的房间，说要找您。
E: I should mention that the conductor and Miss March 7th went up to your room looking for you a short while ago.

C: 我只是想探险。
E: I just wanted to explore the place.

C: （复诵信条）
E: (Recite creed.)

C: 五，即使银河暮色苍茫，仍应将长夜照亮。六，即使局面纷乱无章，仍应看向前方、碾碎乱象。
E: Five, no matter how bleak the cosmos may get, let us light the night. Six, even when there are wheels within wheels, go ahead!

C: 住观景车厢也不错！
E: Staying in the Parlor Car doesn't sound half bad!

C: 让我鉴定一下，这枕头和你的卧室搭不搭～
E: Time for me to see if this pillow matches your bedroom!

C: 我也给你讲一个。
E: Let me tell you one, too.

C: 穿上了新衣服，可不衬托得列车长我气色更好嘛～
E: Pom-Pom is wearing new clothes — don't they make Pom-Pom look even better?

C: 想守住那么大一片区域，哪有退守城墙容易？也多亏了这段历史，我们才有大赚一笔的机会。
E: Rather than protecting such a vast territory, isn't it more feasible to fall back and defend just the city walls? But I guess it's also thanks to these events of the past that we have an opportunity to strike it rich.

C: 至于证据？你带回来的战利品就是最好的证明。只有搜集到足够多的战利品，大伙才会相信你确实完成了壮举。
E: As for proof? The treasures that you bring back will make for the most irrefutable proof. As long as you bring back a large enough pile of treasures, the rest will be convinced of your incredible feat.

C: 至于后面会遇到什么，就是完全的未知数了——真正的冒险，想想都激动！
E: Alright, I have no idea what we're going to encounter once we walk through here. But that's the spirit of adventuring! Just the thought of it excites me!

C: 居然真的有隐藏房间？比我想象中还要经典……
E: Wait, there really is a hidden room? This place is even more classic than I had imagined it to be...

C: 不管怎么说，地宫大半部分都是由你独自完成探索的，这份荣耀也应当属于你。
E: Regardless, since you explored a majority of this hypogeum by yourself, the honor of uncovering its depths should also be yours.

C: 「小地兽」。
E: "Mini Dromas."

C: 要不你来起一个？
E: What would you name it?

C: 呜嗡嗡……（乌拉，乌拉~）
E: Wooooom... (Oola, oola~)

C: 那就跟我讲讲吧，灰宝。我会尽可能回答的。
E: Of course, Grayie. I'll tell you whatever I know.

C: 肌…肌什么？
E: Muscul... what now?

C: 别担心，你肯定行，不行也行。
E: Don't worry, you got this! And if you don't... well, you still got this!

C: 相信应该你已经知道，这头大地兽…并非生来就超凡脱俗。但它拥有无限的潜力。
E: As you probably already know, this dromas... wasn't born extraordinary, but it possesses limitless potential.

C: 呜嗡？（要签名吗？可我的爪子握不了笔哦？）
E: Grumph? (Want an autograph? But my paws can't hold a pen though?)

C: 原来大地兽是充气的……
E: Turns out dromases are basically balloons with legs...

C: 啊呀，阁下该不会是担心被大地兽看到什么秘密吧？别担心，它们不会往外说的，就算说了也没人听得懂。
E: Oh? Worried the dromas might see some little secrets? Don't worry, they won't tell anyone — and even if they did, nobody would understand them anyway.

C: 一天之内连续遭受两次打击，真是太爽了！人生就该充满惊喜！
E: Two hits in one day? Oh, just peachy! Life should be full of surprises like this!

C: 我家孩子真棒！
E: That's my kid!

C: 嗡，呜嗡！（我认真思考了一下这个设定，果然还是无法接受啊！）
E: Grumph, Grumphhh! (I gave this version of my birth some serious thought, and nope, still can't accept it!)

C: 孩啊，心意我领了…
E: Kid, I appreciate your kindness...

C: 噢，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大，我的驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大——
E: Oh, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas, my Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas——

C: 你的对手，便是你的反相。你若是正，它便是邪；你若是恶，它便是善。
E: Your opponent is your inverse. If you are righteous, they are wicked. Contrarily, if you are evil, they are good.

C: 是不是特别漂亮？
E: Isn't it just beautiful?

C: 是呀，这就是我说的，独一无二的至宝。
E: Why, of course. You're a one-of-a-kind treasure!

C: 我们的小店还没被收录进名单里，没有星级呢。
E: Our little place isn't even listed yet. So, no stars to speak of.

C: 我对这个名字倒是没什么意见，只可惜，村子里的大家没办法来迷境里用餐啊。
E: I've got no issue with that name. Just a shame no one from the village can actually come dine in the Maze.

C: 阿蝶！你也是来找小妖精们玩的吗？
E: Cas! You here to play with the little fairies too?

C: 既然菜品已经布置妥当，我就不客气了。
E: Now that the dishes are in place, I'll help myself.

C: （举手）
E: (Raises hand)

C: 我这里应有尽有，树上长的，地面上跑的，都能给你们弄来。不打算瞧瞧嘛？

C: 毫无疑问，缇宝、缇宁与缇安老师准备的菜品都是极其难得的美味，做出抉择相当困难。
E: There's no doubt that Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne each brought something amazing to the table. Choosing just one is not easy.

C: 等等呀。赛飞儿小姐，有兴趣来餐馆工作吗？
E: Wait! Miss Cipher, have you ever considered working at our restaurant?

C: 不大就不叫大地兽了。

C: 是呀，所以我们才会在这里相遇。

E: The Express brushed past a group of void song whales in the empty sky, and the floating song of the whales echoed for days within the Car. The Synesthesia Beacons manage to interpret a vague feeling of happiness from within and judge it to be a rustic form of blessing.

C:
那是何等壮举——
折戟的沙场，
男人为逝去的士兵掘墓，
徒手将千军埋葬。
E:
What a mighty feat it is —
In the aftermath of defeat,
The man digs graves for the deceased soldiers,
Burying thousands with his own hands.

C: 正如无人确信，\n逐火的英雄们，\n是如何将男人说服。
E: Just like how none can ascertain,\nHow the Flame-Chasing heroes\nConvinced this man.

C: 于王座之上， 男人沉吟—— 「没有什么值得再去逐猎，」 「朕已是旅途尽头的烈火。」
E: Atop the throne, The man mutters alone — "There's nothing else worthy of the hunt," "For I am the blazing fire at the journey's end."

C: 少女轻捻丝线，\n将孩童们的过去，\n在自己心中揉捻作弦。
E: The maiden pulls on her silken threads,\nWeaving in her heart,\nThe children's past into strings.

C:
避世独处催生了诸般技艺，
也令她的住处颇显阴森——

此处招待过寥寥数人，
飞贼和织者有幸成为其中之二。
E:
Many skills were born out of her seclusion,
But it painted her dwelling in a gloomy vision —

Only a select few have set foot in this mansion,
And the thief and the weaver were two such lucky persons.

C: 这是属于我的诗篇，\n我已写下最后一笔。」
E: This is the ode of my life,\nAnd I've already penned my last stroke."

C: 白发上的华泽令人瞩目，\n骄横的原主上门讨要。
E: The brilliance adorning her white hair drew all eyes,\nAnd its proud original owner arrived to stake their claim.

C: 身负贼星的命运，\n少女早已习惯行走阴影。
E: Bearing the fate of the Thief Star,\nThe girl was long used to walking in shadow.

C: 你也曾在树庭，咕咕嘟嘟…… 差点淹死。 「这个，就快点忘掉吧。」
E: You, too, tread in the Grove, gurgling... Almost drowning. "Just erase this from your mind quickly."

C: 「山之民…本不好战。你是何人？」
E: "The Mountain Dwellers... are not a warlike people. Who are you?"

C: 不久，听闻逐火军的锋镝指向大地，\n龙骑全军启程，\n只为拱卫造主。
E: Soon after, when word came that the Flame-Chasing Army targeted Earth,\nThe Dromas Riders set forth in full force,\nAll to protect their creator.

C: 但它这次没能得到回应，\n只有思念与痛苦的岁月…
E: But this time, they didn't receive a response,\nOnly long years of yearning and pain...

C:
王立于无机的王座前，
将权杖刺入帝皇无神的瞳孔。
天外尊神也将如泰坦纷陨，
她誓要袭取征服星海的殊荣。
E:
The monarch stood before the inorganic throne,
Driving the Scepter into the emperor's vacant gaze.
Even the gods beyond the sky shall crumble like the Titans,
As she swears to seize the glory of conquering the stars.

C: 忽听<color=#9e5738>琴声悠扬</color>——\n一位剑士孤身掀翻敌浪。
E: <color=#9e5738>Melodious chords of music</color> were suddenly heard —\nA single swordmaster had overcome the waves of enemies.

C:
深海是个静默的居所。
海列屈拉蜷膝自锁，
可怖的凶兽自她身侧游过，
却无一胆敢打扰她的悲梦。
E:
The deep sea became a silent place of dwelling.
Hugging her knees, Helektra locked herself in.
Savage and fearsome monsters swam past her,
But none dared to interrupt her tragic dream.

C: 他也顺应期许，\n愿成为完美的容器。
E: And for his part he embraced their expectations,\nBeing willing to become the perfect vessel.

C:
是啊，在报时的钟声敲响之前，
在裁决逐火的大会开始之前。

不要辜负难得好梦，
和眼泪般温热的水波。
E:
Yes, before the toll of the bell that announces the hour,
Before the meeting to judge the Flame-Chase begins,

Do not waste the rare good dreams,
Or the languid waves warm as tears.

C: 当然，还有{NICKNAME}，我把最珍贵的重逢，放在「昔涟」的故乡。
E: And of course, for {NICKNAME}, I hid our most precious reunion in Cyrene's homeland.

C: 「阁下是不懂规矩？幸而在下懂些剑法。」
E: "You seem unfamiliar with proper etiquette, sir? Fortunately, I know a thing or two about swordplay."

C: 「缇缇！」三个小小的信使发出了欢快的声音。
E: "Trity!" The three tiny messengers let out cheerful voices.

C: 看着房间里再度燃起火焰，阿格莱雅欣慰地点点头。「我会帮你们做好一切准备。也许，是时候前去拜访那位老朋友了……」
E: Seeing the fire rekindled in their eyes, Aglaea nodded with quiet satisfaction. "I'll help you prepare everything. Perhaps, it's time to visit an old friend..."

C: 是日，晴空万里，全体员工都站在店门口严阵以待，很快奥城上空出现一节列车。它如同一枚流星，滑翔了一会儿，精准地降落在黄金Aurum门口。
E: That day, under cloudless skies, the entire staff stood guard at the entrance. Soon, an express appeared in the skies above Okhema. Like a meteor, it glided for a moment before landing squarely in front of Grand Chrysos.

C: 将有机生命设置为初始变量，参考第一阶段的成果，进行的第<unbreak>50122</unbreak>至<unbreak>176199</unbreak>次循环。\n\n【逻辑：无机生命在出现有机特征后，方程出现显著进化。应采纳有机生命的优势，进行变量调整。】
E: Records of cycles <unbreak>50,122</unbreak> to <unbreak>176,199</unbreak>, conducted with organic life designated as the initial variable and based on insights from Phase One.\n\n[Logic: Once inorganic life began exhibiting organic traits, their equation showed significant evolution. Such advantages of organic lifeforms should be adopted to recalibrate the variables.]

C: 于漫长的演算中踏上「毁灭」，由权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>升格的绝灭大君。\n银河间的铁墓并非单一实体，而是权杖散布的「毁灭」方程式副本。\n「铁墓」这一代号由星际和平公司提出，后被来古士采用。
E: The Lord Ravager that stepped onto the Destruction in a long process of calculation and ascended from the scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>.\nThe Irontomb in the cosmos is not a single entity, but a copy of the Destruction equation diffused by the Scepter.\nThe Irontomb code name was proposed by the Interastral Peace Corporation and eventually used by Lygus.

C: 每个人都有自己的道路，而你已经在甜品制作方面展现出了你的天赋。相信你做出的选择，无论未来如何，只要始终坚持梦想，大步向前，必定能绽放出只属于你的光芒。
E: Everyone has their own unique path, and you have shown yours in the world of making desserts. Have faith in your choices and keep chasing your dreams, no matter what obstacles come your way. Stay true to your goals, take bold steps forward, and you'll blossom into something truly special.

C:
最近我对仙舟古国时代的染色方法产生了兴趣，正在做实验。因此擅自使用了你的冰箱，实在抱歉。

感谢你帮我取出了实验品。如果冷藏的时间再长一些，可能就会出现色差了。

冰箱里放了一些薄礼，以表谢意。
E:
Recently, I've become interested in the coloring methods of the Xianzhou Primeval Imperium Era, and I'm doing experiments on them. I apologize for using your refrigerator without asking you.

Thank you for taking out the experiments for me. If it had been refrigerated longer, there might have been a color difference.

I leave some small gifts in your refrigerator as thanks.

C:
瑟希斯是司掌理性、智慧与植物荣枯的泰坦，它执掌着生态、智慧和理性的权柄，人们称其为求知的隐士。

自然既是瑟希斯的庭院，也是它的书库，它允许人类在其中学习、休憩，毫不吝啬地将知识与智慧传授给懵懂无知的凡人。正是在它的指引下，城邦与文明才得以在翁法罗斯上兴起。

瑟希斯以一棵巨大圣树的形象降临世间，它所扎根之处，花草树木开始生长，并最终形成一片巨大的森林，而学者们便在它的身旁漫步、醒神和思辨，建立起求知的庭院。它也曾将一颗种子赠予刻法勒，栽种出名为智慧花园的林地，即使远离圣树，学者们也能在花园里求取神明的灵智。

瑟希斯的力量遍入翁法罗斯的每一株植物、每一条枝蔓、每一片林叶中，依照与吉奥里亚的誓约，它调和生命，促成花草与土壤达成完美的平衡。受它的赐福，植物时而也会获得与人辩论的理性。这也警示人们勿要傲慢，因那些真正的智者，往往在你的身旁缄默不语。
E:
Cerces is the master of wisdom, intellect, and vegetation. They wield authority over ecologies, knowledge, and rationality, and people refer to them as the hermit in search of wisdom.

Nature is Cerces' courtyard and also their library. They allow people to study and rest there, and convey their knowledge to the ignorant tirelessly and generously. It is under their guidance that civilization and cities began in Amphoreus.

Cerces graces the world in the form of a grand and holy tree. Where they take root, vegetation spouts to become a massive forest. And here, scholars walk by their side, enlightened in reason and thinking in debate, creating courts in search of new learning. They also gifted a seed to Kephale, allowing it to become the Garden of Wisdom, and allowing scholars to seek the Titan's wisdom even if they stand far from the holy tree.

Cerces's power infuses every last plant in Amphoreus, from branches and vines to the very leaves themselves. In accordance with the pact they struck with Georios, they mediate life, allowing the greenery and soil to be in perfect balance. Upon accepting their blessing, plants can also gain the rationality to debate humans. This warns people to remain humble, for the truly wise might be the quiet ones around you.

E: You can evaluate whether the realm has been activated by looking out for <color=#f29e38ff>the presence of a floating ball of light</color> near the Trailblazer. The realm will dissipate when you are a certain distance away from the shrine, and the boost for your Rewind powers will also disappear.

C: 这趟翁法罗斯之旅，我们都进步很大，一比一平！哎，不对，他其实比我更早迈出那一步，那…算他小胜！
E: We both made huge progress on this Amphoreus adventure, I'd say it's a draw! Hmm... wait. He made that progress way before I did, so... Okay okay, he wins... but just by a hair!

E: Don't hesitate.

E: You can still walk away.

E: Hi, Astral Expressers... Well, you caught me.

C: 该动手啦。
E: Time to move.

E: Hey Kafka, can I go off-script this time?

C: 要躲开哟。
E: Look out~

C: 我的时间都浪费了！
E: How am I gonna get that time back!

C: 得以拜谒星神的原因？因为我是黑塔啊。
E: Why do I get to visit an Aeon? I'm Herta, that's why.

C: 别来惹我。
E: Don't mess with me.

C: 有两下子。
E: Not bad.

C: 掌控时机。
E: Seize the initiative.

C: 我会小心的。
E: I'll be more careful.

C: 跟着我，有肉吃！
E: Follow Hook if you wanna win!

C: 真拿你没办法~
E: Hmph, what would you do without Hook?

C: 睡袋、防潮垫…都没问题。是时候出发了。
E: Hm... Sleeping bag, moisture resistant sleeping mat... All ready. It's time to go.

C: 家家都有本难念的经，这点道理我懂。可要是人人都为自己的原因欠债不还，整个系统就会崩溃——真到了那个时候，一个人的家长里短就会变成全世界的苦衷。
E: Every family has its problems, this I understand. But if everyone were to stop repaying their debts, the whole system would collapse... If that time comes, what was once thought of as a trivial matter would become a hardship for the world.

C: 清算时间到啦！
E: Liquidation!

C: 连本带息，还债！
E: Don't forget the interest!

C: 天舶司的大人物，从前线退下来还得不了清闲，这官不好当啊。
E: She's a big shot from the Sky-Faring Commission who can't rest even after retiring from the front lines. It's hard being a powerful official.

C: 财运亨通~
E: We're in the money~

C: 白露大人手小小的，手下功夫可了不得…每趟回「罗浮」，小女子都要上她那儿躺一躺，按一按骨头。
E: Lady Bailu has small hands but is very skilled... I have to go lie down and have a massage with her every time I return to the Luofu.

C: 哎呀，都这个时辰了，尾巴也耷拉下来了。对不住，小女子先告退了……
E: Ahh, the time is late, and even my tail is falling down. My apologies, I will be excusing myself...

C: 诶，好运气呀~
E: Quite a stroke of luck~

C: 将军不仅擅长洞察人心，还深谙「藏」和「露」的艺术，当他「露」出些什么时，便要小心了。
E: Not only is the general an expert in perceiving people's intentions, but he is also a master of the arts of concealment and showmanship. When he decides to "show" something, it's time to be careful.

C: 花朵自种子长成，需要几分时间，几分耐心。
E: It takes time and patience for a seed to grow.

C: 可惜，不死之人所求的葬仪，我无法替你实现。
E: Shame. I can't give you the burial that you seek.

C: 随我冲阵。
E: Follow my charge.

C: 其势…已成！
E: The fight... is set!

C: 看来剑还不够快。
E: This sword needs sharpening.

C: 趁它不注意，冲！
E: Quick, let's make a sneak attack!

C: 哼，迄今为止，景元已答应举荐我接任将军一百二十二次。其中一百二十一次是在我出谋献策后，虚应故事地说了声「嗯」。最后那一次，我见他颇有韵律地点了点头，竟是在打瞌睡……
E: Hmph, as it stands, Jing Yuan has promised to nominate me to the generalship on <unbreak>122</unbreak> separate occasions. For <unbreak>121</unbreak> of them, I made my case and he replied with a nonchalant "mm-hmm." The one other time, I spoke at length on my reasoning and watched him gradually fall asleep...

C: 一饮一啄，莫非前定。
E: Isn't every morsel, every drop predestined?

C: 虽然没和将军大人聊过天，我倒是和他那个侍卫打过交道。当时他问我是不是「用剑之人」，我呀，当场就给他表演了一个吞剑！
E: I've never spoken to the general, but I did meet his retainer once. He asked me if I was a "woman of the sword," so you know what I did? I did a sword-swallowing performance right in front of him!

C: 驭空司舵…每每见我，总说自己已经放下过往了，但其实还是放不下吧。
E: Helm Master Yukong... She says she lets everything go everytime she sees me, but I don't think she has.

C: 执意留着那柄残剑，是不想忘记过去吗…「刃」？
E: That broken sword... You don't want to let go of the past, do you, Blade?

C: 将岁阳封印在藿藿身体里的法子，罗浮上虽不多见，其他仙舟上可不少…详细的，我不方便多说。
E: The technique for sealing a heliobus inside Huohuo's tail, though seldom seen on the Luofu, is not so uncommon on other Xianzhou ships... though I really shouldn't divulge too many details.

C: 下一道命令是什么？
E: What is the next order?

C: 还没结呢。
E: It ain't over yet.

C: 朋友们，尽情享用吧！
E: My friends, indulge yourselves!

C: 明智的判断。
E: The consequence of wise deliberation.

C: 在他的领域内，螺丝咕姆正试图建立新的法则，比起天才，我更愿意称呼这样的人为——君王。
E: In his field, Screwllum is trying to establish new laws. I prefer to call such a person a monarch, rather than a genius.

C: 让我来考考你。
E: Let's test your knowledge.

C: 愚不可及！
E: You fool!

C: 再加把劲呢？
E: Let's kick it up a notch.

C: 继续吧，否则如何得到解答？
E: Continue, or remain in the dark...

C: 静默的水面下…便是无尽深渊。
E: Beneath the silent waters lies an endless abyss.

C: 梦原本没有意义，赋予其意义的是生命的底色。但如果色彩是一片「虚无」…梦也只剩下黑白的空壳。
E: Dreams, in essence, are meaningless. Their purpose is painted by the backdrop of life. Yet, if that backdrop is "emptiness"... then dreams are reduced to colorless, hollow shells.

C: 玉石可用来典当，但不是所有东西都需要用来交换——除了「活下去」外，生命中同样也有其他我不愿放弃的，更高价值的东西。
E: Jade stone can be pawned off, but not everything can be used in an exchange. Outside of life itself, there are more valuable things that I don't want to give up.

C: 抱歉，我并非有意隐瞒…在「剧本」的桎梏下，我必须完成「萨姆」的使命。除此之外…是我的私心，我希望以「流萤」的身份认识这个世界。
E: I'm sorry, I didn't intend to hide this... I have to fulfill Sam's mission according to the script. That aside... there are my personal motives: I wish to get to know this world as Firefly.

C: 绝死而能逢生。
E: Facing certain death, yet finding new life.

C: 安息之日。
E: A day of peaceful repose.

C: 世界是公平的，他想得到多少，就要做好失去多少的准备。
E: The world is fair. He must be prepared to lose however much he desires to gain.

C: 不守规矩呀。
E: Bending the rules, are we?

C: 忍侠不可贪慕财物…但仍需傍身之财。
E: A ninja must not lust for wealth... but they still need some possessions.

C: 这就结束了？这就满足了？
E: This is it? You don't want anything else?

C: 每次和小夏见面，他都要说一些奇怪的话，把缇宝的脑袋都听大了…可是，要是他不说，反而还有点不习惯……
E: Naxy talks about so much weird stuff every time I see him. His words make my head spin... But if he doesn't talk like that, then it kinda feels odd...

C: 是可靠的丹恒！*我们*知道，你一定会来的！
E: It's the reliable Dan Heng! We knew you'd come!

C: 浑身破绽！
E: Covered in flaws!

C: 这种小机关就分分钟的事…看不起多洛斯人？
E: I can solve these party tricks in under a minute... Don't underestimate the people of Dolos!

C: 该游向下一片海洋了。
E: It's time to swim towards the next sea.

C: 我说过不下万次：娇小的身躯从不意味着任命运摆布的脆弱…若还有人胆敢质疑，摇光爵便是又一个明证。
E: I've said it at least a thousand times: Just because someone's short doesn't mean they're weak-willed and can be easily manipulated by fate. For those who still dare to refute that statement, Dux Lucens is even more proof.

C: 金龙爵，展示你的守护之道吧。
E: Show me your way of protection, Dux Draconum.

C: 使命…仍未完成……
E: My duty... isn't over.

C: 三月，来拍张合影吧？三、二、一…嘿♪
E: Let's take a group photo, March! Three, two, one... cheese ♪

C: 是我…输了……
E: So this is... defeat...

C: 我们，什么都做得到~
E: We can do it all~

C: 不长记性……
E: You just don't learn...

C:
・列车前往匹诺康尼，却在跃迁时发生了意外震荡。
・你在匹诺康尼的「白日梦酒店」办理入住，并在这里结识了橡木家系的家主星期日，他的妹妹银河歌星知更鸟，以及服务生米沙；星际和平公司的砂金。
・你在自己的房间遇到了自称巡海游侠的黄泉——在砂金迫使你与他进行交易时，是迷路至此的黄泉为你解困。
・通过入梦池，你准备进入梦境世界，途中曾进入过梦境的中转站「思绪长廊」，并再一次与米沙相遇。
E:
・ The Express trip to Penacony experienced an unexpected reverberation during warp jump.
・ You checked in at "The Reverie Hotel" in Penacony, and met Sunday, the head of the Oak Family, his sister Robin, the cosmic songstress, the server Misha, as well as Aventurine from the IPC.
・ In your room, you encountered Acheron, a self-proclaimed Galaxy Ranger. When Aventurine forced you into a deal, it was the lost Acheron who helped you out of trouble.
・ Through the Dreampool, you prepared to enter the dreamscape. Along the way, you visited the dreamscape waystation "Gallery of Thoughts" and met Misha once again.

C: ・黄泉出现在你的预知梦中，以一次斩击给出了自己的提示。
E: ・ Acheron appeared in your prophetic dream, giving a hint through one slash.

C: 开拓者：探索流梦礁
E: Trailblazer: Exploring Dreamflux Reef

C: 又为何苛求真实
E: Why press so hard for the truth?

C: 家族在匹诺康尼分家的真正领导者。肉身已然毁灭，而神识遍入美梦。\n借助「星核」，他殉道于秩序，使陨落的星神「太一」短暂地复归于世。
E: The true leader of the Penaconian branch of The Family. Though his physical form was destroyed, his soul essence permeates the sweet dream.\nUsing the Stellaron, he martyred himself to Order, briefly bringing the fallen Aeon Ena back into existence.

C: 【流萤】的记忆正在逐渐浮现……
E: Firefly's memories are slowly emerging...

C: 敌方目标受到攻击后，若【<u>和音</u>】层数大于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层，且生命值百分比小于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，额外受到等同于当前生命值的真实伤害，每个敌方目标最多触发1次该效果。对精英敌人触发该效果时，为我方全体【<u>罐中脑</u>】充能<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: When an enemy target is attacked, if the "<u>Harmonize</u>" stacks exceed <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and their HP percentage is below <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, they additionally take True DMG equal to their current HP. This effect can only trigger once per enemy target. When triggered on Elite Enemies, all allies' "<u>Brain in a Vat</u>" gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> Charge.

C: 问你还好不好
E: Asking if you were okay

C: 什么时候可以再见面？
E: When might we be able to meet again?

C: 成为毁灭「记忆」的绝灭大君，也是一个不错的选择
E: Becoming the Lord Ravager to destroy Remembrance isn't such a bad choice

C: 蚀心影魔•浑流奔涌的腐坏者
E: Corrupting Shadowfiend: Torrential Rotbringer

C: 进入【基因复制】状态后，每当自身施放攻击，会根据剩余【幼蛰虫】的数量额外造成少量火属性伤害。每当【幼蛰虫】施放攻击后，为【示死祸源：深魇蝗灾】附加一层【死灭本能】，当【死灭本能】叠加到一定层数时，【示死祸源：深魇蝗灾】将立即行动，施放【荒潮到临，蝗灾示死】并清除所有【死灭本能】层数。【幼蛰虫】将优先攻击处于【天敌】状态的我方角色。
E: After entering the "Gene Duplication" state, whenever this unit uses an attack, it additionally deals minor Fire DMG based on the number of "Juvenile Sting" remaining. When any "Juvenile Sting" uses an attack, "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare" gains a stack of "Mortal Instinct." When "Mortal Instinct" reaches a certain number of stacks, "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare" will immediately take action, uses "Primordial Tide, Swarm of Death" and clear all "Mortal Instinct" stacks. "Juvenile Sting" will prioritize attacking ally characters in the "Nemesis" state.

C: 当目标生命值低于0时，会解除其弱点击破状态并获得【弱点无效】效果。
E: When the target's HP is below 0, dispels their Weakness Break state and grants the "Weakness Protected" effect to them.

C: 进入【共舞的渴望】状态，每次行动时施放【波涛与你相拥】。若未处于【<u>在毁灭中狂欢</u>】状态，则使<u>能够进入【在毁灭中狂欢】状态的敌方单位</u>进入【<u>在毁灭中狂欢</u>】状态，使其受到的部分伤害以持续伤害形式在一定回合内扣除。\n行动序列上出现【在毁灭中狂欢】倒计时，倒计时回合开始时所有敌方单位解除【<u>在毁灭中狂欢</u>】状态。
E: Enters "Yearning for a Shared Dance" state. Uses "Embrace From the Waves" in every action. If not in "<u>Revel in Destruction</u>" state, <u>friendly units that can enter the "Revel in Destruction" state</u> will enter the "<u>Revel in Destruction</u>" state. This causes some DMG taken to be received in the form of DoT over a certain number of turns.\nA "Revel in Destruction" countdown appears in the Action Order. When the countdown turn begins, all friendly units will have their "<u>Revel in Destruction</u>" state dispelled.

C: 绝命死斗
E: Desperate Deathmatch

C: 同享罪血
E: Hemotort Entrustment

C: 罪血钳刑
E: Hemotort Clamps

C: 正阳狮鹫（错误）
E: Noontide Gryphon (Bug)

C: 黑天鹅来到黄泉房间探查信息，在此与大丽花遭遇。黑天鹅揭露大丽花的「焚化工」身份，两人似乎早已相熟。
E: Black Swan came to Acheron's room to investigate for information, and she encountered The Dahlia. She exposed The Dahlia's identity as a Cremator. It seemed these two had known each other for quite some time.

C: 大丽花完成她的任务，与你道别。毁灭绝非壮烈的一瞬，命运与记忆亦然。<color=#ff3a3e>生命因何而沉睡？你终将找到，属于你自己的答案。</color>
E: The Dahlia had completed her mission and bid you farewell. Destruction was not just a single glorious moment, and the same applied to destiny and memories. <color=#ff3a3e>Why does life slumber? You will eventually find your own answer.</color>

C: 以黑天鹅将你唤醒作为分界，由于太一之梦的存在，你此后的记忆，都不能再以从前的视角看待。\n为你的记忆，亲自写下开场白吧。
E: Being woken up by Black Swan was a watershed moment. Due to the existence of Ena's Dream, your memories from that point onward can no longer be viewed from the same perspective as before.\nWrite a prologue for your memories.

C: 凝结的心
E: Condensed Heart

C: 获得#2宇宙碎片。
E: Obtain #2 Cosmic Fragments.

C: 绿奇迹
E: Green Miracle

C: 周期演算：君往何方
E: Cyclical Extrapolation: Where Are You Heading

C: 战技
E: Skill

C: 星际漫游寻呼机
E: Interstellar Roaming Pager

C: 流萤：万火归一
E: Firefly: Unity of Flame

C: 在黑天鹅的帮助下，你从星期日编织的幻觉中醒来，然而，要想终结眼前的长夜，一个人的力量远远不够。
E: With Black Swan's help, you woke up from the illusion woven by Sunday. However, one person's strength alone is far from enough to end the Evernight before you.

C: 完成定级赛
E: Complete placement matches

C: 我也不知内情，不过，她告诉我：如果见到你，提醒你看看短信。
E: I don't know the details either, but she told me that if I see you, I should remind you to check your messages.

C: 没跑了，难怪报废的入梦池不值钱。没有家族保护，普通人贸然来到这里，可有够受的了。
E: Figures. No wonder a scrapped Dreampool isn't worth a dime. Without the Family's protection, any regular visitor here is just begging for trouble.

C: 该入场的人都齐了。不是我扫兴，但提醒一句……
E: Everyone who needs to be here is here. Not to be a buzzkill, but just a reminder...

C: 我想，我已经有答案了。
E: I think I've got my answer now.

C: 毕竟在朝露公馆，我亲眼看见了那副*惨状*。我做不到让你独自硬撑。
E: After all, I witnessed that horrific scene at the Dewlight Pavilion with my own eyes. I can't let you bear this burden alone.

C: 所以，说说吧，你想从我这里…拿走什么？
E: So, tell me... what exactly do you want to take from me?

C: 任何人都会犯下的错误——总为秘密设下重重警戒，反倒因此露出破绽。
E: A mistake anyone could make... Setting up layer upon layer of security around a secret only ends up exposing its flaws.

C: 要来试试吗，多积攒些面对迷因的经验？
E: Why don't we give it a shot, and build up some experience dealing with memes?

C: 可从刚才开始，我就什么都没看到……
E: But I haven't seen anything since just now...

C: 凭借忆者的身份，你究竟蒙骗了她们多久？
E: Hiding behind the title of a Memokeeper... Tell me, how long have you been lying to them?
...Catch?

C: 作为梦主的盟友时，我也协助他监视梦境，在{RUBY_B#流萤}一名猎手{RUBY_E#}潜入匹诺康尼时，借机伪装成她的同伴，将她困在了忆域当中。
E: As an ally of the Dreammaster, I also helped monitor the dreamscape, and when {RUBY_B#Firefly}a hunter{RUBY_E#} infiltrated Penacony, I seized the chance to pose as her companion and trapped her in the Memory Zone.

C: 第一条律令，他作为临别赠礼，施予知更鸟，点拨她走上「同谐」。
E: The First Law... As his parting gift, he bestowed it upon Robin, guiding her onto the Harmony.

C: 如你所见，他以身殉道，将全数力量留在十二时刻，如同自行转动的指针，推动着他的计划。
E: As you can see, he became a martyr, leaving all his power in the Twelve Hours, like a self-turning hand of time, driving his plans forward.

C: 康士坦丝究竟是什么人？
E: Who exactly is Constance?

C: 便教回首千次，来路亦已不复，唯余「徒然」的悲叹。
E: Even if you look back a thousand times, the path you've taken can't be retraced, leaving only sighs of "futility."

C: 流萤怎么样了？
E: What happened to Firefly?

C: 我敢打赌，就算我不反抗，你也……
E: I bet that even if I don't resist, you'd still...

C: 不可能没有弱点吧？
E: He's got to have a weakness, right?

C: 「秩序」是希佩的一重面相，此刻，「同谐」却坐视「太一」重诞，没有更进一步的干涉——这其中必然有着极深的隐情。
E: The Order is one of Xipe's aspects, yet the Harmony stands idle at this moment as Ena is being reborn, without any further intervention.... There must be some deeper reason behind this.

C: …怎么，紧张了？也是，第一次登上这么隆重的舞台，就该紧张些。
E: ...You feeling nervous? I know the feeling. You should feel nervous when going up on such a big stage for the first time.

C: …为什么这样认为？
E: ...Why do you think that?

C: 我至今为止的经历，以后，还是会让我在面对危险时，选择踏入其中。
E: All my experiences so far will still make me choose to step into danger when I face it in the future.

C: {NICKNAME}，这将是艰苦的一程，你还是愿意再次，再次走上起点吗？
E: This will be a tough journey, {NICKNAME}. Are you still willing to return to the starting point once again?

C: 我永远会相信明天。
E: I will always believe in tomorrow.

C: 即便如此，米哈伊尔也相信着明天。
E: Even so, Mikhail still believed in tomorrow.

C: 我以完美无缺的乐章号令——再创乐园！
E: With this perfect melody I command — recreate paradise anew!

C: 「梦想之地」匹诺康尼
E: Penacony, Land of the Dreams

C: 你现在想去哪里？
E: Where do you want to go now?

C: 当然是去看烟花，据说，匹诺康尼有一艘很大的飞艇，在那里看到的烟花，非常值得打卡。
E: To see the fireworks, of course. I heard there's this huge airship in Penacony where you can get an absolutely photo-worthy view of the fireworks.

C: 所以你说，你会给我一个，比任何结局都美好的白日梦。
E: That's why you told me that you'll give me a daydream more beautiful than any ending could ever be.

C: 苦难与失败磨平了你的棱角，灾厄与纷争挫败了你的锐气。你接过老者手中的火漆，一缕微光从洞穴深处亮起，仿佛燃烧的火焰。
E: Hardship and failure have worn down your edges, while calamity and strife have crushed your spirit. As you take the Sealing Wax from the elder's hand, a faint glow emerges from deep within the cave, like a burning flame.

C: 身为水手，你深知水体的危险，好在你的船也在那场海难中「死」掉了。你招呼水手们捡拾散落的甲板碎片，重新拼凑出船体的形状。
E: As a sailor, you know all too well the dangers of water, but thankfully your ship "died" along with you in that shipwreck. You call out to your fellow sailors to gather the scattered deck pieces, piecing the ship back in shape together.

C: 奇兽爵，令对手臣服于我吧。
E: Dux Chimera, make our opponent submit to me.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你愿意读读卷轴上的故事吗？然后告诉乌拉尼娅，它们有没有被正确地书写下来，好不好？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, will you read the stories on the scroll? Then tell Urania if they were written down correctly, please?

C: 当行动条上的<color=#f29e38ff>【负载清算】行动时</color>，将进行生命值<color=#f29e38ff>结算</color>，当前生命值为0以下的单位会受到致命伤害，可通过<color=#f29e38ff>治疗</color>来避免我方单位生命值为0以下。本关敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>生命值较低，但造成伤害较高</color>，推荐选择<color=#f29e38ff>多名</color>擅长护盾和治疗的角色。
E: When <color=#f29e38ff>"Overload Settlement" on the action bar takes action</color>, HP <color=#f29e38ff>calculation</color> will be performed. Units with HP below 0 will receive fatal damage. Prevent ally units' "HP Count" from reaching below 0 by <color=#f29e38ff>healing</color>. In this stage, enemy targets have <color=#f29e38ff>lower HP, but deal higher DMG</color>. It is recommended to select <color=#f29e38ff>multiple</color> characters who excel at shielding and healing.

C: 任何时候，你都可以在这里确认记忆中所有经历的时间点。
E: You can check all the timestamps of your experiences in the memories here at any time.

C: 挑战前可查看每个关卡的<color=#f29e38ff>特殊机制</color>详情。
E: Before the challenge, you can check the details of each stage's <color=#f29e38ff>special mechanism</color>.

C: 切换
E: Switch

C: 你的记忆…还真是棘手呢，那不妨从我敞开心胸开始——我的名字是康士坦丝，那些跪倒于我裙摆下的人称我为「大丽花」。别怕，随我来吧，在这场只属于你我的双人舞中，你会知道，过去如何被焚烧，未来又如何被埋葬……
E: Your memories... are quite thorny. So, why don't we start with me laying my thoughts bare...? My name is Constance, and those who have fallen to my charms call me "The Dahlia." Don't be afraid. Come with me. In this duet belonging only to the two of us, you will learn how the past is being cremated and how the future is being buried...
